核心方向 本周总览 交叉研究 磁性/铁电 AI专题 期刊分布
🎯

本周核心方向（ML × ferro / 凝聚态）

5 篇

新材料方面，微调CHGNet结合位点替换工作流从QMOF库中筛选磁性MOF，突破有机材料在数据库中代表性不足的瓶颈；AlScN/AlN多层膜中观测到邻近铁电性，未掺杂AlN层厚达500 nm仍可完全翻转，源于高密勒指数畴壁的低势垒迁移。新方法上，TAS-AI将自主中子谱学解耦为探测-推断-精修三阶段，物理不可知阶段先定位信号，物理知情阶段闭环判别哈密顿量，J1-J2模型<10次测量即获AIC证据比>100；广播射频信号通过频率选择性涡旋核极性翻转实现11个磁隧道结链的远程权重编程，无需单独访问线。新现象中，双层h-BN的AB堆垛在5 ps内完成相干单畴刚性滑移翻转，深度学习势（微调MACE+等变图卷积）结合态约束高斯卷积背景扣除分离本征极化，再现洁净滞回线；AlScN中Sc掺杂剂双重作用——稳定高指数畴壁促进形核、同时引入钉扎阻碍运动，而相邻AlN层无钉扎使畴壁深入传播。

  1. 01
    深度学习分子动力学揭示双层六方氮化硼的超快滑移铁电翻转
    Ultrafast Sliding Ferroelectric Switching in Bilayer Hexagonal Boron Nitride Revealed by Deep Learning Molecular Dynamics
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作构建了融合微调MACE机器学习势与等变图卷积神经网络的耦合原子模拟框架，实现了AB堆垛双层h-BN在电场作用下的大规模非平衡分子动力学模拟。通过实空间路径积分极化形式结合态约束高斯卷积背景扣除，成功分离本征自发极化；模拟揭示5 ps内完成的相干单畴刚性滑移是一种物理可行的超快翻转机制，再现了与实验定性一致的洁净铁电滞回线。

    📐 方法要点：微调MACE机器学习势耦合等变图卷积网络，结合实空间路径积分极化与态约束高斯卷积背景扣除

    🔗 相关工作关联：滑移铁电翻转动力学此前缺乏大规模非平衡模拟，实验观测的滞回线微观机制不明

    💡 对你方向的启示：5 ps相干单畴刚性滑移为超快铁电器件提供具体微观路径，深度学习势框架可推广至其他二维铁电体

    阅读原文 ↗
  2. 02
    Accelerating Quantum Materials Characterization: Hybrid Active Learning for Autonomous Spin Wave Spectroscopy
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：arXiv:2604.23821v1 公告类型：新 摘要：自主中子谱学必须解决三个不同的任务：探测（信号在哪里？）、推断（哪个哈密顿量支配它？）和精修（参数是什么？）。没有单一控制器能同等出色地解决所有三个任务。我们提出TAS-AI，一种用于自主三轴自旋波谱学的混合式物理不可知-物理知情框架，明确分离这些任务。在盲重建基准测试中，物理不可知方法（如随机采样、粗网格和高斯过程映射器）比物理知情规划更可靠地达到全局误差阈值，且测量次数更少，支持"发现与推断是不同任务、需要不同控制器"这一论断。一旦信号结构被定位，物理知情阶段即执行闭环哈密顿量判别和参数精修：在最近邻-only与J1-J2哈密顿量的受控方格晶格测试中，TAS-AI在少于10次测量内即达到决定性的AIC导出证据比（>100），而运动感知调度在固定测量预算下将挂钟时间削减32%。我们还识别了后验加权设计的一种失效模式——算法短视，即规划器过度精修当前领先模型，同时欠采样低强度证伪探针。受限证伪通道大幅缩减执着于错误模型的时间，并加速正确模型选择，且无需修改贝叶斯推断引擎。在受控双模型消融实验中，确定性前二最大分歧规则和基于LLM的审计委员会均在相同约束下实现这一增益。我们利用高保真数字孪生在硅中演示完整工作流，并提供开源Python实现。

    📐 方法要点：混合物理不可知-物理知情框架TAS-AI，分阶段解耦探测、推断与精修任务

    🔗 相关工作关联：传统自主谱学用单一控制器处理全链条，GP映射等黑箱方法缺乏任务针对性

    💡 对你方向的启示：任务解耦策略可将运动感知调度的挂钟时间削减32%，为自动化中子散射设施提供架构范式

    阅读原文 ↗
  3. 03
    Remotely programming the weights of a spintronic neural network by a radiofrequency broadcast signal
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：arXiv:2604.24561v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：在不牺牲可扩展性的前提下选择性编程大量非易失性突触权重是存内计算的一项关键挑战。在此，我们展示了通过共享带状线施加的广播射频信号，对串联连接的11个基于涡旋的磁隧道结链进行突触权重的远程编程。该编程依赖于涡旋核极性的频率选择性翻转，因此不需要单独的访问线或选择器器件。通过重新配置这些链的二进制状态，我们重塑了它们对频分复用射频输入执行的加权和。利用由两条此类链组成的22突触网络，我们将同一硬件远程重新配置为执行两项不同任务：手写数字分类和无人机射频特征识别。数字优化配置在手写数字上达到94.91 ± 0.26%的准确率，但在无人机射频特征上仅为13.17 ± 0.47%；而无人机优化配置在无人机上达到97.33 ± 0.62%，但在数字上仅为47.59 ± 1.5%。广播射频编程 thus 为快速可重构的自旋电子神经形态硬件提供了一条紧凑且可扩展的途径。

    📐 方法要点：共享带状线广播射频信号，利用涡旋核极性频率选择性翻转实现无选择器编程

    🔗 相关工作关联：自旋电子神经形态阵列的突触权重编程通常需单独访问线，可扩展性受限

    💡 对你方向的启示：22突触网络可远程重构执行不同任务，但配置优化呈任务特异性，需多目标优化缓解

    阅读原文 ↗
  4. 04
    磁性金属-有机框架的生成
    Generation of magnetic metal-organic frameworks
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：该工作利用有机材料数据库（OMDB）中超过15,000个单点第一性原理计算构建训练集，对CHGNet进行微调以获得机器学习原子间势。结合位点替换工作流，从QMOF数据库的结构原型中筛选新型高磁性金属-有机框架（MOFs），以应对有机材料在现有材料数据库与基础模型训练集中代表性不足的挑战。

    📐 方法要点：基于OMDB超15,000个DFT单点微调CHGNet，构建位点替换工作流筛选磁性MOF

    🔗 相关工作关联：有机材料在MatBench等基准及基础模型训练集中严重欠代表，磁性MOF预测精度不足

    💡 对你方向的启示：为高通量发现磁有序多孔材料提供可扩展方案，拓展至催化分离等功能磁性框架设计

    阅读原文 ↗
  5. 05
    Proximity Ferroelectricity Driven by Mobile High-Miller-Index Domain Walls
    🎯 核心📖 arXiv

    📄 摘要：arXiv:2604.25343v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 纤锌矿铁电体如掺钪氮化铝(AlScN)因其与半导体工艺的兼容性及强自发极化，在下一代存储器领域颇具应用前景。这类材料的铁电翻转通常归因于掺杂引起的体相翻转势垒软化。然而，近期关于邻近铁电性的报道——即AlN/AlScN多层膜中厚度达500 nm的未掺杂AlN层可实现完全翻转——对这一观点提出了挑战。本研究揭示了一种由高密勒指数畴壁介导的替代翻转机制，该机制因其复杂的几何构型和推测的不稳定性而长期被忽视。通过第一性原理计算和机器学习分子动力学模拟，我们表明这些畴壁一旦形核，便以极低的势垒迁移。Sc掺杂剂发挥双重作用：一方面稳定高指数畴壁从而促进形核，另一方面引入钉扎效应阻碍畴壁运动。在多层膜中，我们的模拟证实AlScN中产生的可动畴壁能够深入传播至相邻AlN层，并在其中无掺杂钉扎地轻松移动，从而实现厚未掺杂层的低场翻转。这一微观"分而治之"机制破解了邻近铁电性之谜，并凸显高指数界面作为调控铁电翻转的尚未充分探索的杠杆。

    📐 方法要点：第一性原理计算与机器学习分子动力学揭示高密勒指数畴壁的低势垒迁移机制

    🔗 相关工作关联：AlN/AlScN邻近铁电性曾被归因于未知机制，高指数畴壁因几何复杂长期被忽视

    💡 对你方向的启示：Sc掺杂的双重角色（形核促进vs运动钉扎）为调控翻转场与矫顽力提供新自由度，指导HfO2等掺杂铁电体设计

    阅读原文 ↗
01

本周总览#

先把握一周的主线，再进入交叉重点与专题全文速览。

整体概览

本周304篇文献中，铁电/磁性153篇、AI/ML 159篇。铁电领域聚焦滑移铁电、极性拓扑结构及畴工程；磁性方面交错磁性（altermagnetism）研究持续升温，涵盖输运、超导耦合及量子几何效应；AI/ML在材料模拟中加速分子动力学、晶体结构预测及量子多体计算，万亿原子级模拟实现突破。Nature正刊报道菱方石墨烯跨维度反常霍尔效应及块体极性涡旋晶体。

趋势观察

交错磁性（altermagnetism）研究全面爆发，涵盖输运、超导、量子几何、拓扑及器件应用，实验验证与理论预言并进；滑移铁电与极性拓扑结构成为低维材料热点，畴工程与超快动力学受关注；AI驱动材料模拟向更大尺度（万亿原子）、更高精度（量子多体）和自主实验（智能体框架）迈进，神经算子与物理信息方法加速多尺度耦合；量子磁性前沿聚焦自旋超固体、Kitaev物理及莫尔关联电子态的调控与表征。

后续展望

跨维度电子态与自发拓扑铁电相的发现拓展了凝聚态研究维度；AI与自主实验的深度融合将重塑材料发现范式，但变分偏置等基础方法论问题需警惕；交错磁性与非常规超导的交叉、以及拓扑量子计算的磁性平台构建，将是下一阶段关键方向。

02

交叉研究#

优先覆盖 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料的直接交叉工作。

01

深度学习分子动力学揭示双层六方氮化硼的超快滑移铁电翻转#

Ultrafast Sliding Ferroelectric Switching in Bilayer Hexagonal Boron Nitride Revealed by Deep Learning Molecular Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Yinan Wang, Poyen Chen, Teruyasu Mizoguchi📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究通过融合微调MACE势与等变图神经网络的深度学习框架，突破了传统分子动力学模拟尺度与精度的瓶颈，首次在原子尺度揭示了双层h-BN中超快相干滑移铁电翻转的物理图像，为二维铁电材料的高速度、低功耗存
该工作构建了融合微调MACE机器学习势与等变图卷积神经网络的耦合原子模拟框架，实现了AB堆垛双层h-BN在电场作用下的大规模非平衡分子动力学模拟。通过实空间路径积分极化形式结合态约束高斯卷积背景扣除，成功分离本征自发极化；模拟揭示5 ps内完成的相干单畴刚性滑移是一种物理可行的超快翻转机制，再现了与实验定性一致的洁净铁电滞回线。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作构建了融合微调MACE机器学习势与等变图卷积神经网络的耦合原子模拟框架，实现了AB堆垛双层h-BN在电场作用下的大规模非平衡分子动力学模拟。通过实空间路径积分极化形式结合态约束高斯卷积背景扣除，成功分离本征自发极化；模拟揭示5 ps内完成的相干单畴刚性滑移是一种物理可行的超快翻转机制，再现了与实验定性一致的洁净铁电滞回线。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27342v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sliding ferroelectricity in bilayer hexagonal boron nitride (h-BN) offers compelling prospects for next-generation non-volatile memory, yet the atomistic dynamics of electric-field-driven polarization switching remain poorly understood. Here, we present a fully data-driven, coupled atomistic framework that integrates a fine-tuned MACE machine learning potential (MLP) with an equivariant graph convolutional neural network (EGCNN) for real-time Born effective charge (BEC) prediction, enabling large-scale non-equilibrium molecular dynamics simulations of AB-stacked bilayer h-BN under applied electric fields. By implementing a rigorous real-space path-integral polarization formalism combined with a state-constrained Gaussian convolution background extraction procedure, we successfully isolate the intrinsic spontaneous polarization from the dominant dielectric background. Our simulations reveal that coherent single-domain rigid sliding, completing within 5 ps, constitutes a physically viable ultrafast switching mechanism, and reproduces clean ferroelectric hysteresis loops whose shape is qualitatively consistent with experimental observations.

02

基于Transformer的二维自旋系统采样方法#

Sampling two-dimensional spin systems with transformers
📚 arXiv👤 Piotr Białas, Piotr Korcyl, Tomasz Stebel, Adam Stefański, Dawid Zapolski📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统逐自旋采样范式，创新性地采用Transformer每步生成自旋群，以计算换精度策略实现180×180伊辛模型采样，临界温度下有效样本量提升约20倍，为大规模自旋玻璃等复杂系统的精确模拟开
该工作提出了一种改进的Transformer神经采样器，通过每步生成自旋群而非单个自旋，并构建近似概率模型以提升效率。尽管计算量大于稠密网络或CNN方法，但该方法成功采样了高达180×180的伊辛模型，在128×128临界温度下有效样本量约为现有最优神经采样器的20倍。算法还在二维Edwards-Anderson自旋玻璃模型上进行了测试。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种改进的Transformer神经采样器，通过每步生成自旋群而非单个自旋，并构建近似概率模型以提升效率。尽管计算量大于稠密网络或CNN方法，但该方法成功采样了高达180×180的伊辛模型，在128×128临界温度下有效样本量约为现有最优神经采样器的20倍。算法还在二维Edwards-Anderson自旋玻璃模型上进行了测试。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27738v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autoregressive Neural Networks based on dense or convolutional layers have recently been shown to be a viable strategy for generating classical spin systems. Unlike these methods, sampling with transformers is commonly considered to be computationally inefficient. In this work, we propose a novel approach to transformer-based neural samplers in which we generate not a single spin per step but groups of spins. As an additional improvement, we construct a model of approximated probabilities, further improving the efficiency of the algorithm. Despite our approach being computationally heavier than dense networks or CNN-based approaches, we were able to sample larger systems of up to 180 × 180 spins in case of the Ising model. The Effective Sample Size of our sampler is sim 20 times larger than that of the previous state-of-the-art neural sampler when trained for the 128 × 128 Ising model at critical temperature. Finally, we also test our algorithm on the 2D Edwards-Anderson model, where we train 64× 64 spin systems.

03

磁性金属-有机框架的生成#

Generation of magnetic metal-organic frameworks
📚 arXiv👤 Alexander C. Tyner, Avinash Pathapati, Alexander V. Balatsky📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：基于OMDB大规模第一性原理数据微调CHGNet势函数，突破有机材料在现有模型中代表性不足的瓶颈；结合位点替换高通量筛选QMOF结构原型，实现新型磁性MOFs的高效逆向设计，为功能多孔磁体的实验合成提
该工作利用有机材料数据库（OMDB）中超过15,000个单点第一性原理计算构建训练集，对CHGNet进行微调以获得机器学习原子间势。结合位点替换工作流，从QMOF数据库的结构原型中筛选新型高磁性金属-有机框架（MOFs），以应对有机材料在现有材料数据库与基础模型训练集中代表性不足的挑战。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用有机材料数据库（OMDB）中超过15,000个单点第一性原理计算构建训练集，对CHGNet进行微调以获得机器学习原子间势。结合位点替换工作流，从QMOF数据库的结构原型中筛选新型高磁性金属-有机框架（MOFs），以应对有机材料在现有材料数据库与基础模型训练集中代表性不足的挑战。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27879v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The potential to utilize metal-organic frameworks as a replacement for rare earth materials as well as in technological applications has prompted increased interested in this material class. The simulation of organic materials, including metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), represents a computational challenge due to an increased average number of atoms in the unit cell. Compounding this challenge, modern materials databases are generally limited to inorganic structures due to their utility in modern technologies such as batteries and integrated circuits. Machine-learning tools appear ideally suited to study these systems. However, organic materials are generally underrepresented in the training sets of foundational models. In this work we leverage the the Organic Materials Database (OMDB) to create a training dataset comprised of more than 15,000 single-point first-principles computations for finetuning machine learned interatomic potentials. Specifically, we fine tune CHGNet and implement a site substitution workflow to identify novel, highly magnetic, MOFs from structural prototypes within the QMOF database.

N进制交叉bar架构中的多比特神经网络推理#

Multibit neural inference in a N-ary crossbar architecture
📚 arXiv👤 Anatole Moureaux, Anthony Lopes Temporao, Flavio Abreu Araujo📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作构建了N进制交叉bar仿真框架，在最小硬件假设下实现多比特存内计算推理。核心创新在于揭示权重量化主导误差而单元随机噪声因阵列平均可忽略，并给出最优阻态分辨率设计准则，为高能效存内计算芯片的精度-
存内计算（IMC）通过在存储交叉bar阵列中执行模拟矩阵-向量乘法实现高能效神经网络推理。本文提出N进制交叉bar架构仿真框架，以最小实现假设获取MVM结果。在(4×4)四态磁隧道结（MTJ）阵列上成功实现XOR和MNIST分类任务，MNIST准确率达94.48%（软件基线97.56%），结合PCA降维进一步缩小软硬件性能差距。研究表明权重量化是主要误差源，单元特异性随机噪声因阵列平均效应危害小于系统误差，并确定平衡量化误差与阻态分辨…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

存内计算（IMC）通过在存储交叉bar阵列中执行模拟矩阵-向量乘法实现高能效神经网络推理。本文提出N进制交叉bar架构仿真框架，以最小实现假设获取MVM结果。在(4×4)四态磁隧道结（MTJ）阵列上成功实现XOR和MNIST分类任务，MNIST准确率达94.48%（软件基线97.56%），结合PCA降维进一步缩小软硬件性能差距。研究表明权重量化是主要误差源，单元特异性随机噪声因阵列平均效应危害小于系统误差，并确定平衡量化误差与阻态分辨率的最优每单元状态数。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26979v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) enables energy-efficient neural network inference by computing analog matrix-vector multiplications (MVM) in memory crossbar arrays. In this work we present a simulation framework for N-ary crossbar architectures that retrieves MVM results with minimal implementation assumptions. The XOR and MNIST classification tasks were successfully inferred using a simulated crossbar array of (4x4) 4-states magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJ). MNIST accuracy reached 94.48% (vs. 97.56% software baseline). The software-hardware performance gap was further reduced using PCA dimensionality reduction. We identified weight quantization as the primary error source, and studied its impact alongside systematic nonidealities and random noise. We find that cell-specific random noise is less detrimental than systematic errors due to averaging across the array. Finally, we demonstrate an optimal number of states per cell that balances quantization error against resistance state resolution to minimize total MVM error.

05

Proximity Ferroelectricity Driven by Mobile High-Miller-Index Domain Walls#

📚 arXiv👤 Changming Ke, Shi Liu📅 2026-04-29⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本研究突破传统体相势垒软化认知，揭示高密勒指数畴壁这一长期被忽视的微观机制：Sc掺杂剂稳定畴壁形核却引入钉扎，而多层膜结构使可动畴壁无阻碍地穿越厚AlN层，实现"分而治之"的低场翻转，为铁电存储器界面
arXiv:2604.25343v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 纤锌矿铁电体如掺钪氮化铝(AlScN)因其与半导体工艺的兼容性及强自发极化，在下一代存储器领域颇具应用前景。这类材料的铁电翻转通常归因于掺杂引起的体相翻转势垒软化。然而，近期关于邻近铁电性的报道——即AlN/AlScN多层膜中厚度达500 nm的未掺杂AlN层可实现完全翻转——对这一观点提出了挑战。本研究揭示了一种由高密勒指数畴壁介导的替代翻转机制，该机制因其复杂的几何构型…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25343v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 纤锌矿铁电体如掺钪氮化铝(AlScN)因其与半导体工艺的兼容性及强自发极化，在下一代存储器领域颇具应用前景。这类材料的铁电翻转通常归因于掺杂引起的体相翻转势垒软化。然而，近期关于邻近铁电性的报道——即AlN/AlScN多层膜中厚度达500 nm的未掺杂AlN层可实现完全翻转——对这一观点提出了挑战。本研究揭示了一种由高密勒指数畴壁介导的替代翻转机制，该机制因其复杂的几何构型和推测的不稳定性而长期被忽视。通过第一性原理计算和机器学习分子动力学模拟，我们表明这些畴壁一旦形核，便以极低的势垒迁移。Sc掺杂剂发挥双重作用：一方面稳定高指数畴壁从而促进形核，另一方面引入钉扎效应阻碍畴壁运动。在多层膜中，我们的模拟证实AlScN中产生的可动畴壁能够深入传播至相邻AlN层，并在其中无掺杂钉扎地轻松移动，从而实现厚未掺杂层的低场翻转。这一微观"分而治之"机制破解了邻近铁电性之谜，并凸显高指数界面作为调控铁电翻转的尚未充分探索的杠杆。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25343v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Wurtzite ferroelectrics such as scandium-doped aluminum nitride (AlScN) are promising for next-generation memory because of their compatibility with semiconductor processes and strong spontaneous polarization. Ferroelectric switching in these materials is typically attributed to doping-induced softening of the bulk switching barrier. However, recent reports of proximity ferroelectricity, in which undoped AlN layers up to 500 nm thick fully switch in AlN/AlScN multilayers, challenge this view. Here, we reveal an alternative switching mechanism mediated by high-Miller-index domain walls, long overlooked due to their complex geometry and presumed instability. Using first-principles calculations and machine-learning molecular dynamics simulations, we show that these walls, once nucleated, migrate with exceptionally low barriers. The Sc dopants play a dual role: they stabilize high-index walls and thereby promote nucleation, while also introducing pinning that hinders wall motion. In multilayers, our simulations demonstrate that mobile domain walls nucleated in AlScN can propagate deep into adjacent AlN, where they move easily without dopant pinning, enabling low-field switching across thick undoped layers. This microscopic divide-and-conquer mechanism resolves the puzzle of proximity ferroelectricity and highlights high-index interfaces as an underexplored lever for controlling ferroelectric switching.

06

Quasiparticle Dynamics in the 4d-4f Ising-like Double Perovskite Ba2DyRuO6 Probed by Neutron Scattering and Machine-Learning Framework#

📚 arXiv👤 Gourab Roy, Ekta Kushwaha, Mohit Kumar, Sayan Ghosh, Fabio Orlandi, Duc Le, Matthew B. Stone, Jhuma Sannigrahi, Devashibhai T. Adroja, Tathamay Basu📅 2026-04-29⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破性地发现Ba₂DyRuO₆中4d-4f交换相互作用驱动Ru⁵⁺与Dy³⁺磁矩同时有序，颠覆了A₂RRuO₆家族常见的分步磁有序范式；结合机器学习辅助的中子散射与SpinW理论，首次完整刻画了
arXiv:2512.24778v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：含4d-4f相互作用的双钙钛矿为研究关联体系中复杂磁现象提供了平台。本文通过飞行时间（TOF）中子衍射（TOF）、非弹性中子散射（INS）及理论建模，研究了有趣的双钙钛矿体系Ba₂DyRuO₆的磁基态和准粒子激发。据报道，Ba₂DyRuO₆仅表现出单一磁转变，这与该家族中大多数其他稀土（R）成员A₂RRuO₆（A = Ca/Sr/Ba）形成鲜明对比，后者通常先出现Ru离子的磁…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2512.24778v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：含4d-4f相互作用的双钙钛矿为研究关联体系中复杂磁现象提供了平台。本文通过飞行时间（TOF）中子衍射（TOF）、非弹性中子散射（INS）及理论建模，研究了有趣的双钙钛矿体系Ba₂DyRuO₆的磁基态和准粒子激发。据报道，Ba₂DyRuO₆仅表现出单一磁转变，这与该家族中大多数其他稀土（R）成员A₂RRuO₆（A = Ca/Sr/Ba）形成鲜明对比，后者通常先出现Ru离子的磁有序，随后发生R离子有序。我们的中子衍射结果证实，长程反铁磁有序在T_N≈47 K时出现，主要由4d-4f Ru⁵⁺-Dy³⁺交换相互作用驱动，Dy和Ru磁矩同时开始有序。有序基态为具有伊辛特征的共线反铁磁体，在1.5 K时有序磁矩分别为μ_Ru = 1.6(1) μ_B和μ_Dy = 5.1(1) μ_B。低温INS揭示了10 meV以下明确定义的磁振子激发。INS谱的SpinW建模证实了复杂交换相互作用及磁各向异性的存在，后者决定了伊辛基态并解释了观测到的磁振子谱。INS与拉曼光谱联合揭示了顺磁区Dy³⁺的晶体电场（CEF）激发，位于46.5和71.8 meV。观测到的CEF能级由与Dy³⁺的Oₕ对称性一致的点电荷计算重现。此外，采用机器学习方法分析声子谱并与INS数据进行比较。这些结果共同阐明了声子和磁振子激发的起源及其在Ba₂DyRuO₆基态磁性中的作用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.24778v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Double perovskites containing 4d--4f interactions provide a platform to study complex magnetic phenomena in correlated systems. Here, we investigate the magnetic ground state and quasiparticle excitations of the fascinating double perovskite system, Ba₂DyRuO₆, through Time of flight (TOF) neutron diffraction (TOF), inelastic neutron scattering (INS), and theoretical modelling. The compound Ba₂DyRuO₆ is reported to exhibit a single magnetic transition, in sharp contrast to most of the other rare-earth (R) members in this family, A₂RRuO₆ (A = Ca/Sr/Ba), which typically show magnetic ordering of the Ru ions, followed by R-ion ordering. Our neutron diffraction results confirm that long-range antiferromagnetic order emerges at T_N approx 47~K, primarily driven by 4d--4f Ru⁵⁺--Dy³⁺ exchange interactions, where both Dy and Ru moments start to order simultaneously. The ordered ground state is a collinear antiferromagnet with Ising character, carrying ordered moments of μRᵤ = 1.6(1)~μ_B and μDy = 5.1(1)~μ_B at 1.5~K. Low-temperature INS reveals well-defined magnon excitations below 10~meV. SpinW modelling of the INS spectra evidences complex exchange interactions and the presence of magnetic anisotropy, which governs the Ising ground state and accounts for the observed magnon spectrum. Combined INS and Raman spectroscopy reveal crystal-electric-field (CEF) excitations of Dy³⁺ at 46.5 and 71.8~meV in the paramagnetic region. The observed CEF levels are reproduced by point-charge calculations consistent with the Oₕ symmetry of Dy³⁺. A complementary machine-learning approach is used to analyse the phonon spectrum and compare with INS data. Together, these results clarify the origin of phonon and magnon excitations and their role in the ground-state magnetism of Ba₂DyRuO₆.

07

Accelerating Quantum Materials Characterization: Hybrid Active Learning for Autonomous Spin Wave Spectroscopy#

📚 arXiv👤 William Ratcliff II📅 2026-04-28⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破性地提出"探测-推断-精修"任务分离范式，以混合式TAS-AI框架实现自主中子谱学：物理不可知策略高效定位信号，物理知情阶段闭环精修哈密顿量参数。核心创新在于揭示算法短视失效模式并设计受限证
arXiv:2604.23821v1 公告类型：新 摘要：自主中子谱学必须解决三个不同的任务：探测（信号在哪里？）、推断（哪个哈密顿量支配它？）和精修（参数是什么？）。没有单一控制器能同等出色地解决所有三个任务。我们提出TAS-AI，一种用于自主三轴自旋波谱学的混合式物理不可知-物理知情框架，明确分离这些任务。在盲重建基准测试中，物理不可知方法（如随机采样、粗网格和高斯过程映射器）比物理知情规划更可靠地达到全局误差阈值，且测量次数更少…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.23821v1 公告类型：新 摘要：自主中子谱学必须解决三个不同的任务：探测（信号在哪里？）、推断（哪个哈密顿量支配它？）和精修（参数是什么？）。没有单一控制器能同等出色地解决所有三个任务。我们提出TAS-AI，一种用于自主三轴自旋波谱学的混合式物理不可知-物理知情框架，明确分离这些任务。在盲重建基准测试中，物理不可知方法（如随机采样、粗网格和高斯过程映射器）比物理知情规划更可靠地达到全局误差阈值，且测量次数更少，支持"发现与推断是不同任务、需要不同控制器"这一论断。一旦信号结构被定位，物理知情阶段即执行闭环哈密顿量判别和参数精修：在最近邻-only与J1-J2哈密顿量的受控方格晶格测试中，TAS-AI在少于10次测量内即达到决定性的AIC导出证据比（>100），而运动感知调度在固定测量预算下将挂钟时间削减32%。我们还识别了后验加权设计的一种失效模式——算法短视，即规划器过度精修当前领先模型，同时欠采样低强度证伪探针。受限证伪通道大幅缩减执着于错误模型的时间，并加速正确模型选择，且无需修改贝叶斯推断引擎。在受控双模型消融实验中，确定性前二最大分歧规则和基于LLM的审计委员会均在相同约束下实现这一增益。我们利用高保真数字孪生在硅中演示完整工作流，并提供开源Python实现。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.23821v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autonomous neutron spectroscopy must solve three distinct tasks: detection (where is the signal?), inference (which Hamiltonian governs it?), and refinement (what are the parameters?). No single controller solves all three equally well. We present TAS-AI, a hybrid agnostic-to-physics-informed framework for autonomous triple-axis spin-wave spectroscopy that separates these tasks explicitly. In blind reconstruction benchmarks, model-agnostic methods such as random sampling, coarse grids, and Gaussian-process mappers reach a global error threshold more reliably and with fewer measurements than physics-informed planning, supporting the claim that discovery and inference are distinct tasks requiring distinct controllers. Once signal structure is localized, the physics-informed stage performs in-loop Hamiltonian discrimination and parameter refinement: in a controlled square-lattice test between nearest-neighbor-only and J1-J2 Hamiltonians, TAS-AI reaches a decisive AIC-derived evidence ratio (>100) in fewer than 10 measurements, while motion-aware scheduling cuts wall-clock time by 32% at a fixed measurement budget. We also identify a failure mode of posterior-weighted design, algorithmic myopia, in which the planner over-refines the current leading model while under-sampling low-intensity falsification probes. A constrained falsification channel sharply reduces time spent committed to the wrong model and accelerates correct model selection without modifying the Bayesian inference engine. In controlled two-model ablations, both a deterministic top-two max-disagreement rule and an LLM-based audit committee achieve this gain under identical constraints. We demonstrate the full workflow in silico using a high-fidelity digital twin and provide an open-source Python implementation.

08

Remotely programming the weights of a spintronic neural network by a radiofrequency broadcast signal#

📚 arXiv👤 M. Menshawy (Laboratoire Albert Fert, CNRS, Thales, Université Paris-Saclay, Palaiseau, France), D. Sanz-Hernández (Laboratoire Albert Fert, CNRS, Thales, Université Paris-Saclay, Palaiseau, France), L. Mazza (Department of Electrical and Information Engineering, Politecnico di Bari, Bari, Italy), V. Puliafito (Department of Electrical and Information Engineering, Politecnico di Bari, Bari, Italy), G. Finocchio (Department of Mathematical and Computer Sciences, Physical Sciences and Earth Sciences, University of Messina, Messina, Italy), A. Jenkins (International Iberian Nanotechnology Laboratory, Braga, Portugal), R. Ferreira (International Iberian Nanotechnology Laboratory, Braga, Portugal), L. Benetti (International Iberian Nanotechnology Laboratory, Braga, Portugal), J. Grollier (Laboratoire Albert Fert, CNRS, Thales, Université Paris-Saclay, Palaiseau, France), F. A. Mizrahi (Laboratoire Albert Fert, CNRS, Thales, Université Paris-Saclay, Palaiseau, France)📅 2026-04-28⚡ 磁性/铁电🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出了一种基于广播射频信号的远程编程方案，通过频率选择性翻转涡旋核极性实现无选择器器件的突触权重配置。核心创新在于利用频分复用机制解决存内计算的可扩展性瓶颈，使单条共享带状线即可重构串联磁隧道结
arXiv:2604.24561v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：在不牺牲可扩展性的前提下选择性编程大量非易失性突触权重是存内计算的一项关键挑战。在此，我们展示了通过共享带状线施加的广播射频信号，对串联连接的11个基于涡旋的磁隧道结链进行突触权重的远程编程。该编程依赖于涡旋核极性的频率选择性翻转，因此不需要单独的访问线或选择器器件。通过重新配置这些链的二进制状态，我们重塑了它们对频分复用射频输入执行的加权和。利用由两条此类链组成的22突触网…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24561v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：在不牺牲可扩展性的前提下选择性编程大量非易失性突触权重是存内计算的一项关键挑战。在此，我们展示了通过共享带状线施加的广播射频信号，对串联连接的11个基于涡旋的磁隧道结链进行突触权重的远程编程。该编程依赖于涡旋核极性的频率选择性翻转，因此不需要单独的访问线或选择器器件。通过重新配置这些链的二进制状态，我们重塑了它们对频分复用射频输入执行的加权和。利用由两条此类链组成的22突触网络，我们将同一硬件远程重新配置为执行两项不同任务：手写数字分类和无人机射频特征识别。数字优化配置在手写数字上达到94.91 ± 0.26%的准确率，但在无人机射频特征上仅为13.17 ± 0.47%；而无人机优化配置在无人机上达到97.33 ± 0.62%，但在数字上仅为47.59 ± 1.5%。广播射频编程 thus 为快速可重构的自旋电子神经形态硬件提供了一条紧凑且可扩展的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24561v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Selectively programming large number of non-volatile synaptic weights without compromising scalability is a key challenge for in-memory computing. Here, we demonstrate remote programming of synaptic weights in series-connected chains of 11 vortex-based magnetic tunnel junctions using broadcast radiofrequency signals applied through a shared strip line. The programming relies on frequency-selective reversal of the vortex-core polarity and therefore does not require individual access lines or selector devices. By reconfiguring the binary states of these chains, we reshape the weighted sums they perform on frequency-multiplexed RF inputs. Using a 22-synapse network composed of two such chains, we remotely reconfigure the same hardware to perform two distinct tasks: handwritten-digit classification and drone RF-signature identification. The digit-optimized configuration reaches 94.91 +/- 0.26% accuracy on handwritten digits but only 13.17 +/- 0.47% on drone RF signatures, whereas the drone-optimized configuration reaches 97.33 +/- 0.62% on drones but only 47.59 +/- 1.5% on digits. Broadcast RF programming thus provides a compact and scalable route to rapidly reconfigurable spintronic neuromorphic hardware.

03

磁性 / 铁电专题#

聚焦自旋、铁电、多铁与相关功能材料研究。

01

铁轴电子晶体中振幅涨落诱导的共振手性修饰#

Resonant chiral dressing by amplitude fluctuations in a ferroaxial electronic crystal
📚 Nature Physics👤 Francesco Barantani, Xinyue Peng, Emil Viñas Boström, Frank Y. Gao 等19位作者📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在铁轴电荷密度波体系中首次实验证实了热力学平衡下对称性禁止的模式耦合，创新性地提出"共振手性缀饰"机制——声子被具有平面手性的电荷序振幅涨落动力学修饰。螺旋分辨拉曼显微技术实现单畴探测，揭示了序
对称性为理解物质的序与动力学提供了统一框架，并对不同集体激发之间的相互作用施加约束。在晶体固体中，这些约束表现为选择定则，禁止在不等价不可约表示下变换的布里渊区中心模式之间的谐波耦合。尽管非谐过程可以介导不同对称性 sector 之间的耦合，但此类机制在热力学平衡下的直接证据尚未得到证实。本文我们在铁轴电荷密度波中展示了不同对称性模式之间的动力学相互作用，这是一种复杂的序态，其中电子调制与旋转晶格畸变相互交织，破缺了多个镜面对称性。我…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

对称性为理解物质的序与动力学提供了统一框架，并对不同集体激发之间的相互作用施加约束。在晶体固体中，这些约束表现为选择定则，禁止在不等价不可约表示下变换的布里渊区中心模式之间的谐波耦合。尽管非谐过程可以介导不同对称性 sector 之间的耦合，但此类机制在热力学平衡下的直接证据尚未得到证实。本文我们在铁轴电荷密度波中展示了不同对称性模式之间的动力学相互作用，这是一种复杂的序态，其中电子调制与旋转晶格畸变相互交织，破缺了多个镜面对称性。我们的螺旋分辨拉曼显微光谱技术可以探测单个铁轴畴，揭示了具有不同对称性特征的声子与电荷序振幅涨落之间存在温度依赖的相互耦合。我们将这一现象称为共振手性缀饰。我们提出了一个微观模型，将该现象归因于声子被集体电荷序涨落的动力学缀饰，这一过程涉及底层电子态的平面手性。这些结果确立了序参量动力学作为介导原本被对称性禁止的相互作用的途径。

English Abstract

Symmetry provides a unifying framework for understanding the ordering and dynamics of matter, and imposes constraints on the interactions between distinct collective excitations. In crystalline solids, these constraints are expressed through selection rules that prohibit harmonic coupling between zone-centre modes that transform under inequivalent irreducible representations. Although anharmonic processes can mediate coupling across distinct symmetry sectors, direct evidence for such mechanisms under thermodynamic equilibrium has not yet been shown. Here we demonstrate a dynamical interaction between modes of different symmetry in a ferroaxial charge density wave, a complex ordered state in which electronic modulations intertwine with rotational lattice distortions to break multiple mirror symmetries. Our helicity-resolved Raman micro-spectroscopy can access individual ferroaxial domains and reveals a temperature-dependent interplay between phonons and charge order amplitude fluctuations with a distinct symmetry character. We refer to this phenomenon as resonant chiral dressing. We propose a microscopic model that attributes this phenomenon to the dynamical dressing of phonons with collective charge order fluctuations, a process that involves the planar chirality of the underlying electronic state. These results establish order parameter dynamics as a route to mediate otherwise symmetry-forbidden interactions.

02

超导性实现铁磁共振向驻留自旋波的转换#

Superconductivity-Enabled Conversion of Ferromagnetic Resonance into Standing Spin Waves
📚 arXiv👤 Ya. V. Turkin, N. G. Pugach, F. M. Maksimov, A. S. Pakhomov, A. I. Chernov, V. I. Belotelov, S. N. Polulyakh, V. S. Stolyarov📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在常规扩散超导体-亚铁磁绝缘体异质结中实现铁磁共振向垂直驻留自旋波的相干转换，揭示自旋极化三重态库珀对与阿布里科索夫涡旋的协同作用机制，为超导自旋电子学中自旋波模式调控开辟新途径。
该研究在铋掺杂铁石榴石/Nb双层结构中实验证实，常规扩散超导体可将均匀铁磁共振模式转换为相邻亚铁磁绝缘体中的垂直驻留自旋波（PSSWs），该特征仅在Nb转变温度以下出现。微观理论自洽耦合准经典Keldysh-Usadel超流描述与Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert动力学，揭示转换需要界面自旋转移力矩（由自旋极化三重态库珀对介导）和阿布里科索夫涡旋产生的深度依赖有效场两个要素。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在铋掺杂铁石榴石/Nb双层结构中实验证实，常规扩散超导体可将均匀铁磁共振模式转换为相邻亚铁磁绝缘体中的垂直驻留自旋波（PSSWs），该特征仅在Nb转变温度以下出现。微观理论自洽耦合准经典Keldysh-Usadel超流描述与Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert动力学，揭示转换需要界面自旋转移力矩（由自旋极化三重态库珀对介导）和阿布里科索夫涡旋产生的深度依赖有效场两个要素。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27076v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Superconductors can transport spin without Joule dissipation, yet their coherent coupling to short-wavelength magnons in insulating magnets remains largely unexplored. Here we demonstrate experimentally and theoretically that a conventional diffusive superconductor can enable the conversion of the uniform ferromagnetic-resonance (FMR) mode into perpendicular standing spin waves (PSSWs) in an adjacent ferrimagnetic insulator. In Bi-substituted iron-garnet/Nb bilayers, the microwave transmission develops an additional resonance feature that appears only below the Nb transition temperature and lies close to the uniform FMR peak. A microscopic theory that self-consistently couples the quasiclassical Keldysh--Usadel description of the superconducting condensate to the Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert dynamics shows that the conversion requires two ingredients: (i) an interfacial spin-transfer torque mediated by spin-polarized triplet Cooper pairs and (ii) a depth-dependent effective field produced by Abrikosov vortices (electromagnetic proximity). The resulting susceptibility reproduces the measured lineshapes and establishes superconductivity as an active control knob for exchange standing-wave modes in magnetic insulators.

03

准周期驱动非相互作用自旋链中预热时间准晶序的出现#

Emergence of prethermal time quasicrystalline order in a quasiperiodically driven non-interacting spin chain
📚 arXiv👤 Davood Marripour, Jahanfar Abouie📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次在准周期驱动非相互作用自旋链中发现预热时间准晶序，揭示了高频驱动下不可约频率谱峰与次线性纠缠熵增长等新奇动力学特征。这一发现拓展了离散时间晶体的研究范式，为理解多频率驱动系统中对称性破缺与热
该工作研究由两部分组成的准周期驱动非相互作用自旋-1/2链中的预热时间准晶序：包括无序Ising相互作用与随机横场，以及频率为Ω的旋转横磁场。通过精确对角化分析，在高频区发现不可约频率处的稳健谱峰，标志着准周期时间平移对称性破缺；纠缠熵呈现次线性幂律增长后进入预热平台，表明能量尺度失配抑制了共振加热。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究由两部分组成的准周期驱动非相互作用自旋-1/2链中的预热时间准晶序：包括无序Ising相互作用与随机横场，以及频率为Ω的旋转横磁场。通过精确对角化分析，在高频区发现不可约频率处的稳健谱峰，标志着准周期时间平移对称性破缺；纠缠熵呈现次线性幂律增长后进入预热平台，表明能量尺度失配抑制了共振加热。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27250v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study prethermal time quasicrystalline (TQC) order in a quasiperiodically driven chain of non-interacting spin-1/2 particles. The drive consists of two parts, switched on and off periodically with frequency ømega_d: (i) disordered Ising interactions, with exchange couplings chosen from a symmetric interval [-J/2, J/2], allowing random antiferromagnetic or ferromagnetic nearest-neighbor couplings, together with a random transverse field; and (ii) a rotating transverse magnetic field with frequency Ømega. The ratio ømega_d/Ømega is chosen to be irrational, producing multiple incommensurate frequencies and yielding quasiperiodic dynamics beyond Floquet theory. Using exact diagonalization, we analyze the time autocorrelation function, dynamical structure factor, and entanglement entropy (EE). In the high-frequency regime, robust spectral peaks at incommensurate frequencies (not integer multiples of the fundamental drives) signal quasiperiodic time-translation symmetry breaking (QTTSB). The EE exhibits sublinear power-law growth followed by a prethermal plateau, indicating suppressed resonant heating due to an energy scale mismatch. The nonequilibrium lifetime increases rapidly with driving frequency. Unlike symmetric disorder sampling, an asymmetric distribution of the Ising exchange couplings induces collective spin rigidity, enhancing the system's resistance to heating. The TQC phase remains stable against next-nearest-neighbor (NNN) exchange perturbations and rotational imperfections, with robustness comparable to discrete time crystals (TCs) under periodic driving. Our results establish this quasiperiodically driven system as a platform for long-lived nonequilibrium temporal order, revealing the interplay of disorder, collective rigidity, and quasiperiodic driving.

04

弱耦合量子链锯反铁磁体中的奇异自旋激发连续谱#

Exotic Spin Excitation Continuum in a Weakly Coupled Quantum Chainsaw Antiferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Asiri Thennakoon, Prena Chaudhary, Sankha Subhra Bakshi, Tommy Park, Tristen Lowrey, Daniel Pajerowski, Christina Hoffmann, Junghong H. He, Hiroaki Ueda, Collin Broholm, Gia-Wei Chern, Seung-Hun Lee📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在弱耦合链锯反铁磁体Cs₈LiNa₃Ti₁₂F₄₈中观测到全动量-能量空间的强连续自旋激发谱，揭示维度跨渡区分数化激发与一维临界性的非平庸关联，为理解量子阻挫体系中拓扑有序与临界行为的耦合机
该研究利用非弹性中子散射对单晶Cs₈LiNa₃Ti₁₂F₄₈进行表征，揭示了由弱耦合自旋-1/2链锯构成的阻挫网络，实现了维度阻挫区域。磁激发谱在整个测量的动量和能量相空间内呈现强连续谱，表明在维度跨渡区域，分数化激发的拓扑有序与一维临界性机制之间存在非平庸关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用非弹性中子散射对单晶Cs₈LiNa₃Ti₁₂F₄₈进行表征，揭示了由弱耦合自旋-1/2链锯构成的阻挫网络，实现了维度阻挫区域。磁激发谱在整个测量的动量和能量相空间内呈现强连续谱，表明在维度跨渡区域，分数化激发的拓扑有序与一维临界性机制之间存在非平庸关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27310v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Collective motions in strongly interacting magnets involve many spins and are often described in terms of integer-spin excitations. However, in certain cases, the collective motion can behave as if these integer excitations break apart into smaller, particle-like entities with unusual properties. Such fractionalized excitations in quantum magnets are commonly associated either with topological order in two dimensions or with criticality in one dimension. It remains unclear how these distinct mechanisms are connected across a dimensional crossover. Here we investigate the Ti-based quantum antiferromagnet, Cs₈LiNa₃Ti₁₂F₄₈, in which Ti³⁺ (3d¹, S=1/2) ions interact antiferromagnetically within distorted kagome planes. Our inelastic neutron scattering study on a single crystal reveals a frustrated network of weakly coupled spin-1/2 chainsaws, realizing a regime of dimensional frustration in which interchain couplings fail to establish coherent two-dimensional order. The magnetic excitation spectrum exhibits a strong continuum spanning the full measured momentum and energy phase space. In addition, the dynamic spin correlation function displays rod-like scattering in momentum space, indicating a quasi-one-dimensional nature of the magnetic correlations. These results point to fractionalized excitations with intrinsically directional character, demonstrating that signatures of one-dimensional criticality can persist within a two-dimensional lattice. Our findings establish anisotropic fractionalization as a distinct organizing principle for quantum-disordered states.

05

FePt/FeRh双层膜中相变诱导的畴演化与磁化动力学用于高效热辅助磁记录#

Phase-Transition Induced Domain Evolution and Magnetization Dynamics in FePt/FeRh Bilayers for Efficient Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording
📚 arXiv👤 Saroj K. Mishra, Y. Sasaki, S. Isogami, I. Suzuki, Keerthana P, J. Mohanty, Y. K. Takahashi📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过FeRh层反铁磁-铁磁相变产生的强界面交换耦合，实现FePt层矫顽力大幅降低，为热辅助磁记录提供了低功耗的磁化翻转新机制，兼具高各向异性保持与显著能效优势。
该研究利用FePt/FeRh双层膜解决热辅助磁记录中的高功耗问题，其中FeRh在约350 K的反铁磁-铁磁相变产生强界面交换耦合以辅助FePt层磁化翻转。磁测量显示双层膜矫顽力从300 K到400 K降低40%（单层FePt仅8%）；温度依赖的磁力显微镜直接捕获相变诱导的畴演化，时间分辨磁光克尔效应测量证实FePt本征各向异性基本保持。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究利用FePt/FeRh双层膜解决热辅助磁记录中的高功耗问题，其中FeRh在约350 K的反铁磁-铁磁相变产生强界面交换耦合以辅助FePt层磁化翻转。磁测量显示双层膜矫顽力从300 K到400 K降低40%（单层FePt仅8%）；温度依赖的磁力显微镜直接捕获相变诱导的畴演化，时间分辨磁光克尔效应测量证实FePt本征各向异性基本保持。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27370v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Achieving ultrahigh recording densities with low power consumption is a central challenge for next generation heat assisted magnetic recording (HAMR), as conventional L10 FePt media require intense laser heating due to their high coercivity (Hc) and high Curie temperature (700 K). Here, we address this issue using FePt/FeRh bilayers, where the antiferromagnetic to ferromagnetic transition of FeRh near 350 K generates strong interfacial exchange coupling that assists magnetization switching in the FePt layer. Magnetometry measurements reveal a 40% reduction in Hc from 300 K to 400 K in the bilayer, compared to only 8% in single layer FePt. Temperature dependent MFM directly captures phase transition induced domain evolution, showing a 30% reduction in domain size and enhanced phase contrast. TR-MOKE measurements reveal only a minor (0.4 T) modification of the effective anisotropy field during phase transition, confirming that the intrinsic anisotropy of FePt remains largely preserved. These results demonstrate that the reduction in Hc in FePt/FeRh bilayers is primarily governed by phase transition induced domain wall mobility coupled with interfacial magnetic interactions, rather than by intrinsic anisotropy softening. This mechanism provides a pathway toward efficient magnetization switching under reduced thermal load, making FePt/FeRh heterostructures promising candidates for advanced HAMR media.

06

反常隧穿作为Nambu-Goldstone模的低能定理#

Anomalous tunneling as a low-energy theorem for Nambu-Goldstone modes
📚 arXiv👤 Keisuke Fujii, Daichi Kagamihara, Masaru Hongo📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作将Goldstone定理从能谱推广至散射领域，建立反常完全隧穿的普适低能定理，揭示对称性-标度律对输运的决定性作用，为超流、磁性等体系的低能散射实验提供理论预言与诊断工具。
该研究在低能有效场论框架下证明，Nambu-Goldstone模的反常隧穿（能量趋于零时透射系数趋于一）是由对称性和标度律决定的普适低能定理。对称性保持的局域势在长波极限下无关，导致完全透射；而对称性破缺微扰则相关并抑制透射。该工作以超流声子和磁振子为例阐释了这一普适行为。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在低能有效场论框架下证明，Nambu-Goldstone模的反常隧穿（能量趋于零时透射系数趋于一）是由对称性和标度律决定的普适低能定理。对称性保持的局域势在长波极限下无关，导致完全透射；而对称性破缺微扰则相关并抑制透射。该工作以超流声子和磁振子为例阐释了这一普适行为。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27489v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Anomalous tunneling refers to the phenomenon in which the transmission coefficient through a potential barrier approaches unity as the energy of an incident particle or quasiparticle tends to zero. This counterintuitive effect has been reported in systems exhibiting spontaneous symmetry breaking (SSB), such as superfluids, yet the general conditions for its occurrence remain unclear. In this Letter, we establish that anomalous tunneling of Nambu-Goldstone (NG) modes is a universal low-energy theorem dictated solely by symmetry and scaling, using a low-energy effective field theory (EFT) framework. We formulate the scattering of NG modes by external potentials in terms of spatially dependent EFT coefficients and demonstrate that symmetry-preserving localized potentials are irrelevant in the long-wavelength limit, leading to perfect transmission. In contrast, symmetry-breaking perturbations are relevant and suppress transmission, resulting in the absence of anomalous tunneling. We illustrate this universal behavior with explicit examples of superfluid phonons and magnons.

07

穿透深度随局域T_c^m标度揭示超导态内的磁量子临界性#

Magnetic Quantum Criticality inside the Superconducting State Revealed by Penetration Depth Scaling with Local Tₘₐₜₕᵣₘ c
📚 arXiv👤 Yusuke Iguchi, Kaede Inoh, Ryosuke Koizumi, Makoto Yokoyama📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作以局域超导转变温度替代名义掺杂浓度作为标度变量，有效消除掺杂非均匀性的干扰，首次在超导态内部直接观测到磁量子临界性。其揭示的无序修饰量子临界行为为理解非常规超导与量子临界点的交织机制提供了关键实
该研究通过扫描SQUID显微镜测定Zn掺杂CeCoIn₅的局域超导转变温度T_c^m和零温穿透深度λ(0)，发现λ(0)的显著峰值揭示了嵌入超导态内的磁量子临界点。以局域T_c^m而非名义Zn掺杂作为参数化变量，规避了掺杂非均匀性带来的不确定性；提取的临界指数超过洁净自旋密度波值，表明无序修饰的量子临界区域，λ(0)的增强反映超流刚度的抑制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究通过扫描SQUID显微镜测定Zn掺杂CeCoIn₅的局域超导转变温度T_c^m和零温穿透深度λ(0)，发现λ(0)的显著峰值揭示了嵌入超导态内的磁量子临界点。以局域T_c^m而非名义Zn掺杂作为参数化变量，规避了掺杂非均匀性带来的不确定性；提取的临界指数超过洁净自旋密度波值，表明无序修饰的量子临界区域，λ(0)的增强反映超流刚度的抑制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27507v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We demonstrate a magnetic quantum critical point embedded within the superconducting state of Zn-doped CeCoIn₅, revealed by a pronounced peak in the magnetic penetration depth at zero temperature łambda(0). Using scanning SQUID microscopy, we determine the local superconducting transition temperature Tₘₐₜₕᵣₘ c and łambda(0). By parameterizing łambda(0) in terms of the local Tₘₐₜₕᵣₘ c rather than nominal Zn substitution, we circumvent the ambiguity caused by doping inhomogeneity and enable a more precise extraction of the critical exponent. The extracted exponent exceeds the clean spin-density-wave value, indicating a disorder-modified quantum critical regime. The enhancement of łambda(0) reflects the suppression of the superfluid stiffness and is consistent with critical scaling. Our approach provides a route to uncover intrinsic quantum critical behavior hidden by inhomogeneity in unconventional superconductors.

08

薄磁壳曲率诱导的非线性反常霍尔效应#

Curvature-induced nonlinear anomalous Hall effect in thin magnetic shells
📚 arXiv👤 Maria Teresa Mercaldo, Mario Cuoco, Carmine Ortix📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：弯曲薄磁壳中，应变梯度诱导的轨道Rashba效应可激活非平庸量子几何，产生量子度规与Berry曲率偶极子分别支配的两类非线性反常霍尔效应，为分别探测量子几何张量实部与虚部提供了全新几何调控手段。
该研究表明，几何弯曲可在中心对称铁磁体中通过厚度方向的应变梯度破缺反演对称性并激活轨道Rashba耦合，进而产生具有非平庸量子几何的自旋织构。在面内磁化和自旋-轨道耦合存在时，这导致由量子度规支配的本征非线性反常霍尔效应；当几何形变进一步破缺面外二重旋转对称性时，出现由Berry曲率偶极子支配的额外非线性反常霍尔效应，可分别探测量子几何张量的实部和虚部。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究表明，几何弯曲可在中心对称铁磁体中通过厚度方向的应变梯度破缺反演对称性并激活轨道Rashba耦合，进而产生具有非平庸量子几何的自旋织构。在面内磁化和自旋-轨道耦合存在时，这导致由量子度规支配的本征非线性反常霍尔效应；当几何形变进一步破缺面外二重旋转对称性时，出现由Berry曲率偶极子支配的额外非线性反常霍尔效应，可分别探测量子几何张量的实部和虚部。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optoelectronic and nonlinear transport experiments probe the quantum geometric tensor of Bloch states, whose real and imaginary components -- the quantum metric and the Berry curvature -- are typically constrained by symmetry. Here, we show that geometric bending provides a route to engineer such responses in centrosymmetric ferromagnets. Curvature-induced strain gradients across the shell thickness break inversion symmetry and activate an orbital Rashba coupling. In the presence of in-plane magnetization and spin-orbit coupling, this generates spin textures with a nontrivial quantum geometry, leading to an intrinsic nonlinear anomalous Hall effect (NAHE) governed by the quantum metric and maximized when the magnetization aligns with the applied electric field. When geometric deformations further break twofold rotational symmetry around the out-of-plane axis, an additional NAHE emerges, maximal for magnetization perpendicular to the driving electric field and governed by the Berry curvature dipole, thus giving access to the imaginary component of the quantum geometric tensor. These results establish curved ferromagnetic shells as a platform for engineering anisotropic nonlinear transport and for selectively probing both components of the quantum geometric tensor.

09

共面Kagome反铁磁体中的量子标量自旋手性#

Quantum Scalar Spin Chirality in Coplanar Kagome Antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Nanse Esaki, Gyungchoon Go, Se Kwon Kim📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地揭示量子涨落可在共面Kagome反铁磁体中诱导出标量自旋手性，无需依赖非共面自旋结构。这一机制为拓扑量子物态和反常霍尔效应的调控提供了全新途径，拓展了量子磁性材料的设计空间。
该理论研究证明，反铁磁体固有的量子涨落可在零温下于共面有序磁体中产生标量自旋手性。在具有共面基态自旋构型的kagome反铁磁体中，当描述涨落的哈密顿量破缺有效类时间反演反幺正对称性且经典基态的磁点群允许其存在时，量子涨落诱导的标量自旋手性在零温出现；该涨落随温度升高通过热激发磁振子进一步增长，可达与非共面自旋结构预言的静态值相当的量级。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该理论研究证明，反铁磁体固有的量子涨落可在零温下于共面有序磁体中产生标量自旋手性。在具有共面基态自旋构型的kagome反铁磁体中，当描述涨落的哈密顿量破缺有效类时间反演反幺正对称性且经典基态的磁点群允许其存在时，量子涨落诱导的标量自旋手性在零温出现；该涨落随温度升高通过热激发磁振子进一步增长，可达与非共面自旋结构预言的静态值相当的量级。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27632v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically demonstrate that quantum fluctuations inherent to antiferromagnets can generate scalar spin chirality at zero temperature even in coplanar ordered magnets. In a kagome antiferromagnet with coplanar ground-state spin configurations, the quantum-fluctuation-induced scalar spin chirality is shown to arise at zero temperature when an effective time-reversal-like antiunitary symmetry is broken in the Hamiltonian describing fluctuations, and a magnetic point group of the classical ground state allows for its presence. The scalar spin chirality fluctuations are shown to grow further with increasing temperature by thermally excited magnons. These scalar spin chirality fluctuations can reach a magnitude comparable to the static one predicted for noncoplanar spin structures, highlighting their physical implications in coplanar spin systems.

10

声子耦合斯格明子共振驱动的涌现电场#

Emergent electric fields driven by phonon-coupled skyrmion resonances
📚 arXiv👤 Seno Aji📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破性地揭示声子-斯格明子耦合可通过晶格形变产生宏观电场，无需净平移即可实现交直流发电，为拓扑磁体能量转换与新型磁电耦合器件奠定理论基础。
该工作建立了微波激发下斯格明子晶格呼吸与转动动力学中，由声子耦合晶格形变产生宏观涌现电场的粗粒化理论。研究识别了产生直流/交流电场的对称性与动力学条件，即使在斯格明子晶格无净平移的稀极限下亦可实现。利用实验可测的斯格明子轮廓参数，模型统一描述了长波声子极限及有限频率下的谐波贡献，为拓扑磁体中的声子驱动自旋-电荷-晶格耦合提供了框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作建立了微波激发下斯格明子晶格呼吸与转动动力学中，由声子耦合晶格形变产生宏观涌现电场的粗粒化理论。研究识别了产生直流/交流电场的对称性与动力学条件，即使在斯格明子晶格无净平移的稀极限下亦可实现。利用实验可测的斯格明子轮廓参数，模型统一描述了长波声子极限及有限频率下的谐波贡献，为拓扑磁体中的声子驱动自旋-电荷-晶格耦合提供了框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27719v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a coarse-grained theoretical description of the macroscopic emergent electric field generated by phonon-coupled lattice deformations in the breathing and rotational dynamics of a skyrmion lattice under microwave excitation. The analysis identifies the symmetry and dynamical conditions that yield rectified (dc) and oscillating (ac) electric fields, even in the absence of net translational motion of the skyrmion lattice, particularly in the dilute-lattice limit. Using experimentally measurable skyrmion profile parameters such as the equilibrium radius, domain-wall width, and dynamical resonance frequency of skyrmion lattice, the model further enables identification of harmonic components contributing to the observed macroscopic electrodynamic response in the long-wavelength phonon limit (q → 0) and at finite phonon frequency, providing a unified framework for phonon-driven spin-charge-lattice coupling in topological magnets.

11

有机导体中第二种交错磁候选材料：κ-(BEDT-TTF)₂m-HOOCC₆H₄SO₃#

The second altermagnet candidate in organic conductors: κ-(BEDT-TTF)₂ₘ₋HOOCC₆H₄SO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Kohei Tokura, Takato Masuta, Kazushi Aoyama, Hiroki Akutsu, Yasuhiro Nakazawa, Scott S. Turner📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在有机导体体系中实现交错磁候选材料，突破传统κ型盐的自旋液体基态，揭示近等边三角晶格中弱铁磁序与交错磁自旋劈裂的共存机制，为有机量子材料的多序态调控与自旋电子学器件设计开辟新途径。
该工作合成了一种新型BEDT-TTF基有机导体κ-m-SBA，并提出其为有机导体中第二种交错磁候选材料。紧束缚计算显示t'/t=1.01，接近等边三角晶格；与大多数因自旋阻挫形成自旋液体的κ型盐不同，该材料在14 K呈现弱铁磁转变。数值计算进一步展示了交错磁特征的自旋劈裂行为，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作合成了一种新型BEDT-TTF基有机导体κ-m-SBA，并提出其为有机导体中第二种交错磁候选材料。紧束缚计算显示t'/t=1.01，接近等边三角晶格；与大多数因自旋阻挫形成自旋液体的κ型盐不同，该材料在14 K呈现弱铁磁转变。数值计算进一步展示了交错磁特征的自旋劈裂行为，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27746v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We have developed a novel BEDT-TTF-based organic conductor, κ-(BEDT-TTF)₂ m-HOOCC₆H₄SO₃ (κ-m-SBA), and propose it as a candidate for altermagnet. Tight-binding band calculations of κ-m-SBA provide a t'/t of 1.01 at 100 K, indicating that the spin structure is closely aligned to an equilateral triangle (t'/t= 1). While most κ-type BEDT-TTF-based salts become spin liquids due to the spin frustration caused by the triangular lattice, κ-m-SBA surprisingly shows a weak ferromagnetic transition at T_N = 14 K due to a canted antiferromagnetic (AFM) spin structure. Until recently, κ-(BEDT-TTF)₂Cu[N(CN)₂]Cl (κ-Cl) was the only κ-type organic conductor known to exhibit this order, and it is also recognized as the first candidate for altermagnetism in organic conductors. This was theoretically predicted by Naka et al. in 2019, who demonstrated that κ-type organic conductors can be candidates for altermagnetism if they display such order. Consequently, κ-m-SBA can be considered the second candidate for altermagnetism in organic conductors. Furthermore, numerical calculations demonstrate a characteristic of altermagnets in κ-m-SBA, namely spin splitting of energy bands.

12

面内磁场诱导菱方石墨烯的陈数反转与涌现超导#

Chern number reversal and emergent superconductivity in rhombohedral graphene induced by in-plane magnetic fields
📚 arXiv👤 Xiaozhou Zan, Hangzhe Li, Jiawei Guo, Gengdong Zhou, Kangyao Chen, Cihan Gao, Zijun Xu, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Anqi Wang, Jie Shen, Jinsong Zhang, Zhida Song, Yayu Wang📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在菱方石墨烯摩尔体系中实现面内磁场对量子反常霍尔态陈数的主动调控，并揭示三种超导相的差异化磁场响应，其中磁场专属诱导的超导为自旋三重态配对机制提供了关键实验证据，为拓扑量子计算及非常规超导机
该工作在hBN对准八层菱方石墨烯摩尔超晶格中观测到稳健的量子反常霍尔态与三种非常规超导相。电子掺杂远离摩尔势时，位移场与面内磁场驱动QAH陈数反转；空穴掺杂靠近摩尔超晶格时，三种超导相呈现截然不同的面内磁场响应：弱增强、强抑制及磁场专属诱导。面内磁场响应的各向同性指向轨道磁性-自旋轨道耦合的 interplay，而磁场涌现超导为自旋三重态配对提供了证据。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在hBN对准八层菱方石墨烯摩尔超晶格中观测到稳健的量子反常霍尔态与三种非常规超导相。电子掺杂远离摩尔势时，位移场与面内磁场驱动QAH陈数反转；空穴掺杂靠近摩尔超晶格时，三种超导相呈现截然不同的面内磁场响应：弱增强、强抑制及磁场专属诱导。面内磁场响应的各向同性指向轨道磁性-自旋轨道耦合的 interplay，而磁场涌现超导为自旋三重态配对提供了证据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27788v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Rhombohedral graphene with topological flat bands offers an ideal platform for realizing correlated and topological quantum phases. Here we investigate hBN aligned eight-layer rhombohedral graphene moire superlattices, which host a robust quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) state alongside three unconventional superconducting phases. For electron-doped carriers away from the moire potential, we observe QAH Chern number reversal driven by the displacement fields and in plane magnetic fields. For hole-doped carriers near the moire superlattice, the three superconducting phases exhibit distinctively different in plane magnetic field responses: one is weakly enhanced, the second is strongly suppressed, and the third exclusively induced by in plane magnetic field. The isotropic in plane magnetic field response in the QAH regime points to interplay between orbital magnetism and spin-orbit coupling, and the field-emergent superconductivity provides compelling evidence for spin-triplet pairing. Our work demonstrates a highly versatile platform for coexisting topological and superconducting states, and highlights in plane magnetic field as a powerful in-situ control knob for engineering novel quantum devices.

13

ErFeO₃的磁激发谱与磁相互作用层级#

Magnetic excitation spectrum and hierarchy of magnetic interactions in ErFeO3
📚 arXiv👤 Dnyaneshwar R. Bhosale, Piotr Fabrykiewicz, Devashibhai Adroja, Martin Meven, Astrid Schneidewind, Michal Stekiel📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在单一体系中完整解析了稀土-过渡金属氧化物的三层磁相互作用层级：Fe-Fe交换、Er-Er交换及Er-Fe耦合，并揭示Kramers简并CEF能级的交换劈裂机制，为理解多铁性材料中的磁电耦合
该工作利用飞行时间中子谱学全面研究了正铁氧体ErFeO₃的激发谱。谱包含两个组分：Fe³⁺子晶格强色散自旋波（~9-65 meV）及Er³⁺离子晶体电场激发（<36 meV）。线性自旋波理论成功描述自旋波色散与谱权重，提取了关键Fe-Fe交换参数。低能中子的高分辨进一步揭示了Kramers简并CEF能级的色散与劈裂：Er³⁺离子间交换耦合导致色散，Er³⁺-Fe³⁺子晶格相互作用解除简并。研究还探讨了偶极与反对称交换对磁基态的影响。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用飞行时间中子谱学全面研究了正铁氧体ErFeO₃的激发谱。谱包含两个组分：Fe³⁺子晶格强色散自旋波（~9-65 meV）及Er³⁺离子晶体电场激发（<36 meV）。线性自旋波理论成功描述自旋波色散与谱权重，提取了关键Fe-Fe交换参数。低能中子的高分辨进一步揭示了Kramers简并CEF能级的色散与劈裂：Er³⁺离子间交换耦合导致色散，Er³⁺-Fe³⁺子晶格相互作用解除简并。研究还探讨了偶极与反对称交换对磁基态的影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27857v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report a comprehensive investigation of the excitation spectrum of ErFeO₃ orthoferrite by means of time-of-flight neutron spectroscopy. The spectrum consists of two distinct components: strongly dispersive spin wave excitations of the Fe³⁺ sublattice spanning approx~9 - 65 meV, and crystal electric field (CEF) excitations of Er³⁺ ions below 36 meV. The observed spin wave dispersions and spectral weight are well captured within linear spin wave theory, enabling extraction of the key Fe-Fe exchange parameters. Low-energy incident neutrons with their enhanced energy resolution, further revealed the dispersive character and splitting of Kramers-degenerate CEF levels. We show that the dispersion is caused by the exchange coupling between Er³⁺ ions, while the degeneracy is lifted by interactions between the Er³⁺ and Fe³⁺ sublattices. We further explore the influence of dipolar and antisymmetric exchange interactions with the focus on the magnetic ground state of ErFeO₃, with particular attention to the low-temperature spin arrangement. Taken together, our results provide a detailed account of the spin dynamics in ErFeO₃ and reveal a hierarchy of interactions scales characteristic for orthoferrites.

14

张量列车格式下微磁解的可压缩性#

Compressibility of micromagnetic solutions in tensor train format
📚 arXiv👤 Thierry Valet, Nicolas Vukadinovic📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文提出将张量列车（TT）格式引入三维微磁模拟，通过自适应捕捉磁化状态的空间稀疏性，突破了传统均匀网格离散化的计算标度瓶颈。核心创新在于证明了TT表示对微磁数据具有近最优压缩效率，参数标度显著优于稠密
针对三维微磁模拟中标准均匀网格离散化无法利用磁化状态信息稀疏性（低维高梯度区域与近均匀磁化体域共存）导致的计算标度问题，作者证明张量列车（TT）表示可通过最优利用空间稀疏性来克服这些不良标度。以软磁矩形棱柱中的代表性磁通闭合构型为研究对象，在近微米尺度下证明TT压缩微磁数据的参数计数标度约为L¹.8和(1/a)¹.2，相对于稠密离散化的优势随问题尺寸和细化程度快速增长。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对三维微磁模拟中标准均匀网格离散化无法利用磁化状态信息稀疏性（低维高梯度区域与近均匀磁化体域共存）导致的计算标度问题，作者证明张量列车（TT）表示可通过最优利用空间稀疏性来克服这些不良标度。以软磁矩形棱柱中的代表性磁通闭合构型为研究对象，在近微米尺度下证明TT压缩微磁数据的参数计数标度约为L¹.8和(1/a)¹.2，相对于稠密离散化的优势随问题尺寸和细化程度快速增长。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28008v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: For three-dimensional (3D) magnetic objects with linear size L exceeding a few exchange lengths, the micromagnetic state exhibits pronounced informational sparsity: low-dimensional, high-gradient regions (e.g., domain walls) coexist with near-uniformly magnetized volumetric domains. Because standard micromagnetic simulation methods discretize the magnetization on near-uniform 3D grids with linear cell size a, they cannot take advantage of this sparsity. The computational problem scales as sim L³ and sim (1/a)³. In this Letter, we establish that direct tensor-train (TT) representations overcome these poor scalings by exploiting the spatial sparsity optimally, while preserving accuracy in a controlled way. Focusing on representative flux-closure configurations in soft-magnetic rectangular prisms, in the near-micrometer regime, we demonstrate that the parameter count of TT-compressed micromagnetic data scales approximately as L¹.⁸ and (1/a)¹.². Hence the relative advantage over dense discretizations rapidly grows with the problem size and refinement level. These first results provide a strong motivation for future developments of micromagnetic solvers in TT format which could transcend the limitations of traditional simulators, with far reaching potential impacts on fundamental research and technology development.

15

LaNiO₃/CaMnO₃界面磁性中介导的维度驱动电子与轨道转变的原位观测#

Dimensionality-Driven Electronic and Orbital Transitions Mediating Interfacial Magnetism in LaNiO3/CaMnO3 Observed In Situ
📚 arXiv👤 B-A. Courchene, A. Hampel, S. Beck, J. R. Paudel, J. D. Grassi, L. A. Lapinski, A. M. Derrico, M. Terilli, M. Kareev, C. Klewe, A. Gloskovskii, C. Schlueter, S. K. Chaluvadi, F. Mazzola, I. Vobornik, P. Orgiani, J. Chakhalian, A. J. Millis, A. X. Gray📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次原位观测到LaNiO₃维度减薄驱动的金属-绝缘体转变与轨道极化交叉，揭示界面磁性的电子限域调控机制，建立了氧化物异质结中电子-轨道-磁自由度的直接耦合图像，为低维量子材料的多场协同调控提供了
该工作结合原位合成、偏振依赖角分辨光电子能谱、X射线磁圆二色性和第一性原理电子结构计算，研究LaNiO₃/CaMnO₃超晶格。发现减小LaNiO₃厚度驱动金属-绝缘体转变，伴随电子相干性丧失和超薄极限下的轨道极化交叉，这些变化削弱界面电荷转移并抑制CaMnO₃中Mn的界面磁矩，证明涌现的铁磁态直接受LaNiO₃中电子限域调控。密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论再现了绝缘态和轨道重构，建立了氧化物异质结中电子、轨道和磁自由度之间的直接可调…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合原位合成、偏振依赖角分辨光电子能谱、X射线磁圆二色性和第一性原理电子结构计算，研究LaNiO₃/CaMnO₃超晶格。发现减小LaNiO₃厚度驱动金属-绝缘体转变，伴随电子相干性丧失和超薄极限下的轨道极化交叉，这些变化削弱界面电荷转移并抑制CaMnO₃中Mn的界面磁矩，证明涌现的铁磁态直接受LaNiO₃中电子限域调控。密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论再现了绝缘态和轨道重构，建立了氧化物异质结中电子、轨道和磁自由度之间的直接可调耦合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28054v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Emergent magnetic states at oxide interfaces arise from the interplay of charge transfer, orbital reconstruction, and dimensional confinement, offering a route to engineered correlated-electron behavior in nanoscale spintronic materials. Here, we combine in situ synthesis, polarization-dependent angle-resolved photoelectron spectroscopy, X-ray magnetic circular dichroism, and first-principles electronic-structure calculations to investigate LaNiO3/CaMnO3 superlattices. We show that reducing the LaNiO3 thickness drives a metal-insulator transition accompanied by loss of electronic coherence and an orbital-polarization crossover in the ultrathin limit. These changes weaken charge transfer across the interface and suppress the interfacial Mn magnetic moment in CaMnO3, revealing that the emergent ferromagnetic state is directly governed by electronic confinement in LaNiO3. The insulating state and orbital reconstruction are reproduced by density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory. Together, these results establish a direct and tunable coupling among electronic, orbital, and magnetic degrees of freedom in oxide heterostructures.

16

铁弹体畴壁局域反演对称破缺诱导的非谐声子耦合#

Anharmonic phonon coupling enabled by local inversion symmetry breaking at domain walls in ferroelastic
📚 arXiv👤 Seyyed Jabbar Mousavi, Vivek Unikandanunni, Niccolo Sellati, Paolo Barone, Martina Basini, Steven L. Johnson, Andrey Shalit, Peter Hamm, Mattia Udina, Thomas Feurer📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次将二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱学应用于铁弹体畴壁研究，利用畴壁局域对称破缺"激活"红外非活性声子，为非谐声子耦合提供直接实验证据，建立了探测微弱对称性破缺与高阶非线性声子相互作用的新范式。
该工作利用二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱学直接观测到铁弹体LaAlO₃中的非谐声子耦合证据。尽管块体晶体保持中心对称，但畴壁处局域反演对称破缺改变了声子选择定则，使原本红外非活性的E_g声子获得有限红外活性。观测到的二维谱交叉峰归因于A₁g拉曼活性声子与通过畴壁局域反演对称破缺获得红外活性的E_g声子之间的力学和电学非谐性，展示了二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱学探测微弱非谐信号以揭示细微对称破缺的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱学直接观测到铁弹体LaAlO₃中的非谐声子耦合证据。尽管块体晶体保持中心对称，但畴壁处局域反演对称破缺改变了声子选择定则，使原本红外非活性的E_g声子获得有限红外活性。观测到的二维谱交叉峰归因于A₁g拉曼活性声子与通过畴壁局域反演对称破缺获得红外活性的E_g声子之间的力学和电学非谐性，展示了二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱学探测微弱非谐信号以揭示细微对称破缺的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28066v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In ferroelastic materials, spontaneous symmetry breaking leads to the formation of twin domains. Although the bulk crystal typically remains centrosymmetric, inversion symmetry can be locally broken at the domain walls, potentially changing phonon selection rules and enabling local anharmonic phonon coupling. Here we report direct evidence of such anharmonic coupling in ferroelastic LaAlO₃ using two-dimensional Raman-terahertz spectroscopy. We attribute the cross-peaks observed in the two-dimensional spectra to both mechanical and electrical anharmonicity between the A₁g Raman-active phonon and the E_g phonon, which acquires finite infrared activity through local inversion symmetry breaking at ferroelastic domain walls. These findings provide new insight into the complex lattice dynamics of ferroelastic materials and highlight the potential of two-dimensional Raman-terahertz spectroscopy to uncover subtle symmetry breaking through the detection of intrinsically weak anharmonic signals.

17

交错磁体中量子几何驱动的巨自旋磁化#

Giant Spin Magnetization from Quantum Geometry in Altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Neelanjan Chakraborti, Sudeep Kumar Ghosh, Snehasish Nandy📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作构建含动量平移与自旋旋转的广义量子几何张量，揭示中心对称交错磁体中磁场诱导自旋磁化是唯一线性量子几何响应，为探测自旋旋转量子度规提供了纯净通道，对新型量子材料物态表征具有重要指导意义。
该工作基于包含布洛赫态动量平移和自旋旋转的广义量子几何张量，建立统一框架将自旋磁化分解为平衡态、电场驱动和磁场驱动贡献。证明中心反演对称性禁止中心对称系统中的线性电场响应，而CₙT对称性进一步抑制交错磁体的平衡态贡献，使磁场诱导的自旋磁化成为中心对称交错磁体中唯一对称性允许的线性量子几何响应。该贡献完全源于自旋旋转量子度规，确立了其作为唯一线性量子几何机制的地位。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作基于包含布洛赫态动量平移和自旋旋转的广义量子几何张量，建立统一框架将自旋磁化分解为平衡态、电场驱动和磁场驱动贡献。证明中心反演对称性禁止中心对称系统中的线性电场响应，而CₙT对称性进一步抑制交错磁体的平衡态贡献，使磁场诱导的自旋磁化成为中心对称交错磁体中唯一对称性允许的线性量子几何响应。该贡献完全源于自旋旋转量子度规，确立了其作为唯一线性量子几何机制的地位。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28088v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets host spin-split band structures while exhibiting vanishing equilibrium spin magnetization, making field-induced responses a direct probe of their quantum geometry. A central question, in this regard, is which quantum-geometric mechanism can generate a linear spin magnetization in centrosymmetric systems. Here we develop a unified framework based on a generalized quantum geometric tensor that incorporates both momentum translations and spin rotations of Bloch states, and decompose spin magnetization into equilibrium, electric-field-driven, and magnetic-field-driven contributions. We show that inversion symmetry forbids the linear electric-field response in centrosymmetric systems, while Cₙ T symmetry further suppresses the equilibrium contribution in altermagnets. Consequently, centrosymmetric altermagnets provide a particularly clean realization in which the magnetic-field-induced spin magnetization emerges as the only symmetry-allowed linear quantum-geometric response. We demonstrate that this contribution originates entirely from the spin-rotation quantum metric, establishing it as the sole linear quantum-geometric mechanism in such systems. Using representative centrosymmetric altermagnets, including the d-wave compound FeSb₂ and the g-wave compound CrSb, we show that the spin-rotation quantum metric directly controls this response. Crucially, we predict a giant linear spin magnetization of order 10⁻²μ_B,nm⁻³ at magnetic fields of sim 10,mT, exceeding typical experimental values for conventional magnets by several orders of magnitude. Our results identify a universal quantum geometric mechanism of spin magnetization operative in centrosymmetric systems in general, and establish centrosymmetric altermagnets as an ideal platform for its experimental detection with potential applications in spintronics.

18

手性Weyl单极子Magnus非线性霍尔效应的观测#

Observation of the Magnus Nonlinear Hall effect from Chiral Weyl Monopoles
📚 arXiv👤 Heda Zhang, Nikolai Peshcherenko, Ning Mao, Nianlong Zou, Jiaqiang Yan, Claudia Felser, Yang Zhang📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破了Berry曲率偶极子机制的对称性限制，首次在CoSi中揭示由自旋转波包斜散射驱动的Magnus型非线性霍尔效应，其手性直接关联Weyl拓扑，为拓扑量子材料的无磁场整流与手性电子学器件开辟新
该工作在Berry曲率偶极子对称性禁戒的手性Weyl半金属CoSi中观测到非线性霍尔效应（NLHE）。利用聚焦离子束制备的交叉条器件，在零磁场下检测到具有NLHE全部关键特征的稳健二次谐波霍尔电压。理论分析将非线性霍尔电导率归因于自旋转电子波包的斜散射，其手性由底层能带拓扑决定，过程类似于经典Magnus效应。NLHE信号呈现温度依赖的符号反转，以及随载流子迁移率增强的强线性场依赖调制，直接反映费米面附近拓扑Weyl节点的分布。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在Berry曲率偶极子对称性禁戒的手性Weyl半金属CoSi中观测到非线性霍尔效应（NLHE）。利用聚焦离子束制备的交叉条器件，在零磁场下检测到具有NLHE全部关键特征的稳健二次谐波霍尔电压。理论分析将非线性霍尔电导率归因于自旋转电子波包的斜散射，其手性由底层能带拓扑决定，过程类似于经典Magnus效应。NLHE信号呈现温度依赖的符号反转，以及随载流子迁移率增强的强线性场依赖调制，直接反映费米面附近拓扑Weyl节点的分布。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28091v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The nonlinear Hall effect (NLHE) connects crystalline symmetry to quantum geometry, offering a probe of band topology beyond linear transport. While most studies have focused on the Berry curvature dipole in low-symmetry crystals, mechanisms that directly probe Berry monopoles in higher-symmetry chiral lattices remain unexplored. Here, we report the observations of the NLHE in the chiral Weyl semimetal CoSi, a platform where the Berry curvature dipole is symmetry-forbidden. By employing focused ion beam-fabricated crossbar devices, we detect a robust second-harmonic Hall voltage under zero magnetic field, hosting all key signatures of the NLHE. Theoretical analysis attributes the nonlinear Hall conductivity to skew scattering of self-rotating electron wave packets, whose chirality is dictated by the underlying band topology, a process reminiscent of the classical Magnus effect. Furthermore, the NLHE signal exhibits a temperature-dependent sign reversal, and a strong, linearly field-dependent modulation that grows with carrier mobility, directly reflecting the topological Weyl nodes distribution near the Fermi level. These findings establish CoSi as a platform for Berry monopole-driven nonlinear transport, demonstrating a skew-scattering route to topological nonlinear Hall responses that bypasses conventional symmetry constraints.

19

从窄带半导体到金属交错磁体：Co掺杂FeSb₂的光学指纹#

From Narrow-gap Semiconductor to Metallic Altermagnet: Optical Fingerprints of Co-Doped FeSb₂
📚 arXiv👤 R. Mathew Roy, M. Povolotskiy, J. Kirschke, C. Prange, Y. Xia, V. Sundaramurthy, P. Puphal, M. Pinteric, M. van de Loo, A. Kreyssig, T. Zhang, A. E. Böhmer, M. Dressel, M. Wenzel📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在Co掺杂FeSb₂中实现室温金属交错磁态，并确立0.1 eV低能带间跃迁作为交错磁性的光学指纹。这一发现为关联电子体系中交错磁性的实验识别提供了可观测判据，拓展了窄带半导体向新型自旋电子学
该工作报道约15%钴掺杂将关联窄带半导体FeSb₂转变为可持续至室温的金属交错磁态。红外光电导揭示0.1 eV附近随掺杂出现的低能带间跃迁，密度泛函理论证实其源于交错磁自旋有序导致的非相对论自旋劈裂能带（~0.2 meV）及自旋-轨道耦合引起的费米面附近能带劈裂（~5 meV）。Co掺杂还导致红外活性声子出现Fano线型和模式混合，反映电子-声子耦合增强和局域反演对称性破缺，同时保持交错磁自旋对称性不变。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道约15%钴掺杂将关联窄带半导体FeSb₂转变为可持续至室温的金属交错磁态。红外光电导揭示0.1 eV附近随掺杂出现的低能带间跃迁，密度泛函理论证实其源于交错磁自旋有序导致的非相对论自旋劈裂能带（~0.2 meV）及自旋-轨道耦合引起的费米面附近能带劈裂（~5 meV）。Co掺杂还导致红外活性声子出现Fano线型和模式混合，反映电子-声子耦合增强和局域反演对称性破缺，同时保持交错磁自旋对称性不变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28105v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The realization of bulk metallic altermagnetism has remained elusive despite the growing number of candidate materials. Here, we present evidence that moderate cobalt substitution (sim15%) drives the correlated narrow-gap semiconductor FeSb₂ into a metallic altermagnetic state persisting up to room temperature. The infrared optical conductivity reveals low-energy interband transitions near 0.1 eV that emerge upon doping and grow with Co concentration. Density functional theory calculations show that these transitions originate exclusively from altermagnetic spin ordering, with spin split bands (sim0.2 meV) of non-relativistic origin, together with spin-orbit coupling induced band splitting of the order of sim5 meV near the Fermi level. Co substitution further leads to Fano lineshapes and mode mixing in the infrared-active phonons, reflecting enhanced electron-phonon coupling and local inversion symmetry breaking, while leaving the altermagnetic spin symmetry intact. Our results establish carrier-tuned FeSb₂ as a platform for exploring metallic d-wave altermagnetism and its coupling to lattice degrees of freedom.

20

通过重入相变实现强Mpemba效应#

Strong Mpemba Effect Through a Reentrant Phase Transition
📚 arXiv👤 Kristian Blom, Doron Benyamin, Uwe Thiele, Oren Raz, Aljaz Godec📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示重入相变可诱导强Mpemba效应，其核心机制在于顺磁相中纯交错型最慢弛豫模式与淬火初态的几何选择性耦合。该发现建立了非平衡反常弛豫与平衡相图拓扑之间的普适关联，为通过调控相变路径设计快速
该工作研究反铁磁Ising模型在磁场中跨越重入相变的温度淬火过程，发现当淬火终止于顺磁相时出现强直接和逆Mpemba效应。这些反常弛豫现象源于对最慢弛豫模式的选择性激发——顺磁相中该模式为纯交错型。从顺磁相出发的淬火因与慢模式零重叠而展现强（逆）Mpemba效应，而从反铁磁相出发的淬火则激发交错模式导致慢弛豫尾。改变晶格配位数表明无重入时强Mpemba效应消失，建立了反常弛豫与平衡相行为的关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究反铁磁Ising模型在磁场中跨越重入相变的温度淬火过程，发现当淬火终止于顺磁相时出现强直接和逆Mpemba效应。这些反常弛豫现象源于对最慢弛豫模式的选择性激发——顺磁相中该模式为纯交错型。从顺磁相出发的淬火因与慢模式零重叠而展现强（逆）Mpemba效应，而从反铁磁相出发的淬火则激发交错模式导致慢弛豫尾。改变晶格配位数表明无重入时强Mpemba效应消失，建立了反常弛豫与平衡相行为的关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28117v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate temperature quenches across the reentrant phase transition of the antiferromagnetic Ising model in a magnetic field and show that the strong direct and inverse Mpemba effects arise when quenches terminate in the paramagnetic phase. These anomalous relaxation phenomena originate from the selective excitation of the slowest relaxation mode, which in the paramagnetic phase is purely staggered. Consequently, quenches starting from the paramagnetic phase have zero overlap with the slow mode and exhibit a strong (inverse) Mpemba effect. Quenches from the antiferromagnetic phase excite the staggered mode and display a slow-relaxation tail. By varying the lattice coordination number we show that the strong Mpemba effect disappears in the absence of reentrance. Our results provide the first demonstration of the strong (inverse) Mpemba effect in the antiferromagnetic Ising model based on the pair-approximation, and establish a link between anomalous relaxation and the equilibrium phase behavior.

21

铁弹金属膜中的极性拓扑结构#

Polar Topologies in a Ferroelastic Metal Membrane
📚 arXiv👤 Rahil Haria, Noah Schnitzer, T. Ben Britton, Yaqi Li, Tom J. P. Irons, Sophia Linssen Pitsaros, Ella Banyas, Geri Topore, Annabel Hoyes, Mariana Palos, Sinead M. Griffin, Katherine Inzani, Michele Shelly Conroy📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统铁电体系局限，在导电铁弹金属SrRuO₃中首次实现极性拓扑织构的自发形成与原子尺度表征。核心创新在于揭示反相界处电极化的选择性涌现机制及多分量倾转场的连续插值行为，将挠曲电耦合与金属性兼
该工作展示将外延SrRuO₃薄膜从衬底释放后，铁弹畴从微米到纳米尺度的层级细化，并自发产生两类普遍存在的极性织构。通过从介观电子通道衬度成像到原子分辨扫描透射电子显微镜的关联显微学，证实电极化在平移不等价的反相界处选择性出现，多分量a⁻a⁻c⁻倾转场经历类Néel插值，保持同相倾转分量并增强挠曲电耦合。该工作为导电磁体中极性织构的工程设计及可重构自旋-轨道耦合与磁电功能提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示将外延SrRuO₃薄膜从衬底释放后，铁弹畴从微米到纳米尺度的层级细化，并自发产生两类普遍存在的极性织构。通过从介观电子通道衬度成像到原子分辨扫描透射电子显微镜的关联显微学，证实电极化在平移不等价的反相界处选择性出现，多分量a⁻a⁻c⁻倾转场经历类Néel插值，保持同相倾转分量并增强挠曲电耦合。该工作为导电磁体中极性织构的工程设计及可重构自旋-轨道耦合与磁电功能提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28120v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Polar metals, materials in which electric polarisation and metallicity coexist, are exceptionally rare because itinerant electrons screen long-range dipoles and favour centrosymmetric structures. Engineering polar textures in a conducting magnet holds promise for reconfigurable spin orbit coupling and magnetoelectric functionality. Here we show that releasing epitaxial SrRuO3 films from their substrates drives a hierarchy of ferroelastic domain refinement from micrometre to nanometre length scales, and that this structural reorganisation spontaneously generates two distinct classes of emergent polar texture that are ubiquitous across the freestanding membrane. Using correlative microscopy from mesoscale electron channelling contrast imaging (ECCI) to atomic resolution scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM), we demonstrate that electric polarisation emerges selectively at translation-inequivalent antiphase boundaries (APBs). At these boundaries multicomponent aac tilt field undergoes Neel-like interpolation that preserves the in-phase tilt component and amplifies roto flexoelectric coupling, while translation-equivalent boundaries remain nonpolar. The Neel like interpolation at hard APBs and Ising like collapse of all tilt components at easy APBs is corroborated with ab initio calculations. While embedded 90 ferroelastic walls provide an additional mechanistically distinct source of electric polarisation resulting in polar nanoclusters (4 nm). These distinct nanotextures at 90 walls from via elastic accommodation of strain mismatch between variants and rotostriction as the tilt field interpolates across the boundaries. These findings show that, in a membrane form, metal oxides provide a robust platform for hosting nanoscale ferroelastic domains that generate polar textures.

22

揭示NdPO₄磁热相在低温制冷中的潜力#

Unveiling the potential of NdPO4 magnetocaloric phases in cryogenic refrigeration
📚 arXiv👤 M. Balli, L. Attou, S-E. Bouzarmine, S. Oubad, K. El Maalam, P. Fournier, S. Mangin📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：采用简易沉淀法合成NdPO₄纳米棒，经热处理实现六方至单斜相变。该材料在强反铁磁耦合下保持无磁有序，于3 K附近表现出19 J/kg·K的优异磁熵变，成本效益优于高磁矩稀土基制冷材料，为低温磁制冷提供
该工作通过简便沉淀生长法制备NdPO₄纳米棒（直径10-20 nm，长度200-500 nm），热处理使其从六方磷铈镧矿结构转变为单斜独居石型结构。磁化测量与DFT计算表明存在强反铁磁耦合且在2-300 K范围内无磁有序。单斜相NdPO₄在5 T磁场、约3 K附近展现出约19 J/kg·K的大磁热效应，优于部分含更昂贵高磁矩稀土元素的参比材料，显示出在低温磁制冷中的应用前景。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作通过简便沉淀生长法制备NdPO₄纳米棒（直径10-20 nm，长度200-500 nm），热处理使其从六方磷铈镧矿结构转变为单斜独居石型结构。磁化测量与DFT计算表明存在强反铁磁耦合且在2-300 K范围内无磁有序。单斜相NdPO₄在5 T磁场、约3 K附近展现出约19 J/kg·K的大磁热效应，优于部分含更昂贵高磁矩稀土元素的参比材料，显示出在低温磁制冷中的应用前景。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28128v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The RPO4 orthophosphates (R = rare earth element) have recently attracted a wide interest due to the strong coupling between their electronic, orbital and structural ordering parameters resulting in a variety of functional properties. Herein, we demonstrate that NdPO4 phases synthesized via a facile precipitation growth process unveil promise in low-temperature magnetic cooling. The analysis of their structural properties reveals nanorod forms with diameters of 10 to 20 nm and lengths ranging from 200 to 500 nm while the heat treatment transforms their hexagonal rhabdophane-type structure to a monoclinic anhydrous monazite-type symmetry. Magnetization measurements and DFT calculations show strong antiferromagnetic couplings and the absence of any magnetic ordering in the 2-300 K range. On the other hand, the monoclinic phase of NdPO4 exhibits a large magnetocaloric effect of about 19 J/kg K under 5 T near 3 K, outperforming some reference materials containing more expensive rare-earth elements with high magnetic moments.

23

YIG微结构中量子化磁子模式与超导谐振器中微波的强耦合#

Strong coupling between quantized magnon modes in a YIG microstucture and microwaves in a superconducting resonator
📚 arXiv👤 Seth W. Kurfman, Philipp Geyer, Anoop Kamalasanan, Karl Heimrich, Kwangyul Hu, Paul Tharnier, Frank Heyroth, Michael Flatté, Georg Schmidt📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破YIG薄膜厚度限制，首次在亚10微米单晶微结构中实现多磁子模式与超导LC谐振器的强耦合，解决了长期存在的模式体积瓶颈，为构建低损耗片上量子信息处理平台开辟了新路径。
该工作利用聚焦离子束技术从单晶YIG制备微片，将其置于优化超导集总元件LC谐振器的收缩电感线上，首次实现亚10微米YIG结构中多个磁子模式与LC谐振器光子的强耦合。此前由于YIG沉积和器件制备的厚度限制，难以获得足够大的有效磁子模式体积，该瓶颈在此得到突破。微磁模拟和解析计算从定性和定量两方面支持实验结果，为基于低损耗YIG的片上量子信息处理提供了新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用聚焦离子束技术从单晶YIG制备微片，将其置于优化超导集总元件LC谐振器的收缩电感线上，首次实现亚10微米YIG结构中多个磁子模式与LC谐振器光子的强耦合。此前由于YIG沉积和器件制备的厚度限制，难以获得足够大的有效磁子模式体积，该瓶颈在此得到突破。微磁模拟和解析计算从定性和定量两方面支持实验结果，为基于低损耗YIG的片上量子信息处理提供了新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28145v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Strong-coupling experiments based on magnons enable the exploration into on-chip demonstrations involving numerous long-lived excitations. Yttrium iron garnet (YIG) has been considered for decades as a gold standard material for magnonics due to its low-loss magnonic properties. While YIG has successfully demonstrated strong-coupling in macroscopic device geometries, the strong coupling of magnons in truly sub-10 micron YIG structures to date has not yet been realized. This obstacle is due to the difficulty producing large enough effective magnonic mode volume necessary primarily due to thickness limitations of YIG deposition and device fabrication techniques. Here, we demonstrate the use of a microplatelet of YIG, manufactured from a single crystal of YIG via focused ion beam (FIB) techniques, placed on a constricted inductive line of an optimized superconducting lumped element LC resonator to achieve strong coupling between numerous magnon modes and the LC resonator photons. These experimental findings are qualitatively backed by micromagnetic simulations and quantitatively supported by analytical calculations to identify the magnon modes corresponding to the experimentally observed anti-crossings in the microwave transmission signal. Further, we show that these anti-crossings remain even at incredibly low device input powers (łeq 10 fW). The fabrication techniques and device geometry enable the deterministic use of numerous confined magnon modes in micron-scale YIG structures for various magnetic field strengths and orientations at substantially reduced device powers. The results here establish a foundational path forward to achieving efficient magnon-based strong-coupling experiments in micron-scale YIG magnetic elements for effective on-chip studies.

24

单轴应变驱动LaAlO₃中铁弹畴调控#

Uniaxial strain-driven ferroelastic domain control in LaAlO3
📚 arXiv👤 Matthias Roeper, Robin Buschbeck, Jakob Wetzel, Tobias Ritschel, Anna-Lena Hofmann, Vladyslav Kovtunovych, Mike N. Pionteck, Javier Taboada-Gutiérrez, Alexey B. Kuzmenko, Martina Basini, Vivek Unikandanunni, Iuliia Kiseleva, Jochen Geck, Susanne C. Kehr, Maximilian Lederer, Simone Sanna, Lukas M. Eng, Samuel D. Seddon📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次实现单轴应变对LaAlO₃铁弹畴的连续可逆操控，以低于0.5%的温和应变驱动菱方-正交相变及孪晶畴大尺度重组，突破了传统热循环畴调控的局限。该原位技术为氧化物异质结中应变可调二维电子气、超导
该工作展示利用原位单轴应变对单晶LaAlO₃铁弹畴结构进行连续可逆操控，结合原子力显微镜、X射线衍射、拉曼光谱与第一性原理计算，完整绘制了从菱方R̄3c基态向预测正交Fmmm相转变过程中孪晶畴微观演化。低于0.5%的应变即可产生显著表面平整化和大尺度畴重组，确立单轴应变为技术可及的畴工程控制参数。该结果为LaAlO₃基异质结中应变可调超导界面等应用开辟了主动实时编程畴结构的途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示利用原位单轴应变对单晶LaAlO₃铁弹畴结构进行连续可逆操控，结合原子力显微镜、X射线衍射、拉曼光谱与第一性原理计算，完整绘制了从菱方R̄3c基态向预测正交Fmmm相转变过程中孪晶畴微观演化。低于0.5%的应变即可产生显著表面平整化和大尺度畴重组，确立单轴应变为技术可及的畴工程控制参数。该结果为LaAlO₃基异质结中应变可调超导界面等应用开辟了主动实时编程畴结构的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28183v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multiferroic domain walls in functional oxides exhibit properties distinct from the bulk and are increasingly exploited as active elements in nanoelectronic and photonic devices. Deterministic control of domain populations has typically remained limited to local control, or removal with temperature. Here we demonstrate continuous, reversible manipulation of the ferroelastic domain structure in single-crystal LaAlO₃ using in-situ uniaxial strain. Combining atomic force microscopy, X-ray diffraction, and Raman spectroscopy with first-principles calculations we map the complete microscopic evolution of the twin domain population through the strain-driven transition from the rhombohedral Rbar3c ground state toward the predicted orthorhombic Fmmm phase. Applied strains below 0.5% produce pronounced surface flattening and large-scale domain reorganisation, establishing uniaxial strain as a technically accessible control parameter for ferroelastic domain engineering. These results open a route to active, real-time programming of domain architectures in LaAlO₃₋based heterostructures, with implications for strain-tunable superconducting interfaces, nanoscale phonon-polariton optics, and ultrafast lattice control.

25

d波交错磁体中本征反常热霍尔效应作为量子度规的表征#

Intrinsic anomalous thermal hall effect as a signature of quantum metric in d-wave altermagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Rishi G. Gopalakrishnan, Srimayi Korrapati, Sumanta Tewari📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示d波交错磁体中本征反常热霍尔效应的三次阶非线性响应机制，创新性地提出"非线性热贝里连接极化率"这一物理量，填补了量子度规在热输运领域的理论空白，为无磁场条件下探测交错磁序及量子几何性质提
该工作研究d波交错磁体中的本征反常热霍尔效应，其中纵向温度梯度在无磁场条件下产生横向热流，主导响应正比于(∇T)³。由于晶体对称性，线性贝里曲率驱动和二次热量子度规驱动的反常热霍尔电流消失，首个非零贡献出现在温度梯度三次阶，由该工作新引入的非线性热贝里连接极化率支配。分析揭示了热梯度相对晶轴旋转时反常热霍尔电导的独特角依赖性，以及特征性的温度和化学势依赖关系，为实验验证提供了理论预言。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究d波交错磁体中的本征反常热霍尔效应，其中纵向温度梯度在无磁场条件下产生横向热流，主导响应正比于(∇T)³。由于晶体对称性，线性贝里曲率驱动和二次热量子度规驱动的反常热霍尔电流消失，首个非零贡献出现在温度梯度三次阶，由该工作新引入的非线性热贝里连接极化率支配。分析揭示了热梯度相对晶轴旋转时反常热霍尔电导的独特角依赖性，以及特征性的温度和化学势依赖关系，为实验验证提供了理论预言。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28184v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the intrinsic anomalous thermal Hall effect in d-wave altermagnets, where a transverse heat current is generated by a longitudinal temperature gradient in the absence of a magnetic field, with the leading response proportional to (nabla T)³. In these systems, the intrinsic Berry curvature-driven linear and thermal quantum-metric-driven second-order anomalous thermal Hall currents vanish as a consequence of crystalline symmetry. We show that the first nonvanishing contribution arises at third order in the temperature gradient and is governed by a nonlinear thermal Berry-connection polarizability, a quantity introduced in this work. Our analysis reveals a distinctive angular dependence of the anomalous thermal Hall conductance as the applied thermal gradient is rotated with respect to the crystal axes. We also find characteristic temperature and chemical-potential dependences that can be tested experimentally. These results identify unique quantum geometry-induced thermal responses and establish altermagnets as a promising platform for exploring intrinsic (i.e., scattering-time-independent) geometric transport phenomena.

26

磁振子Gottesman-Kitaev-Preskill态#

Magnonic Gottesman-Kitaev-Preskill states
📚 arXiv👤 Zi-Xu Lu, Gang Liu, Matteo Fadel, Jie Li📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：首次将GKP玻色子编码拓展至磁振子体系，利用磁晶几何各向异性实现本征压缩，结合腔介导量子比特操控完成条件位移与逻辑门操作，为固态量子存储与容错计算提供了可扩展的混合平台。
该工作首次提出了制备磁振子GKP态的方案：利用椭球形磁晶通过与微波腔耦合的超导量子比特实现有效耦合。几何各向异性本征压缩磁振子模式，腔介导的量子比特控制实现有效条件位移相互作用。两轮条件位移与投影测量可产生三/四分量磁振子GKP-like态，并实现了Pauli、Hadamard和相位等单逻辑量子比特门操作，建立了混合磁振子-量子比特系统作为玻色子编码态制备的有前景平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作首次提出了制备磁振子GKP态的方案：利用椭球形磁晶通过与微波腔耦合的超导量子比特实现有效耦合。几何各向异性本征压缩磁振子模式，腔介导的量子比特控制实现有效条件位移相互作用。两轮条件位移与投影测量可产生三/四分量磁振子GKP-like态，并实现了Pauli、Hadamard和相位等单逻辑量子比特门操作，建立了混合磁振子-量子比特系统作为玻色子编码态制备的有前景平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27565v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Bosonic quantum error correction encodes a logical qubit in an oscillator, avoiding the hardware overhead of large qubit arrays. Among such encodings, Gottesman-Kitaev-Preskill (GKP) states are paticularly powerful because their phase-space grid structure protects against small displacement errors simultaneously in both conjugate quadratures. Here we provide the first protocol for preparing magnonic GKP states, which involves an ellipsoidal magnetic crystal effectively coupled to a superconducting qubit via a microwave cavity. The geometric anisotropy intrinsically squeezes the magnon mode, while the cavity-mediated qubit control realizes an effective conditional-displacement interaction. We show that two rounds of a conditional-displacement interaction and a qubit projective measurement yield three- and four-component magnonic GKP-like states. We also show how to realize single logical qubit gate operations, such as Pauli, Hadamard and phase gates, completing the logical Pauli basis of the approximate GKP code. Our results establish hybrid magnon-qubit systems as a promising platform for preparing bosonic code states, with applications in magnonic fault-tolerant quantum computation and quantum sensing.

27

微瓦驱动下活性磁振子-极化激元中吸引子跃迁的观测#

Observation of attractor transitions in active magnon-polaritons under microwatt drives
📚 arXiv👤 Hao Wu, Qichun Liu, Yuanbin Fan, Yulong Liu, Qing Zhao📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在活性磁振子-极化激元系统中首次实验观测到吸引子跃迁现象，揭示了微瓦级低功耗下丰富的非线性动力学行为。该工作为低功耗自旋电子器件、神经形态计算及宽带混沌信号源的设计提供了新物理机制与实验基础。
该工作在由自激微波腔与YIG球耦合构成的活性磁振子-极化激元系统中，首次实验观测到吸引子跃迁。反馈环路提供内部微波驱动，Kerr频率牵引和Suhl介导的磁振子-磁振子散射产生增强的有效非线性。通过实验标定参数的稳定性分析揭示了丰富的固定点景观，包括多重不稳定固定点相和三临界点区域。在微瓦功率下观测到双稳态的爆发式增长及其向多频极限环、梳状/分形谱和宽带混沌动力学的跃迁。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在由自激微波腔与YIG球耦合构成的活性磁振子-极化激元系统中，首次实验观测到吸引子跃迁。反馈环路提供内部微波驱动，Kerr频率牵引和Suhl介导的磁振子-磁振子散射产生增强的有效非线性。通过实验标定参数的稳定性分析揭示了丰富的固定点景观，包括多重不稳定固定点相和三临界点区域。在微瓦功率下观测到双稳态的爆发式增长及其向多频极限环、梳状/分形谱和宽带混沌动力学的跃迁。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27668v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Magnon-polaritons provide a room-temperature platform for investigating nonlinear cavity quantum electrodynamics in the microwave domain, but experimentally observing controlled transitions among distinct nonlinear attractors remains challenging in conventional passive systems, where strong external driving is usually required. Here we report the observation of attractor transitions in an active magnon-polariton formed by a self-oscillating microwave cavity coupled to a yttrium iron garne (YIG) sphere. The feedback loop supplies an internal microwave drive, while Kerr frequency pulling and Suhl-mediated magnon-magnon scattering produce an enhanced effective nonlinearity. Stability analysis using experimentally calibrated parameters reveals a rich fixed-point (FP) landscape with multiple unstable-FP phases and a triple-point region. By tuning gain across these phases, we observe the first experimental evidence of explosive growth of bistability, followed by transitions to multifrequency limit cycles, comb-like/fractal spectra, and broadband chaotic dynamics at microwatt powers. Near a critical point, magnetic-field-triggered switching between nonlinear emission states produces spectral shifts up to 162 times the bare gyromagnetic response.
