By enabling low-power attractor transitions and attractor-switching-amplified spectral response, active magnon-polaritons open opportunities for nonlinear microwave signal generation, high-precision sensing, and neuromorphic computing.

28

立方手性螺旋磁体Cu₂OSeO₃中具有双倍周期的表面受限螺旋态#

A Surface-confined Spiral State With the Double Period in the Cubic Chiral Helimagnet Cu₂OSeO₃
📚 arXiv👤 Priya R. Baral, Oleg I. Utesov, Samuel H. Moody, Matthew T. Littlehales, Pierluigi Gargiani, Manuel Valvidares, Robert Cubitt, Nina-Juliane Steinke, Chen Luo, Florin Radu, Arnaud Magrez, Jonathan S. White, Victor Ukleev📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在Cu₂OSeO₃表面发现双倍周期的表面受限螺旋态，周期达120 nm，源于表面竞争各向异性稳定机制。该发现拓展了手性磁体表面拓扑物态的认知，为低功耗自旋电子器件提供了新的纳米级自旋纹理调控平台。
该工作利用共振弹性X射线散射在Cu₂OSeO₃表面发现了一种新的表面受限螺旋态(SSS)。其实空间周期约120 nm， remarkably为迄今Cu₂OSeO₃中观测到的非公度结构的两倍长。SSS相在低于30 K、磁场偏离⟨110⟩晶轴3°-18°时出现。通过反射/透射REXS及补充小角中子散射证实其表面局域性，归因于晶体表面竞争各向异性相互作用的稳定作用。该发现为构筑下一代器件的节能纳米级自旋纹理平台铺平道路。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用共振弹性X射线散射在Cu₂OSeO₃表面发现了一种新的表面受限螺旋态(SSS)。其实空间周期约120 nm， remarkably为迄今Cu₂OSeO₃中观测到的非公度结构的两倍长。SSS相在低于30 K、磁场偏离⟨110⟩晶轴3°-18°时出现。通过反射/透射REXS及补充小角中子散射证实其表面局域性，归因于晶体表面竞争各向异性相互作用的稳定作用。该发现为构筑下一代器件的节能纳米级自旋纹理平台铺平道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2507.09663v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The chiral magnetoelectric insulator Cu₂OSeO₃ hosts a rich and anisotropic magnetic phase diagram that includes helical, conical, field-polarised, tilted conical, and skyrmion lattice phases. Using resonant elastic x-ray scattering (REXS), we uncover a new spiral state confined to the surface of Cu₂OSeO₃. This surface-confined spiral state (SSS) displays a real-space pitch of sim120 nm, which remarkably is twice the length of the incommensurate structures observed to-date in Cu₂OSeO₃. The SSS phase emerges at temperatures below 30~K when the magnetic field is applied between 3ⁱ̧rc to 18ⁱ̧rc away from the łangle110ångle crystallographic axes. Its surface localisation is demonstrated through a combination of REXS in reflection and transmission geometries, with complementary small-angle neutron scattering measurements suggesting its absence from the bulk. We attribute the stabilisation of the SSS to competing anisotropic interactions at the crystal surface. The discovery of a robust, surface-confined spiral paves the way for engineering energy-efficient, nanoscale spin-texture platforms for next-generation devices.

29

强关联Cd-Ce准晶近似相的软/硬X射线轨道分辨光电子能谱研究#

Soft and hard x-ray orbital-resolved photoemission study of a strongly correlated Cd-Ce quasicrystal approximant
📚 arXiv👤 Goro Nozue, Hidenori Fujiwara, Satoru Hamamoto, Miwa Tsutsumi, Akane Ose, Takayuki Kiss, Atsushi Higashiya, Atsushi Yamasaki, Yuina Kanai-Nakata, Shin Imada, Masaki Oura, Kenji Tamasaku, Makina Yabashi, Tetsuya Ishikawa, Farid Labib, Shintaro Suzuki, Ryuji Tamura, Akira Sekiyama📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次揭示Cd₆Ce中Ce-4f电子与远离费米能级的价带杂化，突破传统近藤物理中4f-导带电子杂化框架，为理解准晶近似相的反常磁性起源提供关键电子结构证据，开辟探索非传统f电子关联效应的新材料体系
该工作利用软X射线和硬X射线光电子能谱研究了Tsai型准晶及其近似相原型Cd₆Ce的轨道依赖电子态。结果显示4f轨道主要与远离费米能级的价带电子杂化，与铈基金属间化合物中常见的与费米能级处导电子杂化形成鲜明对比。这种反常杂化需在讨论Cd₆Ce未解明的磁基态时予以考虑，表明Cd基近似相可为研究超越常规费米能级杂化框架的新奇磁性质提供新平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用软X射线和硬X射线光电子能谱研究了Tsai型准晶及其近似相原型Cd₆Ce的轨道依赖电子态。结果显示4f轨道主要与远离费米能级的价带电子杂化，与铈基金属间化合物中常见的与费米能级处导电子杂化形成鲜明对比。这种反常杂化需在讨论Cd₆Ce未解明的磁基态时予以考虑，表明Cd基近似相可为研究超越常规费米能级杂化框架的新奇磁性质提供新平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.24277v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We have investigated the orbital-dependent electronic states of Cd6Ce, a prototype of strongly correlated rare-earth-based Tsai-type quasicrystals and approximants (ACs) by soft and hard x-ray photoemission spectroscopy. Our results reveal that the 4f orbitals are predominantly hybridized with the valence-band electrons far from the Fermi level (EF), in sharp contrast to the hybridization with conduction electrons at EF seen for the intermetallic Ce-based compounds. This anomalous hybridization should be taken into account in discussing the unresolved magnetic ground state in Cd6Ce. These findings suggest that Cd-based ACs, some of which show the multi-step magnetic transitions, could provide a new platform for investigating novel magnetic properties that cannot be understood within the conventional framework of hybridization at EF.

30

d⁷三角晶格单层钴酸盐中自旋-轨道驱动的Jₑff=1/2磁性#

Spin-orbit driven Jₑff = 1/2 magnetism in a d⁷ triangular-lattice monolayer cobaltate
📚 arXiv👤 Ritwik Das, Soumen Basak, Mohammad Rezwan Habib, Indra Dasgupta📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：单层CoBr₂中d⁷电子构型与三角晶格几何的协同作用，突破了传统d⁵体系对Kitaev磁性的限制；通过精准调控t₂g-e_g轨道跃迁通道，实现了Jₑff=1/2态的铁磁Kitaev耦合，为探索量子自旋
该工作以单层CoBr₂为模型体系，通过第一性原理DFT计算结合精确对角化方法，研究了三角晶格d⁷钴酸盐中的自旋-轨道纠缠Jₑff=1/2磁性。研究发现最近邻t₂g-e_g跃迁通道增强了铁磁Kitaev型交换作用，而Heisenberg项对直接t₂g-t₂g跃迁路径和电子关联敏感，揭示了该体系作为阻挫磁性平台的丰富相图。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作以单层CoBr₂为模型体系，通过第一性原理DFT计算结合精确对角化方法，研究了三角晶格d⁷钴酸盐中的自旋-轨道纠缠Jₑff=1/2磁性。研究发现最近邻t₂g-e_g跃迁通道增强了铁磁Kitaev型交换作用，而Heisenberg项对直接t₂g-t₂g跃迁路径和电子关联敏感，揭示了该体系作为阻挫磁性平台的丰富相图。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.13325v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent theoretical and experimental advances have identified cobaltates with a high-spin d⁷ electronic configuration as promising hosts for spin-orbit entangled Jₑff = 1/2 magnetism that can support bond-dependent exchange interactions. In two-dimensional triangular lattices, the coexistence of such exchange frustration along with geometric frustration gives rise to a rich landscape of competing magnetic phases, establishing monolayer triangular d⁷ cobaltates as a compelling platform for frustrated magnetism. Here we investigate a representative triangular-lattice monolayer cobaltate CoBr₂, where first-principles density functional theory (DFT) calculations reveal a dominant nearest-neighbor t₂g-e_g hopping channel that enhances the ferromagnetic Kitaev-type exchange interactions. In contrast, the nearest-neighbor Heisenberg term is highly sensitive to a direct t₂g-t₂g hopping path and electronic correlations. The magnetic exchange parameters are evaluated using the hopping amplitudes obtained from DFT calculations within an exact diagonalization framework. We construct the first and third nearest neighbor Heisenberg exchange dependent J₁₋J₃ magnetic phase diagram in the physically relevant regime and identify multiple competing ground states, including ferromagnetic, stripy, spiral, and 120ⁱ̧rc antiferromagnetic orders. The Luttinger-Tisza analysis further predicts a Z₂ vortex crystal phase, while exact diagonalization reveals a bond-nematic phase stabilized by the longer-range couplings. Going beyond the conventional bond-independent XXZ picture typically applied to Co²⁺ systems, our results on monolayer CoBr₂ establish d⁷ cobalt dihalides as a promising platform to explore the interplay of long-range Heisenberg and bond-dependent exchange interactions that can stabilize diverse magnetic ground states on a triangular lattice.

31

极性流体中电学可调螺旋层状超结构#

Electrically Tunable Heliconical Smectic Superstructure in Polar Fluids
📚 arXiv👤 Hiroya Nishikawa, Dennis Kwaria, Atsuko Nihonyanagi, Koki Sano, Hiroyuki Yoshida, Fumito Araoka📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破传统胆甾相液晶需手性分子或外场预取向的局限，创新性地利用单组分非手性分子自组装形成螺旋层状超结构，其SmC_P^H相兼具自发宏观取向稳定性与电场连续螺距调制能力，将电光响应推进至亚千赫兹量级
该工作报道了一种新型单组分非手性分子，其呈现SmAF-NTBF-HEC-SmC_P^H层级极性相序列。SmC_P^H相可在无取向层条件下形成稳定宏观取向，并在超低电场下实现宽光谱范围的连续可逆螺距调制，展现出亚千赫兹范围的特征电光性质，为增强二次谐波产生提供了简单稳健的平台。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了一种新型单组分非手性分子，其呈现SmAF-NTBF-HEC-SmC_P^H层级极性相序列。SmC_P^H相可在无取向层条件下形成稳定宏观取向，并在超低电场下实现宽光谱范围的连续可逆螺距调制，展现出亚千赫兹范围的特征电光性质，为增强二次谐波产生提供了简单稳健的平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.05517v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Ferroelectric nematic (NF) phase and related polar liquid-crystalline phases form a new class of strongly polarized yet fluid soft matter. Well-recognized heliconical ferroelectric phases such as NTBF and SmC_P^H exist, but their electro-optic functionality in smectic systems has been largely unexplored. Here, we report a newly designed single-component achiral molecule exhibiting a hierarchical polar phase sequence: SmAF-NTBF-HEC-SmC_P^H. The key feature of the SmC_P^H phase is its ability to form a stable macroscopic orientation without any alignment layers and to enable continuous, reversible pitch modulation over a wide spectral range at ultralow electric fields, approximately one-third of those required for conventional heliconical nematics. The system exhibits characteristic electro-optic properties in the sub-kilohertz range, differentiating it from heliconical materials controlled by dielectric-elastic balance at higher frequencies. In addition, the SmC_P^H phase's polar heliconical smectic structure facilitates enhanced second-harmonic generation via favorable phase matching, thereby establishing a simple and robust platform for low-voltage photonic applications.

32

嵌入铁电纳米团簇通过近邻效应驱动非铁电极性薄膜的极化反转#

Embedded Ferroelectric Nanoclusters can drive Polarization Reversal in a Non-Ferroelectric Polar Film via the Proximity Effect
📚 arXiv👤 Anna N. Morozovska, Eugene A. Eliseev, Sergei V. Kalinin, Long-Qing Chen, Dean R. Evans, Venkatraman Gopalan📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统铁电掺杂思路，创新性提出"近邻效应"机制：利用AlScN纳米团簇的局部场调控而非整体相变，使非铁电AlN实现低场极化反转。这一"以点带面"策略规避了介电击穿瓶颈，为宽带隙半导体极性调控及
该工作采用Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire热力学方法和有限元模拟，研究了嵌入AlN薄膜中的Al₁₋ₓScₓN铁电纳米团簇通过近邻效应诱导极化切换的机制。研究表明，尖刺状纳米团簇可显著降低AlN的矫顽场，使其在远低于介电击穿场的条件下实现自发极化反转，为调控非铁电材料极化行为提供了新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire热力学方法和有限元模拟，研究了嵌入AlN薄膜中的Al₁₋ₓScₓN铁电纳米团簇通过近邻效应诱导极化切换的机制。研究表明，尖刺状纳米团簇可显著降低AlN的矫顽场，使其在远低于介电击穿场的条件下实现自发极化反转，为调控非铁电材料极化行为提供了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.17214v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Heterogeneous nucleation from defects dominates the electric field required for polarization switching of ferroelectrics. Here, we consider the switching of a nominally non-switchable polar thin film of AlN due to the proximity effect arising from embedded ferroelectric nanoclusters of Al1-xScxN. Using a Landau-Ginzburg-Devonshire thermodynamic approach and finite element modeling, we study the influence of nanocluster shape on polarization switching and domain nucleation emerging in AlN. The ferroelectric nanocluster boundary is modeled as a thin layer transitioning from Al1-xScxN to AlN. We analyze the conditions under which polarization switching in the AlN film occurs at coercive fields significantly lower than its dielectric breakdown field. In the presence of spike-like Al1-xScxN nanoclusters, the proximity effect enables switching of the spontaneous polarization in AlN and significantly reduces the corresponding coercive field. The internal field, which is depolarizing inside the AlN (due to its larger spontaneous polarization) and polarizing within the ferroelectric Al1-xScxN nanoclusters (due to its smaller spontaneous polarization), lowers the potential barrier in the clusters and nucleates nanodomains at the Al1-xScxN-AlN interface, forming localized regions of reversed polarization. Proximity effect can thus provide a pathway towards "thawing" previously "frozen" ferroelectrics through engineered nucleation for memory, actuation and optical technologies.

33

磁控双焦点超表面#

A Magnetically Switchable Bifocal Metasurface
📚 arXiv👤 Alberto Santonocito (Istituto Nazionale di Ottica, Dipartimento di Chimica e Chimica Industriale, Università di Pisa, Pisa), Barbara Patrizi (Istituto Nazionale di Ottica), Alessio Gabbani (Dipartimento di Chimica e Chimica Industriale, Università di Pisa, Pisa), Francesco Pineider (Dipartimento di Chimica e Chimica Industriale, Università di Pisa, Pisa), Guido Toci (Istituto Nazionale di Ottica)📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将磁光材料与Gires-Tournois谐振腔结合，通过外磁场方向切换实现超表面焦距约两倍动态调谐，突破了传统机械调焦局限，为紧凑型非机械可调反射光学元件提供了新范式。
可调谐平面光学对推进紧凑型光子器件至关重要。本文展示了一种反射式磁光超表面的数值研究，其焦距可动态调谐。结构由处于Gires-Tournois谐振腔构型的铋铁石榴石纳米盘组成，石榴石的磁光性质通过外磁场调制反射相位响应，实现不同焦距的聚焦。全波模拟表明，对于固定右旋圆偏振入射波（1.550 μm），超表面根据外加磁场方向呈现不同聚焦特性：外场从+0.2 T切换至-0.2 T时，焦距变化约两倍（从7.16 mm至13.76 mm）。这些…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

可调谐平面光学对推进紧凑型光子器件至关重要。本文展示了一种反射式磁光超表面的数值研究，其焦距可动态调谐。结构由处于Gires-Tournois谐振腔构型的铋铁石榴石纳米盘组成，石榴石的磁光性质通过外磁场调制反射相位响应，实现不同焦距的聚焦。全波模拟表明，对于固定右旋圆偏振入射波（1.550 μm），超表面根据外加磁场方向呈现不同聚焦特性：外场从+0.2 T切换至-0.2 T时，焦距变化约两倍（从7.16 mm至13.76 mm）。这些发现证明磁光超表面为紧凑型反射光学元件中的非机械可调聚焦提供了灵活可行的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27595v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tunable flat optics are essential for advancing compact photonic devices. Here we show a numerical study of a reflective magneto-optical metasurface with a dynamically tunable focal length. The structure comprises bismuth iron garnet nanodisks in a Gires-Tournois resonator configuration. The magneto-optical properties of the garnet modulate the reflected phase response via an external magnetic field, allowing focusing at different focal lengths. Full-wave simulations demonstrate that the metasurface exhibits distinct focusing characteristics depending on the applied magnetic field direction for a fixed right circularly polarized incident wave at 1.550 μm. Specifically, switching the external field from +0.2 T to -0.2 T changes the focal length by a factor of approximately two (from 7.16 mm to 13.76 mm). These findings demonstrate that magneto-optical metasurfaces offer a flexible, viable approach for non-mechanical, tunable focusing in compact reflective optical components.

34

铁电体中的类多铁准粒子#

Multiferroic-like Quasiparticles in Ferroelectrics
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.👤 Ping Tang and Gerrit E. W. Bauer📅 2026-05-01⚡ 磁性/铁电

该工作提出在铁电体中可实现类多铁准粒子，为克服本征多铁材料稀缺（尤其室温下磁性与铁电性看似互斥）的瓶颈提供了新思路。

Author(s): Ping Tang and Gerrit E. W. Bauer Multiferroics are materials with coexisting electric and magnetic orders that are of central importance for fundamental research and technological applications. Unfortunately, intrinsic multiferroics that operate at room temperature remain rare due to an apparent incompatibility between magnetism an… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 176702] Published Fri May 01, 2026

金属有机框架中多能带拓扑诱导的磁非线性霍尔效应#

Magnetononlinear Hall effect from multigap topology in metal-organic frameworks
📚 arXiv👤 Chun Wang Chau, Wojciech J. Jankowski, Bo Peng, Robert-Jan Slager📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文首次将非阿贝尔多能带拓扑中的欧拉类不变量与磁非线性霍尔效应建立关联，突破了传统贝里曲率框架的局限；选择二维kagome金属有机框架作为实验平台，兼具材料可合成性与多参数可调性，为拓扑量子物态的输运
揭示具有非平凡欧拉类不变量的非阿贝尔多能带拓扑可诱导可观测的磁非线性霍尔输运现象。在近年合成的二维kagome N-杂环卡宾金属有机框架中展示该效应，并通过外加电压、温度变化及保持体拓扑与关联边缘态的化学取代实现对非线性效应的调控。该发现确立了欧拉类拓扑在金属有机材料中的实验可探测性，为通过磁输运测量推断拓扑性质开辟新途径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

揭示具有非平凡欧拉类不变量的非阿贝尔多能带拓扑可诱导可观测的磁非线性霍尔输运现象。在近年合成的二维kagome N-杂环卡宾金属有机框架中展示该效应，并通过外加电压、温度变化及保持体拓扑与关联边缘态的化学取代实现对非线性效应的调控。该发现确立了欧拉类拓扑在金属有机材料中的实验可探测性，为通过磁输运测量推断拓扑性质开辟新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26028v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We unveil that non-Abelian multigap band topology characterized by nontrivial Euler class invariants induces observable magnetononlinear Hall transport phenomena. We demonstrate these effects in a highly-tunable class of recently synthesized two-dimensional kagome N-heterocyclic carbene (NHC) metal-organic frameworks. We showcase the controllability of the nonlinear effect upon applying external voltage, changing temperature, and chemical substitutions that preserve the bulk topology and associated edge states. Our findings therefore reveal an uncharted presence of Euler class topology in metal-organic materials that can be experimentally deduced through measurable magnetotransport.

36

独立BaTiO₃薄膜中畴结构对潜热的调控#

Domain-induced control of latent heat in freestanding BaTiO₃ membranes
📚 arXiv👤 Tapas Bar, David Pesquera, Arnau Villalobos-Martin, Cristian Rodriguez-Tinoco, Umair Saeed, Kumara Cordero-Edwards, Jessica Padilla, Jose Manuel Caicedo Roque, Jose Santiso, Pol Lloveras, Leo Boron, Igor Lukyanchuk, Gustau Catalan, Javier Rodriguez-Viejo📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地揭示畴形貌是铁电相变级次的决定性因素，而非传统认知的厚度或边界效应。通过纳米量热法直接观测到：大单畴区呈现一级相变潜热，而纳米畴密集区因自由能势垒降低表现为连续相变。这一发现为通过畴工程
采用准绝热纳米量热法研究无衬底约束的独立BaTiO₃薄膜，证明畴形貌而非厚度或边界条件决定铁电相变级次。具有大单畴区域的厚膜呈现明显潜热，而具有密集180°畴图案的薄膜虽经X射线衍射证实发生相同的四方-立方结构转变，却表现为连续相变。压电力显微镜将该行为与畴尺寸演化关联，金兹堡-朗道分析表明减小的畴尺寸降低自由能势垒，使名义一级失稳变圆滑。该工作为通过畴工程增强热效应提供设计准则。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

采用准绝热纳米量热法研究无衬底约束的独立BaTiO₃薄膜，证明畴形貌而非厚度或边界条件决定铁电相变级次。具有大单畴区域的厚膜呈现明显潜热，而具有密集180°畴图案的薄膜虽经X射线衍射证实发生相同的四方-立方结构转变，却表现为连续相变。压电力显微镜将该行为与畴尺寸演化关联，金兹堡-朗道分析表明减小的畴尺寸降低自由能势垒，使名义一级失稳变圆滑。该工作为通过畴工程增强热效应提供设计准则。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26089v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Thin ferroelectric BaTiO₃ films often exhibit continuous transitions instead of the first-order behavior of bulk crystals, a discrepancy usually attributed to epitaxial strain or dimensionality. Using quasi-adiabatic nanocalorimetry on freestanding BaTiO₃ membranes-free of clamping and substrate heat sinking-we show that domain morphology, not thickness or boundary conditions, controls the transition order. Thick membranes with large, monodomain-like regions display clear latent heat, whereas thinner membranes with dense 180ⁱ̧rc domain patterns show a continuous transition despite undergoing the same tetragonal-cubic structural change confirmed by x-ray diffraction. Piezoresponse force microscopy links this behavior to domain-size evolution, and a Ginzburg-Landau analysis demonstrates how reduced domain size lowers the free-energy barrier, rounding a nominally first-order instability. These results identify domain morphology as the key determinant of ferroelectric transition order in oxide membranes and establish design guidelines for enhancing caloric effects through domain engineering.

37

铁电超晶格中极性斯格明子关联涌现的隐藏交叉与类弛豫响应#

Hidden Crossover and Relaxor-Like Response from Emerging Polar Skyrmion Correlations in Ferroelectric Superlattices
📚 arXiv👤 Zhiyang Wang, Fei Yang, Long-Qing Chen📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本研究揭示铁电超晶格中极性斯格明子存在一种隐藏的热力学交叉：层内孤立态自发转变为层间关联系综，无需引入传统弛豫铁电体所需的淬火无序或极性纳米区域，即可产生类弛豫介电响应。该发现突破了"弛豫行为必关联化
通过大规模相场模拟发现铁电超晶格中极性斯格明子存在隐藏的热力学交叉：在铁电相深处，斯格明子从层内非关联态演变为层间关联系综，无需额外对称破缺或新序参量，却在介电 susceptibility 中产生显著宽峰。该异常源于层间斯格明子关联增长增强的响应与低温下极化诱导刚度抑制介电涨落之间的竞争。交流驱动下峰位随频率移动，呈现类弛豫铁电体行为，尽管不存在淬火无序或极性纳米区域。该工作建立了无序无关的弛豫型介电响应新路径。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

通过大规模相场模拟发现铁电超晶格中极性斯格明子存在隐藏的热力学交叉：在铁电相深处，斯格明子从层内非关联态演变为层间关联系综，无需额外对称破缺或新序参量，却在介电 susceptibility 中产生显著宽峰。该异常源于层间斯格明子关联增长增强的响应与低温下极化诱导刚度抑制介电涨落之间的竞争。交流驱动下峰位随频率移动，呈现类弛豫铁电体行为，尽管不存在淬火无序或极性纳米区域。该工作建立了无序无关的弛豫型介电响应新路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26100v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Polar skyrmions in ferroelectric superlattices are nanoscale topological polarization textures typically regarded as weakly coupled objects confined to individual layers, with a role secondary to that of the underlying symmetry-breaking order parameter. Here using large-scale phase-field simulations of ferroelectric superlattices, we uncover a hidden thermal crossover deep inside the ferroelectric phase, where polar skyrmions evolve from an uncorrelated, layer-resolved state into an interlayer-correlated ensemble. This crossover occurs without additional symmetry breaking or a new order parameter, but produces a pronounced broad peak in the dielectric susceptibility. The anomaly originates from the competition between correlation-enhanced response, associated with the growth of interlayer skyrmion correlations, and polarization-induced stiffness, which suppresses dielectric fluctuations at low temperature. Under AC driving, the peak shifts with frequency, resembling relaxor ferroelectrics despite the absence of quenched disorder or polar nanoregions. Our results establish a disorder-free route to relaxor-like dielectric response and identify topological defect correlations as an organizing principle for thermodynamic anomalies, providing a mechanism distinct from conventional critical behavior associated with symmetry breaking and divergent order-parameter fluctuations.

38

几何约束诱导自旋冰中的拓扑相变#

Topological transitions in spin-ice induced by geometrical constraints
📚 arXiv👤 R. A. Borzi, E. S. Loscar, S. A. Grigera📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统热力学极限认知，揭示几何约束可诱导全新拓扑相变：通过限制自旋冰横向尺寸，使弦激发量子化并产生离散磁化台阶。首次建立降维解析框架确定临界场，为低维拓扑物态设计提供可控实验路径。
研究最近邻自旋冰模型在沿[111]和[110]方向磁场下的行为，聚焦样品几何对拓扑相变的稳定作用。热力学极限下该场取向不存在Kasteleyn转变，但限制横向尺寸可定性改变体系行为：沿场方向伸长且横向面积有限的样品中，无散度约束使跨越系统的弦激发数量量子化，磁化通过一系列离散台阶演化，对应单根弦的相继进入。蒙特卡洛模拟证实每次转变伴随尖锐磁化台阶及比热、susceptibility 峰，其幅度随系统长度线性缩放；基于降维系统熵-能平衡…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

研究最近邻自旋冰模型在沿[111]和[110]方向磁场下的行为，聚焦样品几何对拓扑相变的稳定作用。热力学极限下该场取向不存在Kasteleyn转变，但限制横向尺寸可定性改变体系行为：沿场方向伸长且横向面积有限的样品中，无散度约束使跨越系统的弦激发数量量子化，磁化通过一系列离散台阶演化，对应单根弦的相继进入。蒙特卡洛模拟证实每次转变伴随尖锐磁化台阶及比热、susceptibility 峰，其幅度随系统长度线性缩放；基于降维系统熵-能平衡的解析处理导出各拓扑转变的临界场。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26125v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the nearest-neighbor spin-ice model subjected to a magnetic field applied along the global [111] and [110] directions, focusing on the role of sample geometry in stabilizing topological phase transitions. While no Kasteleyn transition is expected for this field orientations in the thermodynamic limit, we show that constraining the transverse dimensions of the system qualitatively changes the behavior. For samples elongated along the field direction with finite transverse area, the divergence-free constraint quantizes the number of string excitations that can span the system. As a result, the magnetization evolves through a cascade of discrete transitions corresponding to the successive entry of individual strings. Using Monte Carlo simulations, we demonstrate that each transition is marked by sharp magnetization steps and peaks in the specific heat and susceptibility, whose amplitudes scale linearly with the system length. We complement the numerical results with an analytical treatment based on the entropy - energy balance on a system with reduced dimensionality, deriving the critical fields associated with each topological sector. In the isotropic limit these transitions merge into a smooth crossover, but for anisotropic samples they remain sharply resolved, illustrating an unconventional mechanism by which finite geometry stabilizes topological phase transitions in frustrated magnets.

39

二维材料中大单轴均匀应变的实现#

Achieving Large Uniaxial and Homogeneous Strain in Two-Dimensional Materials
📚 arXiv👤 Yangchen He, Jessica Kienbaum, Wuzhang Fang, Hongrui Ma, Ying Wang, Ping Yuan, Daniel A. Rhodes📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：开发高成品率、可逆的二维材料应变调控平台，突破现有方法在应变幅度、循环稳定性及低温传递效率的瓶颈，实现近断裂极限的均匀单轴应变与可控线性梯度，为挠电/挠磁效应的系统研究及二维材料物性调控开辟新途径。
报道一种高成品率样品制备与器件应变平台，克服现有方法应变低于1.5%、循环重复性差及低温应变传递低等局限，实现精确可逆的应变调控直至材料本征断裂极限。该平台可设计数十微米尺度上的均匀线性应变梯度，为系统研究挠电与挠磁现象提供新途径。以CrSBr为模型体系，展示约4%的均匀单轴应变（滑移可忽略）及高达0.06%/μm的线性应变梯度，且该方法适用于广泛的二维材料体系。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

报道一种高成品率样品制备与器件应变平台，克服现有方法应变低于1.5%、循环重复性差及低温应变传递低等局限，实现精确可逆的应变调控直至材料本征断裂极限。该平台可设计数十微米尺度上的均匀线性应变梯度，为系统研究挠电与挠磁现象提供新途径。以CrSBr为模型体系，展示约4%的均匀单轴应变（滑移可忽略）及高达0.06%/μm的线性应变梯度，且该方法适用于广泛的二维材料体系。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26164v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Strain engineering is a powerful tool for tuning the electronic, magnetic, and topological properties of two-dimensional (2D) materials and thin films - particularly at high values of strain (>3%) where many electronic, magnetic, and structural transitions have been predicted. However, most approaches to tuning strain in 2D materials are limited below 1.5%, with poor repeatability when cycling strain and low strain transfer when cooling to cryogenic temperatures. Here, we report a high-yield sample preparation and device strain platform that overcomes these limitations, enabling precise, reversible strain tuning up to the intrinsic strain-to-failure of the materials tested herein. In addition, we show that this platform can be used to controllably design uniform linear strain gradients across of 10's of μm, providing a novel route to systematically investigate flexoelectric and flexomagnetic phenomena. Using CrSBr as a model system, we demonstrate uniform uniaxial strain, up to ~4%, with negligible slippage and linear strain gradients of up to 0.06%/μm. We further show that our strain approach is applicable to a broad class of 2D materials, validating its performance for three different phases of transition metal dichalcogenides: 2H-MoTe₂, 1T^prime-MoTe₂ and T_d-WTe₂. In T_d-WTe₂, verified by theoretical calculations, we show a continuous redshift of the A₁³ mode, up to a record-breaking ~5.5% strain, with a clear separation of the A₁³ and A₁² modes starting at 2% strain.

40

面内磁场下应变α-Sn与α-SnGe薄膜的负磁阻效应#

Negative magnetoresistance in strained α-Sn and α-SnGe films in an in-plane magnetic field
📚 arXiv👤 Sunny Phan (Department of Physics and Astronomy, University of Cincinnati, Cincinnati, OH USA), Andrei Kogan (Department of Physics and Astronomy, University of Cincinnati, Cincinnati, OH USA), Jesse Thompson (KBR, Beavercreek Township, OH, USA, Air Force Research Laboratory, Wright-Patterson AFB, OH, USA), Trent Johnson (KBR, Beavercreek Township, OH, USA, Air Force Research Laboratory, Wright-Patterson AFB, OH, USA), Alexander Khaetskii (Department of Physics and Astronomy, Ohio University, Athens, OH, USA), Arnold Kiefer (Air Force Research Laboratory, Wright-Patterson AFB, OH, USA)📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作系统区分了狄拉克半金属态与拓扑绝缘体态下α-Sn负磁阻的磁场响应特征，首次以对比实验排除了手性反常机制，为厘清拓扑材料中负磁阻起源提供了关键判据，并揭示了样品质量对输运结果的重要影响。
为检验手性反常是否为应变α-Sn负磁阻（MR）的成因，研究处于狄拉克半金属态的纯α-Sn薄膜和处于三维拓扑绝缘体态的α-SnGe合金薄膜的磁输运性质。两种态均观察到电流平行或垂直于面内磁场时的负MR，但磁场依赖关系不同。结果与手性反常不符，提示狄拉克/外尔半金属相中α-Sn的负MR可能源于其他机制。同时讨论了样品设计与材料质量因素对已有研究中不一致MR观测的可能贡献。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

为检验手性反常是否为应变α-Sn负磁阻（MR）的成因，研究处于狄拉克半金属态的纯α-Sn薄膜和处于三维拓扑绝缘体态的α-SnGe合金薄膜的磁输运性质。两种态均观察到电流平行或垂直于面内磁场时的负MR，但磁场依赖关系不同。结果与手性反常不符，提示狄拉克/外尔半金属相中α-Sn的负MR可能源于其他机制。同时讨论了样品设计与材料质量因素对已有研究中不一致MR观测的可能贡献。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26168v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: To test the hypothesis that the chiral anomaly is responsible for negative magnetoresitance (MR) in atn{}, we have studied magnetotransport in strained, epitaxial films of pure aSn{} and the alloy aSnGe{} that are in the Dirac semimetal and 3D topological insulator state, respectively. We have observed for both states a negative MR with current either parallel or transverse to the in-plane magnetic field, but with a different dependence of MR on ěcB strength. Our results are inconsistent with the chiral anomaly and suggest that other mechanisms may be responsible for negative MR in the Dirac/Weyl semimetal phase of aSn{}. We also discuss several factors in sample design and material quality that may be contributing to the incongruous observations of MR reported in studies of strained atn{} films.

41

Coexistence of d-Wave Altermagnetism and Topological States in Janus FeSeX (X = S, Te) Monolayers#

📚 arXiv👤 Alvaro Gonzalez-Garcia, William Lopez-Perez, Paola Pacheco, Luz Ramirez-Montes, Rafael Gonzalez-Hernandez📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在Janus FeSeX单层中实现d波交替磁性与拓扑态的共存，利用化学不对称性在无自旋-轨道耦合下产生动量依赖自旋劈裂，为拓扑交替磁性及低耗散自旋电子器件提供新平台。
arXiv:2604.26239v1 公告类型: 新 摘要：非常规磁性与能带拓扑在二维材料中的相互作用已成为凝聚态物理的重要研究主题。本文通过第一性原理计算，揭示了Janus FeSeX（X = S, Te）单层中d波交替磁性（altermagnetism）与拓扑行为的共存。Janus结构的化学不对称性破缺了面外镜面对称性和反演对称性，导致各向异性交换相互作用以及动量依赖的自旋劈裂——即使在无自旋-轨道耦合情况下亦然，这是交替磁性的标…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.26239v1 公告类型: 新

摘要：非常规磁性与能带拓扑在二维材料中的相互作用已成为凝聚态物理的重要研究主题。本文通过第一性原理计算，揭示了Janus FeSeX（X = S, Te）单层中d波交替磁性（altermagnetism）与拓扑行为的共存。Janus结构的化学不对称性破缺了面外镜面对称性和反演对称性，导致各向异性交换相互作用以及动量依赖的自旋劈裂——即使在无自旋-轨道耦合情况下亦然，这是交替磁性的标志性特征。声子色散分析确认了两种化合物的动力学稳定性，而应变依赖计算表明交替磁性交换劈裂大小（Δₛₑ）可通过双轴应变有效调控。当计入自旋-轨道耦合时，费米能级处出现有限拓扑带隙，伴随量子化的自旋霍尔电导平台及非平庸拓扑不变量（自旋陈数 = 1，Z₂ = 1）。这些发现确立了FeSeS和FeSeTe作为实现拓扑交替磁性及自旋-轨道驱动电荷-自旋转换的有前景的二维平台，从而为低耗散自旋电子器件开辟了新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26239v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The interplay between unconventional magnetism and band topology in two-dimensional materials has emerged as an important theme in condensed matter physics. Here, we present first-principles calculations that reveal the coexistence of d-wave altermagnetism and topological behavior in Janus FeSeX (X = S, Te) monolayers. The chemical asymmetry of the Janus structure breaks both out-of-plane mirror and inversion symmetries, leading to anisotropic exchange interactions and momentum-dependent spin splittings even in the absence of spin-orbit coupling, the defining signature of altermagnetism. Phonon dispersion analyses confirm the dynamical stability of both compounds, while strain-dependent calculations demonstrate that the magnitude of the altermagnetic exchange splitting (Δₛ₎ can be efficiently tuned by biaxial strain. When spin-orbit coupling is included, a finite topological band gap emerges at the Fermi level, accompanied by quantized spin Hall conductivity plateaus and nontrivial topological invariants (spin Chern number = 1, Z2=1). These findings establish FeSeS and FeSeTe as promising two-dimensional platforms for realizing topological altermagnetism and spin--orbit--driven charge--spin conversion, thus opening new avenues for low-dissipation spintronic devices.

42

Influence of strain on the anomalous Hall and Nernst effects in Fe thin films#

📚 arXiv👤 Ao Nakagawa, Ryo Toyama, Keisuke Masuda, Weinan Zhou, Hirofumi Suto, Kodchakorn Simalaotao, Yoshio Miura, Yuya Sakuraba, Tetsunori Koda📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究以单元素铁磁体Fe为理想平台，通过外延应变调控首次系统分离了反常霍尔效应与反常能斯特效应的物理起源，证实AHC由内禀贝里曲率主导而ANC受外禀机制显著影响，为精准调控磁性材料横向输运效应提供了关
arXiv:2604.26257v1 公告类型：新 摘要：反常霍尔效应（AHE）和反常能斯特效应（ANE）是磁性材料中的横向输运现象，反映了费米面附近电子结构产生的贝里曲率。晶格应变通过改变电子结构为调控这些效应提供了直接手段；然而，在多组分材料中，由于杂质和无序引起的外禀贡献带来的复杂性，以及与第一性原理计算进行简单直接比较的困难，通过贝里曲率调制来分离应变诱导效应颇具挑战。本研究以Fe为研究对象，这是一种电子结构明确的典型单元素铁…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.26257v1 公告类型：新
摘要：反常霍尔效应（AHE）和反常能斯特效应（ANE）是磁性材料中的横向输运现象，反映了费米面附近电子结构产生的贝里曲率。晶格应变通过改变电子结构为调控这些效应提供了直接手段；然而，在多组分材料中，由于杂质和无序引起的外禀贡献带来的复杂性，以及与第一性原理计算进行简单直接比较的困难，通过贝里曲率调制来分离应变诱导效应颇具挑战。本研究以Fe为研究对象，这是一种电子结构明确的典型单元素铁磁体，通过改变衬底和沉积条件来调节外延薄膜中应变的符号和大小，以研究应变对AHE和ANE的影响。标度律分析表明，内禀反常霍尔电导率（AHC）表现出明显的四方畸变（c/a）依赖性，与基于贝里曲率调制的理论计算高度吻合。相比之下，反常能斯特电导率（ANC）与理论值存在显著偏差，且c/a依赖性明显不同。这些结果揭示了Fe薄膜中AHC与ANC在物理起源上的关键差异：AHC主要由内禀机制主导，而ANC则强烈受外禀贡献影响。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26257v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The anomalous Hall effect (AHE) and anomalous Nernst effect (ANE) are the transverse transport phenomena in magnetic materials, which reflect the Berry curvature arising from the electronic structure near the Fermi level. Lattice strain provides a direct means to tune these effects by modifying the electronic structure; however, disentangling the strain-induced effect through the Berry curvature modulations in multicomponent materials is challenging due to complexities arising from extrinsic contributions by impurities and disorder, as well as difficulties in simple direct comparison with first-principles calculations. In this study, we focus on Fe, a prototypical single element ferromagnet with a well-established electronic structure, and tune the sign and magnitude of the strain in epitaxial thin films of by varying the substrates and deposition conditions to investigate the strain effect on the AHE and ANE. Scaling law analysis revealed that the intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) exhibits a clear tetragonal distortion (c/a) dependence, in good agreement with theoretical calculations based on Berry curvature modification. In contrast, the anomalous Nernst conductivity (ANC) shows a pronounced deviation from the theoretical values and markedly different c/a dependence. These results demonstrate a crucial difference in the physical origin between the AHC and the ANC in the Fe films; the AHC is predominantly governed by intrinsic mechanisms, whereas the ANC is strongly influenced by the extrinsic contribution.

43

通过ARPES与XMCD揭示畸变kagome材料RTi₃Bi₄（R = Nd, Sm, Gd）中的磁性#

Revealing magnetism in the distorted kagome RTi₃Bi₄ (R = Nd, Sm, Gd) via ARPES and XMCD
📚 arXiv👤 C. Lim, F. Ballester, A. Kar, M. Alkorta, D. Subires, J. Dai, M. Tallarida, E. Vescovo, T. K. Kim, C. Cacho, C. Yi, S. Roychowdhury, A. Kumar Sharma, Y. Choi, G. Fabbris, J. Strempfer, P. Gargiani, C. Shekhar, C. Felser, I. Errea, M. G. Vergniory, S. Blanco-Canosa📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在畸变kagome体系RTi₃Bi₄中实现ARPES与XMCD的联合表征，突破性地分离出表面态与体态贡献，并揭示Gd近邻效应可诱导Ti产生局域磁矩，为理解拓扑磁性材料中的自旋翻转机制提供了原
该工作结合角分辨光电子能谱、密度泛函理论与X射线磁圆二色性研究RTi₃Bi₄的电子与磁结构。ARPES与DFT表明体态由Ti能带杂化主导，Γ点弱电子型口袋为表面态；XMCD求和规则结合原子多体理论获得自旋与轨道磁矩，发现GdTi₃Bi₄中Ti存在由近邻Gd锯齿链诱导的小磁矩，为理解自旋翻转跃迁提供了关键信息。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作结合角分辨光电子能谱、密度泛函理论与X射线磁圆二色性研究RTi₃Bi₄的电子与磁结构。ARPES与DFT表明体态由Ti能带杂化主导，Γ点弱电子型口袋为表面态；XMCD求和规则结合原子多体理论获得自旋与轨道磁矩，发现GdTi₃Bi₄中Ti存在由近邻Gd锯齿链诱导的小磁矩，为理解自旋翻转跃迁提供了关键信息。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26636v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Kagome materials are known for hosting emergent quantum phenomena driven by the interaction between different lattice, charge and spin orders. Here, we present a detailed angle resolved photoemission (ARPES), density functional theory (DFT) and x-ray magnetic circular dichroism (XMCD) study of the electronic and magnetic structure of RTi₃Bi₄ (R = Nd, Sm, Gd). ARPES and DFT demonstrate that the bulk electronic band structure is dominated by the hybridization of the Ti bands, and the weak electron-like pocket at Γ is identified as a surface state. The isotropic XAS profile of the M₄,₅-edge of the rare earth is consistent with the presence of R³⁺ oxidation state. Using the XMCD sum rules, backed by the atomic multiplet theory calculations, we obtain the spin and orbital magnetic moments. The Ti L₂,₃-edge XMCD reveals the presence of a small magnetic moment in GdTi₃Bi₄, presumably driven by the proximity of the Ti kagome layers to the zigzag chains of Gd, while the total magnetic moment of Gd is shared by the f and d electrons. Our combined XMCD, ARPES and DFT study brings an important piece of information to understand the spin flip transitions and anomalous Hall effect observed in the RTi₃Bi₄ kagome metals.

44

合成反铁磁体中超越常规斯格明子的自旋纹理#

Beyond conventional skyrmions in synthetic antiferromagnets
📚 arXiv👤 Kayla Fallon, Reshma Peremadathil-Pradeep, Christopher E. A. Barker, Zoey Tumbleson, Emily Darwin, Andrea Meo, Eloi Haltz, Benjamin A. Brereton, Trevor Almeida, Colin Kirkbride, Sara Villa, Sophie A. Morley, Mario Carpentieri, Riccardo Tomasello, Hans J. Hug, Christopher H. Marrows, Stephen McVitie📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统单材料体系局限，利用化学不对称合成反铁磁体的层间交换耦合差异，首次实现常规与反极性斯格明子的电场可调控共存，为高密度、低功耗自旋电子存储器件提供了全新多态编码方案。
该研究在由两种化学不同铁磁体（CoB和CoFeB）构成的合成反铁磁体中，利用外磁场和层间交换耦合对子晶格的不对称作用，发现了两种不同场区下的斯格明子家族：高场下核与外场反平行的常规极性斯格明子，以及低场下有效场反号时出现的反极性斯格明子。返程记忆测量证实了两家族独立的成核路径，元素分辨X射线磁测量、磁力与洛伦兹透射电子显微学及微磁模拟揭示了其形成机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在由两种化学不同铁磁体（CoB和CoFeB）构成的合成反铁磁体中，利用外磁场和层间交换耦合对子晶格的不对称作用，发现了两种不同场区下的斯格明子家族：高场下核与外场反平行的常规极性斯格明子，以及低场下有效场反号时出现的反极性斯格明子。返程记忆测量证实了两家族独立的成核路径，元素分辨X射线磁测量、磁力与洛伦兹透射电子显微学及微磁模拟揭示了其形成机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26680v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic skyrmions are topologically protected spin textures that can act as reconfigurable nanoscale information carriers. In synthetic antiferromagnets (SAFs), interlayer exchange coupling offers an additional control parameter beyond the interfacial Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction (DMI) and magnetic anisotropy. Here, we engineer a SAF composed of two chemically distinct ferromagnets (CoB and CoFeB), in which the external magnetic field and interlayer exchange act asymmetrically on the sublattices. The competition of these effects, acting as a resultant effective-field, gives rise to two distinct skyrmion families in different field regimes. In large fields, conventional-polarity skyrmions nucleate, with core antiparallel to the external field, whereas in smaller fields an inverse-polarity skyrmion state emerges as the effective-field reverses sign and almost saturates the CoFeB layers. Return-point memory measurements confirm independent nucleation pathways for the two families. Using element-resolved x-ray magnetometry, correlative magnetic force and Lorentz transmission electron microscopies, and parameter-matched micromagnetic modelling, we show that all textures reside only in the CoFeB layers, which experience a Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) exchange field originating from the CoB layers. This effective-field method provides a robust route to programmable three-dimensional spin textures with controlled polarity in selected layers of a multilayer with potential for applications in skyrmion-based computing and spin-logic architectures.

45

原位透射电子显微镜追踪Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂异质结构可见光脉冲激光退火#

Tracking visible pulsed laser annealing of Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 heterostructures with in situ transmission electron microscopy
📚 arXiv👤 Aida Amini, Shruti Verma, Katharina Kohlmann, Sebastian Obernberger, Jean-Christof Lamanque, Andreas Rüdiger, Kenneth R. Beyerlein📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将可见光纳秒激光脉冲退火与原位透射电子显微镜相结合，利用TiN吸收层实现HZO的选择性晶化，突破了传统热退火的温度限制与界面扩散问题。通过原位局域定量表征建立了膜厚-激光能量-铁电相分数
该工作利用可见光纳秒激光脉冲对模拟CMOS器件结构的Si₃N₄/TiN/Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂薄膜异质结构进行退火，借助TiN在可见光区的吸收实现HZO晶化。通过改进透射电子显微镜的原位局域测量，量化了HZO膜厚、临界激光能量密度与铁电相分数的关系，发现8 nm HZO膜在177 mJ/cm²单脉冲下可获得86%的正交相铁电相。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用可见光纳秒激光脉冲对模拟CMOS器件结构的Si₃N₄/TiN/Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂薄膜异质结构进行退火，借助TiN在可见光区的吸收实现HZO晶化。通过改进透射电子显微镜的原位局域测量，量化了HZO膜厚、临界激光能量密度与铁电相分数的关系，发现8 nm HZO膜在177 mJ/cm²单脉冲下可获得86%的正交相铁电相。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26718v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Laser annealing offers a promising route to back end of the line fabrication of ferroelectric thin film transistors based on hafnium-zirconium oxide (HZO). Due to the wide band gap of this material, previous reports have studied the crystallization of HZO using ultraviolet or infrared light. In contrast, we monitor its crystallization in a Si3N4/TiN/Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 thin film heterostructure upon irradiation with visible nanosecond laser pulses. This geometry mimics the structure of CMOS devices and harnesses the absorption of TiN in the visible regime to generate the heat necessary for the transformation. Through a series of local in situ measurements using a modified transmission electron microscope, we quantify the relationship between the HZO film thickness, critical laser energy density and the ferroelectric HZO phase fraction, finding a sharp threshold behavior in the laser pulse energy necessary to crystallize HZO. The optimal condition of irradiating an 8-nm HZO film with a single laser pulse with an energy density of 177 mJ/cm2 is found to produce 86% of the ferroelectric orthorhombic phase. Heat transfer dynamics within the heterostructure during laser annealing are revealed by finite element simulations, where the partial melting of the silicon nitride substrate is found to play an important role limiting the temperature to 1900 degC. This finding as well as the observed laser pulse energy threshold behavior support a kinetic crystallization pathway involving the tetragonal phase. More generally, these findings show how laser-driven phase engineering can lead to scalable design and enhanced performance of ferroelectric materials in advanced electronic applications.

46

Weyl半金属-层状陈绝缘体结中的普适磁隧穿电导#

Universal magnetotunnel conductance at a Weyl semimetal-layered Chern insulator junction
📚 arXiv👤 Nirnoy Basak, Sumathi Rao, Faruk Abdulla📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示Weyl半金属-层状陈绝缘体结中拓扑失配迫使费米弧态经布里渊区边界重连的新机制，发现磁隧穿电导在高场下趋于普适常数。这一陈层拓扑电荷泵浦主导的行为为拓扑量子器件提供了与材料细节无关的鲁棒输运
该研究考察垂直磁场下Weyl半金属与层状陈绝缘体结中的电子输运，发现拓扑失配导致界面费米弧态具有独特连接性——被迫通过布里渊区边界重连而非终止于Weyl节点投影。磁隧穿电导在低场下线增长，超过临界场后饱和至与界面耦合、弧几何及晶格参数无关的普适常数，反映陈层拓扑电荷泵浦主导的输运机制。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究考察垂直磁场下Weyl半金属与层状陈绝缘体结中的电子输运，发现拓扑失配导致界面费米弧态具有独特连接性——被迫通过布里渊区边界重连而非终止于Weyl节点投影。磁隧穿电导在低场下线增长，超过临界场后饱和至与界面耦合、弧几何及晶格参数无关的普适常数，反映陈层拓扑电荷泵浦主导的输运机制。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26739v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate electronic transport across a junction between a Weyl semimetal (WSM) and a layered Chern insulator (LCI) in the presence of a magnetic field perpendicular to the interface. The topological mismatch between the gapless Weyl semimetal and the momentum-resolved chiral edge modes of the layered Chern insulator leads to interface Fermi-arc states with a qualitatively distinct connectivity: unlike WSM-WSM junctions, the interface Fermi arcs are forced to reconnect through the Brillouin-zone boundary rather than terminating at the projections of the Weyl nodes. We analyze the spectrum and compute the magneto tunnel conductance mediated by the interface-localized states. We find that the conductance increases linearly with magnetic field at low fields and saturates beyond a critical field to a constant value that is independent of microscopic details such as interface coupling, arc geometry, and lattice-scale parameters. This universal saturation reflects a transport mechanism governed by the topological charge pumping associated with the Chern layers, rather than magnetic breakdown between Fermi arcs. We further show that, under specific conditions, a junction between two distinct Weyl semimetals can exhibit a similar saturation behavior, thereby clarifying the topological origin of the observed universality.

47

重稀土正交单晶TbAlGe的各向异性变磁性与磁输运#

Anisotropic metamagnetism and magnetotransport of heavy rare-earth orthorhombic single-crystal TbAlGe
📚 arXiv👤 Ram Kumar, K. E. Avers, V. Saini, D. S. Sokratov, Y. Anand, P. Saraf, J. A. Horn, N. Brenowitz, S. Otazo, P. Sobel, D. Graf, S. R. Saha, J. Paglione📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在TbAlGe中观测到a轴独有的级联变磁转变，并构建多相磁相图，为理解重稀土拓扑材料中局域4f磁矩与拓扑电子态的耦合机制提供了关键实验基础，对探索磁场可调拓扑物态具有重要指导意义。
该工作对RAlGe拓扑家族中居里温度最高的TbAlGe单晶进行系统研究，发现其Cmcm结构中存在两个零场反铁磁相变（40 K和8 K），且仅在a轴方向磁场下出现丰富的级联变磁转变。结合电阻、磁化、比热及高达41.5 T的磁输运测量，构建了TbAlGe的多相磁相图，揭示了局域4f磁性与巡游电子拓扑之间的复杂关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作对RAlGe拓扑家族中居里温度最高的TbAlGe单晶进行系统研究，发现其Cmcm结构中存在两个零场反铁磁相变（40 K和8 K），且仅在a轴方向磁场下出现丰富的级联变磁转变。结合电阻、磁化、比热及高达41.5 T的磁输运测量，构建了TbAlGe的多相磁相图，揭示了局域4f磁性与巡游电子拓扑之间的复杂关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26758v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report a comprehensive investigation of the anisotropic magnetism and magnetic field-induced transitions in single crystals of the orthorhombic system TbAlGe, a member of the topological RAlGe (R = rare-earth) family with the highest ordering temeprature in the RAlX (X = Si, Ge) series. With a single rare earth site with triangular coordination in its Cmcm orthorhombic unit cell, TbAlGe harbors complex magnetic interactions that yield two antiferromagnetic transitions at 40 K and 8 K in zero field, and a rich cascade of metamagnetic transitions that only appear for fields directed along the crystallographic a-axis. Combining electrical resistivity, magnetization and heat capacity measurements with magnetotransport experiments performed up to 41.5 T, we construct a magnetic phase diagram mapping the multiple magnetic phases of TbAlGe, and discuss the complex interplay between localized 4f magnetism and itinerant electronic topology, establishing TbAlGe as a compelling platform for exploring tunable magnetic semimetal physics.

48

Kagome晶格Hubbard模型的有限温度铁磁关联#

Finite-Temperature Ferromagnetic Correlations of the Kagome Lattice Hubbard Model
📚 arXiv👤 Francisco Correia, Kyle Corbett, Ehsan Khatami📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统绘制了Kagome晶格Hubbard模型有限温度铁磁相图，揭示Nagaoka铁磁性向掺杂区的连续演化规律，为理解量子几何阻挫体系中关联驱动的磁有序机制提供关键基准，对拓扑量子磁性材料设计
该工作采用数值连接簇展开和行列式量子蒙特卡洛两种精确有限温度方法，研究Kagome晶格费米-Hubbard模型中铁磁关联的范围及其对掺杂和相互作用的依赖关系。发现排斥相互作用在高电子密度区增强铁磁关联，且随相互作用强度增加，强铁磁关联区向半满扩展，与Mott绝缘区附近的Nagaoka铁磁性平滑连接；同时通过电荷压缩率获得半满金属-绝缘体转变临界相互作用强度的精确估计。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用数值连接簇展开和行列式量子蒙特卡洛两种精确有限温度方法，研究Kagome晶格费米-Hubbard模型中铁磁关联的范围及其对掺杂和相互作用的依赖关系。发现排斥相互作用在高电子密度区增强铁磁关联，且随相互作用强度增加，强铁磁关联区向半满扩展，与Mott绝缘区附近的Nagaoka铁磁性平滑连接；同时通过电荷压缩率获得半满金属-绝缘体转变临界相互作用强度的精确估计。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26827v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The Kagome lattice Fermi-Hubbard model is one of the most physically rich, and at the same time most challenging, models to study in strongly-correlated physics. Among its special features are geometric frustration and a flat energy band that create conditions favorable to ferromagnetism near the band insulating limit. Here, we utilize two exact finite-temperature methods, the numerical linked-cluster expansion and the determinant quantum Monte Carlo, to study the extent as well as doping and interaction dependence of ferromagnetic correlations and other thermodynamic properties of the model. We find that repulsive interactions enhance ferromagnetic correlations at high electron densities and that increasing the interaction strength, extends the region with strong ferromagnetic correlations towards half filling, smoothly connecting it to Nagaoka ferromagnetism near the Mott insulating region. We also use the charge compressibility to obtain an accurate estimate for the critical interaction strength for the metal-insulator transition at half filling. These results improve our understanding of the magnetic tendencies of the model away from half filling and pave the way for further studies, including with ultracold atoms in optical lattices.

49

AgCrSe₂单晶生长诱导非化学计量比的解析#

Resolving growth-induced off-stoichiometry in AgCrSe₂ single crystals
📚 arXiv👤 Felix Eder, Zeno Maesen, Yurii Skourski, Enrico Giannini, Oksana Zaharko, Fabian O. von Rohr📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统解析了化学气相输运法中CrCl₃输运剂引入的Cl掺杂及Ag空位协同导致的非化学计量比效应，阐明了其抑制磁有序温度的微观机制；通过发展Ag/Se自熔剂生长法突破性地恢复了本征磁性质，为层状
该研究揭示化学气相输运法生长的层状反铁磁体AgCrSe₂单晶存在系统性的非化学计量比（组成为Ag₁₋ₓCr(Se₂₋ᵧClᵧ)，x≈y≈0.08），源于CrCl₃输运剂的使用，导致Néel温度从化学计量样的58 K被压制至46 K。通过优化Ag/Se自熔剂生长法，获得了恢复化学计量粉末样品磁转变温度和饱和场的大单晶，确立了自熔剂生长制备高质量AgCrSe₂单晶的路线。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究揭示化学气相输运法生长的层状反铁磁体AgCrSe₂单晶存在系统性的非化学计量比（组成为Ag₁₋ₓCr(Se₂₋ᵧClᵧ)，x≈y≈0.08），源于CrCl₃输运剂的使用，导致Néel温度从化学计量样的58 K被压制至46 K。通过优化Ag/Se自熔剂生长法，获得了恢复化学计量粉末样品磁转变温度和饱和场的大单晶，确立了自熔剂生长制备高质量AgCrSe₂单晶的路线。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26887v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The layered delafossite-like antiferromagnet AgCrSe₂ is a superionic conductor at high temperatures and has been reported to exhibit anomalous Hall behavior and Kondo physics at low temperatures. These extraordinary transport properties have been established almost exclusively on single crystals grown by chemical vapor transport, raising questions about the role of growth-induced off-stoichiometry. Using elemental analysis, single-crystal X-ray diffraction, and magnetization measurements, we show that such crystals are indeed systematically off-stoichiometric, with a general composition of Ag₁₋ₓCr(Se₂₋yCl_y) (x approx y approx 0.08) arising from the use of CrCl₃ as a transport agent. This off-stoichiometry manifests in altered magnetic properties, most notably a suppressed Néel temperature of 46,K compared to 58,K in stoichiometric polycrystalline samples prepared by solid-state synthesis. By optimizing an Ag/Se self-flux growth method, we obtained large single crystals of AgCrSe₂ that recover the magnetic transition temperature and saturation field of stoichiometric powder samples. These results establish self-flux growth as a route to high-quality stoichiometric AgCrSe₂ single crystals and provide a reliable platform for reassessing whether the reported anomalous transport phenomena are intrinsic or arise from off-stoichiometry.

50

各向异性Kagome反铁磁体的Schwinger-Boson平均场研究#

Schwinger-Boson Mean-Field Study of the Anisotropic Kagome Antiferromagnet
📚 arXiv👤 Sankha Subhra Bakshi, Brandon B. Le, Seung-Hun Lee, Gia-Wei Chern📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将投影对称群拟设拓展至各向异性Kagome体系，揭示交换各向异性通过自旋子能谱重构驱动量子相变的微观机制，为理解量子自旋液体向对称性破缺相的转变提供了可控的理论框架，对探索新型量子磁性材
该工作利用Schwinger-Boson平均场理论研究空间交换各向异性对自旋-1/2 Kagome反铁磁体的影响。通过引入参数δ控制一组近邻键的Heisenberg交换强度，构建相应的投影对称群拟设，发现各向异性主要重构低能自旋子能谱，导致最低自旋子支软化及双自旋子连续谱下移。足够大的δ使自旋子能隙闭合，触发自旋子凝聚和磁有序，所得磁序具有本征各向异性特征。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用Schwinger-Boson平均场理论研究空间交换各向异性对自旋-1/2 Kagome反铁磁体的影响。通过引入参数δ控制一组近邻键的Heisenberg交换强度，构建相应的投影对称群拟设，发现各向异性主要重构低能自旋子能谱，导致最低自旋子支软化及双自旋子连续谱下移。足够大的δ使自旋子能隙闭合，触发自旋子凝聚和磁有序，所得磁序具有本征各向异性特征。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26907v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the effect of spatial exchange anisotropy on the spin-1/2 kagome antiferromagnet using Schwinger-boson mean-field theory. The anisotropy is introduced by strengthening the Heisenberg exchange along one set of nearest-neighbor bonds relative to the other two, and is controlled by a parameter δ that measures the deviation from the isotropic limit. Incorporating the reduced lattice symmetry, we construct the corresponding projective-symmetry-group ansätze and focus on representative 0- and π-flux states connected to the conventional q=0 and sqrt3×sqrt3 kagome states. We find that anisotropy predominantly reconstructs the low-energy spinon sector, leading to a strong softening of the lowest spinon branch and a downward shift of the two-spinon continuum. At sufficiently large δ, the spinon gap closes at ansatz-dependent values, signaling an instability toward spinon condensation and the onset of magnetic order. From the soft Bogoliubov eigenmodes, we reconstruct the associated incipient spin textures and show that the resulting magnetic orders are intrinsically anisotropic, with suppressed moments on strongly coupled bonds and enhanced moments on more weakly connected sites. These results provide a microscopic picture of how exchange anisotropy drives the transition from kagome spin-liquid states to magnetic order, and offer a framework for interpreting recent experiments on anisotropic kagome materials, particularly titanium-based spin-1/2 compounds.

51

Kagome金属中与超导能隙耦合的空间各向异性Kondo共振#

Spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance coupled with the superconducting gap in a kagome metal
📚 arXiv👤 Zichen Huang, Hui Chen, Zhongqin Zhang, Hao Zhang, Zhen Zhao, Ruwen Wang, Haitao Yang, Wei Ji, Ziqiang Wang, Hong-Jun Gao📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究首次在Kagome超导体系中实现Kondo效应与超导能隙的局域耦合调控，发现空间各向异性Kondo屏蔽可显著增强超导能隙特征，揭示了非超导载流子参与配对的新机制，为理解高温超导及量子材料中电子关
该研究在Kagome超导体CsV3Sb5中引入磁性Cr杂质，揭示了空间各向异性Kondo共振与超导能隙的交织。稀Cr杂质削弱长程电荷密度波有序并产生局域磁矩导致Kondo共振，该共振在单个Cr原子周围形成各向异性波纹状空间图案，破缺所有局域镜面对称；Kondo屏蔽出现后，超导能隙的相干峰和深度及有限零能电导均增强，表明母化合物费米面的非超导载流子参与Kondo屏蔽。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究在Kagome超导体CsV3Sb5中引入磁性Cr杂质，揭示了空间各向异性Kondo共振与超导能隙的交织。稀Cr杂质削弱长程电荷密度波有序并产生局域磁矩导致Kondo共振，该共振在单个Cr原子周围形成各向异性波纹状空间图案，破缺所有局域镜面对称；Kondo屏蔽出现后，超导能隙的相干峰和深度及有限零能电导均增强，表明母化合物费米面的非超导载流子参与Kondo屏蔽。

English Abstract

arXiv:2502.20735v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The chromium-based kagome metal CsCr3Sb5 has garnered significant interest due to its strong electron correlations, intertwined orders and potential for unconventional superconductivity under high pressure. The evolution of magnetic and superconducting interactions as the more frequently studied CsV3Sb5 is doped to CsCr3Sb5 remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate the emergence of a spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance intertwined with the superconducting gap, enabled by introducing magnetic Cr impurities into the kagome superconductor CsV3Sb5. The addition of dilute Cr impurities not only weakens long range charge density wave order but also produces local magnetic moments that leads to Kondo resonances. We show that the Kondo resonance forms anisotropic, ripple like spatial patterns around individual Cr atoms, breaking all local mirror symmetries. We further reveal that with the emergence of Kondo screening, the coherence peak and depth of superconducting gap with finite zero-energy conductance are enhanced. This suggests that non superconducting carriers at the Fermi surface in the parent compound participate in the Kondo effect, simultaneously screening Cr magnetic moments and increasing the superfluid density. Our findings offer an opportunity to study the interplay between superconductivity and local magnetism in kagome materials.

52

二维相互作用拓扑绝缘体中的边界临界性#

Boundary criticality in two-dimensional interacting topological insulators
📚 arXiv👤 Yang Ge, Hong Yao, Shao-Kai Jian📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次系统揭示二维相互作用拓扑绝缘体边界量子相变的完整普适类，核心创新在于发现拓扑边缘态诱导的连续边界标度维度及BKT型特殊转变。通过解析-数值结合确立边界临界理论框架，为实验探测强关联拓扑物态的
该工作利用行列式量子蒙特卡洛方法非微扰研究Kane-Mele-Hubbard-Rashba模型的边界量子相图。在拓扑绝缘体与反铁磁绝缘体之间的量子相变处发现丰富的边界临界现象，包括普通、特殊和反常转变；结合边界理论的解析推导与无偏数值精确模拟，证明拓扑边缘态使普通转变具有连续边界标度维度，并导致Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless型的特殊转变。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作利用行列式量子蒙特卡洛方法非微扰研究Kane-Mele-Hubbard-Rashba模型的边界量子相图。在拓扑绝缘体与反铁磁绝缘体之间的量子相变处发现丰富的边界临界现象，包括普通、特殊和反常转变；结合边界理论的解析推导与无偏数值精确模拟，证明拓扑边缘态使普通转变具有连续边界标度维度，并导致Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless型的特殊转变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.12600v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study the boundary criticality in 2D interacting topological insulators. Using the determinant quantum Monte Carlo method, we present a nonperturbative study of the boundary quantum phase diagram in the Kane-Mele-Hubbard-Rashba model. Our results reveal rich boundary critical phenomena at the quantum phase transition between a topological insulator and an antiferromagnetic insulator, encompassing ordinary, special, and extraordinary transitions. Combining analytical derivation of the boundary theory with unbiased numerically exact quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we demonstrate that the presence of topological edge states enriches the ordinary transition that renders a continuous boundary scaling dimension and, more intriguingly, leads to a special transition of the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless type. Our work establishes a framework for the nonperturbative study of boundary criticality in two-dimensional topological systems with strong electron correlations.

53

范德华磁体中激子-极化激元凝聚的磁控#

Magnetic control of an exciton-polariton condensate in a van der Waals magnet
📚 arXiv👤 Heng Zhang, Niloufar Nilforoushan, Christian Weidgans, Tobias Inzenhofer, Marlene Liebich, Josef Riepl, Julian Hirschmann, Imke Gronwald, Kseniia Mosina, Zdeněk Sofer, Ritaj Tyagi, Jan Wilhelm, Fabian Mooshammer, Florian Dirnberger, Rupert Huber📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：在范德华磁体CrSBr光学微腔中首次实现磁场可调激子-极化激元凝聚，调控幅度达10.5 meV。该工作将二维磁体的磁有序特性与玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚结合，为低功耗磁控相干光源、自旋-光子耦合器件及拓扑极化
该工作在范德华磁体CrSBr中实现了磁场可调的激子-极化激元凝聚。光激发下嵌入光学腔的CrSBr微线表现出极化激元凝聚的标志性特征：受限极化激元态发射强度数量级增强、发射线谱窄化及峰能连续移动，干涉测量证实空间和时间相干性提升。外磁场可将凝聚体能量调控达10.5 meV，源于CrSBr中磁有序与激子-极化激元之间的强耦合。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作在范德华磁体CrSBr中实现了磁场可调的激子-极化激元凝聚。光激发下嵌入光学腔的CrSBr微线表现出极化激元凝聚的标志性特征：受限极化激元态发射强度数量级增强、发射线谱窄化及峰能连续移动，干涉测量证实空间和时间相干性提升。外磁场可将凝聚体能量调控达10.5 meV，源于CrSBr中磁有序与激子-极化激元之间的强耦合。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.06010v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Quasiparticle condensates are among the most spectacular solid-state manifestations of quantum physics. Coupling macroscopic real-space wave functions to additional degrees of freedom, such as the electron spin, would add valuable control knobs for quantum applications. While creating spin-carrying superconducting condensates has attracted enormous attention, man-made condensates of light-matter hybrids known as exciton-polaritons have lacked an analogous spin-based perspective. Here we open a new door by demonstrating magnetically tunable exciton-polariton condensation in the van der Waals magnet CrSBr. Under photoexcitation, CrSBr microwires embedded in an optical cavity show the hallmarks of polariton condensation: a dramatic increase of the emission intensity from an excited laterally confined polariton state by multiple orders of magnitude, spectral narrowing of the emission line, and an intriguing continuous shift of the peak energy. Interferometry evidences an increase in spatial and temporal coherence. Remarkably, the energy of the condensate can be tuned by up to 10.5 meV by an external magnetic field, owing to the strong coupling between the spin order and excitonic correlation. Our results establish CrSBr microcavities as a powerful platform for exploring magnetic control of polariton condensates and mark a significant step toward spin-controlled coherent quantum light sources.

54

通过动能阻挫控制Nagaoka态的不稳定性与量子相变#

Instability of Nagaoka State and Quantum Phase Transition via Kinetic Frustration Control
📚 arXiv👤 Prakash Sharma, Yang Peng, Donna N. Sheng, Hitesh J. Changlani, Yao Wang📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次揭示动能阻挫可诱导Nagaoka铁磁态失稳并驱动向螺旋自旋密度波的量子相变，突破了传统粒子-空穴对称性限制，为冷原子及莫尔材料中调控关联磁性提供了新途径。
该工作研究强相互作用t-t' Hubbard模型中Nagaoka-Thouless铁磁不稳定性，通过可调方-三角格点几何连续破缺粒子-空穴对称性。解析证明当动能阻挫t'/t超过临界维度相关值时，完全自旋极化态对亚稳自旋极化子不稳定；大规模密度矩阵重整化群模拟揭示从NT铁磁体到螺旋自旋密度波的量子相变，该转变在低但有限空穴密度下保持稳健，可通过冷原子和莫尔Hubbard平台实现。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究强相互作用t-t' Hubbard模型中Nagaoka-Thouless铁磁不稳定性，通过可调方-三角格点几何连续破缺粒子-空穴对称性。解析证明当动能阻挫t'/t超过临界维度相关值时，完全自旋极化态对亚稳自旋极化子不稳定；大规模密度矩阵重整化群模拟揭示从NT铁磁体到螺旋自旋密度波的量子相变，该转变在低但有限空穴密度下保持稳健，可通过冷原子和莫尔Hubbard平台实现。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.08410v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the Nagaoka-Thouless (NT) ferromagnetic instability in the strongly interacting t-t' Hubbard model by continuously breaking particle-hole symmetry on a tunable square-triangular lattice geometry. We use an analytic approach to show that the fully spin-polarized state becomes unstable to a metastable spin-polaron when the kinetic frustration t'/t exceeds a critical, dimension-dependent value. Large-scale density matrix renormalization group simulations reveal a quantum phase transition from the NT ferromagnet to a spiral spin-density wave, which evolves continuously into the Haerter-Shastry antiferromagnet in the large-frustration limit. Remarkably, this transition remains robust at low but finite hole density, making it accessible in cold-atom and moiré Hubbard platforms under strong interactions. A variational analysis further captures the instability mechanism at finite density via frustration-induced magnon band deformation.

55

磁性晶体中的电子界限关系#

Electronic bounds in magnetic crystals
📚 arXiv👤 Daniel Passos, Ivo Souza📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将电子界限理论拓展至磁性体系，首次建立Chern绝缘体电极化率下界与轨道磁化上界，并将Chern数约束推广至三维Chern矢量，为拓扑量子材料的光电响应与输运性质预测提供了普适性理论框架
该工作系统研究磁性晶体不同电子性质——电子密度、有效质量、轨道磁化、局域长度、Chern不变量和电极化率——之间的约束关系。新结果包括Chern绝缘体电极化率的下界和轨道磁化求和规则部分的上界，并将涉及Chern不变量的界限从二维(Chern数)推广到三维(Chern矢量)；对金属和绝缘体均建立了界限关系，并以可调平带模型Chern绝缘体为例分析了其饱和行为与光吸收谱的关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作系统研究磁性晶体不同电子性质——电子密度、有效质量、轨道磁化、局域长度、Chern不变量和电极化率——之间的约束关系。新结果包括Chern绝缘体电极化率的下界和轨道磁化求和规则部分的上界，并将涉及Chern不变量的界限从二维(Chern数)推广到三维(Chern矢量)；对金属和绝缘体均建立了界限关系，并以可调平带模型Chern绝缘体为例分析了其饱和行为与光吸收谱的关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.16121v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present a systematic study of bound relations between different electronic properties of magnetic crystals: electron density, effective mass, orbital magnetization, localization length, Chern invariant, and electric susceptibility. All relations are satisfied for a group of low-lying bands, while some remain valid for upper bands. New results include a lower bound on the electric susceptibility of Chern insulators, and an upper bound on the sum-rule part of the orbital magnetization. In addition, bounds involving the Chern invariant are generalized from two dimensions (Chern number) to three (Chern vector). Bound relations are established for metals as well as insulators, and are illustrated for model systems. The manner in which they approach saturation in a model Chern insulator with tunable flat bands is analyzed in terms of the optical absorption spectrum.

56

洁净RuO₂晶体中的费米液体行为与特征温度依赖磁化率#

Fermi-liquid behavior and characteristic temperature-dependent susceptibility in clean RuO₂ crystal
📚 arXiv👤 Shubhankar Paul, Atsutoshi Ikeda, Hisakazu Matsuki, Giordano Mattoni, Jörg Schmalian, Kunihiko Yamauchi, Chanchal Sow, Shingo Yonezawa, Yoshiteru Maeno📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过制备超高纯度RuO₂单晶（RRR=1200），首次系统验证了其弱关联三维费米液体基态，揭示了晶格膨胀驱动的轨道磁化率反常温度依赖机制，为理解氧化物中电子关联与能带拓扑的 interplay
该工作报道了残余电阻比高达1200的超洁净RuO₂单晶的比热与磁化率测量。磁化率随温度升高而增加，在宽温区（至400 K）可用含Tln(T/T₀)项唯象拟合，归因于晶格膨胀导致的能带结构变化所增强的轨道贡献；电子比热、磁化率与电阻率T²系数共同指向弱关联三维费米液体态，Wilson比与Kadowaki-Woods比支持这一结论。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作报道了残余电阻比高达1200的超洁净RuO₂单晶的比热与磁化率测量。磁化率随温度升高而增加，在宽温区（至400 K）可用含Tln(T/T₀)项唯象拟合，归因于晶格膨胀导致的能带结构变化所增强的轨道贡献；电子比热、磁化率与电阻率T²系数共同指向弱关联三维费米液体态，Wilson比与Kadowaki-Woods比支持这一结论。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.03108v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The magnetic nature of the altermagnet candidate RuO₂ remains under debate. It has been recently shown from quantum oscillations and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) that the high-quality RuO₂ bulk single crystal is a paramagnetic metal. Here we report the specific heat and magnetic susceptibility in ultra-clean RuO₂ single crystals with residual resistivity ratio up to 1200. The magnetic susceptibility increases with temperature and is phenomenologically fitted with an inclusion of Tln(T/T₀₎ over a wide temperature range up to 400 K. In contrast, the energy dependence of the density of states and thermal activation of quasiparticles lead to a decrease with temperature. Such characteristic temperature dependence, similar to that observed in other d-electron metals, is attributable to an enhanced orbital contribution arising from lattice-expansion-induced changes in the band structure. The electronic specific heat, the magnetic susceptibility, and the T² coefficient in resistivity point to a weakly-correlated 3D Fermi-liquid state with a modest electron correlation, as supported by the Wilson and Kadowaki-Woods ratios.

57

The chemistry of magnetoelectric multiferroics#

📚 Nature Reviews Chemistry👤 Nicola A. Spaldin📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文从化学视角系统审视磁电多铁性材料，核心创新在于将晶体化学原理与磁电耦合机制深度融合，突破传统物理框架下的材料设计局限。研究意义在于为新型单相多铁材料的原子级精准构筑提供理论指导，并拓展其在自旋电子
从化学视角探讨磁电多铁性材料的发展，这类材料在同一材料中兼具（铁）磁性与铁电性并实现二者耦合。重点阐述了将（铁）磁性与铁电性相结合所需克服的化学挑战，概述了晶体化学领域的进展如何推动新型多铁材料的发现，介绍了多铁材料在化学方面的应用，并讨论了特别适于通过化学手段解决的开放性问题。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

从化学视角探讨磁电多铁性材料的发展，这类材料在同一材料中兼具（铁）磁性与铁电性并实现二者耦合。重点阐述了将（铁）磁性与铁电性相结合所需克服的化学挑战，概述了晶体化学领域的进展如何推动新型多铁材料的发现，介绍了多铁材料在化学方面的应用，并讨论了特别适于通过化学手段解决的开放性问题。

English Abstract

The development of magnetoelectric multiferroic materials, which combine and couple (ferro)magnetism and ferroelectricity in the same material, are discussed from a chemist’s perspective. The chemical challenges that must be overcome to combine (ferro)magnetism and ferroelectricity are highlighted and the developments in crystal chemistry that have enabled identification of new multiferroics are outlined. The chemical applications of multiferroic materials are described and open questions that are particularly amenable to chemical solutions are discussed.

58

FeSe中向列畴调控的可编程超导二极管#

Programmable superconducting diode from nematic domain control in FeSe
📚 arXiv👤 R. D. H. Hinlopen, C. Putzke, L. Holeschovsky, R. Nicholls, F. Ronning, E. D. Bauer, N. E. Hussey, P. J. W. Moll📅 2026-04-30⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究在FeSe向列超导体中利用涡旋-孪晶界相互作用实现高效率可编程超导二极管，通过强电流脉冲猝灭重构畴壁图案，首创以关联电子态空间分布编程超导器件的范式，为低能耗、可重构超导量子电路奠定物理基础。
该工作在向列超导体FeSe中实现了可编程超导二极管效应（SDE），效率高达约75%，其机制源于涡旋与向列孪晶界的相互作用。通过微秒级强电流脉冲以超过10⁷ K/s的速率猝灭向列序，可重构畴壁图案，从而调控SDE的极性与强度。该研究建立了通过关联电子态图案编程超导电路元件的新范式。

中文摘要

该工作在向列超导体FeSe中实现了可编程超导二极管效应（SDE），效率高达约75%，其机制源于涡旋与向列孪晶界的相互作用。通过微秒级强电流脉冲以超过10⁷ K/s的速率猝灭向列序，可重构畴壁图案，从而调控SDE的极性与强度。该研究建立了通过关联电子态图案编程超导电路元件的新范式。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26631v2 Announce Type: new Abstract: The superconducting diode effect (SDE) allows polarity-dependent critical currents when time-reversal and current-inverting spatial symmetries are broken. Superconducting diodes show promise for applications, but inversion asymmetry is usually encoded in sample geometry or non-centrosymmetric crystals, rendering them static circuit elements. Here we demonstrate a programmable superconducting diode whose functionality is encoded in correlated electronic domains. We use the nematic superconductor FeSe as a platform and report a large intrinsic SDE with efficiencies up to η sim 75% due to vortices interacting with nematic twin boundaries. The domain wall configuration thus encodes the SDE of the device. Through intense microsecond current pulses to quench the nematic order at rates exceeding 10⁷ K/s, we modify the domain pattern and control the polarity and strength of the SDE. These results establish a new paradigm in which superconducting circuit elements can be programmed through patterns imprinted into correlated electronic states.

Tunable symmetry breaking in a hexagonal-stacked moiré magnet#

📚 Nature Physics👤 Zeliang Sun, Gaihua Ye, Xiaohan Wan, Ning Mao 等16位作者📅 2026-04-29⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统莫尔磁性的对称性限制，在六方堆叠扭转CrI₃中实现转角可调控的对称性破缺演化，发现兼具破缺旋转、镜像和时间反演对称性的新奇莫尔磁相及变磁行为，为设计具有可控对称性的非常规磁性态提供了全新
对称性在定义磁相方面起着核心作用，因此在磁转变过程中实现可调的对称性破缺对于发现非平庸磁性具有重要价值。通过扭转二维磁性晶体形成的磁性莫尔超晶格，已被理论预言并实验探索为非常规磁性态的研究平台。然而，尽管近期取得了诸多进展，莫尔磁性中对称性破缺的调控能力仍然有限，因为扭转二维磁体主要继承了其构成层的磁性和对称性。在此，我们展示了六方堆叠扭转双层双分子层CrI₃中对称性随扭转角从180°增至190°的清晰演化。尽管在此扭转角范围内净磁化…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

对称性在定义磁相方面起着核心作用，因此在磁转变过程中实现可调的对称性破缺对于发现非平庸磁性具有重要价值。通过扭转二维磁性晶体形成的磁性莫尔超晶格，已被理论预言并实验探索为非常规磁性态的研究平台。然而，尽管近期取得了诸多进展，莫尔磁性中对称性破缺的调控能力仍然有限，因为扭转二维磁体主要继承了其构成层的磁性和对称性。在此，我们展示了六方堆叠扭转双层双分子层CrI₃中对称性随扭转角从180°增至190°的清晰演化。尽管在此扭转角范围内净磁化强度始终为零，但磁相在180°时仅破缺三重旋转对称性，在181°至185°的中间扭转角下破缺所有旋转、镜像和时间反演对称性，而在190°时所有破缺的对称性均恢复。中间扭转角处这种显著的对称性破缺伴随着变磁行为，表现为零磁场附近的对称双磁滞回线。这些结果共同揭示，中间扭转角下的六方堆叠扭转双层双分子层CrI₃具有一种独特的莫尔磁相，其特征为具有破缺的旋转、镜像和时间反演对称性的周期性面内自旋织构。

English Abstract

Symmetry plays a central role in defining magnetic phases, making tunable symmetry breaking across magnetic transitions highly desirable for discovering non-trivial magnetism. Magnetic moiré superlattices, formed by twisting two-dimensional magnetic crystals, have been theoretically proposed and experimentally explored as platforms for unconventional magnetic states. However, despite recent advances, the ability to tune symmetry breaking in moiré magnetism remains limited, as twisted two-dimensional magnets predominantly inherit the magnetic properties and symmetries of their constituent layers. Here we demonstrate a clear evolution of symmetry in hexagonal-stacked twisted double-bilayer CrI3as the twist angle increases from 180° to 190°. Although the net magnetization remains zero across this twist-angle range, the magnetic phase breaks only the threefold rotational symmetry at 180°, but it breaks all the rotational, mirror and time-reversal symmetries at intermediate twist angles between 181° and 185°, and all broken symmetries are recovered at 190°. This pronounced symmetry breaking at intermediate twist angles is accompanied by metamagnetic behaviour, evidenced by symmetric double hysteresis loops around zero magnetic field. Together, these results reveal that hexagonal-stacked twisted double-bilayer CrI3at intermediate twist angles hosts a distinct moiré magnetic phase, featuring periodic in-plane spin textures with broken rotational, mirror and time-reversal symmetries.

Universal Topological Power Transfer with Arbitrarily Large Chern Number in Driven Quantum Spin Chains#

arXiv:2604.24851v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 拓扑频率转换器利用量子系统中两个驱动场之间的量子化功率转移，这一现象由相关纤维丛的陈数拓扑保护。尽管少自旋系统的实现已在理论上证明了该效应，但转换因子通常被限制为较小的整数值。本文研究了一个由两个频率不可通约的磁场驱动绝热演化的相互作用XXZ海森堡自旋-1/2链。陈数由绝热轨迹所包围的简并点决定，随链长系统性地增大，并可通过交换各向异性进行调控，从而直接控制拓扑泵浦强度。我…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24851v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 拓扑频率转换器利用量子系统中两个驱动场之间的量子化功率转移，这一现象由相关纤维丛的陈数拓扑保护。尽管少自旋系统的实现已在理论上证明了该效应，但转换因子通常被限制为较小的整数值。本文研究了一个由两个频率不可通约的磁场驱动绝热演化的相互作用XXZ海森堡自旋-1/2链。陈数由绝热轨迹所包围的简并点决定，随链长系统性地增大，并可通过交换各向异性进行调控，从而直接控制拓扑泵浦强度。我们揭示了奇数与偶数链长下量子临界点的各向异性和磁场强度之间的普适依赖关系。这为在相互作用量子自旋链中实现具有任意大量子化转换比的拓扑频率转换器提供了一种机制。该机制对于驱动场的任意耦合区域均保持不变。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24851v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Topological frequency converters exploit a quantized transfer of power between two driving fields in a quantum system, a phenomenon topologically protected by the Chern number of the associated fiber bundle. While realizations with few-spin systems have theoretically demonstrated this effect, the conversion factors have typically been restricted to small integer values. Here, we investigate an interacting XXZ Heisenberg spin-1/2 chain driven adiabatically by two magnetic drives with incommensurate frequencies. The Chern number, determined by the degeneracy points enclosed by the adiabatic trajectory, increases systematically with the chain length and can be tuned through the exchange anisotropy, providing direct control of the topological pumping strength. We reveal a universal dependency of the anisotropy and magnetic field strength for odd and even chain lengths of the quantum critical points. This provides a mechanism for a topological frequency converter with an arbitrarily large, quantized conversion ratio in interacting quantum spin chains. The mechanism remains the same for arbitrary coupling regions of the drives.

62

Dynamical dimer structure factor of the triangular S=1/2 Heisenberg antiferromagnet#

📚 arXiv👤 Markus Drescher, Laurens Vanderstraeten, Roderich Moessner, Frank Pollmann, Johannes Knolle📅 2026-04-29⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该工作首次利用GPU加速的矩阵乘积态方法计算了三角晶格反铁磁海森堡模型的动力学二聚体结构因子，突破传统自旋结构因子的局限。核心创新在于揭示有序相中规避准粒子衰变的低能模式，并在候选量子自旋液体中发现X
arXiv:2604.24868v1 公告类型：新 摘要：动力学二聚体结构因子是一种可观测量，用于探测量子磁体中的自旋单态激发，这与通常由自旋结构因子研究的激发不同。我们利用大规模GPU加速的矩阵乘积态模拟，报告了三角晶格上扩展自旋-1/2反铁磁海森堡模型的二聚体响应。我们研究了具有120°共面、共线条纹和四面体自旋序的有序相，以及候选的量子自旋液体（QSL）区域，包括预期的无能隙U(1)狄拉克QSL和有限自旋标量手性耦合下的手性QS…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24868v1 公告类型：新
摘要：动力学二聚体结构因子是一种可观测量，用于探测量子磁体中的自旋单态激发，这与通常由自旋结构因子研究的激发不同。我们利用大规模GPU加速的矩阵乘积态模拟，报告了三角晶格上扩展自旋-1/2反铁磁海森堡模型的二聚体响应。我们研究了具有120°共面、共线条纹和四面体自旋序的有序相，以及候选的量子自旋液体（QSL）区域，包括预期的无能隙U(1)狄拉克QSL和有限自旋标量手性耦合下的手性QSL。在有序相中，我们发现两磁子连续谱起始点以下的低能模式，展示了规避的准粒子衰变。在候选无能隙QSL中，我们在布里渊区角的一半动量处（X ≡ K/2）观测到绝对色散极小值，这与场论预测一致，即U(1)狄拉克自旋液体的单态单极子激发在这些点变得无能隙。因此，高分辨率的动力学二聚体响应为具有单态单极子激发的U(1)狄拉克QSL提供了支持。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24868v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The dynamical dimer structure factor is an observable probing spin-singlet excitations of quantum magnets distinct from those commonly studied by the spin structure factor. We report the dimer response for the extended spin-1/2 antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the triangular lattice using large-scale GPU-accelerated matrix-product-state simulations. We investigate the ordered phases with 120ⁱ̧rc coplanar, collinear stripe, and tetrahedral spin order, as well as candidate quantum spin-liquid (QSL) regimes, comprising an expected gapless U(1) Dirac QSL and a chiral QSL at finite spin-scalar-chirality coupling. In the ordered phases, we find low-energy modes below the onset of the two-magnon continuum illustrating avoided quasiparticle decay. Within the candidate gapless QSL, we observe absolute dispersion minima at momenta of half the Brillouin zone corners, Xequiv K/2, in agreement with field-theory predictions that singlet monopole excitations of the U(1) Dirac spin liquid become gapless at these points. Thus, the high-resolution dynamical dimer response provides support for a U(1) Dirac QSL with singlet monopole excitations.

Dielectric signatures of crystal-field and low-temperature correlated dynamics in NdMgAl11O19#

arXiv:2604.24937v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 我们报道了单晶εNdMgAl₁₁O₁₉的介电谱，这是一种磁铅石型六铝酸盐，其中局域化的εNd³⁺磁矩与可极化的εAlO₅双锥网络共存。沿晶轴c方向测量的介电常数实部ε'c(T)在温度从275 K降至30 K时升高，且在4 Hz至50 kHz范围内与频率无关。在更低温度下，观察到介电常数随频率依赖的下降，随后在2 K以下出现进一步上升。高频ε'c(T)可用Barrett公式结…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24937v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 我们报道了单晶εNdMgAl₁₁O₁₉的介电谱，这是一种磁铅石型六铝酸盐，其中局域化的εNd³⁺磁矩与可极化的εAlO₅双锥网络共存。沿晶轴c方向测量的介电常数实部ε'c(T)在温度从275 K降至30 K时升高，且在4 Hz至50 kHz范围内与频率无关。在更低温度下，观察到介电常数随频率依赖的下降，随后在2 K以下出现进一步上升。高频ε'c(T)可用Barrett公式结合有效双能级贡献描述，得到能隙Δ = 25.85 ± 0.32 K，与最低的εNd³⁺晶体电场(CEF)劈裂一致。在~30 K以下，介电响应变得强烈依赖于频率和磁场。等温ε'c(H)测量揭示出在μ₀Hc ≈ 0.85 T附近存在可重复的低场交叉，我们将其归因于反铁磁关联与基态Kramers双重态Zeeman劈裂之间的竞争。因此，εNdMgAl₁₁O₁₉提供了一个Kramers参考体系，其中激发态CEF能级的介电特征可与中心对称受挫磁铅石宿主中磁场调控、关联主导的基态双重态区域的特征区分开来。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24937v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report dielectric spectroscopy of single-crystalline ȩNdMgAl11O19, a magnetoplumbite hexaaluminate in which localized ȩNd³⁺ moments coexist with a polarizable ȩAlO5 bipyramidal network. The real part of the permittivity, ǎrepsilon'c(T), measured along the crystallographic c axis, increases as the temperature is lowered from 275~K to 30~K and is frequency-independent between 4~Hz and 50~kHz. At lower temperatures, a frequency-dependent decrease in permittivity is observed, followed by a further upturn below 2~K. The high-frequency ǎrepsilon'c(T) is described by a Barrett formula supplemented by an effective two-level contribution, yielding a robust gap of Δ = 25.85 ± 0.32~K consistent with the lowest ȩNd³⁺ crystal-electric-field (CEF) splitting. Below sim 30~K, the dielectric response becomes strongly frequency and magnetic-field dependent. Isothermal ǎrepsilon_c'(H) measurements reveal a reproducible low-field crossover near μ₀H_c simeq 0.85~T, which we attribute to the competition between antiferromagnetic correlations and Zeeman splitting of the ground-state Kramers doublet. ȩNdMgAl11O19 thus provides a Kramers reference system in which dielectric signatures of the excited-state CEF manifold can be distinguished from those of the field-tuned, correlation-dominated ground-state doublet sector in a centrosymmetric frustrated magnetoplumbite host

Crystal-Field Symmetry Constraints in Layered Honeycomb ErBr₃#

📚 arXiv👤 Biaoyan Hu, Mingyuan Hu, Franz Demmel, Andrey A. Podlesnyak, Jiaqing He, Liusuo Wu📅 2026-04-29⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究揭示了ErBr₃晶体场对称性对低能磁动力学的根本约束：基态Kramers双重态的特殊对称性禁戒了最低阶横向磁激发，导致零场反常与无低能色散模式的奇异热力学行为，为量子自旋液体候选材料中"缺失"的
arXiv:2604.24951v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 我们表明，ErBr₃的局域晶体场对称性使得基态Kramers双重态内满足⟨ψ_±|J±|ψ_∓⟩=0，从而将最低阶横向通道从低能区移除。热力学测量揭示了两个零场反常。在面内磁场下，热力学响应分离为一条相边界和一条更宽的交叉线。与此一致，非弹性中子散射测量在有序温度以上未发现明确的低能色散磁模式。这些结果表明，晶体场基态对称性强烈约束了低能动力学，并为理解ErBr₃的磁场依赖…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24951v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 我们表明，ErBr₃的局域晶体场对称性使得基态Kramers双重态内满足⟨ψ_±|J±|ψ_∓⟩=0，从而将最低阶横向通道从低能区移除。热力学测量揭示了两个零场反常。在面内磁场下，热力学响应分离为一条相边界和一条更宽的交叉线。与此一致，非弹性中子散射测量在有序温度以上未发现明确的低能色散磁模式。这些结果表明，晶体场基态对称性强烈约束了低能动力学，并为理解ErBr₃的磁场依赖热力学响应提供了自然框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24951v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We show that the local crystal-field symmetry of ErBr₃ enforces łangle ψ_± | J± | ψₘₚ ångle = 0 within the ground-state Kramers doublet, thereby removing the lowest-order transverse channel from the low-energy sector. Thermodynamic measurements reveal two zero-field anomalies. Under an in-plane magnetic field, the thermodynamic response separates into a phase boundary and a broader crossover line. Consistently, inelastic neutron scattering measurements above the ordering temperature reveal no well-defined low-energy dispersive magnetic modes. These results show that the crystal-field ground-state symmetry strongly constrains the low-energy dynamics and provides a natural framework for understanding the field-dependent thermodynamic response of ErBr₃.
