The antiferromagnetic Chern insulator phase in the Kane-Mele-Hubbard model#

📚 arXiv👤 Bao-Qing Wang, Can Shao, Takami Tohyama, Hong-Gang Luo, Hantao Lu📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究解决了Kane-Mele-Hubbard模型中反铁磁陈绝缘体相能否在保持时间反演对称性的条件下存在的长期争议，通过精确对角化和改进的陈数计算方案，证明Hubbard相互作用诱导的反铁磁关联会自发
arXiv:2604.22329v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 本文研究了具有有限子晶格势的Kane-Mele-Hubbard (KMH) 模型中反铁磁 (AFM) 陈绝缘体 (AFCI) 相的出现。AFCI以AFM关联与量子化霍尔电导共存为特征，长期以来一直引发一个问题：即它能否存在于保持时间反演对称性 (TRS) 的KMH模型中。利用精确对角化方法，我们分析了激发能隙、沿z轴和xy平面的各向异性AFM关联，以及扭曲边界条件下的保真度…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22329v1 公告类型: 新
摘要: 本文研究了具有有限子晶格势的Kane-Mele-Hubbard (KMH) 模型中反铁磁 (AFM) 陈绝缘体 (AFCI) 相的出现。AFCI以AFM关联与量子化霍尔电导共存为特征，长期以来一直引发一个问题：即它能否存在于保持时间反演对称性 (TRS) 的KMH模型中。利用精确对角化方法，我们分析了激发能隙、沿z轴和xy平面的各向异性AFM关联，以及扭曲边界条件下的保真度 susceptibility，所有结果均提供了AFCI相一致性的证据。特别地，我们对（自旋）陈数的数值计算揭示了扭曲角空间中绝热连续性的破缺，表明由Hubbard相互作用诱导的AFM微扰驱动了TRS破缺的不稳定性。进一步提出了一种修正的计算方案，在该相中得到了稳健的量子化陈数C=1。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22329v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The emergence of the antiferromagnetic (AFM) Chern insulator (AFCI) phase in the Kane-Mele-Hubbard (KMH) model with a finite sublattice potential is investigated. The AFCI, characterized by AFM correlations coexisting with quantized Hall conductance, has long raised the question of whether it can exist in the KMH model that respects time-reversal symmetry (TRS). Using exact diagonalization, we analyze the excitation gap, anisotropic AFM correlations along the z axis and in the xy plane, and the fidelity susceptibility under twisted boundary conditions, all of which provide consistent evidence for the AFCI phase. In particular, our numerical evaluation on the (spin) Chern number reveals a breakdown of adiabatic continuity in the twist-angle space, indicating an instability toward TRS breaking driven by Hubbard-induced AFM perturbations. A modified computational scheme is further proposed, which yields a robust quantized Chern number C=1 within this phase.

137

Accurate Nanoscale Mapping of Electric Fields across Random Grain Boundaries in Polycrystalline Oxides Using Precession-Assisted 4D-STEM#

📚 arXiv👤 Sangjun Kang (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Technical University Darmstadt), Hyeyoung Cho (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Technical University Darmstadt), Maximilian Töllner (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Technical University Darmstadt), Anna Rose Nelson (Technical University Darmstadt), Ziming Ding (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology), Xiaoke Mu (Lanzhou University), Di Wang (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology), Wolfgang Rheinheimer (University of Stuttgart), Kai Wang (Technical University Darmstadt), Bai-Xiang Xu (Technical University Darmstadt), Jakob Konstantin Laux (Technical University Darmstadt), Mahmoud Serour (Technical University Darmstadt), Karsten Albe (Technical University Darmstadt), Andreas Klein (Technical University Darmstadt), Christian Kübel (Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Technical University Darmstadt)📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究通过电子束旋进结合Sobel迭代边缘检测与SVD后处理，突破了传统CoM分析受取向衬度和动力学散射限制的瓶颈，实现了多晶氧化物随机晶界空间电荷层电场与电荷分布的高保真纳米尺度定量成像，为理解晶界
arXiv:2604.22398v1 发布类型：新摘要：晶界处的空间电荷层（SCLs）在调控局域电场和影响材料功能特性方面起着关键作用，例如氧化物陶瓷中的氧空位迁移和离子电导率。然而，对此类局域电场及其相应电荷分布的直接实验分析仍然具有挑战性。扫描透射电子显微差分相位衬度（STEM-DPC）中的传统质心（CoM）分析受到取向依赖衬度和动力学散射的强烈影响。本文中，我们证明将电子束旋进与先进的后处理相结合，采用Sobel滤波器进行迭代边…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22398v1 发布类型：新摘要：晶界处的空间电荷层（SCLs）在调控局域电场和影响材料功能特性方面起着关键作用，例如氧化物陶瓷中的氧空位迁移和离子电导率。然而，对此类局域电场及其相应电荷分布的直接实验分析仍然具有挑战性。扫描透射电子显微差分相位衬度（STEM-DPC）中的传统质心（CoM）分析受到取向依赖衬度和动力学散射的强烈影响。本文中，我们证明将电子束旋进与先进的后处理相结合，采用Sobel滤波器进行迭代边缘检测和奇异值分解（SVD），能够实现可靠、准确、无偏的衍射位移测量，且晶体学伪影最小。该新方法精确精化了纳米束电子衍射（NBED）花样中心盘的位置，从而显著改善了局域电场及相应电荷分布的提取。以BaTiO3和SrTiO3的随机晶界为例进行的对比分析表明，与传统CoM方法相比，该方法具有更优的准确性和鲁棒性。实验工作辅以原子尺度模拟，以将SCL的电场与晶界的平均内势差及晶界周围的元素偏析分离开来。深入分析表明，我们的方法能够对复杂多晶样品中的电磁场及其电荷分布进行高保真度成像，为利用STEM-DPC进行改进的定量分析奠定了基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22398v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Space charge layers (SCLs) at grain boundaries play a crucial role in modulating local electric fields and influencing the functional properties of materials, such as oxygen vacancy migration and ionic conductivity in oxide ceramics. However, the direct experimental analysis of such localized electric fields and the corresponding charge distribution remains challenging. Conventional center-of-mass (CoM) analysis in scanning transmission electron microscopy differential phase contrast (STEM-DPC) is strongly affected by orientation-dependent contrast and dynamical scattering. Here, we demonstrate that combining electron beam precession with advanced post-processing, employing iterative edge detection via a Sobel filter and singular value decomposition (SVD), enables reliable and accurate, unbiased diffraction shift measurements with minimal crystallographic artefacts. The new method accurately refines the central disk position in nanobeam electron diffraction (NBED) patterns and thus significantly improves the extraction of the local electric field and corresponding charge distribution. Comparative analysis with conventional CoM methods shows superior accuracy and robustness for random grain boundaries in BaTiO3 and SrTiO3 as exemplary case studies. The experimental work is complemented by atomistic simulations to separate the electric field of the SCL from the mean inner potential difference of the grain boundary and the elemental segregation around the grain boundary. The in-depth analysis shows that our approach enables high-fidelity mapping of electromagnetic fields and their charge distribution in complex polycrystalline specimens, laying the groundwork for improved quantitative analysis using STEM-DPC.

138

Classifying magnons in itinerant ferromagnets from linear response TDDFT: Fe, Ni and Co revisited#

📚 arXiv👤 Thorbjørn Skovhus, Thomas Olsen📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：基于线性响应含时密度泛函理论新实现，提出利用自增强函数实部穿越单位值判据区分相干与非相干磁振子，首次量化朗道阻尼与Stoner结合能，为理解巡游铁磁体复杂磁激发谱提供统一分类框架。
arXiv:2604.22484v1 公告类型：新摘要：巡游磁体的磁激发谱呈现出丰富而复杂的谱学特征，往往使底层物理的诠释变得困难。对于长波长极限下的微扰，可在谱函数中得到一个定义明确的零频极点，即戈德斯通磁振子。然而，对于光学模式和有限波矢，磁振子谱可能发生阻尼、出现分支，或完全抹平。在本工作中，我们展示了如何通过仔细分析多体谱函数的本征模式来理解所有这些特征背后的物理机制。我们利用线性响应含时密度泛函理论（LR-TDDFT）框架的…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22484v1 公告类型：新摘要：巡游磁体的磁激发谱呈现出丰富而复杂的谱学特征，往往使底层物理的诠释变得困难。对于长波长极限下的微扰，可在谱函数中得到一个定义明确的零频极点，即戈德斯通磁振子。然而，对于光学模式和有限波矢，磁振子谱可能发生阻尼、出现分支，或完全抹平。在本工作中，我们展示了如何通过仔细分析多体谱函数的本征模式来理解所有这些特征背后的物理机制。我们利用线性响应含时密度泛函理论（LR-TDDFT）框架的一种新实现，对单质巡游铁磁体进行第一性原理计算，并基于自增强函数（即非相互作用Kohn-Sham磁化率与交换关联核的乘积）对各个谱学特征的集体性进行分类。具体而言，我们根据自增强函数的实部是否在磁振子的谱峰处穿过单位值，来区分相干与非相干集体激发，而后者可能受到由虚部量化的朗道阻尼。据此对计算的磁振子谱进行分类，我们观察到体心立方Fe中相干磁振子分支的共存，以及面心立方Ni中在布里渊区边界附近波矢处主磁振子分支的退相干，此处非相干谷磁振子反而携带显著的谱权重。该分析还自然地导出了多体Stoner谱的定义，并使我们能够量化Stoner对激发的结合能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22484v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The magnetic excitation spectrum of itinerant magnets exhibits rich and complex spectral features that often complicate interpretation of the underlying physics. For perturbations in the long wavelength limit, one obtains a well defined pole at zero frequency in the spectral function, the Goldstone magnon. However, for optical modes and finite wavevectors, the magnon spectrum may become damped, exhibit branching, or be completely washed out. In the present work, we show how the physical mechanism of all such features can be understood from careful analysis of the eigenmodes of the many-body spectral function. We perform first principles computations of elemental itinerant ferromagnets using a novel implementation of the linear response time-dependent density functional theory (LR-TDDFT) framework and classify the collective nature of individual spectral features based on the self-enhancement function, the product of the noninteracting Kohn-Sham susceptibility and the exchange-correlation kernel. In particular, we distinguish between coherent and incoherent collective excitations, depending on whether the real part of the self-enhancement function crosses unity at the spectral peak of the magnon, which may or may not be subject to Landau damping as quantified by the imaginary part. Classifying the computed magnon spectra accordingly, we observe coexistence of coherent magnon branches in bcc-Fe, as well as decoherence of the primary magnon branch in fcc-Ni for wave vectors near the BZ boundary where incoherent valley magnons instead carry substantial spectral weight. The analysis also naturally leads to a definition of the many-body Stoner spectrum and allows us to quantify the binding energy of the Stoner pair excitations.

139

Magnetoelastic Waves in Ferromagnetic Thin Films Mediated by Dipolar Interactions#

📚 arXiv👤 Hiroki Yoshida, Ryohei Kono, Manato Fujimoto, Motoki Asano, Daiki Hatanaka, Kei Yamamoto, Shuichi Murakami📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文建立了纳入麦克斯韦方程组导出偶极场的磁弹性耦合理论框架，预言静磁波-Lamb波杂化及反交叉色散，为YIG薄膜中磁弹性波操控提供新机制，对磁声耦合器件设计具有指导意义。
arXiv:2604.22523v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：本文从理论上研究了面内磁场下铁磁薄膜中由磁偶极相互作用介导的磁弹性耦合。我们建立了一个理论描述，将弹性形变存在下由麦克斯韦方程组导出的偶极场纳入其中。所得耦合运动方程预言了静磁波与Lamb波之间的杂化。针对钇铁石榴石（YIG）薄膜的数值计算显示其色散关系中出现反交叉现象，杂化能隙范围从0.1 MHz到数MHz不等。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22523v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：本文从理论上研究了面内磁场下铁磁薄膜中由磁偶极相互作用介导的磁弹性耦合。我们建立了一个理论描述，将弹性形变存在下由麦克斯韦方程组导出的偶极场纳入其中。所得耦合运动方程预言了静磁波与Lamb波之间的杂化。针对钇铁石榴石（YIG）薄膜的数值计算显示其色散关系中出现反交叉现象，杂化能隙范围从0.1 MHz到数MHz不等。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22523v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetoelastic coupling mediated by magnetic dipolar interactions is theoretically investigated in ferromagnetic thin films under an in-plane magnetic field. We develop a theoretical description that incorporates dipolar fields derived from Maxwell's equations in the presence of elastic deformations. The resulting coupled equations of motion predict hybridization between magnetostatic and Lamb waves. Numerical calculations for a yttrium iron garnet (YIG) film reveal anti-crossings in the dispersion relations, with hybridization gaps ranging from 0.1 to several MHz.

arXiv:2604.22547v1 公告类型：新摘要：报道了平面硅-金属氧化物半导体量子点中单个电子在能谷能级反交叉附近的电子自旋共振（ESR）光谱。由于磁自旋翻转与电学能谷翻转跃迁的混合，观测到一系列单光子和双光子共振。这使得具有两个能谷态和两个自旋态的四能级系统的能级图得以重构。在反交叉点附近，观测到拉比频率的增强。这归因于能谷间自旋耦合导致上能级混入所激活的电偶极跃迁。该电偶极跃迁可通过ESR天线与限制栅极之间的电容耦合来驱动…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22547v1 公告类型：新摘要：报道了平面硅-金属氧化物半导体量子点中单个电子在能谷能级反交叉附近的电子自旋共振（ESR）光谱。由于磁自旋翻转与电学能谷翻转跃迁的混合，观测到一系列单光子和双光子共振。这使得具有两个能谷态和两个自旋态的四能级系统的能级图得以重构。在反交叉点附近，观测到拉比频率的增强。这归因于能谷间自旋耦合导致上能级混入所激活的电偶极跃迁。该电偶极跃迁可通过ESR天线与限制栅极之间的电容耦合来驱动。为表征导致增强的自旋-能谷耦合，我们测量了两个能谷态之间g因子差的各向异性、平均g因子，以及面内和面外磁场下的能谷间自旋耦合。能谷间自旋耦合受磁场方向强烈调制，在面外磁场下最强，与面内自旋-能谷场一致。原则上，这种强电偶极自旋共振（EDSR）效应可用于小规模器件中的快速全电学自旋操控。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22547v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Electron spin resonance spectroscopy (ESR) of a single electron in planar Si-MOS quantum dot is reported in the vicinity of a valley level anti-crossing. A number of one and two-photon resonances are observed due to mixing of magnetic spin-flip and electric valley-flip transitions. This allows the reconstruction of the energy-level diagram of a four state system with two valley and two spin states. Near the anti-crossing, an enhancement of the Rabi frequency is observed. This is attributed to an electric-dipole transition activated by admixing of the upper energy level due to inter-valley spin coupling. The electric-dipole transition may be driven via capacitive coupling between the ESR antenna, and the confinement gate. To characterize spin-valley coupling responsible for the enhancement, we measure the anisotropy of the g-factor difference between the two valley states, the mean g-factor and the inter-valley spin coupling for both in and out-of-plane magnetic fields. The inter-valley spin coupling is strongly modulated by the direction of the B-field, and is strongest for out-of-plane B-field, consistent with an in-plane spin-valley field. In principle, this strong Electric dipole spin resonance (EDSR) effect could be utilized for fast all-electrical spin control in small-scale devices.

141

Pulse Shaping to Mitigate the Impact of Device Imperfections in Field-Free Switching Using Combined Spin-Orbit and Spin-Transfer Torques#

AI 解读：本文针对SOT-MRAM无场翻转中的可靠性瓶颈，首次系统揭示了顶钉扎器件中SOT+STT联合翻转的写入不对称性及隐藏的确定性丧失区域，核心创新在于提出STT脉冲整形策略，实验验证其可显著抑制回跳、降低
arXiv:2604.22574v1 公告类型：新摘要：将自旋-轨道力矩（SOT）与自旋转移力矩（STT）相结合，为自旋轨道力矩磁随机存取存储器（SOT-MRAM）的无场翻转提供了一种实用方案，这是实现工业部署的先决条件，但可能通过回跳（backhopping）等现象降低可靠性，尤其在SOT-MRAM常用的顶钉扎（top-pinned）堆叠结构中。我们研究了未针对STT翻转优化的顶钉扎器件中SOT+STT联合翻转的写入错误率（WER）…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22574v1 公告类型：新摘要：将自旋-轨道力矩（SOT）与自旋转移力矩（STT）相结合，为自旋轨道力矩磁随机存取存储器（SOT-MRAM）的无场翻转提供了一种实用方案，这是实现工业部署的先决条件，但可能通过回跳（backhopping）等现象降低可靠性，尤其在SOT-MRAM常用的顶钉扎（top-pinned）堆叠结构中。我们研究了未针对STT翻转优化的顶钉扎器件中SOT+STT联合翻转的写入错误率（WER）。实验揭示了STT诱导回跳的明确迹象，以及反平行态到平行态（AP-to-P）与平行态到反平行态（P-to-AP）无场SOT翻转之间显著的翻转不对称性。我们的宏自旋模型采用两个耦合的朗道-栗弗席兹-吉尔伯特方程分别描述自由层和参考层，定性复现了该不对称性，并揭示了除已知回跳区域外还存在一个中间的确定性丧失区域。基于这些模拟，我们提出了缓解策略，并通过实验证明了STT脉冲整形可降低WER，并在存在器件缺陷的情况下改善翻转鲁棒性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22574v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Combining spin-orbit (SOT) and spin-transfer torques (STT) provides a practical approach for field-free switching in spin-orbit torque magnetic random-access memory (SOT-MRAM), a prerequisite for industrial deployment, but can compromise reliability through phenomena such as backhopping, especially in top-pinned stacks commonly used for SOT-MRAM. We investigate the write error rate (WER) of combined SOT + STT switching in top-pinned devices that are not optimized for STT switching. Experiments reveal clear indications of STT-induced backhopping and a pronounced field-free SOT switching asymmetry between AP-to-P and P-to-AP transitions. Our macrospin model, using two coupled Landau Lifshitz Gilbert equations for the free and the reference layers, qualitatively reproduces this asymmetry and reveals an intermediate loss-of-determinism regime in addition to the well-known backhopping region. Based on these simulations, we propose mitigation strategies and experimentally demonstrate that STT pulse shaping reduces WER and improves switching robustness in the presence of device imperfections.

142

Magnetic-field-induced corner states in quantum spin Hall insulators#

📚 arXiv👤 Sergey S. Krishtopenko, Frédéric Teppe📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统高阶拓扑框架，揭示量子自旋霍尔绝缘体中磁场诱导角态的本质是边界狄拉克理论的质量畴壁束缚态，其存在由边界质量矢量相对构型而非体拓扑不变量决定。这一认识拓展了拓扑角态的物理起源，为闪锌矿量子
arXiv:2303.09260v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们研究了超出粒子-空穴对称极限的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体（QSHI）中磁场诱导的角态问题。从闪锌矿半导体量子阱（QW）的真实低能模型出发，我们推导了有效边界哈密顿量，其形式为具有两个磁场依赖质量项的狄拉克哈密顿量，质量项的结构取决于边界的晶格取向和磁场方向。我们的分析结果表明，磁场诱导的角态最自然地应理解为有效边界理论的能隙内束缚态，其存在受边界质量矢量的相对构型控制，而非一般意…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2303.09260v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们研究了超出粒子-空穴对称极限的量子自旋霍尔绝缘体（QSHI）中磁场诱导的角态问题。从闪锌矿半导体量子阱（QW）的真实低能模型出发，我们推导了有效边界哈密顿量，其形式为具有两个磁场依赖质量项的狄拉克哈密顿量，质量项的结构取决于边界的晶格取向和磁场方向。我们的分析结果表明，磁场诱导的角态最自然地应理解为有效边界理论的能隙内束缚态，其存在受边界质量矢量的相对构型控制，而非一般意义上由稳定体不变量保护的高阶拓扑角模式。我们证明，尽管对于某些晶格构型可以定义并量子化镜像分级绕数，但磁场诱导的角态的存在并不限于这些体不变量有明确定义的区域。最后，我们认为即使没有高阶拓扑保护，这些角态作为孤立的能隙内准粒子激发，在弱微扰下仍可能保持谱学鲁棒性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2303.09260v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We address the problem of magnetic-field-induced corner states in quantum spin Hall insulators (QSHIs) beyond the particle-hole-symmetric limit. Starting from a realistic low-energy model for zinc-blende semiconductor quantum wells (QWs), we derive the effective edge Hamiltonian in the form of a Dirac Hamiltonian with two magnetic-field-dependent mass terms, whose structure depends on the crystallographic orientation of the edge and of the magnetic-field orientation. Our emphanalytical results show that magnetic-field-induced corner states are most naturally understood as in-gap bound states of the effective edge theory, controlled by the relative configuration of the edge mass vectors rather than, in general, as higher-order topological corner modes protected by a stable bulk invariant. We demonstrate that, although mirror-graded winding numbers can be defined and quantized for certain crystallographic configurations, the existence of magnetic-field-induced corner states is not restricted to regimes in which these bulk invariants are well defined. Finally, we argue that even without higher-order topological protection these corner states may remain spectrally robust under weak perturbations as isolated in-gap quasiparticle excitations.

143

Magnon Damping as a Probe of Kondo Coupling in Magnetically Ordered Systems#

📚 arXiv👤 Song Bao, Junsen Wang, Shin-ichiro Yano, Yanyan Shangguan, Zhentao Huang, Junbo Liao, Wei Wang, Yuan Gao, Bo Zhang, Shufan Cheng, Hao Xu, Zhao-Yang Dong, Shun-Li Yu, Wei Li, Jian-Xin Li, Jinsheng Wen📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究突破传统近藤效应仅针对f电子杂质的框架，在3d电子磁有序体系中揭示巡游电子-磁振子散射导致的反常阻尼行为，首次将磁振子阻尼确立为探测金属性量子磁体近藤耦合的新实验探针，为理解关联电子体系中磁性与
arXiv:2312.15961v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：在d电子体系中，同样可以存在如f电子体系中那般复杂的近藤耦合与磁相互作用之间的 interplay，但其背后机制尚不明晰。本研究利用非弹性中子散射，探究了金属性范德华铁磁体Fe₃₋ₓGeTe₂中低能自旋波（磁振子）随温度的演化，观测到磁振子阻尼在低温与高温下均出现发散，并在中间温度呈现极小值。这些行为可由一个结合对数项与幂律项的公式描述，分别代表近藤耦合与热涨落的主导贡献。这…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2312.15961v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：在d电子体系中，同样可以存在如f电子体系中那般复杂的近藤耦合与磁相互作用之间的 interplay，但其背后机制尚不明晰。本研究利用非弹性中子散射，探究了金属性范德华铁磁体Fe₃₋ₓGeTe₂中低能自旋波（磁振子）随温度的演化，观测到磁振子阻尼在低温与高温下均出现发散，并在中间温度呈现极小值。这些行为可由一个结合对数项与幂律项的公式描述，分别代表近藤耦合与热涨落的主导贡献。这些发现可通过铁磁近藤-海森堡晶格模型中的自旋翻转型电子-磁振子散射予以解释，这与原始近藤效应仅考虑巡游电子与孤立杂质自旋之间的耦合有本质区别。这些结果揭示了具有磁序的金属性3d电子体系中巡游电子与自旋波之间的 intriguing interplay，并将磁振子阻尼确立为探测金属性量子磁体中近藤耦合的一种新有效手段，从而开辟了从磁振子视角探索近藤物理的新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2312.15961v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In d-electron systems, there can also be intricate interplay between Kondo coupling and magnetic interactions as that in f-electron systems, but the underlying mechanism remains elusive. Here, using inelastic neutron scattering, we investigate the temperature evolution of the low-energy spin waves (magnons) in a metallic van der Waals ferromagnet Fe₃₋ₓGeTe₂, and observe that the magnon damping diverges at both low and high temperatures and exhibits a minimum at an intermediate temperature. These behaviours are described by a formula that combines logarithmic and power-law terms, representing the dominant contributions from Kondo coupling and thermal fluctuations, respectively. These findings can be explained by considering electron-magnon scattering of spin-flip type within the ferromagnetic Kondo-Heisenberg lattice model, distinct from the original Kondo effect which only considers the coupling between itinerant electrons and isolated impurity spins. These results unveil the intriguing interplay between itinerant electrons and spin waves in metallic 3d-electron systems with magnetic order, and provide magnon damping as a new effective probe of Kondo coupling in metallic quantum magnets, thereby opening new avenues for exploring Kondo physics from the magnon perspective.

144

Persistent Interfacial Topological Hall Effect Demonstrating Electrical Readout of Topological Spin Structures in Insulators#

📚 arXiv👤 Jing Li, Huilin Lai, Andrew H. Comstock, Aeron McConnell, Bharat Giri, Yu Yun, Tianhao Zhao, Xiao Wang, Yongseong Choi, Xuemei Cheng, Jian Shen, Zhigang Jiang, Dali Sun, Wenbin Wang, Xiaoshan Xu📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：本文提出界面拓扑霍尔效应（ITHE），通过磁近邻效应将绝缘体h-LuFeO₃的非共面拓扑自旋纹理印刻至相邻Pt层，实现电学读出。该效应在14 T宽磁场范围内持续存在，突破了传统THE对导电磁性材料的依
arXiv:2509.13445v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：传统拓扑霍尔效应（THE）需要导电磁性材料，这使得绝缘体系在很大程度上难以触及。本文我们引入界面拓扑霍尔效应（ITHE），其中绝缘磁性材料的非共面自旋纹理通过磁近邻效应（MPE）印刻到相邻的重金属上，并以电学方式探测。在Pt/h-LuFeO₃双层膜中，h-LuFeO₃具有在高磁场下依然稳定的拓扑自旋结构，源于120°三角自旋晶格伴随微弱自旋倾斜，产生非平庸拓扑但磁化强度极小。…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2509.13445v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：传统拓扑霍尔效应（THE）需要导电磁性材料，这使得绝缘体系在很大程度上难以触及。本文我们引入界面拓扑霍尔效应（ITHE），其中绝缘磁性材料的非共面自旋纹理通过磁近邻效应（MPE）印刻到相邻的重金属上，并以电学方式探测。在Pt/h-LuFeO₃双层膜中，h-LuFeO₃具有在高磁场下依然稳定的拓扑自旋结构，源于120°三角自旋晶格伴随微弱自旋倾斜，产生非平庸拓扑但磁化强度极小。这在Pt中产生高达纵向电阻率0.5%的巨型霍尔响应，以及超过2 V⁻¹的霍尔电导率/磁化强度比值，可与自旋霍尔Hanle效应背景清晰区分。场依赖和温度依赖分析进一步揭示，Pt纳米团簇通过MPE从h-LuFeO₃继承了拓扑纹理。与传统THE窄化的峰-谷特征不同，Pt/h-LuFeO₃中的ITHE在高达14 T的宽磁场范围内持续存在，证明了底层拓扑自旋结构的 exceptional 稳定性。这项工作将ITHE确立为探测超薄绝缘薄膜中拓扑磁性的一种强大而灵敏的手段，并为新型自旋电子学应用铺平了道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2509.13445v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Conventional topological Hall effects (THE) require conducting magnets, leaving insulating systems largely inaccessible. Here we introduce the interfacial topological Hall effect (ITHE), where the noncoplanar spin textures of insulating magnets are imprinted onto an adjacent heavy metal via the magnetic proximity effect (MPE) and detected electrically. In Pt/h-LuFeO3 bilayers, h-LuFeO3 hosts a topological spin structure robust against high magnetic fields, arising from a 120deg triangular spin lattice with small spin canting that yields nontrivial topology but minimal magnetization. This generates a giant Hall response in Pt up to 0.5% of the longitudinal resistivity and a Hall-conductivity/magnetization ratio above 2 V⁻¹, clearly distinguishable from the spin Hall Hanle effect background. Field- and temperature-dependent analysis further reveals that Pt nanoclusters inherit topological textures from h-LuFeO3 via MPE. Unlike the conventional THE narrow peak-and-dip features, ITHE in Pt/h-LuFeO3 persists across a broad magnetic field range up to 14 T, demonstrating the exceptional stability of the underlying topological spin structure. This establishes ITHE as a powerful and sensitive probe for topological magnetism in ultrathin insulating films and paves the way for new spintronic applications.

145

The Finite-Temperature Behavior of a Triangular Heisenberg Antiferromagnet#

📚 arXiv👤 Cecilie Glittum, Olav F. Syljuåsen📅 2026-04-27⚡ 磁性/铁电
AI 解读：该研究创新性地运用向列键理论处理多近邻耦合三角晶格海森堡模型，突破传统方法在有限温度下的局限。核心贡献在于揭示比热宽峰与关联长度指数增长的内在关联，并系统刻画螺旋自旋液体相；为理解阻挫量子磁体的热力学
arXiv:2510.02042v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们利用向列键理论研究了具有直至第三近邻交换耦合的三角晶格经典反铁磁海森堡模型。该方法使我们能够计算有限温度下的自由能和中子散射静态结构因子。我们绘制了相图，重点研究了破坏晶格旋转对称性的有限温度相变、螺旋自旋液体以及反铁磁120度相中普遍存在的宽比热峰。我们将该比热峰确定为标志着关联长度指数增长的特征。此外，我们在整个交换耦合空间内绘制了比热峰温度和对称性破缺相变的转变温度…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.02042v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们利用向列键理论研究了具有直至第三近邻交换耦合的三角晶格经典反铁磁海森堡模型。该方法使我们能够计算有限温度下的自由能和中子散射静态结构因子。我们绘制了相图，重点研究了破坏晶格旋转对称性的有限温度相变、螺旋自旋液体以及反铁磁120度相中普遍存在的宽比热峰。我们将该比热峰确定为标志着关联长度指数增长的特征。此外，我们在整个交换耦合空间内绘制了比热峰温度和对称性破缺相变的转变温度。沿J₃ = J₂/2线，傅里叶变换后的交换耦合呈现出退化的环状极小值，在中等温度下产生螺旋自旋液体行为。我们研究了螺旋自旋液体的结构因子随J₂的变化，并确定了相应的低温有序态，该有序态与退化环上最大自旋波熵的单q螺旋态一致。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.02042v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We investigate the classical antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the triangular lattice with up to third-nearest neighbor exchange couplings using the Nematic Bond Theory. This approach allows us to compute the free energy and the neutron scattering static structure factor at finite temperatures. We map out the phase diagram with a particular emphasis on finite-temperature phase transitions that break lattice-rotational symmetries, spiral spin liquids and the broad specific heat hump that is ubiquitous in the antiferromagnetic 120 degree phase. We identify this specific heat hump as signaling the onset of an exponentially increasing correlation length. Further, we map out the temperature of the specific heat hump and the transition temperatures of the symmetry-breaking transitions throughout the exchange-coupling space. Along the line J₃ = J₂/2, the Fourier-transformed exchange coupling exhibits a degenerate ring-like minimum, giving rise to spiral spin liquid behavior at intermediate temperatures. We investigate the structure factor of the spiral spin liquid as function of J₂ and identify the corresponding low-temperature order, which coincides with the single-ěcq spiral states of maximum spin-wave entropy along the degenerate ring.

04

AI / 机器学习专题#

覆盖模型、方法与 AI for Science 应用工作。

01

Unsupervised Electrofacies Classification and Porosity Characterization in the Offshore Keta Basin Using Wireline Logs#

📚 arXiv👤 Hamdiya Adams, Theophilus Ansah-Narh, Daniel Kwadwo Asiedu, Bruce Kofi Banoeng-Yakubo, Marcellin Atemkeng, Thomas Armah, Richmond Opoku-Sarkodie, Rebecca Davis, Ezekiel Nii Noye Nortey📅 2026-05-02🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对加纳海上克塔盆地岩心数据匮乏难题，本研究创新性地构建了基于K均值聚类的无监督电相分类流程，以轮廓系数等量化指标替代主观解释，实现从测井数据到地质连续体的自动识别。该框架为无岩心海上盆地的早期地层评
arXiv:2604.27126v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 本研究提出了一种用于加纳海上克塔盆地岩相电性分析的无监督机器学习流程，该盆地岩心数据匮乏。对C井约11,195个采样点的深度区间内的六条标准测井曲线进行了分析。在多元测井空间中应用K均值聚类，并通过惯性系数和轮廓系数诊断评估聚类结构。识别出四个聚类，平均轮廓系数约为0.50，表明分离程度中等但具有实际意义。所得电相呈现出与黏土含量、孔隙度及岩石骨架性质变化相关的系统性、深度…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.27126v1 公告类型: 新
摘要: 本研究提出了一种用于加纳海上克塔盆地岩相电性分析的无监督机器学习流程，该盆地岩心数据匮乏。对C井约11,195个采样点的深度区间内的六条标准测井曲线进行了分析。在多元测井空间中应用K均值聚类，并通过惯性系数和轮廓系数诊断评估聚类结构。识别出四个聚类，平均轮廓系数约为0.50，表明分离程度中等但具有实际意义。所得电相呈现出与黏土含量、孔隙度及岩石骨架性质变化相关的系统性、深度连续分布模式，构成从泥岩主导到较纯净砂岩主导单元的地质连续体。结果表明，仅基于测井数据、由定量指标支持的无监督聚类为地下表征提供了稳健且可重复的框架。所提出的流程为前沿海上盆地早期地层评价提供了实用工具，并为未来综合研究奠定基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27126v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study presents an unsupervised machine learning workflow for electrofacies analysis in the offshore Keta Basin, Ghana, where core data are scarce. Six standard wireline logs from Well~C were analysed over a depth interval comprising approximately 11,195 samples. K-means clustering was applied in multivariate log space, with the clustering structure evaluated using inertia and silhouette diagnostics. Four clusters were identified, supported by an average silhouette coefficient of approximately 0.50, indicating moderate but meaningful separation. The resulting electrofacies exhibit systematic, depth-continuous patterns associated with variations in clay content, porosity, and rock framework properties, forming a geological continuum from shale-dominated to cleaner sandstone-dominated units. The results demonstrate that log-only, unsupervised clustering supported by quantitative metrics provides a robust and reproducible framework for subsurface characterisation. The proposed workflow offers a practical tool for early-stage formation evaluation in frontier offshore basins and a foundation for future integrated studies.

02

实验精确验证的图神经网络预测核心电子结合能#

Experimentally Accurate Graph Neural Network Predictions of Core-Electron Binding Energies
📚 arXiv👤 Adam E. A. Fouda, Joshua Zhou, Rodrigo Ferreira, Patrick Phillips, Valay Agarawal, Bhavnesh Jangid, Jacob J. Wardzala, Rui Ding, Junhong Chen, Nicole Tebaldi, Phay J. Ho, Laura Gagliardi, Linda Young📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统量子化学计算成本瓶颈，以图神经网络实现碳1s结合能的高精度预测，实验验证误差仅0.33 eV，且首次通过消息传递深度建立模型架构与局域化学环境的可解释关联，为大分子X射线光电子能谱的快速
该研究开发了用于预测有机分子碳1s核心电子结合能的图神经网络模型，基于多组态配对密度泛函理论对2116个分子中8637个碳原子进行训练，并在113个含3-45个原子的分子上与570个实验值对比，实验评估误差达0.33 eV，展现出良好的尺寸可迁移性。研究还通过消息传递层数分析建立了模型架构与局域环境定义的化学可解释关联。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究开发了用于预测有机分子碳1s核心电子结合能的图神经网络模型，基于多组态配对密度泛函理论对2116个分子中8637个碳原子进行训练，并在113个含3-45个原子的分子上与570个实验值对比，实验评估误差达0.33 eV，展现出良好的尺寸可迁移性。研究还通过消息传递层数分析建立了模型架构与局域环境定义的化学可解释关联。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27070v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Graph neural network architectures are advantageous for predicting core-electron binding energies which depend on local bond environment effects, as the number of message passing layers defines the topological (bond) radius of the model's receptive field. This provides an interpretable connection between the model's architecture and the definition of locality in the considered environment. Here we present a graph neural network model for predicting carbon 1s core-electron binding energies in organic molecules. The model is trained with multiconfiguration pair-density functional theory on 8637 carbon atoms in 2116 molecules with 4-16 atoms and evaluated against 570 experimental values in 113 different molecules containing 3-45 atoms. Previous work benchmarked a mean absolute error of 0.27 eV to experiment for the training data level of theory [J. Phys. Chem. A 2025, 129, 36, 8419-8431] and the present model demonstrates an experimental evaluation error of 0.33 eV with good size transferability to larger systems. By examining the effect of the number of message passing layers on the performance, we show that two chemically informed node features, the atomic binding energy and environment electronegativity, encode molecule-specific information when normalized across the graph and capture beyond nearest-neighbor environment effects outside the receptive field. A case study on the 45 atom avobenzone tautomers demonstrates the model's ability for instant and precise analysis of complex molecules. Finally, the model's E(3)-equivariance is shown to out-perform an invariant model on non-equilibrium geometries from a methanol C-O bond stretch. The software and data are provided by the open-source AugerNet package at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19689244.

03

VibroML：基于机器学习势的晶体材料高通量振动分析与动态不稳定性自动修复工具包#

VibroML: an automated toolkit for high-throughput vibrational analysis and dynamic instability remediation of crystalline materials using machine-learned potentials
📚 arXiv👤 Rogério Almeida Gouvêa, Gian-Marco Rignanese📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：VibroML突破了传统软模分析依赖线性近似和人工干预的局限，以机器学习势驱动遗传算法全局搜索势能面，实现动态不稳定结构的自动化、智能化修复。该工具包将加速功能材料（如钙钛矿、低维材料）的高通量筛选与
该工作开发了开源Python工具包VibroML，采用基础机器学习原子间势实现从稳定性验证到自动结构修复的范式转变。其能量引导遗传算法远超传统软模跟踪方法，高效搜索势能面以发现多样的动态稳定多形体；自动分子动力学流程评估有限温度结构保持性，并与组合结构预测引擎ProtoCSP耦合，通过靶向合金化稳定受挫晶体拓扑，成功修复了Cs₂KInI₆和KTaSe₃等功能钙钛矿网络。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了开源Python工具包VibroML，采用基础机器学习原子间势实现从稳定性验证到自动结构修复的范式转变。其能量引导遗传算法远超传统软模跟踪方法，高效搜索势能面以发现多样的动态稳定多形体；自动分子动力学流程评估有限温度结构保持性，并与组合结构预测引擎ProtoCSP耦合，通过靶向合金化稳定受挫晶体拓扑，成功修复了Cs₂KInI₆和KTaSe₃等功能钙钛矿网络。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27685v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) accelerate phonon dispersion calculations, merely identifying dynamical instabilities in computationally predicted materials is insufficient; automated pathways to resolve them are required. We introduce VibroML, an open-source Python toolkit driven by foundational MLIPs that shifts the paradigm from stability verification to automated structural remediation. VibroML employs an energy-guided genetic algorithm that vastly outperforms traditional soft-mode following, efficiently navigating the potential energy surface to uncover diverse, dynamically stable polymorphs. As 0 K harmonic stability does not guarantee macroscopic viability, an automated molecular dynamics workflow evaluates finite-temperature structural retention. VibroML also couples with ProtoCSP, our combinatorial structure prediction engine, to stabilize frustrated crystal topologies via targeted alloying, successfully rescuing functional perovskite networks like Cs₂KInI₆ and KTaSe₃. Demonstrating broader applicability, we mined the Alexandria database -- where ~50% of quaternary and 99.5% of quinary elemental combinations lack any structural entries -- to identify thousands of abandoned, high-symmetry stoichiometries. Deploying ProtoCSP's "cold start" retrieval and VibroML's evolutionary search on a sample, we successfully identified dynamically stable low-symmetry candidates. Through integrated structural remediation, thermal validation, and systematic compositional exploration, VibroML enables a comprehensive deep-screening approach, yielding physically sound structural propositions that far surpass standard high-throughput workflows.

04

条件生成模型实现MAX相设计空间的目标化探索#

Conditional Generative Models Enable Targeted Exploration of MAX Phase Design Space
📚 arXiv👤 Jamie Swain, Cyprien Bone, Matthew T. Darby, Ewan Galloway, Keith T. Butler📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将条件生成机制引入晶体语言模型，以二维可解释物理指标定向调控生成过程，突破传统无条件采样的盲目性。在MAX相这一复杂固溶体体系中，该方法将稳定结构发现效率提升一倍，为数据驱动材料设计提供
该研究采用在6179种双过渡金属MAX相上微调的CrystaLLM-π大语言模型，生成符合已知实验趋势的外推结构。通过二维条件向量（统计衍生的MXene衍生计数和A位结合能替代指标）靶向MXene有利区域，特定条件向量使新型稳定结构生成率较无条件基线翻倍。在10种组成新颖的候选物中，5种经DFT验证具有稳定性（Eₕᵤₗₗ < 0.050 eV/atom），展示了自回归生成模型在成分复杂体系中加速发现的潜力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该研究采用在6179种双过渡金属MAX相上微调的CrystaLLM-π大语言模型，生成符合已知实验趋势的外推结构。通过二维条件向量（统计衍生的MXene衍生计数和A位结合能替代指标）靶向MXene有利区域，特定条件向量使新型稳定结构生成率较无条件基线翻倍。在10种组成新颖的候选物中，5种经DFT验证具有稳定性（Eₕᵤₗₗ < 0.050 eV/atom），展示了自回归生成模型在成分复杂体系中加速发现的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27709v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: MAX phases (Mₙ₊₁AXₙ₎, precursors to MXenes, span a vast compositional space, motivating efficient computational screening for synthesisable candidates. We employ CrystaLLM-π, a large language model fine-tuned on 6,179 double transition-metal MAX phases, and demonstrate its ability to generate out-of-sample structures consistent with known experimental trends. Using a conditioning vector with two dimensions (a statistically derived MXene derivative count and a surrogate for A-site binding energy), the model was able to target MXene-favourable regions of phase space for generation. Specific condition vectors double novel stable structure generation rates versus unconditioned baselines. Of ten compositionally novel candidates, five exhibit DFT-validated stability (Eₕᵤₗₗ < 0.050 eV/atom). This work showcases the potential for autoregressive generative models to explore targeted materials' spaces, offering a scalable framework for accelerated discovery in compositionally complex systems.

05

基于机器学习与物理引导增广的钢材料压痕尺寸效应数据高效校正#

Data-Efficient Indentation Size Effect Correction in Steels Using Machine Learning and Physics-Guided Augmentation
📚 arXiv👤 Radmir Karamov, Tagir Karamov📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对纳米压痕尺寸效应导致的硬度测量偏差，该研究创新性地将物理机制（仪器噪声、漂移、多相混合）嵌入机器学习特征工程与数据增广，突破小样本约束，实现钢材料硬度的高效精准校正，为材料力学性能的高通量表征提供
该工作针对浅纳米压痕中压痕尺寸效应导致的硬度高估问题，提出结合物理引导特征工程与数据增广的小样本预测方法。从三种钢参考样品采集约700组实验压痕数据，通过仪器噪声、漂移及多相边界混合等物理 motivated 变体进行增广。评估了岭回归、随机森林、XGBoost和神经网络等模型，输入特征融合Oliver-Pharr参数与力学描述符，详情需查阅原文。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对浅纳米压痕中压痕尺寸效应导致的硬度高估问题，提出结合物理引导特征工程与数据增广的小样本预测方法。从三种钢参考样品采集约700组实验压痕数据，通过仪器噪声、漂移及多相边界混合等物理 motivated 变体进行增广。评估了岭回归、随机森林、XGBoost和神经网络等模型，输入特征融合Oliver-Pharr参数与力学描述符，详情需查阅原文。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27775v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Shallow nanoindentation enables mechanical characterization of thin films, individual phases and other volume-constrained materials, but measured hardness is often inflated by the indentation size effect (ISE), contact-area errors and tip-geometry artifacts. Classical ISE corrections such as the Nix-Gao require a deep linear regime and are unreliable when only shallow measurements are used. This study investigates how a small experimental dataset can be used to predict a reference hardness with physics-guided feature engineering and augmentation. Approximately 700 experimental indentations were collected from three steel reference specimens covering a hardness range of 2-6.5 GPa and augmented using physically motivated variations representing instrumental noise, session-level drift, and local multiphase boundary blending. The input space combined Oliver-Pharr values with mechanics descriptors, including indentation work partitioning, (H/Eᵣ), and the area-invariant compliance proxy (Pₘₐₓ/S²). Ridge Regression (RR), Random Forest, XGBoost, and Neural Networks (NN) were evaluated using a quarantined fourth steel specimen tested at staggered loads. The hardness mapping was nonlinear: RR failed, whereas nonlinear models achieved (R² > 0.98) internally. A constrained (64-8-64) NN gave the best results, reaching RMSE = 0.470 GPa, MAPE = 5.4% on the quarantined steel. Unlike Nix-Gao analysis, the NN produced stable estimates in the shallow regime. SHAP and latent-space analysis showed reliance on area-invariant and energy-based descriptors. The results demonstrate the feasibility of a this workflow for ISE correction in steels using small datasets and suggest a pathway toward data-efficient characterization of any volume constrained materials.

06

片段约束电荷均衡：电化学界面电荷感知机器学习势的新方法#

Fragment-Constrained Charge Equilibration for Charge-Aware Machine Learning Potentials at Electrochemical Interfaces
📚 arXiv👤 Akhil Reddy Peeketi, Blas P Uberuaga, Travis E Jones📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对电化学界面模拟中全局电荷均衡方法无法刻画双电层电荷梯度的问题，作者提出软片段约束电荷均衡（Soft-FQEq）方法，将片段识别转化为原子几何的可微函数，实现了反应性体系中片段分辨的电荷守恒，突破了
针对电化学界面模拟中现有基于全局电荷均衡（QEq）的机器学习势将电极和电解质设定为共同电化学势、无法描述双电层界面梯度的问题，作者提出可微分的软片段约束电荷均衡（Soft-FQEq）方法。该方法通过使片段识别本身成为原子几何的可微函数，在反应性机器学习势中恢复了片段分辨的电荷守恒，克服了传统每片段电荷均衡依赖预定义分子拓扑、仅适用于非反应性系统的局限。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对电化学界面模拟中现有基于全局电荷均衡（QEq）的机器学习势将电极和电解质设定为共同电化学势、无法描述双电层界面梯度的问题，作者提出可微分的软片段约束电荷均衡（Soft-FQEq）方法。该方法通过使片段识别本身成为原子几何的可微函数，在反应性机器学习势中恢复了片段分辨的电荷守恒，克服了传统每片段电荷均衡依赖预定义分子拓扑、仅适用于非反应性系统的局限。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27910v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Predictive simulation of electrochemical interfaces requires atomistic models that capture reactive bond rearrangements, long-range electrostatics, and charge distributions reflecting the electronic distinctness of electrode and electrolyte. Existing charge-aware machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) built on global charge equilibration (QEq) settle electrode and electrolyte at a common electrochemical potential, leaving no room for the interfacial gradient that the double layer requires and admitting spurious charge transfer between electronically disconnected regions. Per-fragment charge equilibration is the established remedy in classical molecular dynamics, but reliance on predefined molecular topology has confined it to non-reactive systems. We lift this restriction by making fragment identification itself a differentiable function of atomic geometry, yielding soft fragment-constrained charge equilibration (Soft-FQEq) -- a solver layer that restores fragment-resolved charge conservation in reactive MLIPs. The layer consumes four scalar MLP readouts from a shared atomic-feature network -- per-atom electronegativity, source charge, short-range energy, and a soft bond connectivity -- and returns equilibrated charges together with per-fragment chemical potentials. We implement Soft-FQEq as an extension of the hippynn framework on a HIP-NN feature network and train it on DFT energies, forces, and DDEC6 charges for IrO2/H2O/Na+/ClO4- interfaces. The trained model recovers a clear electrode-to-electrolyte gradient in the per-atom electrochemical potential. With the same trained weights but the fragment-constrained solver replaced by global QEq at inference, this gradient collapses to an essentially uniform profile, directly showing that the gradient cannot be sustained within global QEq while the fragment formulation recovers it.

07

机器学习与分子模拟揭示ZIFs多晶型选择机制#

Machine Learning and Molecular Simulations Reveal Mechanisms of ZIFs Polymorph Selection
📚 arXiv👤 Emilio Méndez (Sorbonne Université, CNRS, Physico-chimie des Electrolytes et Nanosystèmes Interfaciaux, PHENIX, Paris, France), Rocio Semino (Sorbonne Université, CNRS, Physico-chimie des Electrolytes et Nanosystèmes Interfaciaux, PHENIX, Paris, France)📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将路径集体变量元动力学与机器学习分类器相结合，突破了传统模拟难以捕捉非经典成核路径的局限。通过构建合成中间体数据库训练神经网络，首次量化揭示了成核前团簇与无定形中间相对ZIFs多晶型选择
该工作针对Zn(imidazolate)₂金属有机框架的多晶型现象，采用路径集体变量元动力学模拟结合部分反应力场研究其自组装机制与热力学特征。通过构建瞬态和中间合成结构数据库，开发神经网络分类器分析发现，成核前团簇和无定形中间结构均对最终多晶型产物具有决定性影响，为理解溶剂热合成中非经典成核路径的调控因素提供了新认识。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对Zn(imidazolate)₂金属有机框架的多晶型现象，采用路径集体变量元动力学模拟结合部分反应力场研究其自组装机制与热力学特征。通过构建瞬态和中间合成结构数据库，开发神经网络分类器分析发现，成核前团簇和无定形中间结构均对最终多晶型产物具有决定性影响，为理解溶剂热合成中非经典成核路径的调控因素提供了新认识。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.28106v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Zn(imidazolate)₂ metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) exhibit a remarkable degree of polymorphism. Because of their promising industrial applications, many research groups have investigated phase transitions, phase diagram and relative stability of these polymorphs. There is now wide consensus in the research community that these MOFs are solvothermally formed via non-classical nucleation mechanisms, in which pre-nucleation clusters are first formed, followed by an intermediate amorphous structure that subsequently reorganizes to yield the final crystalline MOF. However, no study up to date has uncovered which part of the synthesis process determines the final polymorph obtained. In this work, path collective variable metadynamics simulations performed with a partially reactive force field give insights into mechanistic and thermodynamic aspects of the self-assembly of these MOFs. Databases of transient and intermediate synthesis structures are built from the simulations. By developing and applying neural network classifiers over these databases, it is found that both pre-nucleation clusters and the amorphous intermediate structures are polymorph-dependent. These results suggest that polymorph selection happens as early as the pre-nucleation cluster stage.

08

结构感知Transformer学习一维Heisenberg哈密顿量中近最优Trotter排序及系统尺寸泛化#

Structure-Aware Transformers for Learning Near-Optimal Trotter Orderings with System-Size Generalization in 1D Heisenberg Hamiltonians
📚 arXiv👤 Shamminuj Aktar, Reuben Tate, Stephan Eidenbenz📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将结构感知Transformer引入量子模拟优化，突破传统依赖昂贵保真度计算的瓶颈，实现从小系统特征直接预测大系统最优Trotter排序，为量子多体模拟的可扩展高效控制提供了数据驱动新范
该工作针对一维XXZ Heisenberg哈密顿量的Trotter化模拟，从哈密顿量对易图着色导出24种候选排序及其群置换。为规避大系统保真度评估的计算瓶颈，训练Transformer编码器基于较小系统（3-14量子比特）的哈密顿量和Trotter构型特征，直接预测更大系统的最优候选排序，推理时无需计算候选保真度。模型在15量子比特验证集上达到相对于24种候选最优排序平均保真度差距0.00115，展示了良好的系统尺寸泛化能力。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对一维XXZ Heisenberg哈密顿量的Trotter化模拟，从哈密顿量对易图着色导出24种候选排序及其群置换。为规避大系统保真度评估的计算瓶颈，训练Transformer编码器基于较小系统（3-14量子比特）的哈密顿量和Trotter构型特征，直接预测更大系统的最优候选排序，推理时无需计算候选保真度。模型在15量子比特验证集上达到相对于24种候选最优排序平均保真度差距0.00115，展示了良好的系统尺寸泛化能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27171v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Trotterization is a standard approach for simulating quantum time evolution on quantum computers, where the Hamiltonian is split into local terms and each term is applied in sequence. The order of these terms affects the fidelity of the simulation when they do not commute, so the choice of ordering directly impacts the accuracy of the simulation. We study this problem for one-dimensional XXZ Heisenberg Hamiltonians using a structured set of 24 candidate orderings derived from colorings of the Hamiltonian's commutation graph and their group permutations. Finding the best candidate for large systems becomes prohibitive because fidelity evaluation is computationally expensive. In this work, we train a transformer encoder on smaller systems to predict the best candidate ordering for larger systems directly from Hamiltonian and Trotter-configuration features, without computing candidate fidelities at inference time. The model is trained on in-range systems of 3 to 14 qubits with 15-qubit systems held out for validation. Experimental results show that the model reaches a mean test fidelity gap of 0.00115 relative to the best of the 24 candidates on out-of-range systems of 16 to 20 qubits. A training-size sweep further shows that generalization emerges once training includes systems up to L=8 qubits, with validation at L=9, and the gap continues to decrease as the training range grows. To our knowledge, this is the first application of a learned model to Trotter ordering, and it motivates future work on AI-guided Trotter ordering with generalization across Hamiltonian families and system types.

09

AutoREC：面向电化学阻抗谱数据等效电路模型生成的强化学习智能体开发平台#

AutoREC: A software platform for developing reinforcement learning agents for equivalent circuit model generation from electrochemical impedance spectroscopy data
📚 arXiv👤 Ali Jaberi (Clean Energy Innovation Research Center, National Research Council Canada, Mississauga, ON, Canada), Yonatan Kurniawan (Department of Material Science and Engineering, University of Toronto, Toronto, ON, Canada), Robert Black (Clean Energy Innovation Research Center, National Research Council Canada, Mississauga, ON, Canada), Shayan Mousavi M. (Clean Energy Innovation Research Center, National Research Council Canada, Mississauga, ON, Canada), Kabir Verma (Cheriton School of Computer Science, University of Waterloo, Waterloo, ON, Canada), Zoya Sadighi (Clean Energy Innovation Research Center, National Research Council Canada, Mississauga, ON, Canada), Santiago Miret (Lila Sciences, San Francisco, CA, USA), Jason Hattrick-Simpers (Department of Material Science and Engineering, University of Toronto, Toronto, ON, Canada)📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：AutoREC将强化学习引入EIS等效电路建模，核心创新在于将电路构建转化为序列决策问题，通过双深度Q网络与死循环缓解策略实现智能体训练。该平台突破了传统人工拟合的瓶颈，为自主实验中的阻抗谱解析提供了
该工作介绍了开源Python包AutoREC，用于开发强化学习智能体以从电化学阻抗谱数据自动生成等效电路模型。该平台将电路构建表述为马尔可夫决策过程中的序列决策问题，采用带优先经验回放的双深度Q网络及死循环缓解策略。训练后的智能体在多样数据集上展示了自动建模能力，为自主实验流程中的EIS解析提供了可扩展方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作介绍了开源Python包AutoREC，用于开发强化学习智能体以从电化学阻抗谱数据自动生成等效电路模型。该平台将电路构建表述为马尔可夫决策过程中的序列决策问题，采用带优先经验回放的双深度Q网络及死循环缓解策略。训练后的智能体在多样数据集上展示了自动建模能力，为自主实验流程中的EIS解析提供了可扩展方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27266v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper introduces AutoREC, an open-source Python package for developing reinforcement learning (RL) agents to automatically generate equivalent circuit models (ECMs) from electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) data. While ECMs are a standard framework for interpreting EIS data, traditional identification is typically based on manual trial-and-error, which requires domain experts and limits scalability, particularly in autonomous experimental pipelines such as self-driving laboratories. AutoREC addresses this challenge by formulating ECM construction as a sequential decision-making problem within a Markov Decision Process framework. It implements a Double Deep Q-Network with prioritized experience replay, along with a dedicated dead-loop mitigation strategy, to efficiently explore a complex action space for circuit generation. To demonstrate the capabilities of the platform, we trained an RL agent using AutoREC and evaluated its strengths and limitations across diverse datasets, while also discussing possible strategies to mitigate these limitations in future agent designs. The trained agent achieved a success rate exceeding 99.6% on synthetic datasets and demonstrated strong generalization to unseen experimental EIS data from batteries, corrosion, oxygen evolution reaction, and CO₂ reduction systems. These results position AutoREC as a promising platform for adaptive and data-driven ECM generation, with potential for integration into automated electrochemical workflows.

10

基于量子电路学习的可积自旋链量子模拟有效噪声缓解#

Effective Noise Mitigation via Quantum Circuit Learning in Quantum Simulation of Integrable Spin Chains
📚 arXiv👤 Wenlong Zhao, Yimeng Zhang, Yan Guo, Yufan Cui, Zhuohang Wang, Rui-Dong Zhu📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将量子电路学习（QCL）与可积系统物理结合，利用守恒荷约束作为物理先验训练浅层变分电路，以逼近深层含噪演化。相比传统误差缓解，该方法无需指数采样开销即可生成更短、更鲁棒的电路，为近-te
该工作提出一种基于量子电路学习(QCL)的噪声缓解量子模拟策略，特别适用于近-term量子设备上的可积量子自旋链。方法训练浅层变分电路通过学习守恒荷和少量动力学信息来近似更深的时间演化电路。在真实噪声模型下，学习得到的电路在保持守恒量和动力学观测量方面显著优于原始电路的噪声模拟，展示了QCL作为一种物理启发的有效误差缓解策略，可产生更短、更鲁棒的电路且无指数采样开销。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出一种基于量子电路学习(QCL)的噪声缓解量子模拟策略，特别适用于近-term量子设备上的可积量子自旋链。方法训练浅层变分电路通过学习守恒荷和少量动力学信息来近似更深的时间演化电路。在真实噪声模型下，学习得到的电路在保持守恒量和动力学观测量方面显著优于原始电路的噪声模拟，展示了QCL作为一种物理启发的有效误差缓解策略，可产生更短、更鲁棒的电路且无指数采样开销。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.27648v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We propose a noise-mitigation quantum simulation strategy for near-term quantum devices based on Quantum Circuit Learning (QCL), which is in particular effective for integrable quantum spin chains. The method trains a shallow variational circuit to approximate a deeper time-evolution circuit by learning the conserved charges and only a small amount of dynamical information in the system. Under realistic noise models, the learned circuit maintains both conserved quantities and dynamical observables significantly closer to their true values than the noisy simulation of the original circuit. This demonstrates QCL as an effective, physics-informed error mitigation strategy, producing shorter, more robust circuits without exponential sampling overhead.

11

经典伊辛模型与变形环面码中的学习相变#

Learning transitions in classical Ising models and deformed toric codes
📚 arXiv👤 Malte Pütz, Samuel J. Garratt, Hidetoshi Nishimori, Simon Trebst, Guo-Yi Zhu📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次在经典伊辛模型中发现"学习相变"这一新普适类，揭示贝叶斯推断可诱导超越热临界的新奇异性；通过建立与弱测量下环面码动力学的精确映射，证明拓扑量子记忆在接近相变点时仍具鲁棒性，为量子纠错阈值分析
该工作证明了二维经典伊辛模型中存在学习相变——当通过贝叶斯推断学习局域能量密度时，条件关联函数的长程行为出现奇异性。此相变从无限高温顺磁态延伸至热临界态，与热伊辛相变的交点构成新的三临界点。该学习模型精确描述了弱测量对无阻挫量子哈密顿量基态的影响，插值于环面码与顺磁体之间。三临界点的位置表明拓扑相的量子记忆对弱测量具有鲁棒性，即使初态任意接近拓扑-平庸量子相变点。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作证明了二维经典伊辛模型中存在学习相变——当通过贝叶斯推断学习局域能量密度时，条件关联函数的长程行为出现奇异性。此相变从无限高温顺磁态延伸至热临界态，与热伊辛相变的交点构成新的三临界点。该学习模型精确描述了弱测量对无阻挫量子哈密顿量基态的影响，插值于环面码与顺磁体之间。三临界点的位置表明拓扑相的量子记忆对弱测量具有鲁棒性，即使初态任意接近拓扑-平庸量子相变点。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.12385v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Conditional probability distributions describe the effect of learning an initially unknown classical state through Bayesian inference. Here we demonstrate the existence of a learning transition, having signatures in the long distance behavior of conditional correlation functions, in the two-dimensional classical Ising model. This transition, which arises when learning local energy densities, extends all the way from the infinite-temperature paramagnetic state down to the thermal critical state. The intersection of the line of learning transitions and the thermal Ising transition is a new tricritical point. Our model for learning also exactly describes the effects of weak measurements on ground states of frustration-free quantum Hamiltonians, which interpolate between the toric code and a paramagnet. Notably, the location of the above tricritical point implies that the quantum memory defined by the degenerate ground states in the topological phase is robust to weak measurement, even when the initial state is arbitrarily close to the quantum phase transition separating topological and trivial phases. Our analysis uses a replica field theory combined with the renormalization group, and we chart out the phase diagram using a combination of tensor network and Monte Carlo techniques. Our methods can be extended to study the more general effects of learning on both classical and quantum states. The learning induced critical states can be realized in classical or quantum devices.

12

基于Transformer预测原子尺度转变#

Predicting Atomistic Transitions with Transformers
📚 arXiv👤 Henry Tischler, Wenting Li, Qi Tang, Danny Perez, Thomas Vogel📅 2026-05-01🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将Transformer引入纳米团簇原子转变预测，核心创新在于建立物理有效性评估框架，并通过输入微扰高效生成多样微观状态。其意义在于突破传统模拟的计算瓶颈，为机器学习驱动材料相变路径探索提供了可
该工作展示了如何利用Transformer模型预测纳米团簇中的原子尺度转变，以替代计算成本极高的传统模拟方法。研究提出了评估预测物理有效性的方法，并证明通过对输入数据进行微小扰动可生成大量不同的微观状态，为机器学习加速材料转变路径探索提供了新策略。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作展示了如何利用Transformer模型预测纳米团簇中的原子尺度转变，以替代计算成本极高的传统模拟方法。研究提出了评估预测物理有效性的方法，并证明通过对输入数据进行微小扰动可生成大量不同的微观状态，为机器学习加速材料转变路径探索提供了新策略。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.06526v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurate knowledge of the atomistic transition pathways in materials and material surfaces is crucial for many material science problems. However, conventional simulation techniques used to find these transitions are extremely computationally intensive. Even with large-scale, accelerated material simulations, the computational cost constrains the applicable domain in practice. Machine learning models, with the potential to learn the complex emergent behaviors governing atomistic transitions as a fast surrogate model, have great promise to predict transitions with a vastly reduced computational cost. Here, we demonstrate how transformers can be trained to predict atomistic transitions in nano-clusters. We show how we evaluate physical validity of the predictions and how a multitude of additional, different microstates can be generated by slightly varying the data provided to the model.
