Geometry-Based Neural-Network Prediction of Electron Localization Function Topology in Dense Hydrogen#

📚 arXiv👤 Xiaoyu Wang, Miriam Marqués, Sergio Gómez, Francesc Serratosa, Eva Zurek, Julia Contreras-García📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统电子结构计算瓶颈，首创几何驱动神经网络直接预测电子局域化函数拓扑，实现R²>0.99的高精度与跨相态（流体/晶体）迁移能力，为高压氢网络高通量表征提供高效新范式。
我们开发了一种机器学习框架，可直接从原子几何结构预测纯致密氢的电子局域化函数（ELF），无需显式电子结构计算。该模型基于涵盖致密流体氢多个压力 regime 的第一性原理数据进行训练，实现了高精度（R² > 0.99），并能忠实再现 ELF 的全局分布。结合实空间和倒空间分析表明，残差误差主要由平滑的长波成分主导，其关联长度超过典型的 H-H 成键尺度，且这些成分的幅度随压力系统性地增大。尽管该模型仅在致密流体氢构型网络上训练，但其向…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

我们开发了一种机器学习框架，可直接从原子几何结构预测纯致密氢的电子局域化函数（ELF），无需显式电子结构计算。该模型基于涵盖致密流体氢多个压力 regime 的第一性原理数据进行训练，实现了高精度（R² > 0.99），并能忠实再现 ELF 的全局分布。结合实空间和倒空间分析表明，残差误差主要由平滑的长波成分主导，其关联长度超过典型的 H-H 成键尺度，且这些成分的幅度随压力系统性地增大。尽管该模型仅在致密流体氢构型网络上训练，但其向晶体氢构型的迁移表现稳健，保留了 ELF 拓扑的关键特征，包括临界点及氢网络连通性。综合而言，这些结果为基于几何结构的流体氢和晶体氢中氢网络特征高通量评估提供了一条可行途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26445v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a machine-learning framework to predict the electron localization function (ELF) of pure, dense hydrogen directly from atomic geometry, bypassing explicit electronic-structure calculations. Trained on first-principles data spanning multiple pressure regimes in dense fluid hydrogen, the model achieves high accuracy (R² > 0.99) and faithfully reproduces the global distribution of the ELF. A combined real- and reciprocal-space analysis reveals that the residual error is dominated by smooth, long-wavelength components with correlation lengths exceeding typical H--H bonding scales, and that the magnitude of these components increases systematically with pressure. Despite being trained exclusively on dense fluid hydrogen networks, the model transfers robustly to crystalline hydrogen configurations, preserving key features of ELF topology, including critical points and hydrogen-network connectivity. Taken together, these results suggest a viable route toward geometry-based, high-throughput evaluation of hydrogen-networking characteristics in both fluid and crystalline hydrogen.

36

aim2dat：自动化从头算材料建模与数据分析的Python基础设施#

aim2dat: A Python infrastructure for automated ab initio material modeling and data analysis
📚 arXiv👤 Holger-Dietrich Saßnick, Joshua Edzards, Timo Reents, Caterina Cocchi📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：aim2dat构建了DFT高通量计算与数据分析的一体化Python平台，创新性地将结构查询、批量筛选与机器学习集成于统一工作流，突破了传统材料计算中数据孤岛与手动处理瓶颈，为光催化、MOF等功能材料的
该工作介绍了aim2dat工具包，一个用于高通量密度泛函理论计算工作流自动化与大数据处理的Python软件包。其核心功能包括在线数据库结构查询接口、高通量筛选程序及机器学习模型无缝集成，应用于光催化材料、金属有机框架等场景，以支持数据驱动计算材料科学的发展。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作介绍了aim2dat工具包，一个用于高通量密度泛函理论计算工作流自动化与大数据处理的Python软件包。其核心功能包括在线数据库结构查询接口、高通量筛选程序及机器学习模型无缝集成，应用于光催化材料、金属有机框架等场景，以支持数据驱动计算材料科学的发展。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26551v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The emergence of data-driven computational materials science offers unprecedented opportunities to explore complex material landscapes, complementing experimental research with the discovery of novel compounds. To enable these developments, it is essential to establish robust, reliable, and easy-to-use software supporting workflow automation and large dataset processing. Herein, we introduce the Automated Ab Initio Materials Modeling and Data Analysis Toolkit (aim2dat), a Python package offering a user-friendly interface to generate and handle big data, design high-throughput workflows based on density functional theory calculations, and analyze the output. Its key features include interfaces to online databases for structure query and analysis, high-throughput screening routines, and seamless integration of machine learning models. The capabilities of aim2dat are showcased with a variety of use-cases, ranging from photocathode materials to metal-organic frameworks.

37

机器学习原子间势中的混合专家框架用于原子模拟#

Mixture of Experts Framework in Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials for Atomistic Simulations
📚 arXiv👤 Gabriel de Miranda Nascimento, Marc L. Descoteaux, Laura Zichi, Chuin Wei Tan, William C. Witt, Nicola Molinari, Sriteja Mantha, Daniil Kitchaev, Mordechai Kornbluth, Karim Gadelrab, Charles Tuffile, Boris Kozinsky📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破MLIP推理成本瓶颈，创新性地将混合专家思想引入E(3)等变架构，通过空间自适应划分与一致性约束实现多保真度耦合，为百万原子级长时间分子动力学模拟提供可扩展的精度-效率平衡方案。
该工作针对机器学习原子间势(MLIP)推理成本限制大规模模拟的问题，提出基于E(3)等变Allegro架构的多保真度"混合专家"框架。将模拟空间划分为化学复杂区域和简单区域并分配不同容量的模型，通过共训练策略在损失函数中引入共享体环境上的能量和力一致性约束，缓解模型界面处的力学失配问题，避免人工应力场和不稳定性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作针对机器学习原子间势(MLIP)推理成本限制大规模模拟的问题，提出基于E(3)等变Allegro架构的多保真度"混合专家"框架。将模拟空间划分为化学复杂区域和简单区域并分配不同容量的模型，通过共训练策略在损失函数中引入共享体环境上的能量和力一致性约束，缓解模型界面处的力学失配问题，避免人工应力场和不稳定性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26143v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: First-principles atomistic simulations are essential for understanding complex material phenomena but are fundamentally limited by their computational cost. While Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (MLIPs) have drastically improved cost for a given accuracy, their inference cost remains a bottleneck for massive systems or long timescales. To address this, we introduce a multifidelity "Mixture-of-Experts" framework based on the E(3)-equivariant Allegro architecture. Our method spatially partitions the simulation domain into a chemically complex region (e.g., reactive interfaces) and a simple region (e.g., bulk lattice), assigning models of varying capacity to each. Among the challenges in such static domain decomposition, the mechanical mismatch between models at the interface is particularly critical, as it can generate artificial stress fields and instability. We address this challenge with a co-training strategy in which the loss function includes agreement constraints -- penalties on per-atom energy and force discrepancies between models evaluated on shared bulk environments -- forcing the independent models to learn a consistent physical description of the bulk material. We validate this approach on a realistic Pt+CO catalytic system, demonstrating that the co-trained models maintain exact energy conservation, align their bulk mechanical response (e.g., equation of state and bulk modulus), and achieve predictive accuracy comparable to a full high-fidelity simulation at more than twice the computational speed.

38

化学元素的语义嵌入用于增强材料推断与发现#

Semantic Embeddings of Chemical Elements for Enhanced Materials Inference and Discovery
📚 arXiv👤 Yunze Jia, Yuehui Xian, Yangyang Xu, Pengfei Dang, Xiangdong Ding, Jun Sun, Yumei Zhou, Dezhen Xue📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统经验描述符的局限，首创基于大规模文献预训练的化学元素语义嵌入方法，使AI自动习得合金领域的隐含知识关联。ElementBERT作为通用元素表征，在多类材料预测任务中实现系统性提升，为数据
该工作提出基于ElementBERT的化学元素通用语义嵌入框架，该领域专用模型基于129万篇合金相关论文摘要训练，捕获合金特有的潜在知识与上下文关系。作为元素描述符，其在预测力学与相变性质、相结构分类及贝叶斯优化等材料下游任务中持续优于传统经验描述符，在钛合金、高熵合金与形状记忆合金应用中预测准确度提升达23%。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出基于ElementBERT的化学元素通用语义嵌入框架，该领域专用模型基于129万篇合金相关论文摘要训练，捕获合金特有的潜在知识与上下文关系。作为元素描述符，其在预测力学与相变性质、相结构分类及贝叶斯优化等材料下游任务中持续优于传统经验描述符，在钛合金、高熵合金与形状记忆合金应用中预测准确度提升达23%。

English Abstract

arXiv:2502.14912v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present a framework for generating universal semantic embeddings of chemical elements to advance materials inference and discovery. This framework leverages ElementBERT, a domain-specific BERT-based natural language processing model trained on 1.29 million abstracts of alloy-related scientific papers, to capture latent knowledge and contextual relationships specific to alloys. These semantic embeddings serve as robust elemental descriptors, consistently outperforming traditional empirical descriptors with significant improvements across multiple downstream tasks. These include predicting mechanical and transformation properties, classifying phase structures, and optimizing materials properties via Bayesian optimization. Applications to titanium alloys, high-entropy alloys, and shape memory alloys demonstrate up to 23% gains in prediction accuracy. Our results show that ElementBERT surpasses general-purpose BERT variants by encoding specialized alloy knowledge. By bridging contextual insights from scientific literature with quantitative inference, our framework accelerates the discovery and optimization of advanced materials, with potential applications extending beyond alloys to other material classes.

39

磷酸三丁酯液体的分子动力学力场遗传优化#

Molecular Dynamics Force Field Genetic Optimization for Tri-n-butyl Phosphate Liquid
📚 arXiv👤 Faranak Hatami, Valmor F. de Almeida📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将非支配排序遗传算法与神经网络代理模型相结合，解决了传统力场优化中分子动力学模拟计算成本高昂的瓶颈，实现了磷酸三丁酯多目标性质的高效同步优化，为复杂分子液体的原子尺度精确建模提供了可扩展的自动化
该工作开发了嵌入分子动力学模拟的迭代优化算法，采用非支配排序遗传算法优化磷酸三丁酯液体的Lennard-Jones参数，以复现实验测量的质量密度、偶极矩、蒸发热、自扩散系数与剪切黏度等关键性质。通过神经网络性质模型摊销MD模拟的高计算成本，实现了大种群多代遗传优化，建立了TBP原子尺度性质预测框架。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作开发了嵌入分子动力学模拟的迭代优化算法，采用非支配排序遗传算法优化磷酸三丁酯液体的Lennard-Jones参数，以复现实验测量的质量密度、偶极矩、蒸发热、自扩散系数与剪切黏度等关键性质。通过神经网络性质模型摊销MD模拟的高计算成本，实现了大种群多代遗传优化，建立了TBP原子尺度性质预测框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25941v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: An iterative optimization algorithm with MD simulations in the loop is developed and applied to optimize Lennard-Jones (LJ) parameters specific for liquid tri-n-butyl phosphate (TBP). The optimization loop uses non-dominated sorting genetic algorithms to obtain LJ parameters that reproduce key properties such as mass density, electric dipole moment, heat of vaporization, self-diffusion coefficient (SDC), and shear viscosity. Errors relative to experimentally measured properties lead to a multi-objective function optimization problem stated in terms of a Pareto-optimal set. A systematic application of the optimization algorithm to cases involving single- and multi-objective functions was carried out in this work, establishing a framework for atomistic TBP property predictions. We demonstrate the use of a neural network property model to amortize the high cost of MD simulations in the optimization loop and to allow for large populations and more generations to be used in the genetic algorithms. In our previous study of finding the best force field for TBP property predictions as judged by the aforementioned thermophysical properties, we found the Polarized AMBER-MNDO force field to be the best overall showing a νm74% relative deviation from experimental values. However, in this study, we show optimized values of the LJ parameters that improve the overall deviation from experimental data to νm23% when using the NN NSGA-III algorithm. Despite this large improvement, the accurate prediction of the transport properties, SDC and shear viscosity, remains difficult since improvements in one of them worsen the other, and vice versa.

40

机器学习实现双读出量能器实时波形分解#

Machine Learning Enables Real-Time Waveform Decomposition for Dual-Readout Calorimetry
📚 arXiv👤 Liangyu Wu, Qibin Liu, Marco Toliman Lucchini, Julia Gonski, Marcello Campajola, Stefano Moneta📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将机器学习引入双读出量能器信号分离，突破传统模板拟合对高采样率的依赖，实现单一模型跨能量泛化及FPGA实时部署，为下一代高精度电磁量能器提供了兼具性能与效率的工程化解决方案。
针对双读出量能器中切伦科夫信号与闪烁信号的事件-by-事件电磁分数修正需求，系统比较了机器学习(ML)与模板拟合方法在三种代表性晶体中的信号分离性能。ML模型在更低采样率下即可达到相当的信号提取效果，单一模型跨能量范围训练展现出稳健性能，且FPGA兼容压缩实现了实时应用所需的低延迟。该工作为晶体基双读出量能器建立了基准模板拟合性能及ML增强替代方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对双读出量能器中切伦科夫信号与闪烁信号的事件-by-事件电磁分数修正需求，系统比较了机器学习(ML)与模板拟合方法在三种代表性晶体中的信号分离性能。ML模型在更低采样率下即可达到相当的信号提取效果，单一模型跨能量范围训练展现出稳健性能，且FPGA兼容压缩实现了实时应用所需的低延迟。该工作为晶体基双读出量能器建立了基准模板拟合性能及ML增强替代方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26090v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Dual-readout calorimeters achieve superior energy resolution by simultaneously measuring Cherenkov and scintillation signals for event-by-event electromagnetic fraction correction, making them attractive for next-generation Higgs factories. However, if a full waveform readout is required for time-based analysis to separate Cherenkov and scintillation signals, high off-detector data rates might present challenges. These challenges can be mitigated by real-time signal processing in front-end electronics. We present a systematic comparison of machine learning (ML) and template fitting approaches for the separation of scintillation and Cherenkov light components in homogeneous dual-readout calorimeters across three representative crystal types. ML models achieve comparable signal extraction performance at lower sampling rates than template fitting. A single model trained over a range of incident particle energies demonstrates robust performance, and FPGA-compatible compression achieves latencies suitable for real-time application. This work establishes both baseline template fitting performance and ML-enhanced alternatives for crystal-based dual-readout calorimeters, offering practical pathways towards front-end feature extraction in future detector design.

41

基于物理信息神经算子的壁湍流大涡模拟网络(LESnets)#

Large-eddy simulation nets (LESnets) based on physics-informed neural operator for wall-bounded turbulence
📚 arXiv👤 Sunan Zhao, Yunpeng Wang, Huiyu Yang, Zhihong Guo, Jianchun Wang📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破性地将LES方程与F-FNO架构深度融合，首创无标签数据驱动的壁湍流长期预测范式。通过壁面模型嵌入壁律约束，解决了高雷诺数湍流多尺度建模的稳定性难题，为工程湍流仿真提供了兼具物理一致性与计算
针对高雷诺数壁湍流多尺度涡结构导致现有物理信息神经算子(PINO)难以稳定准确长期预测的问题，发展了将大涡模拟(LES)方程融入因子化傅里叶神经算子(F-FNO)的LESnets框架。该框架无需标注数据训练，可在训练过程中生成灵活时间跨度的时域解；并通过壁面模型将壁律整合入物理信息损失函数，实现壁湍流的可靠模拟。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

针对高雷诺数壁湍流多尺度涡结构导致现有物理信息神经算子(PINO)难以稳定准确长期预测的问题，发展了将大涡模拟(LES)方程融入因子化傅里叶神经算子(F-FNO)的LESnets框架。该框架无需标注数据训练，可在训练过程中生成灵活时间跨度的时域解；并通过壁面模型将壁律整合入物理信息损失函数，实现壁湍流的可靠模拟。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26621v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate and efficient prediction of three-dimensional (3D) wall-bounded turbulent flows poses a significant challenge for machine learning methods, particularly in scenarios where flow field data are limited. Physics-informed neural operator (PINO) combines neural operator and physics constraint methods, and shows great potential for solving a wide range of partial differential equations. Nevertheless, the multi-scale vortex structures in wall-bounded turbulence make it difficult for most existing PINO methods to make stable and accurate long-term predictions at high Reynolds numbers. To address this challenge, we develop the large-eddy simulation nets (LESnets) that integrates large-eddy simulation (LES) equations into the factorized Fourier neural operator (F-FNO) for wall-bounded turbulence. The LESnets framework does not rely on labeled data for training, which enables it to generate temporal solutions over flexible time horizons during the training process. Moreover, the law of the wall is integrated into the LESnets framework through a wall model for the physics-informed loss, thus enabling reliable simulations of wall-bounded turbulence at high Reynolds number using coarse grids. The proposed LESnets methods are demonstrated in turbulent channel flows at three friction Reynolds numbers: 180, 590, and 1000. Numerical experiments show that the performance of the LESnets in terms of prediction accuracy and efficiency is comparable to that of two data-driven models, namely the implicit U-Net enhanced Fourier neural operator (IUFNO) and F-FNO. Meanwhile, the LESnets model achieves prediction accuracy comparable to traditional LES methods while offering a higher computational efficiency. Thus, the LESnets model demonstrates strong potential for efficient and long-term prediction of wall-bounded turbulent flows.

42

基于多保真贝叶斯优化的细胞复合材料目标非线性力学响应逆向设计#

Inverse Design of Cellular Composites for Targeted Nonlinear Mechanical Response via Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimisation
📚 arXiv👤 Hirak Kansara, Leo Guo, Wei Tan📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对细胞复合材料非线性力学响应的逆向设计难题，本文创新性地将多保真贝叶斯优化与响应相似度标量化相结合，突破传统单保真度方法计算成本高的瓶颈；以旋节分解结构为例，通过有限元与实验双重验证，为复杂材料系统
提出面向细胞复合材料完整非线性响应直接靶向的多保真贝叶斯优化(MFBO)逆向设计框架。通过整合多保真度信息源并采用相似度分数标量化响应，实现设计空间的高效探索，降低对昂贵评估的依赖。以旋节分解型细胞复合材料为概念验证，结合有限元模型与短碳纤维增强PET-G复合材料的压缩实验验证，展示了该方法在非线性力学响应逆向设计中的有效性。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

提出面向细胞复合材料完整非线性响应直接靶向的多保真贝叶斯优化(MFBO)逆向设计框架。通过整合多保真度信息源并采用相似度分数标量化响应，实现设计空间的高效探索，降低对昂贵评估的依赖。以旋节分解型细胞复合材料为概念验证，结合有限元模型与短碳纤维增强PET-G复合材料的压缩实验验证，展示了该方法在非线性力学响应逆向设计中的有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26657v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The rise of machine learning and additive manufacturing has enabled the design of architected materials with tailored properties that surpass those of natural materials. Inverse design offers a data-efficient alternative to trial-and-error methods, yet most existing approaches depend on either large datasets or scarce high-fidelity data from simulations and experiments. These requirements pose a particular challenge for architected materials with nonlinear mechanical responses, where capturing complex deformation modes requires expensive evaluations. To address this, a Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimisation (MFBO) framework for the inverse design of cellular composites that directly targets their full nonlinear response is introduced. By integrating information from multiple fidelity sources and scalarising the response using a similarity score, the framework enables efficient exploration of the design space while reducing reliance on costly evaluations. As a proof of concept, the method is applied to spinodoid cellular composites using finite element models, validated with compression tests on short carbon-fibre reinforced PET-G composites. Four target responses were considered, with three multi-fidelity strategies benchmarked against a standard single-fidelity approach. Across all cases, MFBO achieved higher similarity scores and consistently recovered the targeted responses, outperforming the single-fidelity baseline under the same evaluation budget, while also successfully recovering all targeted responses. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of MFBO for inverse design of stochastic architected materials, where high-quality data is scarce but lower-cost proxies exist. By efficiently navigating complex design spaces, MFBO enables the creation of cellular composites with precisely tailored nonlinear mechanical behaviour.

43

准等动力学恒星器中线圈非平面性与磁面几何关联的数据驱动研究#

The link between coil non planarity and magnetic surface geometry in QI stellarators: a data driven study
📚 arXiv👤 Andrea Pavone, Felix Warmer📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本研究首次系统量化了准等动力学恒星器线圈复杂度与磁面几何的关联，创新性地引入主方向旋转率等微分几何指标解释线圈非平面性成因，突破传统经验设计局限，为聚变装置线圈工程优化提供了数据驱动的理论依据和可计算
基于Constellaration数据集7500个准等动力学(QI)恒星器等离子体边界，通过SIMSOPT约束优化计算线圈构型，定量定义线圈复杂度指标(挠率、SVD非平面性评分、内侧倾角、谱宽)和丰富的表面/磁几何特征(第二基本形式、归一化扭转、主方向旋转率、表面曲率、磁轴特性)。单变量和多变量统计分析(对去均值数据以消除数据集级偏差)揭示了表面几何在线圈复杂度决定中的核心作用，特别是主方向旋转率的关键影响，为下一代聚变电站的工程可行…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

基于Constellaration数据集7500个准等动力学(QI)恒星器等离子体边界，通过SIMSOPT约束优化计算线圈构型，定量定义线圈复杂度指标(挠率、SVD非平面性评分、内侧倾角、谱宽)和丰富的表面/磁几何特征(第二基本形式、归一化扭转、主方向旋转率、表面曲率、磁轴特性)。单变量和多变量统计分析(对去均值数据以消除数据集级偏差)揭示了表面几何在线圈复杂度决定中的核心作用，特别是主方向旋转率的关键影响，为下一代聚变电站的工程可行性提供了设计指导。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26763v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Stellarator fusion devices confine plasma by means of complex, non-planar electromagnetic coils. Understanding how the shape of the plasma boundary determines the required complexity of the coil set is a central open question in stellarator design, with direct implications for engineering feasibility and the prospects of building next-generation fusion power plants. In this work we address this question using a large data-driven study. Starting from the Constellaration dataset of 7 500 quasi-isodynamic (QI) stellarator plasma boundaries, we compute a set of coil configurations using constrained optimisation within SIMSOPT, and define quantitative coil-complexity metrics (torsion, SVD non-planarity score, inboard-side inclination angle, spectral width) together with a rich set of surface and magnetic geometry features (second fundamental form, normalised twist, principal-direction rotation rate, surface curvatures, and magnetic axis properties). Univariate and multivariate statistical analyses, performed on demeaned data to remove dataset-level biases, reveal a strong, central role of the surface geometry: the principal-direction rotation rate of the plasma boundary (twist rate) is the single best predictor of coil non-planarity (Spearman rho = 0.936, R2 = 0.700), while a Random Forest model using up to four surface features achieves R2 = 0.882 for the same target. These results provide quantitative evidence that the local twist of the boundary surface, and how rapidly it changes across the surface, are the primary drivers of coil non-planarity in quasi-isodynamic stellarators.

44

元学习增强隐式全波形反演#

Meta-learning-enhanced implicit full waveform inversion
📚 arXiv👤 Huan Song, Shijun Cheng, Huanhuan Tang, Wei Ouyang, Weijian Mao📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文将元学习引入隐式全波形反演，以SIREN参数化速度模型并通过多任务预训练使网络习得共享反演先验，实现对新场景的快速适应。核心创新在于建立跨地质场景的迁移机制，突破传统IFWI逐案迭代、收敛缓慢的瓶
隐式全波形反演（IFWI）利用隐式神经表示将地下速度模型参数化为空间坐标的连续函数，降低了对初始模型的依赖并提升了反演灵活性。但该方法仍需大量迭代更新，收敛慢、计算成本高，且缺乏跨地质场景共享先验知识的机制。本文提出基于元学习的隐式全波形反演方法（Meta-IFWI），采用周期激活函数的隐式神经网络（SIREN）表示速度模型，并通过元学习策略在多个反演任务上预训练单一网络，使网络学习共享反演先验与快速适应策略，以加速收敛并增强跨区域泛…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

隐式全波形反演（IFWI）利用隐式神经表示将地下速度模型参数化为空间坐标的连续函数，降低了对初始模型的依赖并提升了反演灵活性。但该方法仍需大量迭代更新，收敛慢、计算成本高，且缺乏跨地质场景共享先验知识的机制。本文提出基于元学习的隐式全波形反演方法（Meta-IFWI），采用周期激活函数的隐式神经网络（SIREN）表示速度模型，并通过元学习策略在多个反演任务上预训练单一网络，使网络学习共享反演先验与快速适应策略，以加速收敛并增强跨区域泛化能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26938v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Implicit full waveform inversion (IFWI) introduces implicit neural representations to parameterize the subsurface velocity model as a continuous function of spatial coordinates, which alleviates the dependence on the initial model and improves inversion flexibility. However, IFWI still requires a large number of iterative updates for each new exploration area, leading to slow convergence, high computational cost, and a lack of mechanisms to share prior knowledge across different geological settings, thereby limiting its efficiency and generalization capability. To further accelerate convergence and enhance cross-area generalization, we propose a meta-learning-based implicit full waveform inversion method, referred to as Meta-learning-enhanced implicit full waveform inversion (Meta-IFWI). In this framework, the subsurface velocity model is represented using an implicit neural network with periodic activation functions (SIREN), while a meta-learning strategy is employed to pretrain a single network on multiple velocity inversion tasks. Through this process, the network learns shared inversion priors and rapid adaptation strategies across different geological scenarios. For a new inversion task, the pretrained Meta-IFWI model can be efficiently adapted to the observed seismic data with only a few gradient updates, significantly reducing the number of iterations required for inversion. Numerical experiments conducted on in-distribution models, including layered synthetic models and the Overthrust model, as well as out-of-distribution complex models such as Marmousi 2, demonstrate that, compared with conventional IFWI, the proposed Meta-IFWI achieves improved inversion accuracy while substantially accelerating convergence and reducing computational cost. Moreover, Meta-IFWI exhibits enhanced robustness and stronger cross-area generalization capability.

45

GMT：面向微观结构均匀化的几何多重网格Transformer求解器#

GMT: A Geometric Multigrid Transformer Solver for Microstructure Homogenization
📚 arXiv👤 Yu Xing, Yang Liu, Tianyang Xue, Lin Lu📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出几何多重网格Transformer（GMT），创新性地将Point Transformer V3重构于稀疏GMG层级架构，通过物理感知周期性编码与谱对齐初始化策略，实现单次V-cycle即收敛
晶格超材料可实现轻量化多功能结构，但基于均匀化的有效性能评估计算成本高昂。神经代理模型虽提升速度，但往往缺乏工程级模拟所需的精度与稳定性。本文提出几何多重网格Transformer（GMT），一种具有高数值保真度的神经求解器，用于快速可靠的晶格均匀化。GMT通过重构Point Transformer V3在稀疏GMG层级上运算，实现与几何多重网格的架构对齐，捕获多网格收敛所需的长程依赖与跨层级交互。为增强物理一致性，GMT引入物理感知…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

晶格超材料可实现轻量化多功能结构，但基于均匀化的有效性能评估计算成本高昂。神经代理模型虽提升速度，但往往缺乏工程级模拟所需的精度与稳定性。本文提出几何多重网格Transformer（GMT），一种具有高数值保真度的神经求解器，用于快速可靠的晶格均匀化。GMT通过重构Point Transformer V3在稀疏GMG层级上运算，实现与几何多重网格的架构对齐，捕获多网格收敛所需的长程依赖与跨层级交互。为增强物理一致性，GMT引入物理感知位置编码严格施加周期性，并预测最细层级解与多级残差修正，提供谱对齐初始化，仅需单次GMG V-cycle细化即可收敛。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26518v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Lattice metamaterials enable lightweight, multifunctional structures, yet homogenization-based evaluation of their effective properties remains computationally expensive. Neural surrogates offer speed but often lack the accuracy and stability required for engineering-grade simulations. We introduce GMT, a Geometric Multigrid Transformer -- a neural solver with high numerical fidelity for fast and reliable lattice homogenization. GMT achieves architectural alignment with Geometric Multigrid (GMG) by restructuring Point Transformer V3 to operate across sparse GMG hierarchies, capturing long-range dependencies and cross-level interactions essential for multigrid convergence. To enforce physical consistency, GMT incorporates physics-aware positional encoding for strict enforcement of periodicity and predicts both the finest-level solution and multi-level residual corrections. These predictions deliver a spectrally-aligned initialization, enabling end-to-end training under physics-informed and solver-aware losses and requiring only a single GMG V-cycle refinement to reach convergence. This fusion of neural prediction and numerical rigor achieves relative residual errors of 10⁻⁵ with a 160× speedup over state-of-the-art GPU-based solvers at equivalent accuracy -- particularly at high resolutions (e.g. 512³⁾, where traditional methods become most costly. We validate GMT across mechanical and thermal domains, demonstrate robust generalization to unseen geometries and non-periodic settings, and showcase scalability to high resolutions -- enabling real-time design iteration, multi-scale simulations, high-throughput material discovery, and inverse design.

46

推进多站点排放控制：面向碳-污染物协同的物理信息迁移学习框架与混合专家模型#

Advancing multi-site emission control: A physics-informed transfer learning framework with mixture of experts for carbon-pollutant synergy
📚 arXiv👤 Yuxuan Ying, Hanqing Yang, Kaige Wang, Yu Hu, Zhiming Zheng, Yunliang Jiang, Xiaoqing Lin, Xiaodong Li, Jun Chen📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对城市固废焚烧多站点碳-污染物协同控制难题，该研究创新性地融合物理信息神经网络与混合专家架构，通过工况自适应路由和守恒约束正则化实现跨设施知识迁移。13厂验证表明该框架突破了单一站点模型泛化瓶颈，为
城市固体废物焚烧在城市废物管理中日益重要，但其可持续性效益取决于在高度异质运行条件下控制碳排放与多种空气污染物。现有数据驱动模型在单一厂站内准确但难以跨设施迁移，限制了可扩展排放控制策略的价值。本文表明，当联合考虑物理约束、运行工况异质性与碳-污染物耦合时，多站点排放行为可通过可迁移的系统级结构表示。研究开发了基于碳-污染物混合专家模型的物理信息迁移学习框架，结合工况依赖的专家路由、基于守恒的正则化及碳-污染物协同指数进行综合风险评估…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

城市固体废物焚烧在城市废物管理中日益重要，但其可持续性效益取决于在高度异质运行条件下控制碳排放与多种空气污染物。现有数据驱动模型在单一厂站内准确但难以跨设施迁移，限制了可扩展排放控制策略的价值。本文表明，当联合考虑物理约束、运行工况异质性与碳-污染物耦合时，多站点排放行为可通过可迁移的系统级结构表示。研究开发了基于碳-污染物混合专家模型的物理信息迁移学习框架，结合工况依赖的专家路由、基于守恒的正则化及碳-污染物协同指数进行综合风险评估。在13座焚烧厂的验证中，模型捕获了污染物特异性排放与系统级风险，源域平均污染物R²达0.668-0.904，CPSI R²达0.666-0.970。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26571v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Municipal solid waste incineration is increasingly central to urban waste management, yet its sustainability benefit depends on controlling carbon emissions and multiple air pollutants under highly heterogeneous operating conditions. Current data-driven models are often accurate within individual plants but are difficult to transfer across facilities, limiting their value for scalable emission-control strategies. Here we show that multi-site emission behaviour can be represented through transferable system-level structures when physical constraints, operating-regime heterogeneity and carbon--pollutant coupling are jointly considered. We develop a physics-informed transfer learning framework built on a carbon--pollutant mixture-of-experts model, which combines regime-dependent expert routing with conservation-based regularization and a carbon--pollutant synergistic index for integrated risk evaluation. Across 13 municipal solid waste incineration plants, the model captured both pollutant-specific emissions and system-level risk, achieving source-domain average pollutant R² values of 0.668--0.904 and CPSI R² values of 0.666--0.970. After transfer from a reference facility to 12 target plants, average pollutant R² remained between 0.661 and 0.842, while CPSI retained comparable transferability (R² = 0.610--0.841). Expert-utilization patterns further indicate that adaptation occurs through structured re-weighting of operating regimes rather than complete model re-learning. By extending the learned representation into an interpretable digital twin, this framework provides a route from emission prediction to regime-aware operational navigation, supporting scalable carbon--pollutant synergistic control across heterogeneous waste-to-energy systems.

47

基于引导扩散的过渡态先验采样#

A Priori Sampling of Transition States with Guided Diffusion
📚 arXiv👤 Hyukjun Lim, Soojung Yang, Lucas Pinède, Miguel Steiner, Yuanqi Du, Rafael Gómez-Bombarelli📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出ASTRA方法，创新性地将过渡态搜索转化为生成模型的推理时缩放问题，通过分数引导扩散与分数对齐上升实现无需启发式假设的过渡态采样，突破了传统方法对初始猜测和路径拓扑的依赖，为复杂反应机理研究提
过渡态作为势能面上的一阶鞍点，控制化学反应与构象变化的动力学和机理。定位过渡态具有挑战性，因过渡路径拓扑复杂且可通过多种不同路径进行。现有方法通过引入关于路径或反应坐标的启发式假设来解决这些挑战，当初始猜测不佳或猜测排除了其他潜在相关路径时适用性受限。本文提出ASTRA（基于引导扩散的过渡态先验采样），将过渡态搜索重构为生成模型的推理时间缩放问题。ASTRA在已知亚稳态构型上训练基于分数的扩散模型，然后通过条件分数的原则性组合引导推理…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

过渡态作为势能面上的一阶鞍点，控制化学反应与构象变化的动力学和机理。定位过渡态具有挑战性，因过渡路径拓扑复杂且可通过多种不同路径进行。现有方法通过引入关于路径或反应坐标的启发式假设来解决这些挑战，当初始猜测不佳或猜测排除了其他潜在相关路径时适用性受限。本文提出ASTRA（基于引导扩散的过渡态先验采样），将过渡态搜索重构为生成模型的推理时间缩放问题。ASTRA在已知亚稳态构型上训练基于分数的扩散模型，然后通过条件分数的原则性组合引导推理朝向分离亚稳态势阱的等密度面，再由分数对齐上升（SAA）过程从势阱间差异近似反应坐标。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.25980v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Transition states, the first-order saddle points on the potential energy surfaces, govern the kinetics and mechanisms of chemical reactions and conformational changes. Locating them is challenging because transition pathways are topologically complex and can proceed via an ensemble of diverse routes. Existing methods address these challenges by introducing heuristic assumptions about the pathway or reaction coordinates, which limits their applicability when a good initial guess is unavailable or when the guess precludes alternative, potentially relevant pathways. We propose to bypass such heuristic limitations by introducing ASTRA, A Priori Sampling of TRAnsition States with Guided Diffusion, which reframes the transition state search as an inference-time scaling problem for generative models. ASTRA trains a score-based diffusion model on configurations from known metastable states. Then, ASTRA guides inference toward the isodensity surface separating the basins of metastable states via a principled composition of conditional scores. A Score-Aligned Ascent (SAA) process then approximates a reaction coordinate from the difference between conditioned scores and combines it with physical forces to drive convergence onto first-order transition states. Validated on benchmarks ranging from 2D potentials to biomolecular conformational changes and a chemical reaction, ASTRA locates transition states with high precision and discovers multiple reaction pathways, enabling mechanistic studies of complex molecular systems.

48

面向概率神经网络动力学的不确定性感知预测安全滤波器#

Uncertainty-Aware Predictive Safety Filters for Probabilistic Neural Network Dynamics
📚 arXiv👤 Bernd Frauenknecht, Lukas Kesper, Daniel Mayfrank, Henrik Hose, Sebastian Trimpe📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作将概率集成神经网络与预测安全滤波器结合，核心创新在于用可达集量化动力学不确定性并引入显式约束防止模型过度乐观，解决了深度模型在安全关键强化学习中可靠性不足的瓶颈，为机器人等安全敏感领域提供了可嵌
该工作提出不确定性感知预测安全滤波器（UPSi），将概率集成（PE）神经网络集成到预测安全滤波器（PSF）框架中。UPSi通过将未来结果表述为可达集，利用PE动力学模型提供严格的安全预测，并引入显式确定性约束防止模型利用。该方法可无缝嵌入常见基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）框架，在Dyna风格MBRL的标准安全RL基准测试中，相比现有神经网络PSF在探索安全性上有显著提升，同时保持与标准MBRL相当的性能。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出不确定性感知预测安全滤波器（UPSi），将概率集成（PE）神经网络集成到预测安全滤波器（PSF）框架中。UPSi通过将未来结果表述为可达集，利用PE动力学模型提供严格的安全预测，并引入显式确定性约束防止模型利用。该方法可无缝嵌入常见基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）框架，在Dyna风格MBRL的标准安全RL基准测试中，相比现有神经网络PSF在探索安全性上有显著提升，同时保持与标准MBRL相当的性能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26836v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Predictive safety filters (PSFs) leverage model predictive control to enforce constraint satisfaction during deep reinforcement learning (RL) exploration, yet their reliance on first-principles models or Gaussian processes limits scalability and broader applicability. Meanwhile, model-based RL (MBRL) methods routinely employ probabilistic ensemble (PE) neural networks to capture complex, high-dimensional dynamics from data with minimal prior knowledge. However, existing attempts to integrate PEs into PSFs lack rigorous uncertainty quantification. We introduce the Uncertainty-Aware Predictive Safety Filter (UPSi), a PSF that provides rigorous safety predictions using PE dynamics models by formulating future outcomes as reachable sets. UPSi introduces an explicit certainty constraint that prevents model exploitation and integrates seamlessly into common MBRL frameworks. We evaluate UPSi within Dyna-style MBRL on standard safe RL benchmarks and report substantial improvements in exploration safety over prior neural network PSFs while maintaining performance on par with standard MBRL. UPSi bridges the gap between the scalability and generality of modern MBRL and the safety guarantees of predictive safety filters.

49

为黑洞吸积码学习神经算子代理模型#

Learning Neural Operator Surrogates for the Black Hole Accretion Code
📚 arXiv👤 Matthias Nägele, Cedric Bös, Chester Tan, Christian M. Fromm, Ingo Scholtes, Karl Mannheim📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文首次将物理信息神经算子（PINO）引入狭义相对论电阻MHD模拟，创新性地以控制方程作为细时间分辨率上的附加损失，使代理模型能学习无数据时间步的动力学，成功复现等离子体团形成等仅数据驱动方法无法捕捉
该工作研究黑洞吸积码（BHAC）产生的两类天体物理相关模拟场景的神经网络算子代理模型。首先，物理信息傅里叶神经算子（PINO）在跨越Sweet-Parker和快速重联机制的一系列电阻率下，对狭义相对论电阻MHD（SRRMHD）的Orszag-Tang涡旋演化进行训练。通过将控制方程作为在比可用数据监督更精细时间分辨率上评估的附加损失项嵌入，模型学习到无模拟数据提供的时间步上的动力学，能够恢复仅数据基线无法再现的等离子体团形成。据作者所…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作研究黑洞吸积码（BHAC）产生的两类天体物理相关模拟场景的神经网络算子代理模型。首先，物理信息傅里叶神经算子（PINO）在跨越Sweet-Parker和快速重联机制的一系列电阻率下，对狭义相对论电阻MHD（SRRMHD）的Orszag-Tang涡旋演化进行训练。通过将控制方程作为在比可用数据监督更精细时间分辨率上评估的附加损失项嵌入，模型学习到无模拟数据提供的时间步上的动力学，能够恢复仅数据基线无法再现的等离子体团形成。据作者所知，这是物理信息神经算子在狭义相对论电阻MHD中的首次应用。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25985v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: General-relativistic magnetohydrodynamic (GR-MHD) simulations are essential for studying black hole accretion, relativistic jets, and magnetic reconnection, yet their computational cost severely limits systematic parameter exploration. We investigate neural operator surrogates for two astrophysically relevant simulation scenarios produced by the Black Hole Accretion Code (textttBHAC). First, a Physics Informed Fourier Neural Operator (PINO) is trained on the special-relativistic resistive MHD (SRRMHD) evolution of the Orszag-Tang vortex over a range of resistivities spanning the Sweet-Parker and fast reconnection regimes. By embedding the governing equations as an additional loss term evaluated at finer temporal resolution than the available data supervision, the model learns dynamics at time steps where no simulation data is provided, enabling recovery of plasmoid formation that a data-only baseline trained on the same sparse snapshots fails to reproduce. To our knowledge, the present work is the first application of a physics informed neural operator to special relativistic resistive MHD, and the first to investigate the capability of such models to resolve plasmoid formation in SRRMHD. In a second line of investigation, an OFormer-style Transformer Neural Operator is trained on the evolution of spine-sheath relativistic jets created with textttBHAC, in special-relativistic MHD (SRMHD). The model is directly applied on the adaptive mesh, highlighting the need for linear attention due to long sequences. The neural surrogate model is capable of capturing most of the major details, especially in early predictions. To our knowledge, this constitutes the first application of a neural operator directly on a high resolution adaptive mesh refinement grid in the context of MHD simulations.

50

端口-哈密顿系统与最优能量整形控制的协同学习#

Co-Learning Port-Hamiltonian Systems and Optimal Energy-Shaping Control
📚 arXiv👤 Ankur Kamboj, Biswadip Dey, Vaibhav Srivastava📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将物理先验嵌入神经网络，实现pH系统模型与能量平衡无源性控制器的协同迭代学习。通过耗散正则化保证严格能量衰减与闭环无源性，避免抵消自然势能，为仿真到现实的机器人控制提供了可解释且鲁棒的物
该工作提出从轨迹数据中进行端口-哈密顿（pH）系统能量整形控制的物理信息学习框架。该方法通过交替优化与策略感知数据收集，协同学习pH系统模型和最优能量平衡无源性控制器（EB-PBC）。系统模型利用当前控制策略收集的轨迹数据迭代精化，控制器在更新模型上重新优化。两个组件均由嵌入pH动力学和EB-PBC结构的神经网络参数化，确保能量交互的可解释性。所学控制器使闭环系统内在无源且可证明稳定，利用被动设备动力学而不抵消自然势能。耗散正则化在训…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出从轨迹数据中进行端口-哈密顿（pH）系统能量整形控制的物理信息学习框架。该方法通过交替优化与策略感知数据收集，协同学习pH系统模型和最优能量平衡无源性控制器（EB-PBC）。系统模型利用当前控制策略收集的轨迹数据迭代精化，控制器在更新模型上重新优化。两个组件均由嵌入pH动力学和EB-PBC结构的神经网络参数化，确保能量交互的可解释性。所学控制器使闭环系统内在无源且可证明稳定，利用被动设备动力学而不抵消自然势能。耗散正则化在训练期间强制严格能量衰减，增强对仿真-现实差距的鲁棒性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26172v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We develop a physics-informed learning framework for energy-shaping control of port-Hamiltonian (pH) systems from trajectory data. The proposed approach co-learns a pH system model and an optimal energy-balancing passivity-based controller (EB-PBC) through alternating optimization with policy-aware data collection. At each iteration, the system model is refined using trajectory data collected under the current control policy, and the controller is re-optimized on the updated model. Both components are parameterized by neural networks that embed the pH dynamics and EB-PBC structure, ensuring interpretability in terms of energy interactions. The learned controller renders the closed-loop system inherently passive and provably stable, and exploits passive plant dynamics without canceling the natural potential. A dissipation regularization enforces strict energy decay during training, thereby enhancing robustness to sim-to-real gaps. The proposed framework is validated on state-regulation and swing-up tasks for planar and torsional pendulum systems.

51

FloatSOM：GPU加速、分布式、拓扑灵活的自组织映射#

FloatSOM: GPU-Accelerated, Distributed, Topology-Flexible Self-Organizing Maps
📚 arXiv👤 Tony Xu, Sarah Klamt, Katherine Turner, Anne Brustle, Felix Marsh-Wakefield, Givanna Putri📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：FloatSOM突破传统SOM的格点拓扑限制，实现任意拓扑结构与GPU分布式加速，解决海量高维数据流的核外训练瓶颈。其拓扑感知超参微调策略显著降低量化误差，为十亿级样本的实时聚类与可视化提供工程可行方
该工作提出FloatSOM框架，支持可扩展的自组织映射（SOM）训练与部署，具备多GPU执行、核外磁盘支持流式处理以及常规格点之外的新颖拓扑。在14个合成和真实基准数据集及受控速度扩展基准上的评估表明，改进拓扑结合拓扑感知超参数微调比当前最先进SOM基线产生更低量化误差。FloatSOM在最大规模基准中，以8个GPU跨两个高性能计算节点在6.16分钟内训练了具有50个特征的1,000,000,000样本上的1024节点SOM网络。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出FloatSOM框架，支持可扩展的自组织映射（SOM）训练与部署，具备多GPU执行、核外磁盘支持流式处理以及常规格点之外的新颖拓扑。在14个合成和真实基准数据集及受控速度扩展基准上的评估表明，改进拓扑结合拓扑感知超参数微调比当前最先进SOM基线产生更低量化误差。FloatSOM在最大规模基准中，以8个GPU跨两个高性能计算节点在6.16分钟内训练了具有50个特征的1,000,000,000样本上的1024节点SOM网络。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26555v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: GPU-accelerated Self-Organizing Map (SOM) implementations are among the most competitive options for large-scale SOM analysis, but growing dataset sizes increasingly challenge their practical use because workloads no longer fit cleanly within device-memory limits. We introduce FloatSOM, a SOM framework for scalable training and deployment that supports multi-GPU execution, out-of-memory disk-backed streaming, and novel topologies beyond regular lattices. We evaluate FloatSOM on 14 synthetic and real benchmark datasets together with controlled speed scaling benchmarks, and show that these improved topologies, combined with topology-aware hyperparameter fine-tuning, yield lower quantization error than current state-of-the-art SOM baselines. FloatSOM also sustains this performance at large scale with high-throughput distributed execution; in the largest benchmark, it trains a 1024-node SOM network on 1,000,000,000 samples with 50 features in 6.16 minutes on 8 GPUs across two separate high-performance-computing nodes.

52

参数化量子电路作为特征映射：多光谱土地覆盖分类中的表示质量与读出效应#

Parameterized Quantum Circuits as Feature Maps: Representation Quality and Readout Effects in Multispectral Land-Cover Classification
📚 arXiv👤 Ralntion Komini, Aikaterini Mandilara, Georgios Maragkopoulos, Dimitris Syvridis📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次系统量化了VQC中特征映射表示质量与读出策略的解耦效应，揭示线性读出无法充分利用量子嵌入的指数空间，而量子核方法可释放其潜力，为量子机器学习在遥感分类中的实用化设计提供了关键诊断框架。
该工作从特征映射视角研究变分量子分类器（VQC）在多光谱卫星影像土地覆盖分类中的应用，其中量子电路定义非线性数据嵌入，读出决定如何利用该表示。使用EuroSAT-MS数据集，作者在控制实验协议下对所有类别对进行系统一对一评估，比较经典基线（逻辑回归、SVM、神经网络）与采用线性读出和量子核SVM策略的VQC。结果表明，线性读出VQC未超越RBF-SVM等强经典基线，但相同训练量子特征映射在基于核的决策框架中重用时能显著提升性能。量子比…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作从特征映射视角研究变分量子分类器（VQC）在多光谱卫星影像土地覆盖分类中的应用，其中量子电路定义非线性数据嵌入，读出决定如何利用该表示。使用EuroSAT-MS数据集，作者在控制实验协议下对所有类别对进行系统一对一评估，比较经典基线（逻辑回归、SVM、神经网络）与采用线性读出和量子核SVM策略的VQC。结果表明，线性读出VQC未超越RBF-SVM等强经典基线，但相同训练量子特征映射在基于核的决策框架中重用时能显著提升性能。量子比特数扫描揭示了与指数希尔伯特空间维度和线性参数缩放之间失配一致的饱和效应。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26675v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We investigate variational quantum classifiers (VQCs) for land-cover classification from multispectral satellite imagery, adopting a feature-map perspective in which the quantum circuit defines a nonlinear data embedding while the readout determines how this representation is exploited. Using the EuroSAT-MS dataset, we perform a systematic one-vs-one evaluation across all class pairs under a controlled experimental protocol, comparing classical baselines (logistic regression, SVMs, neural networks) with VQCs employing both linear readout and quantum-kernel SVM strategies. Our results show that, while VQCs with linear readout do not outperform strong classical baselines such as RBF-SVM, the same trained quantum feature map can significantly improve performance when reused within a kernel-based decision framework. A qubit-count sweep further reveals saturation effects consistent with the mismatch between exponential Hilbert space dimension and linear parameter scaling. Overall, our findings highlight that the effectiveness of quantum models depends critically on the interplay between representation and readout, and that meaningful gains may arise from combining learned quantum feature maps with classical decision mechanisms rather than seeking direct replacement of classical models.

53

基于超分辨率循环扩散模型量化气候变化对可再生能源发电的影响#

Quantifying Climate Change Impacts on Renewable Energy Generation: A Super-Resolution Recurrent Diffusion Model
📚 arXiv👤 Xiaochong Dong, Jun Dan, Yingyun Sun, Yang Liu, Xuemin Zhang, Shengwei Mei📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将超分辨率技术与循环扩散模型结合，突破气候数据时间分辨率瓶颈，实现小时级精细化建模。其意义在于架起气候科学与能源工程的桥梁，为应对可再生能源间歇性、保障电网稳定运行提供关键决策工具，助力
该工作提出超分辨率循环扩散模型（SRDM），通过预训练解码器与去噪网络的循环耦合机制，将气候数据时间分辨率提升至小时尺度，以捕捉可再生能源的短期波动与不确定性；进而结合机理模型模拟长期风电与光伏发电，为可持续电力系统规划提供高分辨率气候-能源耦合分析工具。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出超分辨率循环扩散模型（SRDM），通过预训练解码器与去噪网络的循环耦合机制，将气候数据时间分辨率提升至小时尺度，以捕捉可再生能源的短期波动与不确定性；进而结合机理模型模拟长期风电与光伏发电，为可持续电力系统规划提供高分辨率气候-能源耦合分析工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.11399v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Driven by global climate change and the ongoing energy transition, the coupling between power supply capabilities and meteorological factors has become increasingly significant. Over the long term, accurately quantifying the power generation of renewable energy under the influence of climate change is essential for the development of sustainable power systems. However, due to interdisciplinary differences in data requirements, climate data often lacks the necessary hourly resolution to capture the short-term variability and uncertainties of renewable energy resources. To address this limitation, a super-resolution recurrent diffusion model (SRDM) has been developed to enhance the temporal resolution of climate data and model the short-term uncertainty. The SRDM incorporates a pre-trained decoder and a denoising network, that generates long-term, high-resolution climate data through a recurrent coupling mechanism. The high-resolution climate data is then converted into power value using the mechanism model, enabling the simulation of wind and photovoltaic (PV) power generation on future long-term scales. Case studies were conducted in the Ejina region of Inner Mongolia, China, using fifth-generation reanalysis (ERA5) and coupled model intercomparison project (CMIP6) data under two climate pathways: SSP126 and SSP585. The results demonstrate that the SRDM outperforms existing generative models in generating super-resolution climate data. Furthermore, the research highlights the estimation biases introduced when low-resolution climate data is used for power conversion.

54

利用量子深度神经网络提取康普顿形状因子#

Compton Form Factor Extraction using Quantum Deep Neural Networks
📚 arXiv👤 Brandon B. Le, Dustin Keller📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将量子启发深度神经网络引入核子结构分析，核心创新在于突破经典神经网络框架，利用量子叠加与纠缠特性提升康普顿形状因子提取精度；所提定量选择指标为量子-经典机器学习方法在部分子分布研究中的协同应用提
该工作采用量子启发深度神经网络（QDNN）从杰斐逊实验室深度虚康普顿散射数据中提取康普顿形状因子（CFF），基于twist-2 BKM形式论与拟局域拟合策略；基准测试表明QDNN在相当模型复杂度下常具有更高预测精度与更紧致的误差，并引入定量选择指标以判定QDNN与经典深度神经网络（CDNN）的最优适用场景，支持QDNN作为CFF确定与多维部分子分布研究的互补工具。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作采用量子启发深度神经网络（QDNN）从杰斐逊实验室深度虚康普顿散射数据中提取康普顿形状因子（CFF），基于twist-2 BKM形式论与拟局域拟合策略；基准测试表明QDNN在相当模型复杂度下常具有更高预测精度与更紧致的误差，并引入定量选择指标以判定QDNN与经典深度神经网络（CDNN）的最优适用场景，支持QDNN作为CFF确定与多维部分子分布研究的互补工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.15458v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We extract Compton form factors (CFFs) from deeply virtual Compton scattering measurements at the Thomas Jefferson National Accelerator Facility (JLab) using quantum-inspired deep neural networks (QDNNs). The analysis implements the twist-2 Belitsky-Kirchner-Müller formalism and employs a fitting strategy that emulates standard local fits. Using pseudodata, we benchmark QDNNs against classical deep neural networks (CDNNs) and find that QDNNs often deliver higher predictive accuracy and tighter uncertainties at comparable model complexity. Guided by these results, we introduce a quantitative selection metric that indicates when QDNNs or CDNNs are optimal for a given experimental fit. After obtaining local extractions from the JLab data, we perform a standard neural-network global CFF fit and compare with previous global analyses. The results support QDNNs as an efficient and complementary tool to CDNNs for CFF determination and for future multidimensional studies of parton distributions and hadronic structure.

55

基于物理信息深度学习的体运动场在雷达降水临近预报中的效用评估#

Assessing the Utility of Volumetric Motion Fields for Radar-based Precipitation Nowcasting with Physics-informed Deep Learning
📚 arXiv👤 Peter Pavlík, Anna Bou Ezzeddine, Viera Rozinajová📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将物理信息神经网络与半拉格朗日平流结合，首次实现雷达反射率三维运动场端到端估计，突破传统二维假设局限。虽降水预报增益有限，但揭示了垂直运动一致性特征，为体数据运动分析建立了可微分计算框架。
该工作提出物理信息深度学习框架，直接从体扫雷达反射率数据估计各高度层水平运动场，采用全可微半拉格朗日外推算子处理三维输入；基于中欧多年雷达数据集评估高度分辨运动估计对降水外推预报的影响，发现估计运动场具有强垂直一致性，与传统二维方法相比改进有限，为体地理空间数据运动结构分析提供通用工具。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出物理信息深度学习框架，直接从体扫雷达反射率数据估计各高度层水平运动场，采用全可微半拉格朗日外推算子处理三维输入；基于中欧多年雷达数据集评估高度分辨运动估计对降水外推预报的影响，发现估计运动场具有强垂直一致性，与传统二维方法相比改进有限，为体地理空间数据运动结构分析提供通用工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.13589v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Estimating motion from spatiotemporal geoscientific data is a fundamental component of many environmental modeling and forecasting tasks. In this work, we propose a physics-informed deep learning framework for estimating altitude-wise motion fields directly from volumetric radar reflectivity data. The model utilizes a fully differentiable semi-Lagrangian extrapolation operator to process three-dimensional inputs as independent horizontal slice sequences, enabling efficient inference of horizontal motion across multiple altitude levels. Using a multi-year radar dataset from Central Europe, we evaluate the impact of altitude-wise motion estimation on extrapolation-based precipitation forecasting and conduct a systematic dataset-scale analysis of inter-altitude motion consistency. The results show that the estimated motion fields exhibit strong vertical coherence, with high correlation across altitude levels, which results in limited improvement over traditional two-dimensional approach in this setting. The proposed framework provides a general tool for efficiently analyzing motion structure in volumetric geospatial data. The findings indicate that, in regions dominated by vertically coherent precipitation systems, the added complexity of volumetric motion modeling may offer limited benefit, warranting careful consideration in the design of efficient spatiotemporal advection models.

56

评估GeoAI解释与领域知识在卫星洪水制图中的一致性#

Evaluating the Alignment Between GeoAI Explanations and Domain Knowledge in Satellite-Based Flood Mapping
📚 arXiv👤 Hyunho Lee, Wenwen Li📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出ADAGE框架，创新性地将深度学习可解释性与遥感先验知识进行系统性比对，突破GeoAI"黑箱"验证缺乏物理依据的困境。该工作为洪水制图中模型可信度评估建立了知识驱动的基准范式，推动人工智能与地
该工作提出ADAGE框架，系统评估深度学习模型解释与遥感领域知识的一致性，特别关注地表水体的独特光谱特性；针对卫星影像洪水制图中深度学习决策过程不透明、阻碍科学业务化应用的瓶颈，通过比对模型解释与先验遥感知识，为GeoAI模型的可信度验证与可解释性改进提供方法论支撑。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出ADAGE框架，系统评估深度学习模型解释与遥感领域知识的一致性，特别关注地表水体的独特光谱特性；针对卫星影像洪水制图中深度学习决策过程不透明、阻碍科学业务化应用的瓶颈，通过比对模型解释与先验遥感知识，为GeoAI模型的可信度验证与可解释性改进提供方法论支撑。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26051v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The increasing number of satellites has improved the temporal resolution of Earth observation, making satellite-based flood mapping a promising approach for operational flood monitoring. Deep learning-based approaches for flood mapping using satellite imagery, an important application within Geospatial Artificial Intelligence (GeoAI), have shown improved predictive performance by learning complex spatial and spectral patterns from large volumes of remote sensing data. However, the opaque decision-making processes of deep learning models remain a major barrier to their integration into critical scientific and operational workflows. This highlights the need for a systematic assessment of whether model explanations align with established domain knowledge in remote sensing. To address this research gap, this study introduces the ADAGE (Alignment between Domain Knowledge And GeoAI Explanation Evaluation) framework. The proposed framework is designed to systematically evaluate how well explanations of deep learning models align with established remote sensing knowledge, particularly regarding the distinctive spectral properties of the Earth's surface. The ADAGE framework employs Channel-Group SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) method to estimate the contributions of grouped input channels to pixel-level predictions. Experiments on two satellite-based flood mapping tasks demonstrate that the ADAGE framework can (1) quantitatively assess the alignment between model explanations and reference explanations derived from domain knowledge and (2) help domain experts identify misaligned explanations through alignment scores. This study contributes to bridging the gap between explainability and domain knowledge in GeoAI for Earth observation, enhancing the applicability of GeoAI models in scientific and operational workflows.

57

Qvine：用于加载高维分布的藤结构量子电路#

Qvine: Vine Structured Quantum Circuits for Loading High Dimensional Distributions
📚 arXiv👤 David Quiroga, Hannes Leipold, Bibhas Adhikari📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：Qvine将经典藤copula分解思想引入量子电路设计，通过层级化树结构实现高维概率分布的紧凑编码，突破了传统方法在维度扩展时的量子资源瓶颈。该架构以多项式深度换取指数级参数效率，为量子生成建模与金融
该工作提出Qvine藤结构量子电路拟设，借鉴经典藤copula分解构建可扩展量子电路，实现高维分布振幅编码的高效可训练逼近；对于R-vine，电路深度至多与分布维度呈二次关系，对于D-vine及常见实用R-vine深度进一步降低，缓解高维情况下量子比特数指数增长与梯度消失问题。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出Qvine藤结构量子电路拟设，借鉴经典藤copula分解构建可扩展量子电路，实现高维分布振幅编码的高效可训练逼近；对于R-vine，电路深度至多与分布维度呈二次关系，对于D-vine及常见实用R-vine深度进一步降低，缓解高维情况下量子比特数指数增长与梯度消失问题。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26213v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Loading high dimensional distributions is an important task for utilizing quantum computers on applications ranging from machine learning to finance. The high dimensionality leads to a curse of dimensionality, representing a d-dimensional distribution with k resolution requires dk qubits and an unstructured parameterized circuit would express a unitary in an exponential operator space in the number of qubits, leading to vanishing gradients and poor convergence guarantees even at high depth. Vine copula decompositions are widely used to represent high dimensional distributions classically, showing high quality approximation in many important applications, such as financial modeling. We present Qvine, a vine structured ansatz for quantum circuits, that mirrors the vine decomposition to construct scalable quantum circuits with efficient trainability while achieving similarly high quality approximation for amplitude encoding distributions. For regular vines (R-vines), we show that the circuit depth scales at most quadratic in the dimension of the distribution, while for D-vines, as well as many practical R-vines, the circuit depth scales linear in the dimension. For 3-dimensional and 4-dimensional Gaussians and empirical joint stock price return distributions for selected stocks, our experiments show Qvines achieve high quality loading.

58

Star-Fusion：基于球面拓扑离散化天体定向的多模态Transformer架构#

Star-Fusion: A Multi-modal Transformer Architecture for Discrete Celestial Orientation via Spherical Topology
📚 arXiv👤 May Hammad, Menatallh Hammad📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：Star-Fusion通过球面拓扑离散化将姿态估计转化为分类问题，从根本上规避了欧拉角/四元数的周期性歧义；三分支架构融合语义、空间与几何信息，在保持轻量化的同时实现端到端天体定向，为星载计算资源受限
该工作提出Star-Fusion架构，将航天器姿态确定重新表述为离散拓扑分类任务，利用球面K-Means聚类将天球划分为K个拓扑一致区域以消除坐标缠绕伪影；采用三分支融合策略：SwinV2-Tiny提取光度特征、卷积热图分支实现空间定位、坐标MLP提供几何锚定，在合成Hipparcos数据集上验证，为自主航天器导航提供低计算开销的深度学习替代方案。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出Star-Fusion架构，将航天器姿态确定重新表述为离散拓扑分类任务，利用球面K-Means聚类将天球划分为K个拓扑一致区域以消除坐标缠绕伪影；采用三分支融合策略：SwinV2-Tiny提取光度特征、卷积热图分支实现空间定位、坐标MLP提供几何锚定，在合成Hipparcos数据集上验证，为自主航天器导航提供低计算开销的深度学习替代方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26582v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reliable celestial attitude determination is a critical requirement for autonomous spacecraft navigation, yet traditional "Lost-in-Space" (LIS) algorithms often suffer from high computational overhead and sensitivity to sensor-induced noise. While deep learning has emerged as a promising alternative, standard regression models are often confounded by the non-Euclidean topology of the celestial sphere and by the periodic boundary conditions of Right Ascension (RA) and Declination (Dec). In this paper, we present Star-Fusion, a multi-modal architecture that reformulates orientation estimation as a discrete topological classification task. Our approach leverages spherical K-Means clustering to partition the celestial sphere into K topologically consistent regions, effectively mitigating coordinate wrapping artifacts. The proposed architecture employs a tripartite fusion strategy: a SwinV2-Tiny transformer backbone for photometric feature extraction, a convolutional heatmap branch for spatial grounding, and a coordinate-based MLP for geometric anchoring. Experimental evaluations on a synthetic Hipparcos-derived dataset demonstrate that Star-Fusion achieves a Top-1 accuracy of 93.4% and a Top-3 accuracy of 97.8%. Furthermore, the model exhibits high computational efficiency, maintaining an inference latency of 18.4 ms on resource-constrained COTS hardware, making it a viable candidate for real-time onboard deployment in next-generation satellite constellations.

59

SynSur：面向工业表面缺陷生成与检测的端到端合成数据生成管线#

SynSur: An end-to-end generative pipeline for synthetic industrial surface defect generation and detection
📚 arXiv👤 Paul Julius Kühn, Mika Pommeranz, Arjan Kuijper, Saptarshi Neil Sinha📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：SynSur构建了视觉-语言提示驱动的端到端缺陷合成管线，核心创新在于将LoRA微调扩散模型与掩码引导修复、自动标签过滤深度融合，实现缺陷形态与标注的联合生成。其意义在于揭示了合成-真实数据协同训练可
该工作提出了一种端到端的合成工业表面缺陷生成与标注管线，融合视觉-语言模型提示、LoRA适配扩散模型、掩码引导修复及自动标签派生的样本过滤，以缓解缺陷检测中标注数据稀缺问题。实验在滚珠丝杠点蚀缺陷数据集及手机屏表面缺陷分割数据集（MSD）上开展，结合YOLOv2、YOLOX和LW-DETR等检测器评估，并分析了提示构建、LoRA选择及DreamSim/CLIPScore样本过滤等关键环节。结果表明纯合成数据训练尚无法替代真实数据，但真…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

该工作提出了一种端到端的合成工业表面缺陷生成与标注管线，融合视觉-语言模型提示、LoRA适配扩散模型、掩码引导修复及自动标签派生的样本过滤，以缓解缺陷检测中标注数据稀缺问题。实验在滚珠丝杠点蚀缺陷数据集及手机屏表面缺陷分割数据集（MSD）上开展，结合YOLOv2、YOLOX和LW-DETR等检测器评估，并分析了提示构建、LoRA选择及DreamSim/CLIPScore样本过滤等关键环节。结果表明纯合成数据训练尚无法替代真实数据，但真实与合成数据联合使用可有效克服数据瓶颈。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.26633v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The bottleneck in learning-based industrial defect detection is often limited not by model capacity, but by the scarcity of labeled defect data: defects are rare, annotations are expensive, and collecting balanced training sets is slow. We present an end-to-end pipeline for synthetic defect generation and annotation, combining Vision-Language-Model-based prompts, LoRA-adapted diffusion, mask-guided inpainting, and sample filtering with automatic label derivation, and demonstrates the potential of real data with realistic synthetic samples to overcome data scarcity. The evaluation is conducted on, a challenging dataset of pitting defects on ball screw drives, and then on a subset of the Mobile phone screen surface defect segmentation dataset (MSD) dataset to test cross-domain transfer. Beyond downstream detector performance, we analyze key stages of the pipeline, including prompt construction, LoRA selection, and sample filtering with DreamSim and CLIPScore, to understand which synthetic samples are both realistic and useful. Experiments with YOLOv26, YOLOX, and LW-DETR show that synthetic-only training does not replace real data. When combined with real data, synthetic defects can preserve performance and yield modest gains in selected BSData training regimes. The MSD transfer study shows that the overall pipeline structure carries over to a second industrial inspection domain, while also highlighting the importance of domain-specific adaptation and annotation-quality control. Overall, the paper provides an end-to-end assessment of diffusion-based industrial defect synthesis and shows that its strongest value lies in strengthening scarce real datasets rather than substituting for them.

60

Lost in Translation: Simulation-Informed Bayesian Inference Improves Understanding of Molecular Motion From Neutron Scattering#

📚 arXiv👤 Harry Richardson, Kit McColl, Gøran Nilsen, Jeff Armstrong, Andrew R. McCluskey📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究建立模拟-贝叶斯融合框架，突破传统QENS拟合的非唯一性困境，首次定量解析液态苯的各向异性转动动力学，揭示其远超预期的各向异性程度，为限域催化中的分子输运机制研究提供新范式。
arXiv:2603.06080v3 公告类型: 替换 摘要: 准弹性中子散射(QENS)可探测催化、能源材料和气体吸附中核心长度与时间尺度上的原子和分子运动。然而，传统QENS谱图的解析拟合往往无法唯一确定其背后的动力学机制。简化线型模型的灵活性可能使由不同物理过程产生的谱图在统计上不可区分，导致机理解释含糊或失准。通过整合分子动力学模拟、物理推导的Q依赖散射模型、贝叶斯模型判别和极化分析，我们首次证明QENS能够解析液态苯中的各向…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2603.06080v3 公告类型: 替换 摘要: 准弹性中子散射(QENS)可探测催化、能源材料和气体吸附中核心长度与时间尺度上的原子和分子运动。然而，传统QENS谱图的解析拟合往往无法唯一确定其背后的动力学机制。简化线型模型的灵活性可能使由不同物理过程产生的谱图在统计上不可区分，导致机理解释含糊或失准。通过整合分子动力学模拟、物理推导的Q依赖散射模型、贝叶斯模型判别和极化分析，我们首次证明QENS能够解析液态苯中的各向异性转动运动——该分子是微孔催化中具有代表性的芳香烃分子。提取的自旋和翻滚扩散系数表明其各向异性程度远超此前认知。这一基于贝叶斯证据的集成分析框架为QENS确立了新范式，能够直接解析控制分子相互作用与输运的转动和平动动力学，即限域烃类催化中的基本过程与速控步骤。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.06080v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Quasi-elastic neutron scattering (QENS) probes atomic and molecular motion on length and time scales central to catalysis, energy materials, and gas adsorption. However, conventional analytical fitting of QENS spectra often fails to uniquely determine the underlying dynamics. The flexibility of simplified line-shape models can make spectra generated by distinct physical processes statistically indistinguishable, leading to ambiguous or inaccurate mechanistic interpretation. By integrating molecular dynamics simulations, physically derived Q-dependent scattering models, Bayesian model discrimination, and polarisation analysis, we demonstrate that QENS can, for the first time, resolve anisotropic rotational motion in liquid benzene, a prototypical aromatic molecule relevant to microporous catalysis. The extracted spinning and tumbling diffusion coefficients suggest substantially stronger anisotropy than previously recognised. This integrated, Bayesian evidence-based analytical framework defines a new paradigm for QENS, enabling direct resolution of the rotational and translational dynamics that govern molecular interactions and transport; the fundamental processes and rate-limiting steps in confined hydrocarbon catalysis.

Lightweight Quantum Agent for Edge Systems: Joint PQC and NOMA Resource Allocation#

📚 arXiv👤 Yongtao Yao, Wenjing Xiao, Miaojiang Chen, Anfeng Liu, Zhiquan Liu, Min Chen, Ahmed Farouk, H. Herbert Song📅 2026-04-30🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文创新性地将后量子密码能耗纳入边缘计算资源优化框架，通过李雅普诺夫理论解耦长期随机优化问题，并设计线性复杂度算法突破非凸功率分配瓶颈。该工作为量子安全威胁下的实时边缘智能提供了可部署的低复杂度解决方
arXiv:2604.25980v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：在量子安全场景下，现有基于非正交多址接入（NOMA）通信模型的移动边缘设备及智能计算与边缘（ICE）系统研究忽视了后量子密码（PQC）模块的能耗开销，且传统资源分配算法的高复杂度无法满足实时决策需求。针对上述挑战，本文提出一种面向ICE赋能移动设备的在线联合优化轻量级智能体AI框架。该方案构建了纳入PQC模块静态功耗约束的多阶段随机混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）模型。基于李…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25980v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：在量子安全场景下，现有基于非正交多址接入（NOMA）通信模型的移动边缘设备及智能计算与边缘（ICE）系统研究忽视了后量子密码（PQC）模块的能耗开销，且传统资源分配算法的高复杂度无法满足实时决策需求。针对上述挑战，本文提出一种面向ICE赋能移动设备的在线联合优化轻量级智能体AI框架。该方案构建了纳入PQC模块静态功耗约束的多阶段随机混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）模型。基于李雅普诺夫优化理论，对长期优化问题进行解耦，并提出线性复杂度算法解决NOMA功率分配的非凸难题。仿真结果表明，所提方案在保障系统队列稳定性与能耗约束的同时显著提升了计算吞吐量。与传统连续凸近似（SCA）算法相比，复杂度降至O(N)，当设备数N=35时加速比约达46倍，从而满足动态无线环境下的实时决策需求。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25980v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the context of quantum secure scenarios, existing research on mobile edge devices and intelligent computing and edge (ICE) systems based on the Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access (NOMA) communication model have overlooked the energy consumption overhead of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) modules, and the high complexity of traditional resource allocation algorithms fails to meet the demands of real-time decision-making. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a lightweight agentic AI framework designed for online joint optimization within ICE-enabled mobile devices. The scheme constructs a multi-stage stochastic Mixed Integer Nonlinear Programming (MINLP) model that incorporates static power-consumption constraints for PQC modules. Based on Lyapunov optimization theory, the long-term optimization problem is decoupled, and a linear complexity algorithm is proposed to solve the nonconvex challenges of NOMA power allocation . Simulation results verify that the proposed scheme significantly improves computational throughput while ensuring system queue stability and energy consumption constraints. Compared with traditional Successive Convex Approximation (SCA) algorithms, the complexity is reduced to O(N), achieving a speedup of approximately 46 times when the number of devices N=35, thereby meeting the real-time decision-making requirements in dynamic wireless environments.

62

Trillion-atom molecular dynamics simulations with ab initio accuracy#

AI 解读：该工作突破性地实现了1.62万亿原子分子动力学模拟，通过NEP机器学习势达到从头算精度，并在国产超算上实现百倍加速与近87%弱扩展效率。其核心创新在于将量子精度直接推进至介观尺度，架起了原子模拟与连续
arXiv:2604.24816v1 公告类型：新摘要：材料性质从根本上由多尺度现象决定，这些现象通常达到介观尺度。微米级介观尺度也是光学显微镜下可直接观测的尺寸，架起了原子微观描述与连续模型宏观世界之间的桥梁。本工作中，我们报告了一项前所未有的分子动力学（MD）模拟，包含1.62万亿个原子。利用神经演化势（NEP）框架，我们在中国的新一代智能超级计算机上达到了从头算精度。我们的实现达到了每步每原子求解时间比先前最先进的机器学习力场模…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24816v1 公告类型：新摘要：材料性质从根本上由多尺度现象决定，这些现象通常达到介观尺度。微米级介观尺度也是光学显微镜下可直接观测的尺寸，架起了原子微观描述与连续模型宏观世界之间的桥梁。本工作中，我们报告了一项前所未有的分子动力学（MD）模拟，包含1.62万亿个原子。利用神经演化势（NEP）框架，我们在中国的新一代智能超级计算机上达到了从头算精度。我们的实现达到了每步每原子求解时间比先前最先进的机器学习力场模拟快100倍，比六年前的戈登·贝尔奖获奖应用快1000倍。此外，我们展示了从单块GPGPU到45,000块GPGPU的86.9%弱扩展效率。这些结果重新定义了原子模拟的边界，实现了量子级精度的直接介观建模。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24816v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Material properties are fundamentally dictated by multiscale phenomena, which often reach mesoscale in size. The μm mesoscale is also the size which can be observed directly under an optical microscope, bridging the atomistic microscopic description with the continuous model macroscopic world. In this work, we report an unprecedented molecular dynamics (MD) simulation comprising 1.62 trillion atoms. Utilizing the neuroevolution potential (NEP) framework, we attained ab initio accuracy on China's New-generation Intelligent Supercomputer. Our implementation achieves a time-to-solution (s/step/atom) 100 times faster than previous state-of-the-art machine learning force field simulations, and 1,000 times faster than the Gordon Bell Prize-winning application from six years ago. Furthermore, we demonstrate an 86.9% weak scaling efficiency from a single GPGPU to 45,000 GPGPUs. These results redefine atomistic simulation boundaries, enabling direct mesoscopic modeling with quantum-level precision.

Uncovering Exotic Paired States in the 2D Spin-Imbalanced Fermi Gas with Neural Wave Functions#

📚 arXiv👤 Wan Tong Lou, Gino Cassella, Andres Perez Fadon, Halvard Sutterud, David Pfau, James S. Spencer, Johannes Knolle, W. M. C. Foulkes📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将基于AGPs FermiNet的神经网络变分蒙特卡洛方法应用于二维自旋不平衡费米气体，首次在量子多体系统中实现从BCS到BEC极限的全相图精确计算，发现奇异的库珀对晶体等新量子态，为强
arXiv:2604.24883v1 公告类型：新摘要：我们使用最近发展的基于AGPs FermiNet拟设的神经网络变分蒙特卡洛方法，研究具有短程吸引相互作用的二维自旋不平衡费米气体的零温相图。在弱相互作用BCS极限下观测到Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov相，在强相互作用BEC极限下出现极化超流体。当相互作用较强时，少数自旋动量密度在未配对多数自旋电子所占据的动量空间区域中几乎降至零。当相互作用非常强…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24883v1 公告类型：新摘要：我们使用最近发展的基于AGPs FermiNet拟设的神经网络变分蒙特卡洛方法，研究具有短程吸引相互作用的二维自旋不平衡费米气体的零温相图。在弱相互作用BCS极限下观测到Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov相，在强相互作用BEC极限下出现极化超流体。当相互作用较强时，少数自旋动量密度在未配对多数自旋电子所占据的动量空间区域中几乎降至零。当相互作用非常强时，发生相分离，包含玻色子对的区域与由剩余多数自旋粒子占据的未配对区域共存。此外，我们在中等相互作用强度下观测到平移对称性破缺，此时系统在未配对多数自旋粒子的费米流体中形成奇异的库珀对晶体。我们为晶体相的形成提供了可能的解释，阐明了当对紧密束缚时k空间动量密度空穴的起源，并讨论了我们的方法如何为未来工作开辟新方向。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24883v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study the zero-temperature phase diagram of the 2D spin-imbalanced Fermi gas with short-ranged attractive interactions using the recently developed neural network variational Monte Carlo method with the AGPs FermiNet Ansatz. The Fulde-Ferrell-Larkin-Ovchinnikov phase is observed in the weakly interacting BCS limit and a polarised superfluid is seen in the strongly interacting BEC limit. When the interactions are strong, the minority-spin momentum density is reduced almost to zero in the momentum-space region occupied by the unpaired majority-spin electrons. When the interactions are very strong, phase separation occurs, with regions containing bosonic pairs and unpaired regions occupied by the remaining majority-spin particles. In addition, we observe translational symmetry breaking at intermediate interaction strengths, where the system forms an exotic crystal of Cooper pairs in a Fermi fluid of unpaired majority-spin particles. We provide a possible explanation for the formation of the crystalline phase, explain the origins of the k-space momentum-density hole when the pairs are tightly bound, and discuss how our approach opens new directions for future work.

64

Benchmarking Universal Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials for High-Temperature Metal-Organic Framework Chemistry#

📚 arXiv👤 Connor W. Edwards, Jack D. Evans📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文构建了首个覆盖300–2000 K的锌/锆基MOFs高温AIMD基准数据集，突破现有uMLIPs仅在低温下验证的局限；系统评估揭示ORB-v3与OMAT综合性能最优，但所有模型在高温及长时间动力学
arXiv:2604.25262v1 公告类型: 新论文 摘要: 通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）为以接近DFT精度进行原子模拟同时大幅降低计算成本提供了一种前景广阔的方法。在此，我们提出了一个新的高温基准数据集，包含九种锌基和锆基金属有机框架（MOFs）在300、1000和2000 K下模拟的40皮秒从头算分子动力学（AIMD）轨迹：ZIF-8、CALF-20、MOF-10、MOF-5、MIP-206、UiO-66、UiO-67…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25262v1 公告类型: 新论文 摘要: 通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）为以接近DFT精度进行原子模拟同时大幅降低计算成本提供了一种前景广阔的方法。在此，我们提出了一个新的高温基准数据集，包含九种锌基和锆基金属有机框架（MOFs）在300、1000和2000 K下模拟的40皮秒从头算分子动力学（AIMD）轨迹：ZIF-8、CALF-20、MOF-10、MOF-5、MIP-206、UiO-66、UiO-67、UiO-66-NH2和NU-1000。这些轨迹捕捉了平衡动力学、热诱导畸变以及早期分解事件，包括连接体降解和金属节点聚集。随后，我们利用该数据集对五种领先的uMLIPs进行基准测试：ORB-v3、MACE-MP-0a、MACE-MPA-0、fairchem ODAC23和fairchem OMAT。结果表明，ORB-v3和fairchem OMAT在所有温度下均实现了最低的能量、力和应力误差。然而，所有模型在高温条件下均表现出显著误差。使用ORB-v3进行的长时间尺度分子动力学模拟表明，uMLIPs的生成误差远超静态验证中捕获的模型损失，凸显了当前通用模型在模拟高温MOF动力学方面的局限性。本工作为评估uMLIPs在极端条件下的稳健性提供了基准，并指导未来开发能够精确建模高温MOF动力学的势函数。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25262v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Universal machine-learned interatomic potentials (uMLIPs) offer a promising approach to performing atomistic simulations at near-DFT accuracy with greatly reduced computational cost. Here, we present a new high-temperature benchmarking dataset of 40~ps ab~initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) trajectories simulated at 300, 1000, and 2000 K for nine zinc- and zirconium-based metal-organic frameworks (MOFs): ZIF-8, CALF-20, MOF-10, MOF-5, MIP-206, UiO-66, UiO-67, UiO-66-NH2, and NU-1000. These trajectories capture equilibrium dynamics, thermally induced distortions, and early-stage decomposition events, including linker degradation and metal node aggregation. Subsequently, we use this dataset to benchmark five leading uMLIPs: ORB-v3, MACE-MP-0a, MACE-MPA-0, fairchem ODAC23, and fairchem OMAT. Our results reveal that ORB-v3 and fairchem OMAT achieve the lowest energy, force, and stress errors across all temperatures. However, all models exhibit significant error under high-temperature conditions. Long-timescale molecular dynamics simulations produced with ORB-v3 demonstrate that the generative error of uMLIPs far exceeds model losses captured during static validation, highlighting the limitations of current universal models for simulating high-temperature MOF dynamics. This work provides a benchmark for assessing the robustness of uMLIPs in extreme regimes and guides future development of potentials capable of accurately modeling the chemistry of high-temperature MOF dynamics.

65

Training cell stress patterns in 3D cellular packings#

📚 arXiv👤 Shabeeb Ameen, Tao Zhang, J. M. Schwarz📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破性地将机器学习范式引入生物组织力学，证明三维细胞堆积可通过对比学习自主涌现预设应力模式。核心创新在于揭示组织刚性调控"探索-利用"权衡的集体学习机制，细胞重排驱动不连续动力学使系统跃迁于不同
arXiv:2604.25439v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 模式学习任务通常与在固定架构上更新参数的系统相关联，例如神经网络，其学习通过连续优化进行。在此，我们证明模式学习也可在可重构细胞组织中涌现，其中力学参数和网络拓扑结构共同演化。利用三维顶点模型，我们展示了细胞堆积体可通过对比学习算法更新隐式细胞形状指数，从而被训练实现预设的细胞应力模式。我们发现学习本质上是集体性的，需要系统范围参数的协调调整，其可学习性由力学状态、容量和训…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25439v1 公告类型: 新
摘要: 模式学习任务通常与在固定架构上更新参数的系统相关联，例如神经网络，其学习通过连续优化进行。在此，我们证明模式学习也可在可重构细胞组织中涌现，其中力学参数和网络拓扑结构共同演化。利用三维顶点模型，我们展示了细胞堆积体可通过对比学习算法更新隐式细胞形状指数，从而被训练实现预设的细胞应力模式。我们发现学习本质上是集体性的，需要系统范围参数的协调调整，其可学习性由力学状态、容量和训练协议之间的相互作用所支配。特别地，组织刚性控制着一种有效的探索-利用权衡：流体状区域通过细胞重排增强探索，而刚性区域限制动力学并有利于利用现有构型。这些重排引入了不连续的学习动力学，使系统能够在代价函数图景的不同局域极小值之间跃迁。随着堆积体中靶细胞与总细胞数之比或约束载荷的增加，学习变得更慢、更不均匀，并越来越依赖于允许逃离几何约束态的稀有重排。最后，与并行协议相比，按顺序训练细胞提供了一种替代路径，可能更为鲁棒，但对所研究的约束载荷通常需要更长的训练时间。这些结果表明存在一个由约束载荷、细胞堆积刚性和训练协议支配的学习相图。通过实现局域化内部态的训练，本研究将组织不仅定位为自适应材料，更定位为非传统人工智能平台。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25439v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The task of learning patterns is typically associated with systems that update parameters on fixed architectures, such as neural networks, where learning proceeds through continuous optimization. Here, we demonstrate that pattern learning can also emerge in reconfigurable cellular tissue, where both mechanical parameters and network topology evolve. Using a three-dimensional vertex model, we show that cellular packings can be trained to realize prescribed cell stress patterns through a contrastive learning algorithm to update hidden-cell shape indices. We find that learning is intrinsically collective, requiring coordinated, system-wide parameter adjustments, with learnability governed by an interplay between mechanical state, capacity, and training protocol. In particular, the rigidity of the tissue controls an effective exploration-exploitation tradeoff: fluid-like regimes enhance exploration through cellular rearrangements, while rigid regimes constrain dynamics and favor exploitation of existing configurations. These rearrangements introduce discontinuous learning dynamics, enabling the system to transition between distinct local minima in the cost function landscape. As the ratio of target cells to the total number cells in the packing or constraint load increases, learning becomes slower, more heterogeneous, and increasingly dependent on rare rearrangements that allow escape from geometrically constrained states. Finally, training cells in sequence, in contrast to parallel protocols, provides an alternative route that can be more robust but generally takes longer to train for the constraint loads studied. These results suggest a learning phase diagram governed by constraint load, cell packing rigidity, and training protocol. By enabling the training of localized internal states, this work positions tissues not only as adaptive materials, but as nonconventional AI platforms.

66

Benchmarking bandgap prediction in semiconductors under experimental and realistic evaluation settings#

📚 arXiv👤 Haolin Wang, Xianyuan Liu, Anna Jungbluth, Alexandra J. Ramadan, Robert D. J. Oliver, Haiping Lu📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：现有ML带隙模型因训练于计算数据而难以泛化至实验测量。本工作构建RealMat-BaG基准，首创晶体结构对齐的实验带隙数据集，通过统计分割与域分割双重评估，系统揭示图神经网络与经典ML的迁移失效机制，
arXiv:2604.25568v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：准确的带隙预测对半导体应用至关重要，然而基于计算数据训练的机器学习模型往往难以泛化到实验带隙测量。现有评估框架对数据保真度、域泛化和模型可解释性等相关挑战仍关注不足。为弥补这一空白，我们提出RealMat-BaG基准，用于在实验相关条件下评估模型可靠性。我们整理了一套晶体结构对齐的实验带隙开放获取数据集，并对比了图神经网络与经典机器学习基线模型。该框架在统计分割和基于域的分…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25568v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：准确的带隙预测对半导体应用至关重要，然而基于计算数据训练的机器学习模型往往难以泛化到实验带隙测量。现有评估框架对数据保真度、域泛化和模型可解释性等相关挑战仍关注不足。为弥补这一空白，我们提出RealMat-BaG基准，用于在实验相关条件下评估模型可靠性。我们整理了一套晶体结构对齐的实验带隙开放获取数据集，并对比了图神经网络与经典机器学习基线模型。该框架在统计分割和基于域的分割下评估性能，考察从DFT计算带隙到实验带隙的迁移能力，并在元素性质和结构两个层面分析可解释性。结果揭示了当前带隙预测模型的根本泛化局限，并建立了一个与实验测量对齐的基准，以开发更可靠的材料发现学习策略。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25568v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate bandgap prediction is crucial for semiconductor applications, yet machine learning models trained on computational data often struggle to generalize to experimental bandgap measurements. Challenges related to data fidelity, domain generalization, and model interpretability remain insufficiently addressed in existing evaluation frameworks. To bridge this gap, we introduce RealMat-BaG, a benchmark for assessing model reliability under experimentally relevant conditions. We curate an open-access dataset of experimental bandgaps with aligned crystal structures and compare graph neural networks as well as classical machine learning baselines. Our framework evaluates performance across statistical and domain-based splits, examines transfer from DFT-computed to experimental bandgaps, and analyzes interpretability at both elemental-property and structural levels. Our results reveal the fundamental generalization limitations of current bandgap prediction models and establish a benchmark aligned with experimental measurements for developing more reliable learning strategies for materials discovery.

67

Predicting challenging phase transitions with Bayesian active learning#

📚 arXiv👤 Lorenzo Bastonero, Gabriel Joalland, Chiara Cignarella, Lorenzo Monacelli, Nicola Marzari📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出即时贝叶斯主动学习结合随机自洽谐波近似的新框架，以数十至数百次第一性原理计算即可构建精确原子间势，成功预测Li₂O及CsPbI₃的宽温区热力学性质与相图，为固态电池、光伏等材料的真实条件加速
arXiv:2604.25756v1 公告类型：新 摘要：材料是现代技术的基石，涵盖能量收集、存储与转换，以及信息与通信技术等领域。其功能通常由竞争相之间的相互作用所支配，热力学行为塑造微观性质并最终决定技术性能；例如太阳能电池中无机金属卤化物钙钛矿的光吸收。然而，由于强非谐效应需要对势能面进行广泛采样，精确预测晶体热力学对计算方法而言仍是一项重大挑战。在此，我们提出一种即时贝叶斯框架，结合随机自洽谐波近似，用于学习第一性原理原子间势…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25756v1 公告类型：新
摘要：材料是现代技术的基石，涵盖能量收集、存储与转换，以及信息与通信技术等领域。其功能通常由竞争相之间的相互作用所支配，热力学行为塑造微观性质并最终决定技术性能；例如太阳能电池中无机金属卤化物钙钛矿的光吸收。然而，由于强非谐效应需要对势能面进行广泛采样，精确预测晶体热力学对计算方法而言仍是一项重大挑战。在此，我们提出一种即时贝叶斯框架，结合随机自洽谐波近似，用于学习第一性原理原子间势。该方法能够以第一性原理精度预测宽温度范围内的热力学性质，而仅需对数十至数百个原子构型进行训练。为展示其能力，我们研究了Li₂O、α-CsPbI₃和δ-CsPbI₃的热力学与动力学性质，分别仅需44、256和50次总能计算。值得注意的是，我们表明该框架精确捕捉了CsPbI₃的相图，解释了其自发降解为非吸收性黄色相的现象，以卓越的精度和效率预测了相变温度。更广泛而言，本方法为多种技术相关应用（包括固态电池、光电器件和忆阻器）在真实条件下的加速材料工程开辟了一条新途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25756v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Materials underpin modern technologies, from energy harvesting, storage, and conversion to information and communication technologies. Their functionality is often governed by the interplay between competing phases, as thermodynamic behavior shapes microscopic properties and ultimately determines technological performance; for instance, the light absorption of inorganic metal-halide perovskites in solar cells. Accurately predicting crystal thermodynamics, however, remains a major challenge for computational approaches because strong anharmonic effects require extensive sampling of the potential energy surface. Here, we present an on-the-fly Bayesian framework, combined with the stochastic self-consistent harmonic approximation, for learning first-principles interatomic potentials. This approach enables the prediction of thermodynamic properties over a broad temperature range with first-principles accuracy while requiring training on only a few tens to a few hundreds of atomic configurations. To demonstrate its power, we investigate the thermodynamic and dynamical properties of Li₂O, α-CsPbI₃, and δ-CsPbI₃, requiring only 44, 256, and 50 total-energy calculations, respectively. Notably, we show that this framework accurately captures the phase diagram of CsPbI₃, which explains its spontaneous degradation into the non-absorbing yellow phase, predicting the transition temperature with remarkable accuracy and efficiency. More broadly, the method presented opens a novel route toward accelerated materials engineering under realistic conditions for a wide range of technologically relevant applications, including solid-state batteries, optoelectronic devices, and memristors.
