Pareto Frontier of Neural Quantum States: Scalable, Affordable, and Accurate Convolutional Backflow for Strongly Correlated Lattice Fermions#

📚 arXiv👤 Yuntian Gu, Zeyao Han, Wenrui Li, Zhiyu Xiao, Tao Xiang, Mingpu Qin, Liwei Wang, Dingshun Lv📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作针对神经量子态计算成本高的瓶颈，提出SCALE与ACE两种卷积反流架构，分别实现O(N³)高效标度与极限精度，将NQS推向可扩展的新帕累托前沿，使32×32大晶格强关联体系的精确模拟成为可能。
arXiv:2604.25775v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 神经量子态（NQS）现已成为研究强关联多费米子体系的最精确方法之一，在大型体系上超越了现有的多体方法。然而，NQS计算仍然极其耗费计算资源。本文中，我们为NQS模拟强关联晶格费米子引入了一条效率与精度的新帕累托前沿，由两种互补的反流相关架构定义：晶格电子稀疏卷积拟设（SCALE）（最先进效率）和晶格电子精确卷积拟设（ACE）（最先进精度），并在标志性的Hubbard模型…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25775v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 神经量子态（NQS）现已成为研究强关联多费米子体系的最精确方法之一，在大型体系上超越了现有的多体方法。然而，NQS计算仍然极其耗费计算资源。本文中，我们为NQS模拟强关联晶格费米子引入了一条效率与精度的新帕累托前沿，由两种互补的反流相关架构定义：晶格电子稀疏卷积拟设（SCALE）（最先进效率）和晶格电子精确卷积拟设（ACE）（最先进精度），并在标志性的Hubbard模型和t-J模型的大晶格上进行了基准测试。SCALE采用定制的卷积设计，通过低秩行列式更新实现高效的局域更新，将反流方法的计算标度从O(N⁴)降至O(N³)，在测试中实现超过40倍的实际加速，同时保持高变分精度。作为应用，我们研究了此前无法触及的1/8掺杂纯Hubbard模型直至32×32，发现水平与垂直填充条纹态之间无显著能量差异——这与包含次近邻跃迁时的半填充条纹态形成对比。ACE采用深度卷积堆叠以最大化表达能力，在大型体系上实现了前所未有的精度。对Hubbard模型和t-J模型的广泛基准测试表明，SCALE以极低成本提供与领先方法竞争的变分能量，而ACE则树立了新的精度基准，在16×4体系上仅用1/6的运行时间便超越了近期结果。这些新的NQS方法为探索强关联费米子物理（如非常规超导的微观机制）提供了可扩展、经济且精确的工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25775v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural Quantum States (NQS) are now among the most accurate methods for studying strongly correlated many-fermion systems, outperforming existing many-body approaches for large systems. However, NQS calculations remain extremely resource-intensive. Here, we introduce a new Pareto frontier of efficiency and accuracy for NQS in simulating strongly correlated lattice fermions, defined by two complementary backflow-related architectures: the Sparse Convolutional Ansatz for Lattice Electrons (SCALE) (state-of-the-art efficiency) and the Accurate Convolutional ansatz for lattice Electrons (ACE) (state-of-the-art accuracy), benchmarked on the iconic Hubbard and t-J models for large lattices. SCALE uses a tailored convolutional design enabling efficient local updates via low-rank determinant updates, reducing computational scaling from O(N⁴⁾ to O(N³⁾ in backflow methods and yielding a >40× practical speed-up in tests while maintaining high variational accuracy. As an application, we study the previously inaccessible 1/8-doped pure Hubbard model up to 32 × 32, finding no significant energy difference between horizontal and vertical filled stripe states - contrasting with half-filled stripe states when next-nearest-neighbor hoppings are included. ACE employs a deep convolutional stack to maximize expressive power, achieving unprecedented accuracy on large systems. Extensive benchmarks on Hubbard and t-J models show SCALE delivers variational energies competitive with leading methods at a fraction of the cost, while ACE sets a new accuracy benchmark, surpassing recent results with only 1/6 the runtime for 16 × 4 systems. These new NQS approaches provide scalable, affordable, and accurate tools for exploring strongly correlated fermionic physics, such as the microscopic mechanism of unconventional superconductivity.

69

Atomistic Machine Learning with Irreducible Cartesian Natural Tensors#

📚 arXiv👤 Qun Chen, A. S. L. Subrahmanyam Pattamatta, Boyu Wang, David J. Srolovitz, Mingjian Wen📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出笛卡尔自然张量网络（CarNet），建立了笛卡尔空间中不可约表示的完整理论框架，实现了高秩物理张量的系统分解与重构。CarNet在保持笛卡尔坐标直观物理优势的同时，获得了与球张量模型相当的精
arXiv:2510.04015v2 公告类型: 替换 摘要: 原子尺度机器学习（ML）是精确高效研究原子尺度材料行为的强大工具。尽管此类模型已在笛卡尔空间中构建以利用几何信息并保持直观的物理表示，但它们在提供系统的、基于不可约表示的形式体系方面面临挑战，而该形式体系类似于等变网络中广泛使用的球张量机制。我们通过提出笛卡尔自然张量网络（CarNet）作为原子尺度机器学习的通用框架来解决这些挑战。我们提出了使用笛卡尔自然张量的不可约表示…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.04015v2 公告类型: 替换 摘要: 原子尺度机器学习（ML）是精确高效研究原子尺度材料行为的强大工具。尽管此类模型已在笛卡尔空间中构建以利用几何信息并保持直观的物理表示，但它们在提供系统的、基于不可约表示的形式体系方面面临挑战，而该形式体系类似于等变网络中广泛使用的球张量机制。我们通过提出笛卡尔自然张量网络（CarNet）作为原子尺度机器学习的通用框架来解决这些挑战。我们提出了使用笛卡尔自然张量的不可约表示理论，涵盖其构造及其乘积，并进一步发展了高秩物理张量分解与重构的系统方案。利用这一机制，我们随后开发了一个等变笛卡尔模型，并展示了其在多种原子尺度机器学习任务中的优异性能。CarNet为材料和分子系统提供机器学习原子间势（MLIP），性能与领先的球张量模型相当。此外，它还能够为从简单性质（如偶极矩）到具有复杂对称性的高秩张量（如弹性常数张量）等各种张量量构建精确高效的结构-性质关系。这项工作增强了笛卡尔方法在先进原子尺度机器学习中的能力，以用于理解和设计新材料。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.04015v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Atomistic machine learning (ML) is a powerful tool for accurate and efficient investigation of material behavior at the atomic scale. While such models have been constructed within Cartesian space to harness geometric information and preserve intuitive physical representations, they face challenges in providing a systematic, irreducible-representation-based formalism analogous to the spherical-tensor machinery widely used in equivariant networks. We address these challenges by proposing Cartesian Natural Tensor Networks (CarNet) as a general framework for atomistic ML. We present the theory of irreducible representations using Cartesian natural tensors, covering their construction and their products, and further develop a systematic scheme for the decomposition and reconstruction of high-rank physical tensors. Leveraging this machinery, we then develop an equivariant Cartesian model and demonstrate its strong performance across diverse atomistic ML tasks. CarNet delivers machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for both materials and molecular systems, with performance on par with leading spherical-tensor models. Furthermore, it enables the construction of accurate and efficient structure--property relationships for tensorial quantities ranging from simple properties like the dipole moment to high-rank tensors with complex symmetries, such as the elastic constant tensor. This work strengthens Cartesian approaches for advanced atomistic ML in the understanding and design of new materials.

Target-depth sensing with metasurface-encoder integrated optoelectronic neural network#

arXiv:2604.25160v1 公告类型：新摘要：在三维（3D）环境中对目标进行精确且实时的感知对于现代机器视觉至关重要，是自主系统、机器人操作、增强现实和智能监控等新兴技术的基础。然而，最先进的3D感知方法通常依赖多视角图像或激光雷达点云的复杂后处理，导致计算负载大、功耗高且延迟显著。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种超表面编码器集成的光电神经网络架构，该架构通过超表面产生的双螺旋点扩散函数对深度进行编码，将3D信息压缩为二维图像…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25160v1 公告类型：新摘要：在三维（3D）环境中对目标进行精确且实时的感知对于现代机器视觉至关重要，是自主系统、机器人操作、增强现实和智能监控等新兴技术的基础。然而，最先进的3D感知方法通常依赖多视角图像或激光雷达点云的复杂后处理，导致计算负载大、功耗高且延迟显著。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种超表面编码器集成的光电神经网络架构，该架构通过超表面产生的双螺旋点扩散函数对深度进行编码，将3D信息压缩为二维图像。深度编码图像由常规单目相机捕获，随后由轻量级影子ResNet神经网络处理。我们在MNIST和Vehicle-Image数据集上对该架构进行了实验验证，在目标分类和深度估计方面同时实现了高精度，从而实现了实时目标跟踪。该框架可便捷扩展至其他深度或角度编码超表面，用于多维压缩与检测。我们的结果证明了超光学编码器/电子解码器范式在显著降低网络复杂度和计算负担的同时，仍能为智能视觉传感应用保持强劲性能的有效性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25160v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate and real-time sensing of targets in three-dimensional (3D) environments is essential for modern machine vision, underpinning emerging technologies such as autonomous systems, robotic manipulation, augmented reality, and intelligent surveillance. However, state-of-the-art 3D sensing approaches typically rely on complex postprocessing of multi-view images or LiDAR point clouds, resulting in considerable computational load, power consumption, and latency. To address these challenges, we propose a metasurface-encoder integrated optoelectronic neural network architecture that compresses 3D information into two-dimensional images by encoding depth using double-helix point spread function generated by a metasurface. The depth-encoded images are captured with a conventional monocular camera and subsequently processed by a lightweight shadow ResNet neural network. We experimentally validate the proposed architecture on the MNIST and Vehicle-Image datasets, achieving high accuracy simultaneously in target classification and depth estimation, thereby enabling real-time target tracking. The framework is readily extendable to other depth- or angle-encoding metasurfaces for multidimensional compression and detection. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of the meta-optic-encoder/electronic-decoder paradigm in significantly reducing network complexity and computational burden while maintaining strong performance for smart vision sensory applications.

71

Unsupervised Physics-Informed Deep Learning for Dual-Energy CT Material Decomposition#

📚 arXiv👤 Laura Hellwege, Johann Christopher Engster, Moritz Schaar, Thorsten M. Buzug, Maik Stille📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出无监督物理信息深度学习框架，将多色前向投影模型嵌入训练过程，以投影域差异为优化目标，彻底摆脱对真实材料标注数据的依赖。该方法在AAPM挑战数据集上实现最优分解精度，为临床DECT低剂量、高精
arXiv:2604.25356v1 公告类型: 新摘要: 双能计算机断层扫描(DECT)通过在不同X射线能谱下采集实现材料特异性成像。DECT数据的材料分解是一个病态逆问题，对噪声放大高度敏感。传统方法在精度和计算效率方面面临挑战。我们提出了一种新型物理信息深度学习(DL)框架用于DECT材料分解，消除了训练过程中对真实材料图像的需求。我们的方法将多色前向模型融入训练流程，使网络通过最小化投影域中的差异来学习分解映射。我们在AAPM…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25356v1 公告类型: 新摘要: 双能计算机断层扫描(DECT)通过在不同X射线能谱下采集实现材料特异性成像。DECT数据的材料分解是一个病态逆问题，对噪声放大高度敏感。传统方法在精度和计算效率方面面临挑战。我们提出了一种新型物理信息深度学习(DL)框架用于DECT材料分解，消除了训练过程中对真实材料图像的需求。我们的方法将多色前向模型融入训练流程，使网络通过最小化投影域中的差异来学习分解映射。我们在AAPM DL-Spectral CT Challenge数据集上验证了该方法，并与三种最先进方法进行了性能比较。在投影域中，我们的方法在测试数据集上实现了最低的均方根误差(RMSE)。对于30 keV、50 keV和70 keV的虚拟单能图像(VMI)，该方法在RMSE和结构相似性指数(SSIM)方面始终优于所有传统方法。这些结果展示了深度学习在无需标注训练数据的情况下实现DECT精确材料分解的潜力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25356v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Dual-energy computed tomography (DECT) enables material-specific imaging through acquisitions at two different X-ray energy spectra. Material decomposition from DECT data is an ill-posed inverse problem that is highly sensitive to noise amplification. Conventional methods face challenges regarding accuracy and computational efficiency. We present a novel physics-informed deep learning (DL) framework for DECT material decomposition that eliminates the requirement for ground-truth material images during training. Our approach incorporates a polychromatic forward model into the training pipeline, enabling the network to learn the decomposition mapping by minimizing discrepancies in the projection domain. We validate our method on the AAPM DL-Spectral CT Challenge dataset, comparing performance against three state-of-the-art methods. In the projection domain, our method achieves the lowest root mean squared error (RMSE) across test datasets. For virtual monoenergetic images (VMIs) at 30 keV, 50 keV, and 70 keV, the approach consistently outperforms all conventional methods in both RMSE and structural similarity index (SSIM). These results demonstrate the potential of DL for accurate material decomposition in DECT without requiring labeled training data.

72

Representing the Surface Ocean in ECMWF's data-driven forecasting system AIFS#

📚 arXiv👤 Sara Hahner, Lorenzo Zampieri, Jean-Raymond Bidlot, Philip Browne, Matthew Chantry, Mariana C. A. Clare, Harrison Cook, Peter Dueben, Rachel Furner, Sarah Keeley, Josh Kousal, Simon Lang, Christian Lessig, Gert Mertes, Kristian Mogensen, Gabriel Moldovan, Charles Pelletier, Florian Pinault, Ana Prieto Nemesio, Baudouin Raoult, Irina Sandu, Mario Santa Cruz, Jakob Schloer, Steffen Tietsche, Hao Zuo📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：ECMWF将数据驱动预报系统AIFS扩展至联合建模大气与表层海洋（含海浪、海冰），突破传统数值模式的分量独立架构，以分量无关方式直接学习跨界面耦合关系。该联合模型在中期预报中展现约一天的技巧提升，并对
arXiv:2604.25559v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 机器学习（ML）模型，如欧洲中期天气预报中心（ECMWF）的AIFS，近年来彻底改变了天气预报。我们提出了AIFS的扩展版本，该版本联合建模大气与表层海洋，包括海浪和海冰。此项扩展的主要目标是提升机器学习中期预报能力，并通过扩展天气状态以更好地捕捉耦合表层过程来启用新的应用场景。我们的方法与传统数值模型不同，不采用大气与海洋分量各自独立的两个模型。该联合模型以分量无关的方式…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25559v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 机器学习（ML）模型，如欧洲中期天气预报中心（ECMWF）的AIFS，近年来彻底改变了天气预报。我们提出了AIFS的扩展版本，该版本联合建模大气与表层海洋，包括海浪和海冰。此项扩展的主要目标是提升机器学习中期预报能力，并通过扩展天气状态以更好地捕捉耦合表层过程来启用新的应用场景。我们的方法与传统数值模型不同，不采用大气与海洋分量各自独立的两个模型。该联合模型以分量无关的方式学习整个大气-海洋界面上的相关性，并能利用ML架构的表达能力直接从数据中学习跨分量关系。我们利用定制化和针对性的数据集，解决了模型设计挑战，如陆地区域缺失值、多尺度时间动力学、预报场的物理真实性等问题，并展示了损失缩放引导学习过程的有效性。我们评估了表征表层海洋对中期天气预报的影响。我们还评估了模型对表层海洋场的预测能力，包括涌浪和热带气旋冷尾流。对于几乎所有评估的海洋变量，在中期预报时效上，我们观测到相比基于物理的模型预报技巧提升约一天。此外，我们证明了模型对训练分布之外的理想化初始条件具有鲁棒性，并以物理一致的方式响应。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，联合AIFS建模方法在联合大气-海洋预报方面具有重大潜力。我们的工作为未来开发具有更大灵活性和物理保真度的数据驱动耦合地球系统模型奠定了坚实基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25559v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine-learning (ML) models, such as the AIFS at the ECMWF, have revolutionised weather forecasting in recent years. We present an extension of the AIFS that jointly models the atmosphere and surface ocean, including ocean waves and sea ice. The primary objective of this extension is to enhance machine-learning medium-range forecasting and enable new use cases by expanding the weather state to better capture coupled surface processes. Our approach departs from traditional numerical models by not having two separate models for the atmosphere and marine components. The joint model instead learns correlations across the entire atmosphere-ocean interface in a component-agnostic way, and can exploit the expressive capacity of ML architectures to learn cross-component relationships directly from the data. We leverage tailored and targeted datasets and solve model design challenges such as missing values over land, multi-scale temporal dynamics, and physical realism of forecast fields and demonstrate the utility of loss scaling in guiding the learning process. We evaluate how representing the surface ocean affects medium-range weather forecasts. We also assess the model's ability to predict surface-ocean fields, including wave swell and tropical-cyclone cold wakes. For nearly all evaluated marine variables, we observe an improvement of approximately one day in forecast skill at medium-range lead times compared to physics-based models. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the model is robust to idealised initial conditions outside the training distribution and responds to them in a physically consistent way. Overall, our findings suggest that the joint AIFS modelling approach offers significant potential for combined atmosphere-ocean forecasting. Our work provides a solid foundation for future development of data-driven coupled Earth system models with greater flexibility and physical fidelity.

73

Accelerated Surface Hopping via Scaling the Spin--Orbit Coupling: Opportunities for Machine Learning#

📚 arXiv👤 Jakub Martinka, Mahesh Kumar Sit, Pavlo O. Dral, Jiří Pittner📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文针对加速面跳跃方法中多轨迹系综外推计算成本高昂、统计可信度不足的问题，创新性地将机器学习势能面与非绝热耦合模型拓展至自旋-轨道耦合的旋转-预测-旋转拟合，以硅乙烯为案例系统评估了布居拟合与外推技术
arXiv:2604.25603v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 面跳跃(SH)方法通常用于模拟超快非绝热过程，但长时间尺度往往超出其能力范围。为此，加速SH方案通过缩放此类过程的驱动力来缓解这一限制，内转换情况下缩放非绝热耦合(NACs)，系间窜越情况下缩放自旋-轨道耦合(SOCs)。然而，获得实际时间常数需要从多个具有不同缩放因子的轨迹系综进行外推。这带来了巨大的计算需求，通常限制了每个系综的轨迹数量，从而降低了所得时间常数的统计可信…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25603v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 面跳跃(SH)方法通常用于模拟超快非绝热过程，但长时间尺度往往超出其能力范围。为此，加速SH方案通过缩放此类过程的驱动力来缓解这一限制，内转换情况下缩放非绝热耦合(NACs)，系间窜越情况下缩放自旋-轨道耦合(SOCs)。然而，获得实际时间常数需要从多个具有不同缩放因子的轨迹系综进行外推。这带来了巨大的计算需求，通常限制了每个系综的轨迹数量，从而降低了所得时间常数的统计可信度。本工作中，我们以硅乙烯(CH₂SiH₂)为案例研究加速方案，评估了多种布居拟合方法和外推技术。我们训练了势能面(PESs)和非绝热耦合的机器学习模型，并将旋转-预测-旋转方法扩展用于拟合自旋-轨道耦合。这些模型表现出高性能，产生的布居在参考MR-CISD/SA-CASSCF(2,2)数据的置信区间内；然而，外推本身对拟合的时间常数高度敏感，导致最终时间常数存在差异。最后，我们展示并讨论了机器学习模型如何增强加速SH方案的可靠性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25603v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Surface hopping (SH) methods are typically employed to simulate ultrafast nonadiabatic processes, but long timescales often remain beyond their reach. To address this, accelerated SH scheme mitigate this limitation by scaling the driving forces of such process, either nonadiabatic couplings (NACs) in case of internal conversion or spin-orbit couplings (SOCs) for intersystem crossing. However, obtaining the actual time constant requires extrapolation from several ensembles of trajectories with different scaling factors. This introduces a significant computational demand, often restricting the number of trajectories per ensemble and, therefore, reducing the statistical confidence in the resulting time constant. In this work, we investigate the accelerated scheme using silaethylene (CH₂SiH₂₎ as a case study, evaluating various population fitting methods and extrapolation techniques. We trained machine learning models for potential energy surfaces (PESs) and NACs, and extended our rotate-predict-rotate approach to fit SOCs. These models demonstrate high performance, yielding populations within the confidence interval of the reference MR-CISD/SA-CASSCF(2,2) data; however, the extrapolation itself is highly sensitive to the fitted time constants, leading to discrepancies in the final time constant. Finally, we showcase and discuss how ML models can enhance the reliability of an accelerated SH scheme.

74

The Physical Limit of Neural Hypoxia Detection in the Black Sea from Satellite Observations#

📚 arXiv👤 Victor Mangeleer, Luc Vandenbulcke, Marilaure Grégoire, Gilles Louppe📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文将黑海低氧监测构建为贝叶斯反问题，创新性地采用深度生成神经网络结合数值模式训练，实现从卫星表层观测反演次表层氧状态的后验分布。核心发现混合层均一性是该方法有效的物理极限，夏季陆架低氧检测精度47%
arXiv:2604.25608v1 公告类型：新摘要：沿海低氧（O₂ < 63 [mmol/m³]）威胁全球海洋健康。底层呼吸消耗的氧气无法得到补充，因此监测对于保护脆弱的海洋生态系统和减少生物多样性丧失至关重要。尽管黑海卫星观测数据日益丰富，但目前尚无业务化系统利用这些数据实时反演氧状态。该问题可构建为贝叶斯反问题，将表层观测与完整的黑海状态联系起来。本文采用基于数值模式输出训练的深度生成神经网络求解，为真实海状态后验分布提供可处…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25608v1 公告类型：新摘要：沿海低氧（O₂ < 63 [mmol/m³]）威胁全球海洋健康。底层呼吸消耗的氧气无法得到补充，因此监测对于保护脆弱的海洋生态系统和减少生物多样性丧失至关重要。尽管黑海卫星观测数据日益丰富，但目前尚无业务化系统利用这些数据实时反演氧状态。该问题可构建为贝叶斯反问题，将表层观测与完整的黑海状态联系起来。本文采用基于数值模式输出训练的深度生成神经网络求解，为真实海状态后验分布提供可处理的近似。我们发现准确的状态估计仅限于混合层，因其均一性使表层条件能够代表次表层状态。夏季期间，我们在整个陆架区域检测到38%的低氧事件，精度为47%。改进结果可能需要更长的同化窗口或额外的观测数据。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25608v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coastal hypoxia (O₂ < 63 [mmol / m³]) threatens ocean health worldwide. Bottom oxygen consumed by respiration cannot be renewed, making monitoring essential to protect vulnerable marine ecosystems and reduce biodiversity loss. Despite the growing availability of Black Sea satellite observations, no operational system currently exploits them to directly infer the oxygen state in real time. This can be framed as a Bayesian inverse problem relating surface observations to the complete Black Sea states. Here, we solve it using a deep generative neural network trained on numerical model outputs, providing a tractable approximation of the true posterior distribution of sea states. We find that accurate state estimation is limited to the mixing layer, because its homogeneity makes surface conditions representative of subsurface states. During summer, we detect 38% of all hypoxic events shelf-wide with a precision of 47%. Improving results will likely require longer assimilation windows or additional observations.

75

Comparative Study of Bending Analysis using Physics-Informed Neural Networks and Numerical Dynamic Deflection in Perforated nanobeam#

📚 arXiv👤 Ramanath Garai, Iswari Sahu, S. Chakraverty📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出域映射FL-TFC方法，将物理约束嵌入泛函连接表达式并以神经网络表示自由函数，无需深度架构即可精确求解多孔纳米梁弯曲问题，兼顾计算效率与边界条件严格满足，为微纳结构力学分析提供了高精度轻量化的
arXiv:2604.24768v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：本章采用高效且计算稳健的物理信息泛函连接约束框架域映射（DFL-TFC）方法，研究正弦载荷作用下多孔纳米梁的弯曲行为。旨在确定不同穿孔情况下多孔纳米梁静态弯曲响应与动态挠度之间的关系。静态弯曲通过域映射FL-TFC方法求解，动态挠度则采用伽辽金法确定。所提方法运用泛函连接理论（TFC），将控制微分方程约束系统地嵌入约束表达式（CE）中，使其精确满足所有给定的初始条件和边界条件…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24768v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：本章采用高效且计算稳健的物理信息泛函连接约束框架域映射（DFL-TFC）方法，研究正弦载荷作用下多孔纳米梁的弯曲行为。旨在确定不同穿孔情况下多孔纳米梁静态弯曲响应与动态挠度之间的关系。静态弯曲通过域映射FL-TFC方法求解，动态挠度则采用伽辽金法确定。所提方法运用泛函连接理论（TFC），将控制微分方程约束系统地嵌入约束表达式（CE）中，使其精确满足所有给定的初始条件和边界条件（ICs与BCs），并将微分方程的域映射至正交多项式的域。在此框架下，约束表达式中的自由函数通过泛函连接神经网络（FLNN）表示。通过微分方程均方残差最小化代价函数，无需复杂的深度网络架构即可训练。本文研究了简支（S-S）多孔纳米梁静态挠度与动态挠度之间的关系。与标准PINN相比，域映射FL-TFC方法无需深度复杂的神经网络架构，同时保证了精度、效率以及对边界条件的严格满足。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24768v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this chapter, we investigate the bending behavior of a perforated nanobeam subjected to sinusoidal loading using an efficient and computationally robust Physics-Informed Functional Link Constrained Framework with Domain Mapping (DFL-TFC) method. Our aim is to determine the relationship between static bending response and dynamic deflection of a perforated nanobeam for various perforation cases. The static bending is obtained using the FL-TFC with Domain mapped method, whereas dynamic deflection is determined using the Galerkin method. The proposed approach employs the theory of functional connections (TFC) to systematically embed governing differential equation constraints into a constrained expression (CE), which exactly satisfies all prescribed initial and boundary conditions (ICs and BCs) and domain of differential equation is mapped to domain of orthogonal polynomials. Within this framework, the free function appearing in the constrained expression is expressed through a functional link neural network (FLNN). The cost is minimized by the mean square residual of DE, allowing training without requiring complex deep network architectures. Relationship between static and dynamic defection of simply-supported (S-S) perforated nanobeams has been investigated here. FL-TFC with Domain mapped method eliminates the need for deep and complex neural network architectures while ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and strict satisfaction of boundary conditions as compared to standard PINN.

76

Quantum Dynamics via Score Matching on Bohmian Trajectories#

📚 arXiv👤 Lei Wang📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出一种基于玻姆力学与生成模型融合的新范式，将量子演化重构为得分驱动的连续归一化流。核心创新在于利用神经网络参数化得分函数，通过自洽Fisher散度实现无监督学习，规避了传统方法对波函数显式表示的
arXiv:2604.25137v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：我们通过在玻姆轨迹上学习得分函数（即对数概率密度的梯度）来求解含时薛定谔方程。在玻姆的量子力学表述中，粒子在经典势及依赖于演化密度得分函数的量子势共同作用下沿确定性路径运动。这些不相交的玻姆轨迹构成一个由得分函数控制的连续归一化流。我们用神经网络对得分函数进行参数化，并最小化网络与所得密度得分函数之间的自洽Fisher散度。我们证明了，对于无节点波函数（这一条件在原子量子振动…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25137v1 公告类型：交叉
摘要：我们通过在玻姆轨迹上学习得分函数（即对数概率密度的梯度）来求解含时薛定谔方程。在玻姆的量子力学表述中，粒子在经典势及依赖于演化密度得分函数的量子势共同作用下沿确定性路径运动。这些不相交的玻姆轨迹构成一个由得分函数控制的连续归一化流。我们用神经网络对得分函数进行参数化，并最小化网络与所得密度得分函数之间的自洽Fisher散度。我们证明了，对于无节点波函数（这一条件在原子量子振动中自然满足），该自洽目标函数的零损失极小化子可恢复薛定谔动力学。我们在双势阱中的波包分裂和Morse链的非谐振动上展示了该方法。通过将实时量子动力学重构为自洽的得分驱动归一化流，该框架为快速发展的现代生成建模工具箱打开了含时薛定谔方程的大门。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25137v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We solve the time-dependent Schrödinger equation by learning the score function, the gradient of the log-probability density, on Bohmian trajectories. In Bohm's formulation of quantum mechanics, particles follow deterministic paths under the classical potential supplemented by a quantum potential depending on the score function of the evolving density. These non-crossing Bohmian trajectories form a continuous normalizing flow governed by the score. We parametrize the score with a neural network and minimize a self-consistent Fisher divergence between the network and the score of the resulting density. We prove that the zero-loss minimizer of this self-consistent objective recovers Schrödinger dynamics for nodeless wave functions, a condition naturally met in quantum vibrations of atoms. We demonstrate the approach on wavepacket splitting in a double-well potential and anharmonic vibrations of a Morse chain. By recasting real-time quantum dynamics as a self-consistent score-driven normalizing flow, this framework opens the time-dependent Schrödinger equation to the rapidly advancing toolkit of modern generative modeling.

77

Quantum Compressed Sensing Enables Image Classification with a Single Photon#

📚 arXiv👤 Yanshan Fan, Jianyong Hu, Shuxiao Wu, Zhixing Qiao, Guosheng Feng, Changgang Yang, Jianqiang Liu, Ruiyun Chen, Chengbing Qin, Guofeng Zhang, Liantuan Xiao, Suotang Jia📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出"测量即决策"新范式，以量子压缩感知突破经典信息论极限，将测量次数从对数级降至常数阶；利用单光子量子叠加并行性与衍射神经网络构建自适应测量基，实现光子极限能效下的端到端图像分类，为深空探测、低
arXiv:2604.25480v1 公告类型: cross 摘要: 图像分类是智能感知的核心任务，传统上遵循先成像后处理的顺序流水线。然而，冗余的高维图像重建本身效率低下，尤其在光子受限场景中。本文报道一种基于量子压缩感知的光子级图像分类方法，将分类任务重新表述为直接面向类别标签的稀疏信号测量问题。利用光子量子叠加态的并行性，单个光子即可编码高维图像的完整空间信息。通过衍射深度神经网络，我们在物理层面构建与类别空间对齐的专用测量基，…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25480v1 公告类型: cross 摘要: 图像分类是智能感知的核心任务，传统上遵循先成像后处理的顺序流水线。然而，冗余的高维图像重建本身效率低下，尤其在光子受限场景中。本文报道一种基于量子压缩感知的光子级图像分类方法，将分类任务重新表述为直接面向类别标签的稀疏信号测量问题。利用光子量子叠加态的并行性，单个光子即可编码高维图像的完整空间信息。通过衍射深度神经网络，我们在物理层面构建与类别空间对齐的专用测量基，实现信号依赖的自适应压缩测量。理想情况下，本方法可通过单次量子投影测量提取类别信息，将经典压缩感知所需测量次数从对数标度O(Klog(N/K))降至常数阶信息论极限M = K = 1。实验结果表明，以单光子探测事件作为判决准则可达到69.0%的分类准确率，而四光子探测事件时提升至95.0%。本工作展示了能效极限下的图像分类，并引入了"测量即决策"框架，为极端光子预算和恶劣环境下运行的智能感知系统奠定基础。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25480v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Image classification is a core task of intelligent sensing, conventionally follows a sequential imaging then processing pipeline. However, redundant high-dimensional image reconstruction is inherently inefficient, especially in photon limited scenarios. Here we report a photon level image classification method using quantum compressed sensing, which reformulates the classification task as a sparse signal measurement problem directly oriented toward class labels. By exploiting the parallelism of photonic quantum superposition states, a single photon can be encoded the complete spatial information of a high-dimensional image. Through a diffractive deep neural network, we physically construct a dedicated measurement basis aligned with the class space, enabling signal-dependent adaptive compressive measurement. Ideally, our method can extract class information via a single quantum projective measurement, reducing the required number of measurements from the logarithmic scaling O(Klog(N/K)) of classical compressed sensing to the constant-order information-theoretic limit M = K = 1. Experimental results show that a classification accuracy of 69.0% can be achieved by using a single-photon detection event as the decision criterion, while it increases to 95.0% with four-photon detection events. This work demonstrates image classification at the energy efficiency limit and introduces a measurement as decision framework. It provides a foundation for intelligent sensing systems that operate under extreme photon budgets and harsh environments.

78

Disentangling Internal Tides from Balanced Motions with Deep Learning and Surface Field Synergy#

📚 arXiv👤 Han Wang, Jeffrey Uncu, Kaushik Srinivasan, Nicolas Grisouard📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出基于深度学习的图像翻译方法，以更低计算成本实现内潮与平衡运动分离；核心创新在于揭示海面流速对分离贡献最大，且算法需具备高度非局域性以利用散射介质信息；为多平台协同观测及宽刈幅卫星数据应用提供新
arXiv:2511.03614v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：海洋动力学中的一个根本性挑战是分离平衡运动与内波。从海面数据中提取内潮（IT）印记是这一挑战的核心环节。传统谐波分析在强非相干性和时间采样不足的情况下会失效，如全球卫星观测中常见的情形。新型宽刈幅卫星提供二维空间覆盖，使得内潮提取可重构为图像翻译问题。基于我们此前在理想化湍流模拟中利用深度学习方法从海面高度（SSH）提取内潮信号的工作，我们表明：当训练过程中对学习率进行退火时…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2511.03614v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：海洋动力学中的一个根本性挑战是分离平衡运动与内波。从海面数据中提取内潮（IT）印记是这一挑战的核心环节。传统谐波分析在强非相干性和时间采样不足的情况下会失效，如全球卫星观测中常见的情形。新型宽刈幅卫星提供二维空间覆盖，使得内潮提取可重构为图像翻译问题。基于我们此前在理想化湍流模拟中利用深度学习方法从海面高度（SSH）提取内潮信号的工作，我们表明：当训练过程中对学习率进行退火时，一种更简捷、计算成本更低的算法在我们的实验中表现相当。利用该算法，我们测试了不同海面输入组合：海面高度、海面温度和海面流速。在我们的确定性基准测试中，所有场均对分离过程产生协同贡献，其中海面流速的信息量远超其他场。这些发现凸显了协同多平台观测的价值，并强调了海面流速在分离平衡运动与内波中的重要性。进一步分析表明，波信号信息和散射介质信息均有助于内潮提取。为利用散射介质中的大尺度、达中尺度范围的信息，算法必须具有高度非局域性。残余误差集中分布于接近第二模态潮波长的空间小尺度区域，这可能反映了输入信息的不完整、模拟所得参考场的不确定性（包括可能的频移污染），以及当前确定性架构的局限性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2511.03614v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A fundamental challenge in ocean dynamics is disentangling balanced motions and internal waves. Extracting internal tidal (IT) imprints from surface data is a central part of this challenge. Traditional harmonic analysis can fail under strong incoherence and poor temporal sampling, as in global satellite observations. New wide-swath satellites provide two-dimensional spatial coverage, allowing IT extraction to be reformulated as image translation. Building on our earlier deep-learning approach for extracting IT signatures from sea surface height (SSH) in an idealized turbulent simulation, we show that a simpler, computationally cheaper algorithm performs comparably in our experiments when the learning rate is annealed during training. Using this algorithm, we test different combinations of surface inputs: SSH, surface temperature, and surface velocity. All fields contribute synergistically to disentanglement in our deterministic benchmark, with surface velocity by far the most informative. These findings underscore the value of coordinated multi-platform observations and highlight the importance of surface velocity for separating balanced motions and internal waves. Additional analysis shows that both wave-signature information and scattering-medium information aid IT extraction. To exploit large-scale, mesoscale-reaching information in the scattering medium, the algorithm must be highly non-local. Residual errors concentrate at small spatial scales near mode-2 tidal wavelengths, likely reflecting incomplete input information, uncertainty in the simulation-derived reference fields, including possible Doppler-shift contamination, and limitations of the present deterministic architecture.

Query-Efficient Quantum Approximate Optimization via Graph-Conditioned Trust Regions#

📚 arXiv👤 Molena Huynh📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出图条件信赖域方法，以图神经网络预测QAOA参数角度的联合高斯分布，将均值用于初始化、协方差定义信赖域、不确定性动态分配评估预算，使学习分布本身成为搜索策略而非仅提供初始点。核心创新在于打破"点
arXiv:2604.24803v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 在量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的低深度实现中，主要代价通常是目标函数评估次数而非电路深度。我们提出一种图条件信赖域方法以降低该查询代价。图神经网络预测QAOA参数角度的联合高斯分布N(mu, Sigma)，其均值初始化局部优化器，协方差定义约束搜索的椭球信赖域，预测不确定性决定实例相关的评估预算。因此，学习得到的分布定义的是搜索策略，而非仅作为初始参数估计。基于对局部光…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24803v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 在量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的低深度实现中，主要代价通常是目标函数评估次数而非电路深度。我们提出一种图条件信赖域方法以降低该查询代价。图神经网络预测QAOA参数角度的联合高斯分布N(mu, Sigma)，其均值初始化局部优化器，协方差定义约束搜索的椭球信赖域，预测不确定性决定实例相关的评估预算。因此，学习得到的分布定义的是搜索策略，而非仅作为初始参数估计。基于对局部光滑性、曲率、校准及噪声的显式假设，我们推导了信赖域内目标函数退化界、梯度方差下界、退极化噪声下期望目标函数序的保持性，以及有限样本覆盖保证。我们在Erdos-Renyi、3-正则、Barabasi-Albert和Watts-Strogatz图上对深度p=2、顶点数n=8-16的MaxCut问题评估该方法。相对于随机重启及最强学习点预测基线，该方法将平均电路评估次数从343次和85次降至45±7次，同时采样近似比与基于集中性的启发式方法相差在3个百分点以内。该方法并未提升绝对近似比；其优势在于以相当解质量降低查询代价。预测不确定性在实验中得到良好校准，ECE=0.052，Spearman相关系数rho=0.770，且学习得到的信赖域可迁移至训练时未使用的图规模。该结果识别出一个低深度、查询主导的区域，其中图条件信赖域可在不修改拟设的情况下降低QAOA的查询代价。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24803v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In low-depth implementations of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA), the dominant cost is often the number of objective evaluations rather than circuit depth. We introduce a graph-conditioned trust-region method for reducing this query cost. A graph neural network predicts a Gaussian distribution N(mu, Sigma) over QAOA angles. The mean initializes a local optimizer, the covariance defines an ellipsoidal trust region that constrains the search, and the predicted uncertainty determines an instance-dependent evaluation budget. Thus the learned distribution defines a search policy rather than only an initial parameter estimate. Under explicit assumptions on local smoothness, curvature, calibration, and noise, we derive bounds on objective degradation within the trust region, lower bounds on gradient variance, preservation of expected objective ordering under depolarizing noise, and finite-sample coverage guarantees. We evaluate the method for MaxCut at depth p = 2 on Erdos-Renyi, 3-regular, Barabasi-Albert, and Watts-Strogatz graphs with n = 8-16 vertices. Relative to random restarts and the strongest learned point-prediction baseline, the method reduces the mean number of circuit evaluations from 343 and 85 to 45 +/- 7, while maintaining sampled approximation ratios within 3 percentage points of concentration-based heuristics. The method does not improve absolute approximation ratios; its advantage is reduced query cost at comparable solution quality. The predictive uncertainty is calibrated in the experiments, with ECE = 0.052 and Spearman correlation rho = 0.770, and the learned trust regions transfer to graph sizes not used during training. The results identify a low-depth, query-dominated regime in which graph-conditioned trust regions reduce the query cost of QAOA without modifying the ansatz.

Learning with Embedded Linear Equality Constraints via Variational Bayesian Inference#

AI 解读：提出变分贝叶斯框架，将线性等式约束嵌入神经网络学习过程，实现模型参数与物理知识的不确定性联合量化。应用于单粒子电池模型，在电压能量平衡约束下获得更紧致可信区间并显著降低约束违反，为物理信息机器学习提供
arXiv:2604.24911v1 公告类型: 新摘要: 机器学习在科学与工程中的应用日益广泛，但许多方法无法提供有意义的不确定性估计，且预测结果可能违背已知的物理知识。我们提出一种贝叶斯框架，将输入与输出之间的线性关系嵌入学习过程，同时对模型参数和领域知识进行完整的预测不确定性表征。我们在受电压与能量平衡约束的单粒子电池模型学习上评估了该方法，结果表明相较于基于变分推断的标准贝叶斯神经网络，该方法能够提供更窄的可信区间并减少约束违…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24911v1 公告类型: 新摘要: 机器学习在科学与工程中的应用日益广泛，但许多方法无法提供有意义的不确定性估计，且预测结果可能违背已知的物理知识。我们提出一种贝叶斯框架，将输入与输出之间的线性关系嵌入学习过程，同时对模型参数和领域知识进行完整的预测不确定性表征。我们在受电压与能量平衡约束的单粒子电池模型学习上评估了该方法，结果表明相较于基于变分推断的标准贝叶斯神经网络，该方法能够提供更窄的可信区间并减少约束违反。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24911v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine Learning is becoming more prevalent in science and engineering, but many approaches do not provide meaningful uncertainty estimates and predictions may also violate known physical knowledge. We propose a Bayesian framework to embed linear relationships across inputs and outputs into the learning process, whilst characterizing full predictive uncertainty over both the model parameters and the domain knowledge. We evaluated our method on learning the single particle battery model subject to voltage and energy balances, showing its ability to provide reduced credible intervals and constraint violations compared to standard Bayesian neural networks based on variational inference.

Towards interpretable AI with quantum annealing feature selection#

📚 arXiv👤 Francesco Aldo Venturelli, Emanuele Costa, Sikha O K, Bruno Juliá-Díaz, Miguel A. González Ballester, Alba Cervera-Lierta📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文创新性地将量子退火用于CNN特征图选择，以组合优化方式定位关键预测特征，较GradCAM类方法显著提升类别解耦与解释透明度；同时通过能隙与成功概率分析为量子可解释AI提供理论支撑，推动可信深度学习
arXiv:2604.25649v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：深度学习模型被应用于关键领域，其中的错误可能造成严重后果。因此，理解模型如何以及为何生成预测至关重要。这种理解有助于检验模型是否学习到正确的模式、检测数据中的偏差、改进模型设计，并构建可信赖的系统。本工作提出了一种用于解释图像分类任务中卷积神经网络的新方法。该方法通过选取对每个预测贡献最大的特征图来实现。为求解这一组合优化问题，我们将其编码为量子约束优化问题，并建议使用量子…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25649v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：深度学习模型被应用于关键领域，其中的错误可能造成严重后果。因此，理解模型如何以及为何生成预测至关重要。这种理解有助于检验模型是否学习到正确的模式、检测数据中的偏差、改进模型设计，并构建可信赖的系统。本工作提出了一种用于解释图像分类任务中卷积神经网络的新方法。该方法通过选取对每个预测贡献最大的特征图来实现。为求解这一组合优化问题，我们将其编码为量子约束优化问题，并建议使用量子退火求解。我们将该方法与最先进的可解释AI技术（特别是GradCAM和GradCAM++）进行对比评估，观察到类别解耦效果的提升，即模型的决策边界变得更加清晰，推理过程更加透明。这表明我们的方法提高了解释质量，使人更容易理解模型在特定预测中依赖哪些特征。此外，我们研究了量子退火算法的计算行为。具体而言，我们分析了计算过程中系统的最小能隙以及算法找到正确解的概率。这些分析为该方法在实践中有效运行的原因提供了理论洞见。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25649v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep learning models are used in critical applications, in which mistakes can have serious consequences. Therefore, it is crucial to understand how and why models generate predictions. This understanding provides useful information to check whether the model is learning the right patterns, detect biases in the data, improve model design, and build systems that can be trusted. This work proposes a new method for interpreting Convolutional Neural Networks in image classification tasks. The approach works by selecting the most important feature maps that contribute to each prediction. To solve this combinatorial problem, we encode it into a quantum constrained optimization problem and propose to solve it using quantum annealing. We evaluate our method against the state-of-the-art explainable AI techniques, specifically GradCAM and GradCAM++, and observe an improved class disentanglement, i.e. the model's decision boundaries become more distinct and its reasoning more transparent. This demonstrates that our approach enhances the quality of explanations, making it easier to understand which features the model relies on for specific predictions. In addition, we study the computational behavior of the quantum annealing algorithm. Specifically, we analyze the minimum energy gap of the system during computation and the probability that the algorithm finds the correct solution. These analyses provide theoretical insight into why the method works effectively in practice.

82

Data-Driven Hamiltonian Reduction for Superconducting Qubits via Meta-Learning#

📚 arXiv👤 Arielle Sanford, Andrew T. Kamen, Frederic T. Chong, Andy J. Goldschmidt📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：HAML通过元学习实现超导量子比特有效哈密顿量的数据驱动约化，突破微扰理论局限，仅需少量测量即可在线适配新器件。该框架为量子处理器校准、控制及误差缓解提供了可扩展的高效表征工具。
arXiv:2604.24912v1 公告类型: 交叉 摘要: 我们提出HAML（基于元学习的哈密顿量自适应），一种用于超导量子处理器有效哈密顿量模型快速在线自适应的框架。HAML分两个阶段进行。监督训练阶段使用模拟器件集成学习从控制输入和器件参数到有效哈密顿量系数的离线映射。在线自适应阶段则利用少量硬件可及测量来识别新器件的未知参数。通过直接针对从全多模模拟中提取的有效双量子比特系数进行训练，HAML隐式学习从全多模哈密顿量到有效量…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24912v1 公告类型: 交叉 摘要: 我们提出HAML（基于元学习的哈密顿量自适应），一种用于超导量子处理器有效哈密顿量模型快速在线自适应的框架。HAML分两个阶段进行。监督训练阶段使用模拟器件集成学习从控制输入和器件参数到有效哈密顿量系数的离线映射。在线自适应阶段则利用少量硬件可及测量来识别新器件的未知参数。通过直接针对从全多模模拟中提取的有效双量子比特系数进行训练，HAML隐式学习从全多模哈密顿量到有效量子比特描述的约化，无需调用微扰理论。我们进一步证明，基于方差最大化的贪婪测量构型选择可提升在线自适应效率。我们在transmon-耦合器-transmon系统上演示HAML，在宽范围工作区间内恢复有效双量子比特系数，包括Schrieffer-Wolff微扰理论（SWPT）失效的参数区域。这为近期量子处理器的哈密顿量约化与表征建立了一种可扩展、样本高效的方法，对校准、控制和误差缓解具有直接意义。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24912v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce HAML (Hamiltonian Adaptation via Meta-Learning), a framework for fast online adaptation of effective Hamiltonian models of superconducting quantum processors. HAML proceeds in two phases. A supervised training phase uses an ensemble of simulated devices to learn an offline map from control inputs and device parameters to effective Hamiltonian coefficients. An online adaptation phase then uses a small number of hardware-accessible measurements to identify the unknown parameters of a new device. By training directly against effective two-qubit coefficients extracted from full multi-mode simulations, HAML implicitly learns the reduction from full multi-mode Hamiltonians to effective qubit descriptions without invoking perturbation theory. We further show that a variance-maximizing greedy selection of measurement configurations boosts online adaptation efficiency. We demonstrate HAML on a transmon-coupler-transmon system, recovering effective two-qubit coefficients across a wide range of operating regimes, including parameter regions where Schrieffer-Wolff perturbation theory (SWPT) breaks down. This establishes a scalable, sample-efficient approach to Hamiltonian reduction and characterization for near-term quantum processors, with direct implications for calibration, control, and error mitigation.

83

Residual-loss Anomaly Analysis of Physics-Informed Neural Networks: An Inverse Method for Change-point Detection in Nonlinear Dynamical Systems with Regime Switching#

📚 arXiv👤 Yuhe Bai, Chengli Tan, Jiaqi Li, Xiangjun Wang, Zhikun Zhang📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出基于物理信息神经网络残差损失异常的变点检测逆方法，突破传统解耦框架的局限，通过局部物理残差结构抬升定位转换区间，并联合优化变点与分段参数，为含态制转换的非线性动力系统反问题提供统一高效求解范式。
arXiv:2604.25655v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：具有态制转换的非线性动力学系统通常由含跳跃参数的常微分方程描述。传统方法常将变点检测与参数估计视为独立任务，忽略了二者之间的内在耦合。为此，我们提出物理信息神经网络的残差损失异常分析，一种利用物理信息学习范式内动力学一致性的统一框架。该方法在单组约束下联合推断分段参数与转换点。方法采用两阶段策略：首先，通过重叠子区间分解分析局部物理残差。当子区间跨越真实转换点时，无噪声条件下…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25655v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：具有态制转换的非线性动力学系统通常由含跳跃参数的常微分方程描述。传统方法常将变点检测与参数估计视为独立任务，忽略了二者之间的内在耦合。为此，我们提出物理信息神经网络的残差损失异常分析，一种利用物理信息学习范式内动力学一致性的统一框架。该方法在单组约束下联合推断分段参数与转换点。方法采用两阶段策略：首先，通过重叠子区间分解分析局部物理残差。当子区间跨越真实转换点时，无噪声条件下残差呈现显著的结构抬升，且具有非零下界，从而有效定位潜在转换区间。其次，在本框架中，变点位置与分段参数被整合至统一物理损失函数进行联合优化，实现同步识别。在基准非线性动力系统（包括马尔萨斯与逻辑增长模型、范德波尔振子、洛特卡-沃尔泰拉模型及洛伦兹系统）上的实验表明，所提方法在变点定位与参数估计精度上均优于传统解耦方法。本研究为含态制转换的非线性动力系统中结构耦合反问题提供了一种高效统一的解决方案。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25655v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Nonlinear dynamical systems with regime transitions are typically described by ordinary differential equations with jumping parameters parameters. Traditional methods often treat change-point detection and parameter estimation as separate tasks, ignoring the inherent coupling between them. To address this, we propose residual-loss anomaly analysis of physics-informed neural networks, a unified framework that leverages dynamical consistency within the physics-informed learning paradigm. This approach jointly infers piecewise parameters and transition points under a single set of constraints. The method follows a two-stage strategy: First, local physical residuals are analyzed through overlapping subinterval decomposition. When a subinterval spans a true transition point, the residual exhibits a distinct structural elevation in noise-free conditions, which has a non-zero lower bound, enabling effective localization of potential transition intervals. Second, within our framework, change-point locations and piecewise parameters are integrated into a unified physical loss function for joint optimization, enabling simultaneous identification. Experiments on benchmark nonlinear dynamical systems, including Malthusian and logistic growth models, Van der Pol oscillator, Lotka-Volterra model and Lorenz system, demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms traditional decoupled approaches in both change-point localization and parameter estimation accuracy. This study provides an efficient, unified solution for structurally coupled inverse problems in nonlinear dynamical systems with regime switching.

84

Adaptive Meta-Learning Stochastic Gradient Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Simulation for Bayesian Updating of Structural Dynamic Models#

📚 arXiv👤 Xianghao Meng, James L. Beck, Yong Huang, Hui Li📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出自适应元学习随机梯度哈密顿蒙特卡洛（AM-SGHMC）算法，通过输入输出自适应设计的神经网络优化采样策略，突破现有神经增强MCMC需针对新任务重新训练的瓶颈，实现同类结构贝叶斯更新任务的即插即
arXiv:2604.25710v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：近几十年来，马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）方法已广泛应用于结构健康监测领域的结构动力学模型贝叶斯更新。近期，多种融合神经网络的MCMC算法被开发出来，以提升其在特定贝叶斯模型更新问题中的性能。然而，这些方法的共同挑战在于，嵌入的神经网络在面对新任务时往往需要重新训练，这一过程耗时且严重削弱这些方法的竞争力。本文提出一种新开发的自适应元学习随机梯度哈密顿蒙特卡洛（AM-SGHM…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25710v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：近几十年来，马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）方法已广泛应用于结构健康监测领域的结构动力学模型贝叶斯更新。近期，多种融合神经网络的MCMC算法被开发出来，以提升其在特定贝叶斯模型更新问题中的性能。然而，这些方法的共同挑战在于，嵌入的神经网络在面对新任务时往往需要重新训练，这一过程耗时且严重削弱这些方法的竞争力。本文提出一种新开发的自适应元学习随机梯度哈密顿蒙特卡洛（AM-SGHMC）算法。AM-SGHMC的核心思想是通过训练自适应神经网络来优化采样策略，由于网络输入和输出的自适应设计，训练好的采样器可直接应用于同类结构的各种贝叶斯更新问题而无需进一步训练，从而实现元学习。此外，本文还讨论了AM-SGHMC算法用于结构动力学模型更新的可行性问题，并通过两个涉及不同模型保真度的多层建筑模型贝叶斯更新的算例，验证了所提方法的有效性和泛化能力。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25710v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the last few decades, Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods have been widely applied to Bayesian updating of structural dynamic models in the field of structural health monitoring. Recently, several MCMC algorithms have been developed that incorporate neural networks to enhance their performance for specific Bayesian model updating problems. However, a common challenge with these approaches lies in the fact that the embedded neural networks often necessitate retraining when faced with new tasks, a process that is time-consuming and significantly undermines the competitiveness of these methods. This paper introduces a newly developed adaptive meta-learning stochastic gradient Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (AM-SGHMC) algorithm. The idea behind AM-SGHMC is to optimize the sampling strategy by training adaptive neural networks, and due to the adaptive design of the network inputs and outputs, the trained sampler can be directly applied to various Bayesian updating problems of the same type of structure without further training, thereby achieving meta-learning. Additionally, practical issues for the feasibility of the AM-SGHMC algorithm for structural dynamic model updating are addressed, and two examples involving Bayesian updating of multi-story building models with different model fidelity are used to demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization ability of the proposed method.

85

Explainable AI for Jet Tagging: A Comparative Study of GNNExplainer, GNNShap, and GradCAM for Jet Tagging in the Lund Jet Plane#

📚 arXiv👤 Pahal D. Patel, Sanmay Ganguly📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文创新性地将三种可解释AI方法适配至Lund喷注平面，构建物理知情的评估框架，首次系统揭示了解释质量在微扰与非微扰区的动量依赖性转移，并量化验证了模型对QCD子结构特征的学习程度，为高能物理中的AI
arXiv:2604.25885v1 发布类型：交叉 摘要：图神经网络（如ParticleNet）和基于Transformer的点云网络（如ParticleTransformer）在欧洲核子研究中心大型强子对撞机的喷注标记基准测试中达到了最先进的性能，但其预测背后的物理推理仍然不透明。我们提出了多种方法，即基于扰动的（GNNExplainer）、基于沙普利值的（GNNShap）和基于梯度的（GRADCam）；并将其适配到LundNet…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25885v1 发布类型：交叉 摘要：图神经网络（如ParticleNet）和基于Transformer的点云网络（如ParticleTransformer）在欧洲核子研究中心大型强子对撞机的喷注标记基准测试中达到了最先进的性能，但其预测背后的物理推理仍然不透明。我们提出了多种方法，即基于扰动的（GNNExplainer）、基于沙普利值的（GNNShap）和基于梯度的（GRADCam）；并将其适配到LundNet的Lund平面图表示上操作。利用Lund平面中每个节点对应一个具有物理意义的部分子分裂这一事实，我们构建了蒙特卡洛真值解释掩码，并引入了一个超越标准保真度指标的物理知情评估框架。我们在三个横动量区间（p_T ∈ [500,700]、[800,1000]和全包含区间[500,1000] GeV）中进行分析，揭示了解释质量和关注焦点如何在非微扰和微扰区域之间转移。我们进一步量化了解释器分配的节点重要性与经典喷注子结构可观测量之间的相关性——N-子喷注度比值τ₂₁和τ₃₂以及能量关联函数——从而确定了模型在多大程度上学习了已知的量子色动力学特征。我们发现，总体而言，可解释性方法赋予的权重与解析可观测量存在相关性，且在不同相空间区域呈现预期的偏移，这表明训练后的神经网络确实学习了喷注子结构矩的某些方面。我们的开源实现为基于图的喷注标记器提供了可复现的可解释性研究。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25885v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Graph neural networks such as ParticleNet and transformer based networks on point clouds such as ParticleTransformer achieve state-of-the-art performance on jet tagging benchmarks at the Large Hadron Collider, yet the physical reasoning behind their predictions remains opaque. We present different methods, i.e. perturbation-based (GNNExplainer), Shapley-value-based (GNNShap), and gradient-based (GRADCam); adapted to operate on LundNet's Lund-plane graph representation. Leveraging the fact that each node in the Lund plane corresponds to a physically meaningful parton splitting, we construct Monte Carlo truth explanation masks and introduce a physics-informed evaluation framework that goes beyond standard fidelity metrics. We perform the analysis in three transverse-momentum bins (p_T in [500,700], [800,1000], and the inclusive region [500,1000] GeV), revealing how explanation quality and focus shift between non-perturbative and perturbative regimes. We further quantify the correlation between explainer-assigned node importance and classical jet substructure observables -- N-subjettiness ratios τ₂₁ and τ₃₂ and the energy correlation functions -- establishing the degree to which the model has learned known QCD features. We find that overall the weight assigned by explainability methods has a correlation with analytic observables, with expected shift across different phase space regimes, indicating that a trained neural network indeed learns some aspects of jet-substructure moments. Our open-source implementation enables reproducible explainability studies for graph-based jet taggers.

86

Grothendieck Graph Neural Networks Framework: An Algebraic Platform for Crafting Topology-Aware GNNs#

📚 arXiv👤 Amirreza Shiralinasab Langari, Leila Yeganeh, Kim Khoa Nguyen📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作以范畴论中的"覆盖"概念替代传统GNN的"邻域"原语，构建Grothendieck图神经网络框架，突破Weisfeiler-Lehman测试的表达瓶颈；所提出的筛神经网络在多个挑战性图同构基准上
arXiv:2412.08835v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：图神经网络（GNN）几乎普遍基于单一原语构建：邻域。无论架构如何变化，消息传递最终都是对邻域进行聚合，这从根本上限制了表达能力，通常产生的效力不超过Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）测试。在本工作中，我们挑战这一原语。我们引入Grothendieck图神经网络（GkGNN）框架，它将邻域严格代数扩展为覆盖，并在此过程中以覆盖取代邻域作为消息传递的基本对象。邻域和邻接矩…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2412.08835v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：图神经网络（GNN）几乎普遍基于单一原语构建：邻域。无论架构如何变化，消息传递最终都是对邻域进行聚合，这从根本上限制了表达能力，通常产生的效力不超过Weisfeiler-Lehman（WL）测试。在本工作中，我们挑战这一原语。我们引入Grothendieck图神经网络（GkGNN）框架，它将邻域严格代数扩展为覆盖，并在此过程中以覆盖取代邻域作为消息传递的基本对象。邻域和邻接矩阵作为特例被恢复，而覆盖为定义拓扑感知的传播方案提供了 principled 且灵活的基础。GkGNN将覆盖形式化，并系统地将它们转化为矩阵，类似于邻接矩阵编码邻域的方式，从而同时实现理论分析和实际应用。在该框架内，我们引入筛的覆盖，其灵感来自范畴论，能够捕获丰富的拓扑结构。基于这一覆盖，我们设计筛神经网络（SNN），一种规范化的固定覆盖实例，推广了邻接矩阵。实验表明，SNN在具有挑战性的图同构基准测试（SRG、CSL、BREC）上实现了零观测失败，并通过受控的标签传播探测显著提升了拓扑感知评估。这些结果确立了GkGNN作为以覆盖取代GNN中邻域的 principled 基础框架。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.08835v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are almost universally built on a single primitive: the neighborhood. Regardless of architectural variations, message passing ultimately aggregates over neighborhoods, which intrinsically limits expressivity and often yields power no stronger than the Weisfeiler-Lehman (WL) test. In this work, we challenge this primitive. We introduce the Grothendieck Graph Neural Networks (GkGNN) framework, which provides a strict algebraic extension of neighborhoods to covers, and in doing so replaces neighborhoods as the fundamental objects of message passing. Neighborhoods and adjacency matrices are recovered as special cases, while covers enable a principled and flexible foundation for defining topology-aware propagation schemes. GkGNN formalizes covers and systematically translates them into matrices, analogously to how adjacency matrices encode neighborhoods, enabling both theoretical analysis and practical implementation. Within this framework, we introduce the cover of sieves, inspired by category theory, which captures rich topological structure. Based on this cover, we design Sieve Neural Networks (SNN), a canonical fixed-cover instantiation that generalizes the adjacency matrix. Experiments show that SNN achieves zero observed failures on challenging graph isomorphism benchmarks (SRG, CSL, BREC) and substantially improves topology-aware evaluation via a controlled label-propagation probe. These results establish GkGNN as a principled foundational framework for replacing neighborhoods in GNNs.

87

Iterative Quantum Feature Maps#

📚 arXiv👤 Nasa Matsumoto, Quoc Hoan Tran, Koki Chinzei, Yasuhiro Endo, Hirotaka Oshima📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出迭代量子特征映射（IQFM），通过逐层堆叠浅层量子特征映射与经典增强权重，结合对比学习和逐层训练机制，在无需变分优化的情况下有效抑制噪声、降低量子资源开销，为含噪量子机器学习提供可扩展的实用化
arXiv:2506.19461v4 公告类型: replace-cross 摘要: 利用量子线路作为量子特征映射（QFM）的量子机器学习模型，因其在学习任务中增强的表达能力而备受关注。此类模型已在特定分类问题族上展示了严格的端到端量子加速。然而，由于线路噪声和硬件限制，深层QFM在实际量子硬件上的部署仍具挑战性。此外，变分量子算法常受计算瓶颈困扰，尤其在精确梯度估计方面，这显著增加了训练期间的量子资源需求。我们提出迭代量子特征映射（…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2506.19461v4 公告类型: replace-cross 摘要: 利用量子线路作为量子特征映射（QFM）的量子机器学习模型，因其在学习任务中增强的表达能力而备受关注。此类模型已在特定分类问题族上展示了严格的端到端量子加速。然而，由于线路噪声和硬件限制，深层QFM在实际量子硬件上的部署仍具挑战性。此外，变分量子算法常受计算瓶颈困扰，尤其在精确梯度估计方面，这显著增加了训练期间的量子资源需求。我们提出迭代量子特征映射（IQFM），一种混合量子-经典框架，通过迭代连接浅层QFM与经典计算的增强权重来构建深层架构。通过引入对比学习和逐层训练机制，IQFM框架有效减少量子运行时间并缓解噪声导致的性能退化。在涉及含噪量子数据的任务中，数值实验表明IQFM框架优于量子卷积神经网络，且无需优化变分量子参数。即便对于典型经典图像分类基准，精心设计的IQFM框架也能达到与经典神经网络相当的性能。该框架为解决当前局限并充分释放量子增强机器学习的潜力提供了一条有前景的路径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2506.19461v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantum machine learning models that leverage quantum circuits as quantum feature maps (QFMs) are recognized for their enhanced expressive power in learning tasks. Such models have demonstrated rigorous end-to-end quantum speedups for specific families of classification problems. However, deploying deep QFMs on real quantum hardware remains challenging due to circuit noise and hardware constraints. Additionally, variational quantum algorithms often suffer from computational bottlenecks, particularly in accurate gradient estimation, which significantly increases quantum resource demands during training. We propose Iterative Quantum Feature Maps (IQFMs), a hybrid quantum-classical framework that constructs a deep architecture by iteratively connecting shallow QFMs with classically computed augmentation weights. By incorporating contrastive learning and a layer-wise training mechanism, the IQFMs framework effectively reduces quantum runtime and mitigates noise-induced degradation. In tasks involving noisy quantum data, numerical experiments show that the IQFMs framework outperforms quantum convolutional neural networks, without requiring the optimization of variational quantum parameters. Even for a typical classical image classification benchmark, a carefully designed IQFMs framework achieves performance comparable to that of classical neural networks. This framework presents a promising path to address current limitations and harness the full potential of quantum-enhanced machine learning.

88

asRoBallet: Closing the Sim2Real Gap via Friction-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Underactuated Spherical Dynamics#

📚 arXiv👤 Fang Wan, Guangyi Huang, Tianyu Wu, Zishang Zhang, Bangchao Huang, Haoran Sun, Mingdong Chen, Chaoyang Song📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文首次将强化学习成功部署于人形球轮机器人实体，核心创新在于构建了显式建模全向轮离散滚子力学的高保真仿真环境，并开发摩擦感知RL框架实现零样本Sim2Real迁移。通过减材重构低成本硬件与iOS生态系
arXiv:2604.24916v1 发布类型: cross 摘要: 我们推出了asRoBallet，据我们所知，这是首个在人形球轮机器人硬件上成功部署强化学习(RL)的工作。历史上，球轮机器人一直是欠驱动和非完整约束控制的经典基准，其特点是复杂摩擦模型（涉及轮子-球体-地面交互）中存在严重的现实鸿沟。虽然现有文献已证明LQR和MPC可成功实现三维平衡控制，但利用RL将人形球轮机器人迁移至实际硬件目前仍受限于接触建模、执行器延迟与抖动…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24916v1 发布类型: cross 摘要: 我们推出了asRoBallet，据我们所知，这是首个在人形球轮机器人硬件上成功部署强化学习(RL)的工作。历史上，球轮机器人一直是欠驱动和非完整约束控制的经典基准，其特点是复杂摩擦模型（涉及轮子-球体-地面交互）中存在严重的现实鸿沟。虽然现有文献已证明LQR和MPC可成功实现三维平衡控制，但利用RL将人形球轮机器人迁移至实际硬件目前仍受限于接触建模、执行器延迟与抖动、以及安全硬件探索等关键瓶颈。本研究提出了一种高保真MuJoCo仿真，显式建模了ETH型全向轮的离散滚子力学机制，从而捕捉了此前被忽略的寄生振动和接触不连续性。我们还开发了一种摩擦感知强化学习框架，通过掌握轮子-球体及球体-地面界面处的耦合滚动、横向和扭转摩擦通道，实现了零样本Sim2Real迁移。我们通过减材重构设计了asRoBallet，从过约束四足机器人中复用关键组件，并将其集成到新设计的结构框架中，以低成本构建了一个鲁棒的研究平台。我们还开发了一套通用iOS生态系统，将消费电子产品转化为低延迟接口，使单个操作员能够通过直观的自然运动编排富有表现力的人形动作。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24916v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce asRoBallet, to the best of our knowledge, the first successful deployment of reinforcement learning (RL) on a humanoid ballbot hardware. Historically, ballbots have served as a canonical benchmark for underactuated and nonholonomic control, which are characterized by a reality gap in complex friction models for wheel-sphere-ground interactions. While current literature demonstrates successful handling of 3D balancing with LQR and MPC, transitioning to actual hardware for a humanoid ballbot using RL is currently hindered by critical gaps in contact modeling, actuator latency & jitter, and safe hardware exploration, and safe hardware exploration. This study proposes a high-fidelity MuJoCo simulation that explicitly models the discrete roller mechanics of ETH-type omni-wheels, thereby capturing parasitic vibrations and contact discontinuities that are previously ignored. We also developed a Friction-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that achieves zero-shot Sim2Real transfer by mastering the coupled rolling, lateral, and torsional friction channels at the wheel-sphere and sphere-ground interfaces. We designed asRoBallet through subtractive reconfiguration, repurposing key components from an overconstrained quadruped and integrating them into a newly designed structural frame to achieve a robust research platform at low cost. We also developed a generalized iOS ecosystem that transforms consumer electronics into a low-latency interface, enabling a single operator to orchestrate expressive humanoid maneuvers via intuitive natural motion.

89

Adaptive Sensing beyond Non-Adaptive Information Limits: End-to-End Co-Design of Geometry, Policy, and Inference#

📚 arXiv👤 Arvin Keshvari, William Tuxbury, Zin Lin📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究提出联合动态规划(joint-DP)框架，首次实现硬件几何结构与贝尔曼最优自适应测量策略的端到端协同优化，突破非自适应信息理论极限。通过可微动态规划与包络定理保证梯度精确性，成功扩展至十万像素级
arXiv:2604.25193v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 逆向设计使广阔的物理参数空间成为涌现行为的基底。在传感领域，这一原理的风险在模拟-数字边界处最为尖锐——硬件未能捕获的任何信息都是下游算法无法恢复的信息；因此仅靠硬件优化是不够的，几何结构必须与下一步测量规则的协同设计。我们将这种协同设计形式化为联合动态规划（joint-DP）：对连续硬件几何结构与贝尔曼最优自适应测量策略的单一优化。外部硬件梯度通过可微动态规划计算，采用尖…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.25193v1 公告类型: 新
摘要: 逆向设计使广阔的物理参数空间成为涌现行为的基底。在传感领域，这一原理的风险在模拟-数字边界处最为尖锐——硬件未能捕获的任何信息都是下游算法无法恢复的信息；因此仅靠硬件优化是不够的，几何结构必须与下一步测量规则的协同设计。我们将这种协同设计形式化为联合动态规划（joint-DP）：对连续硬件几何结构与贝尔曼最优自适应测量策略的单一优化。外部硬件梯度通过可微动态规划计算，采用尖锐的贝尔曼最大值，由包络定理保证其精确且无偏；松弛层级将该通用框架从小型离散POMDP推广至10⁵像素的光子拓扑结构。在三个案例研究中，joint-DP大幅优于其领域的自然基线：在雷达波束搜索POMDP上，经典信息界引导的几何选择损失了2.8倍的可达到自适应价值；在超导量子比特磁通传感器上，joint-DP将部署后的均方误差较联合贝叶斯克拉美-罗基线降低11.3倍，且两种几何结构均在其各自目标下数值协同优化；在90,000像素光子超构传感器上，通过贝叶斯费舍尔信息矩阵代理的joint-DP将部署后的均方误差较随机基线降低123倍。对于任何硬件一次性设计而策略在器件寿命期内运行的传感器，硬件与策略的联合优化是最低限度的原则性流程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.25193v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Inverse design has made vast physical parameter spaces a substrate for emergent behavior. In sensing, the stakes of this principle are sharpest at the analog-to-digital boundary, where any information the hardware fails to capture is information no downstream algorithm can recover; hardware optimization alone is therefore not enough, and the geometry must be co-designed with a rule for what to measure next. We formulate this co-design as emphjoint dynamic programming (joint-DP): a single optimization over the continuous hardware geometry and a Bellman-optimal adaptive measurement policy. The outer hardware gradient is computed by differentiable dynamic programming with a sharp Bellman maximum, which the envelope theorem makes exact and bias-free, and a relaxation hierarchy carries the common framework from small discrete POMDPs to 10⁵⁻pixel photonic topologies. Across three case studies, joint-DP beats the natural baseline of its community by a large factor: on a radar beam-search POMDP, classical information-bound-guided geometry selection loses 2.8× in attainable adaptive value; on a superconducting-qubit flux sensor, joint-DP reduces deployed mean-squared error by 11.3× over the joint Bayesian Cramér--Rao baseline, with both geometries numerically co-optimized under their respective objectives; and on a 90,000-pixel photonic metasensor, joint-DP via the Bayesian Fisher-information-matrix surrogate reduces deployed mean-squared error by 123× relative to a randomized baseline. For any sensor whose hardware is designed once but whose policy runs for the device's lifetime, joint optimization of hardware and policy is the minimum principled procedure.

Natural Image Classification via Quasi-Cyclic Graph Ensembles and Random-Bond Ising Models at the Nishimori Temperature#

📚 arXiv👤 V. S. Usatyuk, D. A. Sapozhnikov, S. I. Egorov📅 2026-04-29🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将统计物理中的随机键伊辛模型与准循环LDPC图结构引入图像分类，核心创新在于利用Nishimori温度处的谱-拓扑对应关系抑制有害子结构，并开发快速二次-牛顿估计器实现高效求解。其意义在于将12
arXiv:2508.18717v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：现代多类别图像分类使用高维CNN特征，导致巨大的内存与计算开销，并掩盖了数据流形的几何结构。现有基于图谱的分类器在合成或二分类任务上有效，但在多类别自然图像上性能退化，原因在于特征流形具有非平凡拓扑。我们提出一种受物理启发的流程：将冻结的MobileNetV2特征解释为稀疏多边缘类型准循环LDPC图上的伊辛自旋，构建随机键伊辛模型（RBIM）。该模型在其西森温度下运行——即B…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2508.18717v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：现代多类别图像分类使用高维CNN特征，导致巨大的内存与计算开销，并掩盖了数据流形的几何结构。现有基于图谱的分类器在合成或二分类任务上有效，但在多类别自然图像上性能退化，原因在于特征流形具有非平凡拓扑。我们提出一种受物理启发的流程：将冻结的MobileNetV2特征解释为稀疏多边缘类型准循环LDPC图上的伊辛自旋，构建随机键伊辛模型（RBIM）。该模型在其西森温度下运行——即Bethe-Hessian矩阵最小特征值为零处。一种谱-拓扑对应关系将Tanner图中的捕获集与Ihara-Bass zeta函数的极点相关联的拓扑不变量联系起来，从而系统性地抑制有害子结构，否则这些子结构会使top-1准确率降低超过四倍。一种快速二次-牛顿估计器仅需约9次Arnoldi迭代即可找到西森温度，较二分法提速六倍。所得集成模型将原始1280维MobileNetV2表征压缩至32维（ImageNet-10）或64维（ImageNet-100）。采用三图软集成，我们在ImageNet-10上达到98.7%的top-1准确率，在ImageNet-100上达到84.92%。与MobileNetV2相比，我们的硬集成准确率提升0.10%，同时将FLOPs降低2.67倍。与ResNet-50相比，软集成仅损失1.09%的准确率，却将FLOPs削减29倍。创新点在于：（a）建立图捕获集与代数拓扑缺陷之间的严格联系；（b）高效的西森温度估计器；（c）展示拓扑引导的LDPC图嵌入用于高度压缩的分类器。

English Abstract

arXiv:2508.18717v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Modern multi-class image classification uses high-dimensional CNN features that incur large memory and computational costs and obscure the data manifold's geometry. Existing graph-based spectral classifiers work on synthetic or binary tasks but degrade on natural images with many classes because feature manifolds have non-trivial topology. We introduce a physics-inspired pipeline where frozen MobileNetV2 features are interpreted as Ising spins on a sparse multi-edge type quasi-cyclic LDPC graph, defining a Random-Bond Ising Model (RBIM). The model is operated at its Nishimori temperature -- where the smallest eigenvalue of the Bethe-Hessian matrix vanishes. A spectral-topological correspondence links trapping sets in the Tanner graph to topological invariants via poles of the Ihara-Bass zeta function, enabling systematic suppression of harmful substructures that otherwise reduce top-1 accuracy by more than a factor of four. A fast quadratic-Newton estimator finds the Nishimori temperature in sim 9 Arnoldi iterations, a sixfold speed-up over bisection. The resulting ensembles compress the original 1280-dimensional MobileNetV2 representation to 32 dimensions (ImageNet-10) or 64 dimensions (ImageNet-100). We achieve 98.7% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-10 and 84.92% on ImageNet-100 using a three-graph soft ensemble. Relative to MobileNetV2, our hard ensemble increases accuracy by 0.10% while reducing FLOPs by a factor of 2.67. Against ResNet-50, the soft ensemble drops only 1.09% accuracy yet cuts FLOPs by 29×. The novelty lies in (a) establishing a rigorous link between graph trapping sets and algebraic-topological defects, (b) an efficient Nishimori-temperature estimator, and (c) demonstrating topology-guided LDPC graph embedding for highly compressed classifiers.

91

Merging the classical and the modern in physics-based simulations#

📚 Nature Computational Science👤 Michael D. Shields, Somdatta Goswami📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该文提出神经算子有限元方法，将经典有限元的高精度与现代机器学习的高效性深度融合，突破传统仿真计算成本瓶颈，为工程大规模问题提供兼具物理可解释性与可扩展性的新范式。
工程仿真传统上依赖有限元方法，其精度高但计算成本大，而科学机器学习提供了更快的数据驱动替代方案。新近发展的神经算子有限元方法将两种方法结合，使仿真更高效、更具可扩展性。 Fish, J. & Belytschko, T.《有限元法入门》第1卷（Wiley，2007）。 Hughes, T. J. R.《有限元法：线性与动态有限元分析》（Courier Corporation，2003）。 Karniadakis, G. E. 等. N…

工程仿真传统上依赖有限元方法，其精度高但计算成本大，而科学机器学习提供了更快的数据驱动替代方案。新近发展的神经算子有限元方法将两种方法结合，使仿真更高效、更具可扩展性。

English Abstract

Engineering simulations traditionally rely on finite element methods, which are accurate but computationally expensive, while scientific machine learning offers faster, data-driven alternatives. The recently developed neural-operator element method combines both approaches, making simulations more efficient and scalable. NOEM: efficient and scalable finite element method enabled by reusable neural operators#

📚 Nature Computational Science👤 Weihang Ouyang, Yeonjong Shin, Si-Wei Liu, Lu Lu📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：NOEM通过构建可复用的神经算子单元（NOE），以变分框架将其与标准有限元耦合，突破了传统FEM对密集网格的依赖，在保持精度的同时显著降低多尺度、复杂几何问题的计算成本，为工程科学中的高保真模拟提供了
有限元法（FEM）是求解偏微分方程（PDEs）的一种成熟数值方法。然而，其基于网格的特性带来了巨大的计算成本，尤其对于复杂的多尺度模拟。新兴的机器学习方法为偏微分方程提供了数据驱动型解法，但仍面临训练成本高、模型可复用性低等挑战。本文提出神经算子有限元法（NOEM），通过将有限元法与算子学习协同融合以应对上述挑战。NOEM利用神经算子模拟有限元法中需要精细网格的子域。在每个子域中，采用神经算子构建单一单元，即神经算子单元（NOE）。随…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

有限元法（FEM）是求解偏微分方程（PDEs）的一种成熟数值方法。然而，其基于网格的特性带来了巨大的计算成本，尤其对于复杂的多尺度模拟。新兴的机器学习方法为偏微分方程提供了数据驱动型解法，但仍面临训练成本高、模型可复用性低等挑战。本文提出神经算子有限元法（NOEM），通过将有限元法与算子学习协同融合以应对上述挑战。NOEM利用神经算子模拟有限元法中需要精细网格的子域。在每个子域中，采用神经算子构建单一单元，即神经算子单元（NOE）。随后，NOE与标准有限元通过变分框架整合，以表征整体解。由此，NOEM无需密集网格划分即可实现高效模拟。我们通过系统的理论分析与数值实验验证了NOEM的精度、效率与可扩展性，涵盖非线性偏微分方程、多尺度问题、复杂几何上的偏微分方程以及不连续系数场等情形。

English Abstract

The finite element method (FEM) is a well-established numerical method for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). However, its mesh-based nature gives rise to substantial computational costs, especially for complex multiscale simulations. Emerging machine learning-based methods provide data-driven solutions to PDEs, yet they present challenges, including high training cost and low model reusability. Here we propose the neural-operator element method (NOEM) by synergistically combining FEM with operator learning to address these challenges. NOEM leverages neural operators to simulate subdomains that require fine meshes in FEM. In each subdomain, a neural operator is used to build a single element, namely, a neural-operator element (NOE). NOEs are then integrated with standard finite elements to represent the entire solution through the variational framework. Thereby, NOEM does not necessitate dense meshing and offers efficient simulations. We demonstrate the accuracy, efficiency and scalability of NOEM by performing systematic theoretical analysis and numerical experiments, such as nonlinear PDEs, multiscale problems, PDEs on complex geometries and discontinuous coefficient fields.

93

Large language model-enabled automated data extraction for concrete materials informatics#

📚 arXiv👤 Zhanzhao Li, Kengran Yang, Qiyao He, Kai Gong📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出一种可泛化的大语言模型驱动自动化流程，突破非结构化文献数据提取瓶颈，以混凝土为实例实现F₁达0.97的高精度信息抽取，一小时构建万级规模开放数据库，验证大规模多样化数据对机器学习泛化能力的关键
arXiv:2604.22938v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 数据驱动材料发现的潜力仍受限于大规模、高质量且可获取的实验数据集的稀缺。本文介绍一种可泛化的大语言模型（LLM）驱动的自动化流程，用于从非结构化科学文献中提取并结构化材料数据，并以混凝土材料作为代表性且极具挑战性的实例。该流程在广泛的LLM中均表现出稳健性能，对多种成分-工艺-性能属性的F₁分数高达0.97。在一小时内，该流程从超过27,000篇出版物中筛选提取了近9,00…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22938v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 数据驱动材料发现的潜力仍受限于大规模、高质量且可获取的实验数据集的稀缺。本文介绍一种可泛化的大语言模型（LLM）驱动的自动化流程，用于从非结构化科学文献中提取并结构化材料数据，并以混凝土材料作为代表性且极具挑战性的实例。该流程在广泛的LLM中均表现出稳健性能，对多种成分-工艺-性能属性的F₁分数高达0.97。在一小时内，该流程从超过27,000篇出版物中筛选提取了近9,000条包含100余种属性的高质量记录，构建了最大的开放实验室级掺合料水泥混凝土数据库。机器学习分析强调了大规模、多样化且信息丰富的数据集对于提升分布内准确性和对未见材料的分布外泛化能力的重要性。所提出的流程可便捷地适配其他材料领域，加速材料信息学可扩展数据基础设施的发展。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22938v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The promise of data-driven materials discovery remains constrained by the scarcity of large, high-quality, and accessible experimental datasets. Here, we introduce a generalizable large language model (LLM)-powered pipeline for automated extraction and structuring of materials data from unstructured scientific literature, using concrete materials as a representative and particularly challenging example. The pipeline exhibits robust performance across a broad range of LLMs and achieves an F₁ score of up to 0.97 for diverse composition--process--property attributes. Within one hour, it extracts nearly 9,000 high-quality records with over 100 attributes screened from more than 27,000 publications, enabling the construction of the largest open laboratory database for blended cement concrete. Machine learning analyses underscore the importance of large, diverse, and information-rich datasets for enhancing both in-distribution accuracy and out-of-distribution generalization to unseen materials. The proposed pipeline is readily adaptable to other materials domains and accelerates the development of scalable data infrastructures for materials informatics.

94

From Data-Driven Models to Physical Insight: Vibrational Entropy Governed by Atomic Volume#

📚 arXiv👤 Shivam Tripathi, Jatin Kawatra, Varun Malviya, Krishna Mehta📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习

arXiv:2604.23369v1 公告类型: 新论文 摘要: 振动熵在决定材料的相稳定性和温度依赖行为方面起着核心作用，然而基于第一性原理声子方法的计算仍十分耗时。本工作结合数据驱动建模与物理启发的分析，发展了一种高效且可解释的振动熵预测框架。利用源自PhononDB的数据集，基于Materials Project和成分描述符训练的前馈神经网络实现了高预测精度，同时SHAP分析识别出原子体积为控制振动熵的主导因素。受此启发，构建了…
