页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.23841v1 公告类型：新
摘要：在现实工业应用中高效求解作业车间调度问题，需要计算轻量且拓扑鲁棒的策略。虽然强化学习在自动化分派规则方面展现出潜力，但现有模型常因二次图复杂度或异构层的架构开销而遭遇可扩展性瓶颈。我们提出一种统一图框架，采用基于特征的同构化方法将不同节点角色投影到共享隐空间。这使得标准同质图同构网络能够以线性复杂度捕获复杂资源竞争，确保大规模工业应用的低延迟推理。我们的实证结果表明，该框架达到最优性能，并展现出一致的零样本泛化能力。我们发现工件-机器比是策略有效性的主要驱动因素，而非绝对问题规模。基于此，我们提出结构饱和假说，证明在临界拥堵实例（J≈M）上训练的策略学习到了尺度不变的求解策略。在该饱和点训练的智能体内化了不变的冲突消解逻辑，使其能够将大规模矩形实例视为饱和子问题的序列拼接。该方法消除了代价高昂的特定尺度再训练需求，并防止对统计捷径的过拟合，为在动态生产环境中部署强化学习解决方案提供了鲁棒且高效的途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.23841v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Efficiently solving the Job Shop Scheduling Problem in real-world industrial applications requires policies that are both computationally lean and topologically robust. While Reinforcement Learning has shown potential in automating dispatching rules, existing models often struggle with a scalability bottleneck caused by quadratic graph complexity or the architectural overhead of heterogeneous layers. We introduce a unified graph framework that employs feature-based homogenization to project distinct node roles into a shared latent space. This allows a standard homogeneous Graph Isomorphism Network to capture complex resource contention with linear complexity, ensuring low-latency inference for large-scale industrial applications. Our empirical results demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance while exhibiting consistent zero-shot generalization. We identify the job-to-machine ratio as the primary driver of policy effectiveness, rather than absolute problem size. Based on this, we propose a hypothesis of structural saturation, demonstrating that policies trained on critically congested instances (J approx M) learn scale-invariant resolution strategies. Agents trained at this saturation point internalize invariant conflict-resolution logic, allowing them to treat massive rectangular instances as a sequential concatenation of saturated sub-problems. This approach eliminates the need for expensive scale-specific retraining and prevents overfitting to statistical shortcuts, providing a robust and efficient pathway for deploying RL solutions in dynamic production environments.

124

Crystal structure prediction using graph neural combinatorial optimization#

📚 arXiv👤 Stavros Gerolymatos, J. Kyle Brubaker, Martin J. A. Schuetz, Vladimir V. Gusev📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文将晶体结构预测转化为图上的组合优化问题，核心创新在于以扩展图编码原子间短程与长程相互作用，并借助Gumbel-Sinkhorn机制实现化学计量比约束下的无监督学习。该方法突破了传统精确优化与启发式
arXiv:2604.23921v1 公告类型：新摘要：晶体材料广泛应用于技术领域，但其发现仍是一项重大挑战。由于材料性质由结构决定，晶体结构预测（CSP）方法在旨在加速这一过程的计算方案中占据核心地位。此前，CSP从组合优化角度进行处理，核心挑战是在晶胞内预定义离散位置的精细网格上分配原子，同时最小化其相互作用能。精确数学优化方法可提供保证解，但对于大规模实例计算成本高昂，此时原子构型空间迅速膨胀，尤其在缺乏额外对称性约束的情况下。…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.23921v1 公告类型：新摘要：晶体材料广泛应用于技术领域，但其发现仍是一项重大挑战。由于材料性质由结构决定，晶体结构预测（CSP）方法在旨在加速这一过程的计算方案中占据核心地位。此前，CSP从组合优化角度进行处理，核心挑战是在晶胞内预定义离散位置的精细网格上分配原子，同时最小化其相互作用能。精确数学优化方法可提供保证解，但对于大规模实例计算成本高昂，此时原子构型空间迅速膨胀，尤其在缺乏额外对称性约束的情况下。本工作中，我们针对原子分配挑战及随后的CSP问题，引入了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的神经组合优化方法，能够以无监督方式有效采样可行结构的分布。我们利用扩展图在离散位置上构建计算图，以捕获原子间的短程和长程相互作用，并采用Gumbel-Sinkhorn方法强制生成结构的期望化学计量比。我们证明，该方法优于经典启发式方法，并在多种化学组成上与商业优化求解器具有竞争力。这使得能够利用不断扩展的GPU基础设施来应对CSP固有的组合挑战，为超越当前能力的规模化铺平道路。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.23921v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Crystalline materials are widely used in technological applications, yet their discovery remains a significant challenge. As their properties are driven by structure, crystal structure prediction (CSP) methods play a central role in computational approaches aiming to accelerate this process. Previously, CSP has been approached from a combinatorial optimization perspective, with the core challenge of allocating atoms on a fine grid of predefined discrete positions within a unit cell while minimizing their interaction energy. Exact mathematical optimization methods provide guaranteed solutions, but they become computationally expensive for large-scale instances, where the atomic configuration space grows rapidly, particularly in the absence of additional symmetry constraints. In this work, we introduce a neural combinatorial optimization approach to the atom allocation challenge and, subsequently, CSP, based on graph neural networks (GNNs), which can effectively sample from the distribution of feasible structures in an unsupervised manner. We leverage expander graphs to construct computational graphs over discrete positions that capture both short- and long-range interactions between atoms, and employ the Gumbel-Sinkhorn approach to enforce the desired stoichiometry of the generated structures. We demonstrate that our method outperforms classical heuristic approaches and is competitive with a commercial optimization solver across a range of chemical compositions. This enables the use of ever-expanding GPU infrastructure to tackle the inherent combinatorial challenges of CSP, paving the way for scaling beyond current capabilities.

125

Progressive Approximation in Deep Residual Networks: Theory and Validation#

📚 arXiv👤 Wei Wang, Xiao-Yong Wei, Qing Li📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究突破传统通用近似定理的黑箱视角，将残差网络重构为误差单调递减的逐层渐进近似过程，提出逐层渐进近似(LPA)训练原则。核心创新在于实现"训练一次，使用N个模型"：单个网络在各深度均可有效推理，无需
arXiv:2604.24154v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 通用近似定理(UAT)保证了通用函数近似能力，但未能解释残差模型如何在各层之间分配近似任务。我们将残差网络重新构建为逐层近似过程，形成从输入到目标的近似轨迹，并证明了渐进轨迹的存在性——即误差随深度单调递减。这表明残差网络能够实现结构化的逐步精化，而非端到端(E2E)的黑箱映射。在此基础上，我们提出逐层渐进近似(LPA)，一种具有理论基础的训练原则，通过显式将每一层与其…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24154v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 通用近似定理(UAT)保证了通用函数近似能力，但未能解释残差模型如何在各层之间分配近似任务。我们将残差网络重新构建为逐层近似过程，形成从输入到目标的近似轨迹，并证明了渐进轨迹的存在性——即误差随深度单调递减。这表明残差网络能够实现结构化的逐步精化，而非端到端(E2E)的黑箱映射。在此基础上，我们提出逐层渐进近似(LPA)，一种具有理论基础的训练原则，通过显式将每一层与其残差目标对齐来实现此类轨迹。LPA具有架构无关性：我们在残差前馈神经网络、ResNet和Transformer中均观察到渐进行为，涵盖复杂曲面拟合、图像分类以及基于大语言模型的生成与分类等自然语言处理任务。关键的是，这实现了"训练一次，使用N个模型"：单个网络在每个深度都能产生有效预测，支持无需重新训练的高效浅层推理。我们的工作将近似理论与实用深度学习相统一，为表示学习提供了新视角，并为多深度部署提供了灵活框架。源代码将在论文接收后于https://(openᵤₚₒₙₐcceptance)发布。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24154v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The Universal Approximation Theorem (UAT) guarantees universal function approximation but does not explain how residual models distribute approximation across layers. We reframe residual networks as a layer-wise approximation process that builds an approximation trajectory from input to target, and prove the existence of progressive trajectories where error decreases monotonically with depth. It reveals that residual networks can implement structured, step-by-step refinement rather than end-to-end (E2E) black-box mapping. Building on this, we propose Layer-wise Progressive Approximation (LPA), a theoretically grounded training principle that explicitly aligns each layer with its residual target to realize such trajectories. LPA is architecture-agnostic: we observe progressive behavior in residual FNNs, ResNets, and Transformers across tasks including complex surface fitting, image classification, and NLP with LLMs for generation and classification. Crucially, this enables ``train once, use N models": a single network yields useful predictions at every depth, supporting efficient shallow inference without retraining. Our work unifies approximation theory with practical deep learning, providing a new lens on representation learning and a flexible framework for multi-depth deployment. The source code will be released unpon acceptance at https://(openᵤₚₒₙₐcceptance).

126

Latent-Hysteresis Graph ODEs: Modeling Coupled Topology-Feature Evolution via Continuous Phase Transitions#

📚 arXiv👤 Qinhan Hou, Jing Tang📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作揭示传统Graph ODE因单稳态陷阱导致长时信息泄漏的致命缺陷，创新性地引入迟滞机制耦合特征-拓扑协同演化，通过双阱势实现边态可微分极化切换，为图神经网络的长程动态建模提供了突破单稳态极限的新
arXiv:2604.24293v1 发布类型：新论文 摘要：图神经常微分方程（Graph ODE）将图学习从离散的消息传递层拓展至连续时间表示流。尽管其支持自适应长程传播，但我们证明：具有严格正不可约混合算子的Graph ODE面临固有的**单稳态陷阱**——在长时极限下，信息泄漏不可避免，动力学收敛至单一的全局共识吸引子。我们提出迟滞图ODE（HGODE），将特征演化与由学习得到的成对力驱动的隐式拓扑势耦合。双阱边势与双极化门控使…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24293v1 发布类型：新论文 摘要：图神经常微分方程（Graph ODE）将图学习从离散的消息传递层拓展至连续时间表示流。尽管其支持自适应长程传播，但我们证明：具有严格正不可约混合算子的Graph ODE面临固有的**单稳态陷阱**——在长时极限下，信息泄漏不可避免，动力学收敛至单一的全局共识吸引子。我们提出迟滞图ODE（HGODE），将特征演化与由学习得到的成对力驱动的隐式拓扑势耦合。双阱边势与双极化门控使边态极化为连通相或绝缘相，同时保持可微性。我们对坍缩机制及所提出的迟滞拓扑动力学进行渐近分析，并在理论驱动的合成诊断数据集与真实图基准上验证HGODE。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24293v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Graph neural ordinary differential equations (Graph ODEs) extend graph learning from discrete message-passing layers to continuous-time representation flows. While it supports adaptive long-range propagation, we show that Graph ODEs with strictly positive irreducible mixing operators face an inherent emphmonostability trap: in the long-time regime, information leakage is unavoidable and the dynamics converge to a single global consensus attractor. We propose the Hysteresis Graph ODE (HGODE), which couples feature evolution with a latent topological potential driven by a learned pairwise force. A double-well edge potential and bipolarized gate allow edge states to polarize into connected or insulated phases while preserving differentiability. We provide asymptotic analysis of the collapse mechanism and the proposed hysteretic topology dynamics, and validate HGODE on theory-driven synthetic diagnostics and real-world graph benchmarks.

127

A Functorial Formulation of Neighborhood Aggregating Deep Learning#

📚 arXiv👤 Sun Woo Park, Yun Young Choi, U Jin Choi, Youngho Woo📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作以拓扑预层/上预层的函子语言重新诠释图神经网络的消息传递机制，将网络表达能力瓶颈转化为层/上层化的拓扑阻碍问题，为理解GNN经验性局限提供了范畴论视角下的系统性理论诊断框架。
arXiv:2604.24672v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：我们利用拓扑空间上连续函数集合的预层与上预层，为卷积（或消息传递）神经网络提供了一种数学诠释。基于这一诠释，我们构建了一个理论启发式框架，借助拓扑空间上此类连续函数集合成为层或上层的阻碍，系统阐释了这些神经网络的若干经验性局限。
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.24672v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：我们利用拓扑空间上连续函数集合的预层与上预层，为卷积（或消息传递）神经网络提供了一种数学诠释。基于这一诠释，我们构建了一个理论启发式框架，借助拓扑空间上此类连续函数集合成为层或上层的阻碍，系统阐释了这些神经网络的若干经验性局限。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.24672v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We provide a mathematical interpretation of convolutional (or message passing) neural networks by using presheaves and copresheaves of the set of continuous functions over a topological space. Based on this interpretation, we formulate a theoretical heuristic which elaborates a number of empirical limitations of these neural networks by using obstructions on such sets of continuous functions over a topological space to be sheaves or copresheaves.

Shape: A Self-Supervised 3D Geometry Foundation Model for Industrial CAD Analysis#

📚 arXiv👤 Bayangmbe Mounmo, Sam Chien, Mile Mitrovic📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：Shape提出首个面向工业CAD的自监督3D几何基础模型，核心创新在于多尺度几何感知分词器MAGNO与结构化隐式网格的协同设计，实现逐区域可解释归因；通过归一化几何统计量的掩码重建预训练策略，仅用10
arXiv:2604.22826v1 公告类型: cross 摘要: 工业CAD工作流需要鲁棒、可泛化的三维几何表示，以支持准确性与可解释性。我们提出Shape，一种自监督基础模型，将表面网格转换为稠密的逐token嵌入。Shape结合结构化三维隐式网格、带交叉注意力的多尺度几何感知分词器（MAGNO），以及采用分组查询注意力与RMSNorm的Transformer处理器。可学习的重建先验支持逐区域归因，实现可解释预测。预训练采用归一…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22826v1 公告类型: cross 摘要: 工业CAD工作流需要鲁棒、可泛化的三维几何表示，以支持准确性与可解释性。我们提出Shape，一种自监督基础模型，将表面网格转换为稠密的逐token嵌入。Shape结合结构化三维隐式网格、带交叉注意力的多尺度几何感知分词器（MAGNO），以及采用分组查询注意力与RMSNorm的Transformer处理器。可学习的重建先验支持逐区域归因，实现可解释预测。预训练采用归一化几何统计量的掩码token重建与多分辨率对比一致性。10.9M参数的主干网络在Thingi10K、MFCAD和Fusion360的61,052个CAD网格上进行预训练。在2,983个网格的留出测试集上，Shape实现重建R²=0.729，并在Wang-Isola协议下达到98.1%的top-1检索准确率，重建训练/验证差距近乎为零（对比分数使用更大的评估池）。对损失类型与目标空间归一化的2×2消融实验表明，逐维度归一化至关重要：缺失时性能崩溃（R²<0.70，top-1<96%）。Smooth-L1提供次要的稳定性。代码、嵌入及交互式演示已发布于https://github.com/simd-ai/shape。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22826v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Industrial CAD workflows require robust, generalizable 3D geometric representations supporting accuracy and explainability. We introduce Shape, a self-supervised foundation model converting surface meshes into dense per-token embeddings. Shape combines a structured 3D latent grid, a multi-scale geometry-aware tokenizer (MAGNO) with cross-attention, and a transformer processor using grouped-query attention and RMSNorm. A learned reconstruction prior enables per-region attribution for explainable predictions. Pretraining uses masked-token reconstruction of normalized geometry statistics and multi-resolution contrastive consistency. The 10.9M-parameter backbone is pretrained on 61,052 CAD meshes from Thingi10K, MFCAD, and Fusion360. On a held-out split of 2,983 meshes, Shape achieves reconstruction R2 = 0.729 and 98.1% top-1 retrieval under the Wang-Isola protocol, with near-zero reconstruction train/val gap (contrastive scores use a larger evaluation pool). A 2x2 ablation on loss type and target-space normalization shows per-dimension normalization is critical: without it, performance collapses (R2 < 0.14, top-1 < 88%); with it, both losses succeed (R2 > 0.70, top-1 > 96%). Smooth-L1 offers secondary stability. Code, embeddings, and an interactive demo are released at https://github.com/simd-ai/shape.

129

Accelerating New Product Introduction for Visual Quality Inspection via Few-Shot Diffusion-Based Defect Synthesis#

📚 arXiv👤 Serkan Hamdi Güğül, Kemal Levi, Burak Acar📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作针对新产品导入阶段缺陷样本稀缺的痛点，创新性地将掩码文本反演、噪声混合生成与梯度感知融合相结合，实现缺陷形态与背景解耦，在零样本跨域迁移场景取得85.1% mAP，为工业视觉检测的 rapid
arXiv:2604.22850v1 发布类型：交叉 摘要：工业视觉检测系统常面临标注缺陷数据严重稀缺的问题，特别是在新产品导入（NPI）早期阶段。这一限制阻碍了鲁棒监督检测器的部署，而恰恰此时最需要自动化质量控制。我们提出了一种端到端的高保真少样本缺陷生成框架，可同时实现域内增强与跨域迁移。该方法通过结合掩码文本反演进行缺陷表征学习、噪声混合条件生成实现表面感知合成、以及梯度感知后处理实现无缝视觉融合，将缺陷形态与背景外观解耦。我们…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22850v1 发布类型：交叉 摘要：工业视觉检测系统常面临标注缺陷数据严重稀缺的问题，特别是在新产品导入（NPI）早期阶段。这一限制阻碍了鲁棒监督检测器的部署，而恰恰此时最需要自动化质量控制。我们提出了一种端到端的高保真少样本缺陷生成框架，可同时实现域内增强与跨域迁移。该方法通过结合掩码文本反演进行缺陷表征学习、噪声混合条件生成实现表面感知合成、以及梯度感知后处理实现无缝视觉融合，将缺陷形态与背景外观解耦。我们在两个实际相关场景中评估该框架：少样本数据增强场景，其中合成样本扩充少量真实缺陷；零样本适应场景，其中从源域学习的缺陷迁移至新目标表面，且无需任何真实目标域缺陷样本。使用RF-DETR作为下游检测器，我们在私有工业数据集上表明所提流程显著缩小了域差距。在少样本设置中，合成增强将mAP从78.8%提升至83.3%。在零样本设置中，合成域适应将mAP从65.0%提升至85.1%。这些结果表明，高保真缺陷合成能够通过在收集到充足真实缺陷数据前实现有效检测模型，从而实质性加速NPI进程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22850v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Industrial visual inspection systems often suffer from a severe scarcity of labeled defect data, particularly during the early stages of New Product Introduction (NPI). This limitation hinders the deployment of robust supervised detectors precisely when automated quality control is most needed. We present an end-to-end generative framework for high-fidelity, few-shot defect synthesis that enables both in-domain augmentation and cross-domain transfer. Our approach disentangles defect morphology from background appearance by combining masked textual inversion for defect representation learning, noise-blended conditioned generation for surface-aware synthesis, and gradient-aware post-processing for seamless visual integration. We evaluate the framework in two practically relevant settings: few-shot data augmentation, where synthetic samples enrich a small set of real defects, and zero-shot adaptation, where defects learned from a source domain are transferred to a novel target surface without any real target-domain defect examples. Using RF-DETR as the downstream detector, we show that the proposed pipeline substantially narrows the domain gap on a private industrial dataset. In the few-shot setting, synthetic augmentation improves mAP from 78.8% to 83.3%. In the zero-shot setting, synthetic domain adaptation improves mAP from 65.0% to 85.1%. These results demonstrate that high-fidelity defect synthesis can meaningfully accelerate NPI by enabling effective inspection models before sufficient real defect data has been collected.

MCMC with Adaptive Principal-Component Transformation: Rotation-Invariant Universal Samplers for Bayesian Structural System Identification#

📚 arXiv👤 Xianghao Meng, Yong Huang, James L. Beck, Kui Jiang, Hui Li📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出APM-SGHMC算法，通过自适应主成分变换实现参数空间旋转不变性，融合平移与尺度不变性，突破传统元学习MCMC对训练-测试任务相似性的依赖。核心创新在于以几何对称性替代网络设计权衡，使通用采
arXiv:2604.23381v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：数十年来，马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）方法得到广泛研究，其典型应用为结构动力学模型贝叶斯系统识别中的后验不确定性量化。针对通用MCMC方法应用于特定问题时采样效率过低的问题，研究者开发了多种将可训练神经网络集成以替代和增强其关键组件的MCMC算法。随后，元学习MCMC方法涌现以减少训练时间。然而，这类方法要求测试任务与训练任务具有高度相似性，且其采样效率受限于网络设计的权衡…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.23381v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：数十年来，马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）方法得到广泛研究，其典型应用为结构动力学模型贝叶斯系统识别中的后验不确定性量化。针对通用MCMC方法应用于特定问题时采样效率过低的问题，研究者开发了多种将可训练神经网络集成以替代和增强其关键组件的MCMC算法。随后，元学习MCMC方法涌现以减少训练时间。然而，这类方法要求测试任务与训练任务具有高度相似性，且其采样效率受限于网络设计的权衡简化。本文提出自适应主成分（PC）元学习随机梯度哈密顿蒙特卡洛（APM-SGHMC）算法。该算法自适应旋转参数空间中的坐标轴，使其与当前后验样本的主成分方向对齐，确保采样性能相对于后验分布的旋转不变性。通过在统一框架中融合平移不变性、尺度不变性和旋转不变性，APM-SGHMC使通用采样器能够利用极简任务获取跨多样贝叶斯系统识别任务的可泛化知识，同时消除网络设计权衡对采样效率的约束。实际可行性问题亦得到解决。两个贝叶斯系统识别案例研究验证了其有效性与普适性：本方法克服了传统数据驱动方法的逐案例局限，在结构迥异的模型间实现免重新训练的零样本泛化，并在所有场景中保持一致的优越性能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.23381v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Over decades, Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods have been widely studied, with a typical application being the quantification of posterior uncertainties in Bayesian system identification of structural dynamic models. To address the issue of excessively low sampling efficiency in generic MCMC methods when applied to specific problems, researchers developed several MCMC algorithms that integrate trainable neural networks to replace and enhance their critical components. Later, meta-learning MCMC methods emerged to reduce training time. However, they require considerable similarity between test and training tasks, while their sampling efficiency is constrained by trade-off-simplified network designs. This paper proposes the Adaptive Principal-Component (PC) Meta-learning Stochastic Gradient Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (APM-SGHMC) algorithm. It adaptively rotates coordinate axes in the parameter space to align with the PC directions of the current posterior samples, ensuring rotation-invariance of sampling performance with respect to the posterior distribution. By incorporating translation-invariance, scale-invariance, and rotation-invariance in a unified framework, APM-SGHMC enables universal samplers to acquire generalizable knowledge across diverse Bayesian system identification tasks using minimalistic tasks while eliminating the constraints imposed by network design trade-offs on sampling efficiency. Practical feasibility issues are also addressed. Two Bayesian system identification case studies demonstrate its effectiveness and universality: our method overcomes the case-by-case limitations of traditional data-driven approaches, achieving zero-shot generalization across structurally distinct models without retraining and maintaining consistent superior performance across all scenarios.

131

Bayesian Optimization for Function-Valued Responses under Min-Max Criteria#

📚 arXiv👤 Pouya Ahadi, Reza Marzban, Ali Adibi, Kamran Paynabar📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出MM-FBO框架，以极小-极大准则直接优化泛函响应的最坏情况误差，突破现有方法仅关注平均性能的局限。通过泛函主成分分析与积分不确定性采集函数，实现泛函域上的自适应探索-利用权衡，为超构光子器件等关
arXiv:2512.07868v2 公告类型: 替换交叉 摘要: 贝叶斯优化被广泛用于优化昂贵的黑箱函数，但大多数现有方法聚焦于标量响应。在许多科学与工程场景中，响应是泛函性的，随时间或波长等索引平滑变化，这使得经典形式不再适用。现有方法通常最小化积分误差，这能捕捉平均性能但忽略最坏情况偏差。为克服这一局限，我们提出极小-极大泛函贝叶斯优化(MM-FBO)，该框架直接最小化泛函域上的最大误差。泛函响应采用泛函主成分分析表示，并为主成…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2512.07868v2 公告类型: 替换交叉 摘要: 贝叶斯优化被广泛用于优化昂贵的黑箱函数，但大多数现有方法聚焦于标量响应。在许多科学与工程场景中，响应是泛函性的，随时间或波长等索引平滑变化，这使得经典形式不再适用。现有方法通常最小化积分误差，这能捕捉平均性能但忽略最坏情况偏差。为克服这一局限，我们提出极小-极大泛函贝叶斯优化(MM-FBO)，该框架直接最小化泛函域上的最大误差。泛函响应采用泛函主成分分析表示，并为主成分得分构建高斯过程代理模型。基于这一表示，MM-FBO引入积分不确定性采集函数，在最坏情况期望误差的利用与泛函域上的探索之间取得平衡。我们提供两项理论保证：最坏情况目标的离散化界，以及一致性结果——当代理模型趋于精确且不确定性消失时，采集函数收敛至真实极小-极大目标。我们通过合成基准测试及物理启发的案例研究验证该方法，案例涉及超构光子器件的电磁散射和气相渗透。结果表明，MM-FBO始终优于现有基线方法，并凸显了在贝叶斯优化中显式建模泛函不确定性的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2512.07868v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Bayesian optimization is widely used for optimizing expensive black box functions, but most existing approaches focus on scalar responses. In many scientific and engineering settings the response is functional, varying smoothly over an index such as time or wavelength, which makes classical formulations inadequate. Existing methods often minimize integrated error, which captures average performance but neglects worst case deviations. To address this limitation we propose min-max Functional Bayesian Optimization (MM-FBO), a framework that directly minimizes the maximum error across the functional domain. Functional responses are represented using functional principal component analysis, and Gaussian process surrogates are constructed for the principal component scores. Building on this representation, MM-FBO introduces an integrated uncertainty acquisition function that balances exploitation of worst case expected error with exploration across the functional domain. We provide two theoretical guarantees: a discretization bound for the worst case objective, and a consistency result showing that as the surrogate becomes accurate and uncertainty vanishes, the acquisition converges to the true min-max objective. We validate the method through experiments on synthetic benchmarks and physics inspired case studies involving electromagnetic scattering by metaphotonic devices and vapor phase infiltration. Results show that MM-FBO consistently outperforms existing baselines and highlights the importance of explicitly modeling functional uncertainty in Bayesian optimization.

132

FormalScience: Scalable Human-in-the-Loop Autoformalisation of Science with Agentic Code Generation in Lean#

📚 arXiv👤 Jordan Meadows, Lan Zhang, Andre Freitas📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出FormalScience人机协同智能体框架，突破物理领域专用符号的形式化瓶颈，构建首个大学物理Lean4形式化数据集FormalPhysics，实现完全形式有效性与高命题复杂度，为科学知识的可验
arXiv:2604.23002v1 公告类型：新摘要：将非形式化数学推理转化为可形式化验证的代码，是大语言模型面临的重大挑战。在物理学等科学领域，领域专用工具（如狄拉克符号、矢量微积分）带来了额外的形式化挑战，而现代大语言模型和智能体方法尚未解决这些问题。为助力科学领域的自动形式化，我们提出FormalScience；这是一种领域无关的人机协同智能体流程，使单一领域专家（无需深厚的形式语言经验）能够以较低经济成本生成语法正确且语义对…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.23002v1 公告类型：新摘要：将非形式化数学推理转化为可形式化验证的代码，是大语言模型面临的重大挑战。在物理学等科学领域，领域专用工具（如狄拉克符号、矢量微积分）带来了额外的形式化挑战，而现代大语言模型和智能体方法尚未解决这些问题。为助力科学领域的自动形式化，我们提出FormalScience；这是一种领域无关的人机协同智能体流程，使单一领域专家（无需深厚的形式语言经验）能够以较低经济成本生成语法正确且语义对齐的非形式化推理的形式化证明。将FormalScience应用于物理学，我们构建了FormalPhysics——一个包含200道大学水平（LaTeX）物理问题及解答（主要为量子力学和电磁学）的数据集，以及相应的Lean4形式化表示。与现有形式化数学基准相比，FormalPhysics实现了完全的形式有效性，并表现出更高的命题复杂度。我们通过零样本提示、基于错误反馈的自我优化，以及一种新颖的多阶段智能体方法，在数据集上的命题自动形式化任务中评估了开源模型和专有系统，并探索了现代基于大语言模型方法的自动形式化局限性。我们从符号坍缩和抽象层级提升等概念出发，首次系统刻画了物理学自动形式化中的语义漂移，揭示了当完全语义保留无法实现时，形式语言实际验证的内容。我们发布了代码库以及基于交互式界面的FormalScience系统，以促进物理学以外科学领域的自动形式化和定理证明。https://github.com/jmeadows17/formal-science

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.23002v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Formalising informal mathematical reasoning into formally verifiable code is a significant challenge for large language models. In scientific fields such as physics, domain-specific machinery (e.g. Dirac notation, vector calculus) imposes additional formalisation challenges that modern LLMs and agentic approaches have yet to tackle. To aid autoformalisation in scientific domains, we present FormalScience; a domain-agnostic human-in-the-loop agentic pipeline that enables a single domain expert (without deep formal language experience) to produce syntactically correct and semantically aligned formal proofs of informal reasoning for low economic cost. Applying FormalScience to physics, we construct FormalPhysics, a dataset of 200 university-level (LaTeX) physics problems and solutions (primarily quantum mechanics and electromagnetism), along with their Lean4 formal representations. Compared to existing formal math benchmarks, FormalPhysics achieves perfect formal validity and exhibits greater statement complexity. We evaluate open-source models and proprietary systems on a statement autoformalisation task on our dataset via zero-shot prompting, self-refinement with error feedback, and a novel multi-stage agentic approach, and explore autoformalisation limitations in modern LLM-based approaches. We provide the first systematic characterisation of semantic drift in physics autoformalisation in terms of concepts such as notational collapse and abstraction elevation which reveals what formal language verifies when full semantic preservation is unattainable. We release the codebase together with an interactive UI-based FormalScience system which facilitates autoformalisation and theorem proving in scientific domains beyond physics.https://github.com/jmeadows17/formal-science

133

Optimal Experimental Design for Reliable Learning of History-Dependent Constitutive Laws#

📚 arXiv👤 Kaushik Bhattacharya, Lianghao Cao, Andrew Stuart📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对历史相关本构模型参数识别不可靠的难题，该研究构建了贝叶斯最优实验设计框架，创新性地引入期望信息增益的高斯近似与Fisher信息矩阵的替代近似两种高效计算方法，突破了昂贵正向模型与高维数据的计算瓶颈
arXiv:2603.12365v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：历史相关本构模型作为微观力学聚合效应的宏观封闭。其参数通常从实验数据中学习。在实验预算有限的情况下，激发表征本构关系所需的完整响应范围可能很困难。因此，数据可以被一系列参数选择很好地解释，导致参数估计不确定或不可靠。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种贝叶斯最优实验设计框架，用于量化、解释和最大化实验设计在历史相关本构模型可靠学习中的效用。在该框架中，设计效用定义为参数不确定性的期…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2603.12365v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：历史相关本构模型作为微观力学聚合效应的宏观封闭。其参数通常从实验数据中学习。在实验预算有限的情况下，激发表征本构关系所需的完整响应范围可能很困难。因此，数据可以被一系列参数选择很好地解释，导致参数估计不确定或不可靠。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种贝叶斯最优实验设计框架，用于量化、解释和最大化实验设计在历史相关本构模型可靠学习中的效用。在该框架中，设计效用定义为参数不确定性的期望降低或期望信息增益。这使得能够利用模拟数据进行计算设计优化，并降低物理实验在可靠参数识别中的成本。我们引入了两种近似，使该框架适用于具有昂贵正向模型和高维数据的先进材料测试：（i）期望信息增益的高斯近似，（ii）Fisher信息矩阵的替代近似。前者实现高效的设计优化和解释，后者通过摊销重复效用评估的成本将该方法扩展到批量设计优化。我们对粘弹性固体单轴试验的数值研究表明，优化的试样几何形状和加载路径产生的图像和力数据显著改善了参数可识别性，相对于随机设计而言，尤其是与记忆效应相关的参数。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.12365v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: History-dependent constitutive models serve as macroscopic closures for the aggregated effects of micromechanics. Their parameters are typically learned from experimental data. With a limited experimental budget, eliciting the full range of responses needed to characterize the constitutive relation can be difficult. As a result, the data can be well explained by a range of parameter choices, leading to parameter estimates that are uncertain or unreliable. To address this issue, we propose a Bayesian optimal experimental design framework to quantify, interpret, and maximize the utility of experimental designs for reliable learning of history-dependent constitutive models. In this framework, the design utility is defined as the expected reduction in parametric uncertainty or the expected information gain. This enables in silico design optimization using simulated data and reduces the cost of physical experiments for reliable parameter identification. We introduce two approximations that make this framework practical for advanced material testing with expensive forward models and high-dimensional data: (i) a Gaussian approximation of the expected information gain, and (ii) a surrogate approximation of the Fisher information matrix. The former enables efficient design optimization and interpretation, while the latter extends this approach to batched design optimization by amortizing the cost of repeated utility evaluations. Our numerical studies of uniaxial tests for viscoelastic solids show that optimized specimen geometries and loading paths yield image and force data that significantly improve parameter identifiability relative to random designs, especially for parameters associated with memory effects.

134

Neural networks as low-cost surrogates for impurity solvers in quantum embedding methods#

📚 arXiv👤 Rohan Nain, Philip M. Dee, Kipton Barros, Steven Johnston, Thomas A. Maier📅 2026-04-28🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作核心创新在于突破数据瓶颈：以极少样本（降低1-2个数量级）训练神经网络替代动力学平均场理论中的CT-QMC杂质求解器，实现相当精度；更关键的是利用其外推结果作为高质量初猜，将精确求解加速5倍，为
arXiv:2603.25557v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：机器学习的一个有前景的应用是构建低成本的替代模型，以缓解量子多体模拟中的计算瓶颈。本文探索了神经网络（NN）能否在低数据量条件下进行训练——训练样本比先前工作少一到两个数量级——作为动力学平均场理论模拟关联电子模型中杂质求解器的有效替代。我们发现，当在训练集样本之间进行插值时，NN求解器达到了与常用的连续时间量子蒙特卡洛（CT-QMC）杂质求解器相当的精度。虽然当外推到训练分…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2603.25557v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：机器学习的一个有前景的应用是构建低成本的替代模型，以缓解量子多体模拟中的计算瓶颈。本文探索了神经网络（NN）能否在低数据量条件下进行训练——训练样本比先前工作少一到两个数量级——作为动力学平均场理论模拟关联电子模型中杂质求解器的有效替代。我们发现，当在训练集样本之间进行插值时，NN求解器达到了与常用的连续时间量子蒙特卡洛（CT-QMC）杂质求解器相当的精度。虽然当外推到训练分布之外的更低温度时，NN的性能显著下降，但其输出仍可为更精确的CT-QMC杂质求解器提供极佳的初始猜测，从而将求解时间加速高达五倍。我们在快速相空间探索的背景下讨论了这些结果。

English Abstract

arXiv:2603.25557v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A promising application of machine learning is the creation of low-cost surrogate models to mitigate computational bottlenecks in quantum many-body simulations. Here, we explore whether a neural network (NN) can be trained in the low-data regime, with one to two orders of magnitude fewer training examples than previous works, as an efficient substitute for the impurity solver in dynamical mean-field theory simulations of correlated electron models. We show that the NN solver achieves accuracy comparable to popular continuous-time quantum Monte Carlo (CT-QMC) impurity solvers when interpolating between samples within the training set. While the NN's performance decreases notably when extrapolating to lower temperatures outside the training distribution, its output still provides an excellent initial guess for input to more accurate CT-QMC impurity solvers, thus accelerating the time to solution up to a factor of five. We discuss our results in the context of rapid phase-space exploration.

135

Dynamic Moiré Potentials and Robust Wigner Crystallization in Large-Scale Twisted Transition Metal Dichalcogenides#

📚 arXiv👤 Yifan Ke, Chuanjing Zeng, Xinming Qin, Wei-Lin Tu, Wei Hu, Jinglong Yang📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作创新性地将DeePMD-DeepH机器学习框架与第一性原理计算相结合，突破了大规模转角TMD体系的动力学模拟瓶颈。核心发现是晶格振动与弛豫会显著加深莫尔势阱并促进电子强局域化，进而诱导出稳健的维
arXiv:2604.22343v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 理解大尺度莫尔系统的动力学演化对于连接理论预测与实验观测至关重要。本研究开发了一套基于机器学习的工作流程，将DeePMD和DeepH框架与第一性原理计算相结合，以高效研究具有实验相关莫尔超胞（包含超过3000个原子）的转角双层过渡金属硫族化合物（TMDs）中的时间依赖结构响应与电子响应。以WS₂为典型体系，我们发现低温晶格振动与弛豫加深了莫尔势阱，收窄了最低导带，并促进了强…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22343v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 理解大尺度莫尔系统的动力学演化对于连接理论预测与实验观测至关重要。本研究开发了一套基于机器学习的工作流程，将DeePMD和DeepH框架与第一性原理计算相结合，以高效研究具有实验相关莫尔超胞（包含超过3000个原子）的转角双层过渡金属硫族化合物（TMDs）中的时间依赖结构响应与电子响应。以WS₂为典型体系，我们发现低温晶格振动与弛豫加深了莫尔势阱，收窄了最低导带，并促进了强局域电子态的形成。基于包含这些动力学效应的密度泛函理论（DFT）导出的莫尔势，密度矩阵重整化群（DMRG）模拟揭示了稳健的维格纳晶化以及一种笼目（kagomé）图案的三电子态，与近期实验观测一致。我们的工作流程为探索超越静态构型的大莫尔超胞提供了实用途径，并为转角二维材料中晶格动力学、电子局域化与涌现关联态之间的相互作用提供了新见解。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22343v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding the dynamical evolution of large-scale moiré systems is crucial for connecting theoretical predictions with experimental observations. Here we develop a machine-learning-based workflow, integrating DeePMD and DeepH frameworks with first-principles calculations, to efficiently investigate time-dependent structural and electronic responses in twisted bilayer transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) with experimentally relevant moiré supercells containing over 3000 atoms. Using WS₂ as a representative system, we show that low-temperature lattice vibrations and relaxation deepen the moiré potential wells, narrow the lowest conduction band, and facilitate the formation of strongly localized electronic states. Based on DFT-derived moiré potentials that incorporate these dynamical effects, density-matrix-renormalization-group (DMRG) simulations reveal robust Wigner crystallization and a kagomé-patterned three-electron state, consistent with recent experimental observations. Our workflow provides a practical route for exploring large moiré supercells beyond static configurations and offers new insight into the interplay between lattice dynamics, electronic localization, and emergent correlated states in twisted two-dimensional materials.

Pressure-Temperature Phase Diagram and łambda-Transition in Liquid Sulfur#

📚 arXiv👤 Sonia Salomoni, Frédéric Datchi, A. Marco Saitta, Arthur France-Lanord📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究基于机器学习势函数分子动力学，首次在原子尺度揭示了硫λ相变的微观机制：非S₈环作为反应中心触发聚合，阐明了聚合与熔化的竞争关系，重构了聚合相图并发现聚合温度随压强降低最终与熔线在临界点合并，为理
arXiv:2604.22696v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：利用机器学习原子间势驱动的分子动力学模拟，我们在低至中等压强下研究了硫的λ相变，即一种温度诱导的聚合过程。在环境压强下，我们捕捉到晶体环八硫熔化为分子环液体的过程。在此液体中，非S₈环的浓度随温度升高而增加；我们证明这些分子充当反应中心，最终触发聚合。我们重现了λ相变的关键实验特征，包括热容的急剧跃升以及转变温度对升温速率的显著依赖性。在此基础上，我们重构了直至中等压强的聚合…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22696v1 公告类型：交叉 摘要：利用机器学习原子间势驱动的分子动力学模拟，我们在低至中等压强下研究了硫的λ相变，即一种温度诱导的聚合过程。在环境压强下，我们捕捉到晶体环八硫熔化为分子环液体的过程。在此液体中，非S₈环的浓度随温度升高而增加；我们证明这些分子充当反应中心，最终触发聚合。我们重现了λ相变的关键实验特征，包括热容的急剧跃升以及转变温度对升温速率的显著依赖性。在此基础上，我们重构了直至中等压强的聚合相图。我们的结果显示聚合温度随压强适度降低，最终与熔线在临界点处合并。超过该点后，我们提供了聚合直接从晶相出现的直接证据。通过分析升温轨迹，我们观察到非S₈环、开链及保留晶相排列特征的扩展聚合物结构的形成；进一步加热体系导致无序通过熔化占据主导。因此，聚合在熔化之前稍早启动。总之，我们的发现为硫相图中λ相变提供了微观图像。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22696v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Using molecular dynamics simulations driven by a machine-learned interatomic potential, we investigate at low to intermediate pressures the łambda-transition of sulfur, a temperature-induced polymerization. At ambient pressure, we capture the melting of crystalline cyclo-octasulfur into a liquid of molecular rings. Within this liquid, the concentration of non-S₈ rings increases with temperature; we show that these molecules act as reactive centers, which eventually trigger polymerization. We reproduce key experimental signatures of the łambda-transition, including the sharp increase in heat capacity and the pronounced dependence of the transition temperature on the heating rate. Building on this, we reconstruct a phase diagram of polymerization up to intermediate pressures. Our results reveal a moderate decrease of the polymerization temperature with pressure, culminating with its merging with the melting line at a critical point. Beyond this point, we provide direct evidence of polymerization emerging from the crystalline phase. By analyzing temperature-ramp trajectories, we observe the formation of non-S₈ rings, open chains, and extended polymeric structures which retain features of the crystalline arrangement; further heating the system leads to disorder taking over through melting. Polymerization is therefore initiated slightly before melting. Altogether, our findings provide a microscopic picture of the łambda-transition throughout the sulfur phase diagram.

Neural Wave Functions for High-Pressure Atomic Hydrogen#

📚 arXiv👤 David Linteau, Saverio Moroni, Giuseppe Carleo, Markus Holzmann📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作首次将神经量子态同时应用于电子与质子自由度，以无预设对称性的变分框架突破了传统投影蒙特卡洛的尺度与效率瓶颈，为高压氢的量子晶体结构及压致熔化相变提供了超越玻恩-奥本海默近似的高精度理论工具。
arXiv:2504.07062v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们利用神经量子态来描述固态和液态原子氢的基态波函数，同时包含电子和质子自由度。对于静态质子，所得到的玻恩-奥本海默能量与此前所有投影蒙特卡洛结果相比，在含有多达128个氢原子的体系中始终相当或更低。在纳入核量子效应后，同样水平的精度得以保持，从而超越了玻恩-奥本海默近似。此外，我们的描述克服了现有波函数的主要局限性， notably 避免了对预期量子晶体的任何显式对称性假设…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2504.07062v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：我们利用神经量子态来描述固态和液态原子氢的基态波函数，同时包含电子和质子自由度。对于静态质子，所得到的玻恩-奥本海默能量与此前所有投影蒙特卡洛结果相比，在含有多达128个氢原子的体系中始终相当或更低。在纳入核量子效应后，同样水平的精度得以保持，从而超越了玻恩-奥本海默近似。此外，我们的描述克服了现有波函数的主要局限性， notably 避免了对预期量子晶体的任何显式对称性假设，并规避了不同质量尺度下虚时演化的效率问题。作为首个应用，我们研究了极高密度区域中直至压致熔化的晶体形成过程。

English Abstract

arXiv:2504.07062v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We leverage the power of neural quantum states to describe the ground state wave function of solid and liquid atomic hydrogen, including both electronic and protonic degrees of freedom. For static protons, the resulting Born-Oppenheimer energies are consistently comparable to or lower than all previous projector Monte Carlo results for systems containing up to 128 hydrogen atoms. The same level of accuracy is preserved upon inclusion of nuclear quantum effects, thus going beyond the Born-Oppenheimer approximation. In addition, our description overcomes major limitations of current wave functions, notably by avoiding any explicit symmetry assumption on the expected quantum crystal, and sidestepping efficiency issues of imaginary time evolution with disparate mass scales. As a first application, we examine crystal formation in an extremely high-density region up to pressure-induced melting.

Halide diffusion in mixed-halide perovskites and heterojunctions#

AI 解读：该研究创新性地采用神经网络势函数开展大尺度分子动力学模拟，揭示了混合卤素钙钛矿中卤素缺陷扩散增强及离子选择性迁移的新机制，发现异质结界面化学组成对跨界面离子输运具有决定性调控作用。这一工作为理解混合卤
arXiv:2601.11503v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：卤素缺陷的迁移主导金属卤化物钙钛矿中的离子输运，并控制卤素混合与相分离的动力学。我们利用基于密度泛函理论计算训练的神经网络势，通过分子动力学模拟研究了CsPb(IₓBr₁₋ₓ)₃和CsPbI₃/CsPbBr₃异质结中卤素空位和间隙原子的扩散。我们发现混合卤素化合物中空位和间隙原子的扩散均强于单一卤素化合物，且混合化合物中Br⁻和I⁻离子的迁移率存在差异。异质结中的跨界面扩散受…

中文摘要

arXiv:2601.11503v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：卤素缺陷的迁移主导金属卤化物钙钛矿中的离子输运，并控制卤素混合与相分离的动力学。我们利用基于密度泛函理论计算训练的神经网络势，通过分子动力学模拟研究了CsPb(IₓBr₁₋ₓ)₃和CsPbI₃/CsPbBr₃异质结中卤素空位和间隙原子的扩散。我们发现混合卤素化合物中空位和间隙原子的扩散均强于单一卤素化合物，且混合化合物中Br⁻和I⁻离子的迁移率存在差异。异质结中的跨界面扩散受界面结构调控：Br富集界面尤其会阻碍空位迁移，而I富集界面则具有通透性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2601.11503v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Migration of halide defects guides ion transport in metal halide perovskites and controls the kinetics of halide mixing and phase separation. We study the diffusion of halide vacancies and interstitials in ȩCsPb(IₓBr₁₋ₓ)₃ and ȩCsPbI₃/ȩCsPbBr₃ heterojunctions by molecular dynamics simulations using neural network potentials trained on density functional theory calculations. We observe enhanced diffusion of both vacancies and interstitials in the mixed halide compounds compared to the single halide ones, as well as a difference in mobility between Br and I ions in the mixed compound. Diffusion across heterojunctions is governed by the interface structure, where a Br-rich interface blocks migration of vacancies in particular, but an I-rich interface is permeable.

Time-dependent Neural Galerkin Method for Quantum Dynamics#

📚 arXiv👤 Alessandro Sinibaldi, Douglas Hendry, Filippo Vicentini, Giuseppe Carleo📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该工作突破传统逐步积分范式，以全局时间变分原理重构量子动力学计算，通过Galerkin型神经拟设实现长时间尺度的高效模拟，成功揭示二维横场伊辛模型的非遍历行为，为强关联系统远离平衡态动力学提供了新的可
arXiv:2412.11778v4 公告类型: 替换交叉引用 摘要: 我们提出一种基于全局时间变分原理的量子动力学经典计算方法。与传统的时间步进方法不同，本方案通过在有限时间窗口内最小化强制满足薛定谔方程的损失函数来计算完整的状态轨迹。变分态采用基于Galerkin启发的拟设进行参数化，该拟设由时间无关神经量子态的时间依赖线性组合构成。这一结构特别适用于探索长时间动力学，并能够通过全局损失函数对精确演化的误差进行界定。我们通过模拟典…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2412.11778v4 公告类型: 替换交叉引用 摘要: 我们提出一种基于全局时间变分原理的量子动力学经典计算方法。与传统的时间步进方法不同，本方案通过在有限时间窗口内最小化强制满足薛定谔方程的损失函数来计算完整的状态轨迹。变分态采用基于Galerkin启发的拟设进行参数化，该拟设由时间无关神经量子态的时间依赖线性组合构成。这一结构特别适用于探索长时间动力学，并能够通过全局损失函数对精确演化的误差进行界定。我们通过模拟典型横场伊辛模型在一维和二维中的全局量子淬火来展示该方法，揭示了二维情况下遍历性破缺和热化缺失的特征。总体而言，我们的方法与最先进的含时变分方法相比具有竞争力，同时解锁了强相互作用量子系统此前无法触及的动力学区域。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.11778v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce a classical computational method for quantum dynamics that relies on a global-in-time variational principle. Unlike conventional time-stepping approaches, our scheme computes the entire state trajectory over a finite time window by minimizing a loss function that enforces the Schrödinger's equation. The variational state is parametrized with a Galerkin-inspired ansatz based on a time-dependent linear combination of time-independent Neural Quantum States. This structure is particularly well-suited for exploring long-time dynamics and enables bounding the error with the exact evolution via the global loss function. We showcase the method by simulating global quantum quenches in the paradigmatic Transverse-Field Ising model in both 1D and 2D, uncovering signatures of ergodicity breaking and absence of thermalization in two dimensions. Overall, our method is competitive compared to state-of-the-art time-dependent variational approaches, while unlocking previously inaccessible dynamical regimes of strongly interacting quantum systems.

Optimal sensor placement for the reconstruction of ocean states using differentiable Gumbel-Softmax sampling operator#

📚 arXiv👤 Oscar Chapron, Ronan Fablet, Yann Stéphan📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究将Gumbel-Softmax可微采样引入海洋观测优化，突破了传统方法静态假设与扩展性瓶颈。核心创新在于联合优化概率采样掩码与重建参数，实现端到端梯度下降求解组合优化问题。其意义在于：以极低计算
arXiv:2604.22511v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 从稀疏观测中准确重建和预测海洋场对业务应用和科学研究均至关重要。由于海洋动力学的演变及实际部署约束，优化传感器布设以最大化重建技巧仍具挑战性。传统方法如经验正交函数、贪婪搜索或高斯过程，或假设观测网络静态，或在高分辨率及非平稳情形下扩展性不佳。本文提出一种基于Gumbel-Softmax采样算子的可微自适应传感器布设框架。给定预报或模拟集合，该方法在严格观测预算下联合优化概…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22511v1 公告类型: 新
摘要: 从稀疏观测中准确重建和预测海洋场对业务应用和科学研究均至关重要。由于海洋动力学的演变及实际部署约束，优化传感器布设以最大化重建技巧仍具挑战性。传统方法如经验正交函数、贪婪搜索或高斯过程，或假设观测网络静态，或在高分辨率及非平稳情形下扩展性不佳。本文提出一种基于Gumbel-Softmax采样算子的可微自适应传感器布设框架。给定预报或模拟集合，该方法在严格观测预算下联合优化概率采样掩码与重建映射（如最优插值相关长度）。数值实验针对墨西哥湾流区域的海面高度重建开展，通过观测系统模拟实验利用最先进的高分辨率海洋模拟进行。在传感器预算仅为0.1%（14°×14°区域上不足100个点观测）时，优化采样较均匀随机策略将重建均方根误差降低逾半（0.0908 m 对比 0.1750 m），解释方差提升约20%（93.1% 对比 74.4%）。当基于含显著空间偏移（达1°）的噪声集合训练时，该方法仍保持稳健，证明了其在预报不确定性下的实际适用性。总体而言，该框架为观测网络设计提供了一种可扩展的、预算敏感的方法。除提升技巧外，其产生可解释的采样模式，持续靶向涡旋和锋面等高能量区域，为地球物理系统中的自适应感知提供了一种可迁移的工具。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22511v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurately reconstructing and forecasting ocean fields from sparse observations is critical for both operational and scientific purposes. Optimizing sensor placement to maximize reconstruction skill remains challenging due to evolving ocean dynamics and practical deployment constraints. Traditional approaches, such as Empirical Orthogonal Functions, greedy search, or Gaussian processes, either assume static observation networks or scale poorly in high-resolution and non-stationary regimes. We introduce a differentiable adaptive sensor placement framework based on a Gumbel-Softmax sampling operator. Given an ensemble of forecasts or simulations, the method jointly optimizes a probabilistic sampling mask and the reconstruction mapping (e.g., Optimal Interpolation correlation lengths) under strict observation budgets. Numerical experiments are conducted for Sea Surface Height reconstruction in a Gulf Stream region through Observing-System Simulation Experiments using a state-of-the-art high-resolution ocean simulation. With a sensor budget of only 0.1% (fewer than 100 point-wise observations on a 14degx14deg domain) the optimized sampling reduces the reconstruction RMSE by more than half (0.0908 m versus 0.1750 m) and increases explained variance by about 20% (93.1% versus 74.4%) compared with a uniform random strategy. The method remains robust when trained on noisy ensembles with significant spatial displacement (up to 1deg), demonstrating practical applicability under forecast uncertainty. Overall, the framework provides a scalable, budget-aware approach to designing observation networks. Beyond improved skill, it yields interpretable sampling patterns that consistently target energetic regions such as eddies and fronts, offering a transferable tool for adaptive sensing in geophysical systems.

141

Hybrid weather prediction using spectral nudging toward machine-learning forecasts#

📚 arXiv👤 I. Polichtchouk, M. C. A. Clare, M. Chantry, E. Gascón, M. Maier-Gerber, B. Vanniere, S. Lang📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出尺度选择性谱逼近的混合预报框架，以机器学习预报约束物理模式的大尺度虚温与涡度场，在保持小尺度物理过程与极端天气表征的同时，显著提升热带与副热带预报技巧并减少预报失败，为物理-数据融合预报提供了
arXiv:2604.22522v1 发布类型: 新摘要: 本文研究了一种数值天气预报的混合方法，将无扰动的基于物理的ECMWF集成预报系统（IFS）通过谱逼近向机器学习天气预报模型的预报结果进行约束，该机器学习模型训练于模式层上进行预报。逼近仅应用于虚温和涡度的大尺度分量，旨在提高大尺度预报技巧的同时，保留底层基于物理的模型在小尺度的动力学和物理行为。与先前研究一致，谱逼近显著提升了自由运行IFS的大尺度预报技巧，热带地区增益高达1…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22522v1 发布类型: 新摘要: 本文研究了一种数值天气预报的混合方法，将无扰动的基于物理的ECMWF集成预报系统（IFS）通过谱逼近向机器学习天气预报模型的预报结果进行约束，该机器学习模型训练于模式层上进行预报。逼近仅应用于虚温和涡度的大尺度分量，旨在提高大尺度预报技巧的同时，保留底层基于物理的模型在小尺度的动力学和物理行为。与先前研究一致，谱逼近显著提升了自由运行IFS的大尺度预报技巧，热带地区增益高达1.5天，副热带地区达12-18小时，且预报失败频率降低。这些改进在保持预报变率的同时实现。极端近地面天气的表征得以维持或改善。热带气旋路径预报受益于改进的大尺度引导气流，而风暴强度与基于物理的模型相当，且比纯机器学习天气预报模型更具物理一致性。这些结果证实，尺度选择性谱逼近为融合机器学习与基于物理的预报系统提供了一条实用途径。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22522v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A hybrid approach to numerical weather prediction is investigated, in which the unperturbed physics-based ECMWF Integrated Forecasting System (IFS) is spectrally nudged toward forecasts from a machine-learned weather forecast model, trained to forecast on model levels. Nudging is applied only to the large scales of virtual temperature and vorticity, with the objective of improving large-scale forecast skill while preserving the dynamical and physical behaviour of the underlying physics-based model at smaller scales. Consistent with previous studies, spectral nudging substantially improves large-scale forecast skill relative to the free-running IFS, with gains of up to 1.5 days in the tropics and 12-18 hours in the extra-tropics, and a reduced frequency of forecast busts. These improvements are achieved while preserving forecast variability. The representation of extreme near-surface weather is maintained or improved. Tropical cyclone track forecasts benefit from improved large-scale steering flow, while storm intensity remains comparable to that of the physics-based model and more physically consistent than in pure machine-learned weather forecast models. These results confirm that scale-selective spectral nudging provides a practical pathway for combining machine-learning and physics-based forecasting systems.

142

A Deep Learning Approach to Describing the Plasma Sheath#

📚 arXiv👤 Ethan Webb, Yuzhi Li, Christopher McDevitt📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将物理信息神经网络（PINN）引入等离子体鞘层建模，突破性地实现了无数据依赖的偏微分方程约束求解，构建了宽参数范围内的高效替代模型，为等离子体边界物理的快速预测与多尺度耦合研究提供了新范
arXiv:2604.22566v1 公告类型：新摘要：尽管等离子体鞘层普遍存在，但其丰富的物理内涵阻碍了对这一关键区域的普适性描述。本研究利用物理信息神经网络（PINN）对等离子体鞘层的多级模型进行评估。与传统深度学习方法不同，PINN利用控制偏微分方程约束神经网络的预测，因此不需要任何实验或模拟数据进行训练。本工作中，我们利用PINN求解不同物理精度等离子体鞘层流体模型的参数化解。虽然PINN的离线训练时间通常长于传统求解器，但一…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22566v1 公告类型：新摘要：尽管等离子体鞘层普遍存在，但其丰富的物理内涵阻碍了对这一关键区域的普适性描述。本研究利用物理信息神经网络（PINN）对等离子体鞘层的多级模型进行评估。与传统深度学习方法不同，PINN利用控制偏微分方程约束神经网络的预测，因此不需要任何实验或模拟数据进行训练。本工作中，我们利用PINN求解不同物理精度等离子体鞘层流体模型的参数化解。虽然PINN的离线训练时间通常长于传统求解器，但一旦训练完成，PINN能够高效预测宽参数范围内的鞘层分布，从而成为等离子体鞘层的有效替代模型。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22566v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite their ubiquity, the rich physics present in a plasma sheath has inhibited the development of a generally applicable description of this critical region. The present study utilizes a physics-informed neural network (PINN) to evaluate a hierarchy of models of the plasma sheath. Unlike traditional deep learning methods, PINNs use the governing PDEs to constrain the predictions of a neural network, and thus do not require any experimental or simulation data to train. In this work, we utilize a PINN to identify the parametric solution to fluid models of different physics fidelity of the plasma sheath. While the offline training time of the PINN is often longer than a traditional solver, once trained, the PINN is able to efficiently predict the sheath profiles across a broad range of parameter regimes, thus yielding an effective surrogate of the plasma sheath.

143

LARA: Validation-Driven Agentic Supercomputer Workflows for Atomistic Modeling#

📚 arXiv👤 William Dawson, Louis Beal, Yoann Curé, Giuseppe Fisicaro, Dorian Rolland, Luigi Genovese📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：LARA-HPC提出"验证优先"范式，通过受控执行层、零成本空运行验证与多阶段智能体流水线，解决LLM驱动原子模拟在高性能计算中的可靠性瓶颈，实现DFT工作流的端到端自动化与迭代纠错，为AI辅助科学计
arXiv:2604.22571v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 大语言模型（LLM）与智能体系统近期在自动化科学工作流（包括原子尺度模拟）方面展现出潜力。然而，其在高性能计算（HPC）环境中的部署仍受限于缺乏确保正确性、可复现性及与计算资源安全交互的机制。生成的工作流存在不一致性、API误用或无效物理构型等问题，导致模拟失败或结果不可靠。本工作提出LARA-HPC，一种验证驱动的智能体框架，用于实现HPC系统上原子建模的可靠工作流生…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22571v1 发布类型: 新论文 摘要: 大语言模型（LLM）与智能体系统近期在自动化科学工作流（包括原子尺度模拟）方面展现出潜力。然而，其在高性能计算（HPC）环境中的部署仍受限于缺乏确保正确性、可复现性及与计算资源安全交互的机制。生成的工作流存在不一致性、API误用或无效物理构型等问题，导致模拟失败或结果不可靠。本工作提出LARA-HPC，一种验证驱动的智能体框架，用于实现HPC系统上原子建模的可靠工作流生成。该方法基于三个核心组件：（i）受控执行层，中介所有与HPC资源的交互；（ii）模拟原生验证，通过空运行能力实现执行级验证而不产生资源消耗；（iii）多阶段智能体流水线，结合检索增强生成与迭代精修。我们通过将LARA-HPC应用于密度泛函理论（DFT）模拟，展示了其在HPC上完成端到端原子模拟工作流的有效性。结果表明，验证驱动生成显著提升鲁棒性，并实现对语法错误与物理不一致性的迭代修正。更广泛而言，本工作倡导人工智能（AI）辅助科学计算从"生成优先"向"验证优先"范式转变。我们认为，计算物理学界的未来任务是开发基于结构化工具的领域专用智能体系统，以实现HPC赋能的协同研究生态系统。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22571v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) and agentic systems have recently demonstrated potential for automating scientific workflows, including atomistic simulations. However, their deployment in high-performance computing (HPC) environments remains limited by the lack of mechanisms ensuring correctness, reproducibility, and safe interaction with computational resources. Generated workflows suffer from inconsistencies, incorrect API usage, or invalid physical configurations - leading to failed or unreliable simulations. In this work, we introduce LARA-HPC, a validation-driven agentic framework to enable reliable workflow generation for atomistic modeling on HPC systems. Our approach is based on three key components: (i) a controlled execution layer that mediates all interactions with HPC resources; (ii) simulation-native validation through dry-run capabilities, enabling execution-level verification without incurring resource cost; and (iii) a multi-phase agentic pipeline combining retrieval-augmented generation and iterative refinement. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach performing an end-to-end atomistic simulation workflow on HPC by applying LARA-HPC to Density Functional Theory simulations. The results show that validation-driven generation significantly improves robustness and enables iterative correction of both syntactic and physical inconsistencies. More broadly, this work advocates for a shift from generation-first to validation-first paradigms in Artificial Intelligence (AI) assisted scientific computing. We argue that the future task of the computational physics community is to develop domain specific agentic systems based on structured tooling to realize an HPC enabled co-piloted research ecosystem.

144

DeepHartree: A Poisson-Coupled Neural Field for Scalable Density Functional Theory#

📚 arXiv👤 Jiankun Wu, Jinming Fan, Chao Qian, Shaodong Zhou📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：DeepHartree通过将E(3)等变神经网络与泊松方程自动微分耦合，以近线性O(N)数值推理替代传统O(N⁴)库仑积分，突破了DFT自洽场计算的标度瓶颈。其核心创新在于delta学习处理核奇异性、
arXiv:2604.22669v1 公告类型: 新摘要: 从头算计算在大体系中的根本瓶颈源于求解自洽场(SCF)方程的陡峭计算标度。尽管机器学习提供了潜在的加速手段，现有方法往往以牺牲物理严格性为代价，或依赖于依赖于基组、不可迁移的表示。本文介绍DeepHartree，一种泊松耦合神经场，用于加速原子轨道线性组合(LCAO)密度泛函理论(DFT)。通过自动微分将E(3)等变神经网络与泊松方程耦合，并通过delta学习缓解核奇异性，D…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22669v1 公告类型: 新摘要: 从头算计算在大体系中的根本瓶颈源于求解自洽场(SCF)方程的陡峭计算标度。尽管机器学习提供了潜在的加速手段，现有方法往往以牺牲物理严格性为代价，或依赖于依赖于基组、不可迁移的表示。本文介绍DeepHartree，一种泊松耦合神经场，用于加速原子轨道线性组合(LCAO)密度泛函理论(DFT)。通过自动微分将E(3)等变神经网络与泊松方程耦合，并通过delta学习缓解核奇异性，DeepHartree同时预测相互自洽的实空间电子密度和Hartree势。这通过以GPU加速的近线性O(N)数值推理替代O(N⁴)解析积分，解决了库仑瓶颈。仅在小分子上训练，DeepHartree通过两级可迁移性实现可扩展密度泛函理论：对于SCF收敛加速，它在不同基组、泛函和多达168个原子的体系上实现稳健的零样本迁移；对于预测其他密度相关物理量，它在小分子上保持零样本能力，同时通过高效少样本微调实现对更大体系的精确预测。我们的模型通过高保真初始密度矩阵将标准SCF迭代次数减少高达40.6%，其严格的长程渐近行为在格点计算前提供零成本的物理不确定度指标。通过将深度学习扎根于泊松耦合神经场，DeepHartree将苛刻任务——如近耦合簇动态红外模拟——加速数个数量级，为密度泛函理论建立了可扩展范式。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22669v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ab initio calculations are fundamentally bottlenecked for large systems by the steep computational scaling of solving self-consistent field (SCF) equations. While machine learning offers potential accelerations, existing methods often compromise physical rigor or rely on basis-dependent, non-transferable representations. Here, we introduce DeepHartree, a Poisson-coupled neural field that accelerates linear combination of atomic orbitals (LCAO) density functional theory (DFT). By coupling an E(3)-equivariant neural network with the Poisson equation through automatic differentiation and mitigating nuclear singularities via delta-learning, DeepHartree simultaneously predicts mutually consistent real-space electron densities and Hartree potentials. This resolves the Coulomb bottleneck by substituting O(N⁴⁾ analytical integrals with GPU-accelerated, near-linear O(N) numerical inference. Trained solely on small molecules, DeepHartree enables scalable density functional theory through a two-level transferability: for SCF convergence acceleration, it achieves robust zero-shot transferability across diverse basis sets, functionals, and systems up to 168 atoms; for predicting other density-related physical quantities, it retains zero-shot capability on small molecules while enabling precise predictions for larger systems via efficient few-shot fine-tuning.Our model accelerates standard SCF protocols by reducing iterations by up to 40.6% via high-fidelity initial density matrices, and its rigorous long-range asymptotics provide a zero-cost physical uncertainty metric prior to grid evaluation. By grounding deep learning in Poisson-coupled neural fields, DeepHartree accelerates demanding tasks -- such as near-coupled-cluster dynamic infrared simulations -- by orders of magnitude, establishing a scalable paradigm for density functional theory.

145

A Brain-Inspired Deep Separation Network for Single Channel Raman Spectra Unmixing#

📚 arXiv👤 Gaoruishu Long, Jinchao Liu, Bo Liu, Jie Liu, Xiaolin Hu📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：提出首个面向欠定系统的单通道拉曼光谱解混深度网络RSSNet，突破稀疏回归噪声敏感瓶颈，实现从数千种候选物质中仅凭单条含噪光谱精准分离纯组分，合成数据训练即可泛化至真实矿物混合物检测，为开放域非合作场
arXiv:2604.22324v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 实际应用中获得的光谱通常是多种物质光谱的含噪混合。将此类光谱解混为对应各物质的独立组分具有重要价值，且一直是光谱学中的长期挑战。现有解混方法主要针对超定混合模型设计，需要多个混合光谱作为输入。然而，光谱学中的开放域和/或非合作检测应用（如受控物质检测）需要单通道解决方案，仅通过分析单个含噪混合光谱即可从数千种候选物质中识别独立组分。据我们所知，稀疏回归是唯一能够应对此场景现…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22324v1 公告类型: 新 摘要: 实际应用中获得的光谱通常是多种物质光谱的含噪混合。将此类光谱解混为对应各物质的独立组分具有重要价值，且一直是光谱学中的长期挑战。现有解混方法主要针对超定混合模型设计，需要多个混合光谱作为输入。然而，光谱学中的开放域和/或非合作检测应用（如受控物质检测）需要单通道解决方案，仅通过分析单个含噪混合光谱即可从数千种候选物质中识别独立组分。据我们所知，稀疏回归是唯一能够应对此场景现有方法，但其噪声容忍度极低，实践中难以应用。为克服这些局限，我们提出一种受语音分离启发的光谱单通道解混神经方法。该方法旨在求解欠定系统，可从包含数千种组分（物质）的谱库中分解含噪混合光谱。方法核心为深度分离神经网络（RSSNet），以混合光谱为输入，输出纯组分光谱。我们构建了两个单通道光谱解混合成数据集，并在其上验证了RSSNet的可行性与优越性（相比竞争方法提升>4dB）。此外，我们证实仅经合成数据训练的RSSNet能够成功解混真实矿物粉末混合物的混合光谱，展现出强泛化能力。本方法代表了光谱解混的新范式，为混合物快速检测开辟了新可能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22324v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Raman spectra obtained in real world applications are often a noisy combination of several spectra of various substances in a tested sample. Unmixing such spectra into individual components corresponding to each of the substances is of great value and has been a longstanding challenge in Raman spectroscopy. Existing unmixing methods are predominantly designed to invert an overdetermined mixed model and therefore require multiple mixed spectra as input. However, open domain and/or non-cooperative detection applications in Raman spectroscopy such as controlled substance detection, call for single-channel solutions which can identify individual components from thousands of candidates by analyzing only a single noisy mixed spectrum. To our knowledge, sparse regression is the only existing solution which can cope with this scenario, yet it has very low tolerance to noises and can hardly be applicable in practice. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel neural approach for single-channel Raman spectrum unmixing inspired by speech separation. It aims at solving underdetermined systems and can decompose a noisy mixed spectrum from a library of thousands of components (substances). The core of our method is a deep separation neural network (RSSNet) which takes a mixed spectrum as input and outputs spectra of pure components. We created two synthetic datasets of single-channel Raman spectra unmixing and demonstrated feasibility and superiority of RSSNet on these datasets (outperform competing methods by >4dB). Furthermore, we verified that RSSNet, trained solely on synthetic data, can successfully unmix real-world mixed spectra of mixtures of mineral powders, exhibiting strong generalization. Our approach represents a new paradigm for Raman unmixing and enables new possibilities for fast detection of Raman mixtures.

146

Iterative Model-Learning Scheme via Gaussian Processes for Nonlinear Model Predictive Control of (Semi-)Batch Processes#

📚 arXiv👤 Tai Xuan Tan, Alexander Mitsos, Eike Cramer📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：针对(半)间歇过程动态建模困难、制约非线性模型预测控制(NMPC)应用的问题，提出基于高斯过程的迭代模型学习NMPC方案(GP-MLMPC)。核心创新在于：仅利用单条初始轨迹数据初始化，通过迭代运行嵌
arXiv:2604.22672v1 公告类型: 新论文 摘要: 间歇过程本质上是瞬态的且通常具有非线性特征，这推动了非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）的应用。然而，动态模型的构建成本高昂且难以获取，制约了NMPC的采用。为此，我们提出将高斯过程（GP）用于间歇过程的模型学习NMPC方案（GP-MLMPC）。我们利用单条初始轨迹的数据（例如来自PI控制器）初始化GP-MLMPC。通过迭代运行嵌入GP的NMPC来执行批次，并利用每次迭代的新…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.22672v1 公告类型: 新论文 摘要: 间歇过程本质上是瞬态的且通常具有非线性特征，这推动了非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）的应用。然而，动态模型的构建成本高昂且难以获取，制约了NMPC的采用。为此，我们提出将高斯过程（GP）用于间歇过程的模型学习NMPC方案（GP-MLMPC）。我们利用单条初始轨迹的数据（例如来自PI控制器）初始化GP-MLMPC。通过迭代运行嵌入GP的NMPC来执行批次，并利用每次迭代的新观测数据更新GP，从而实现批次级别的性能提升。利用GP的不确定性量化，我们构建机会约束以确保操作安全性达到所需的置信水平。我们通过半间歇聚合反应器的仿真验证所提方法，针对跟踪目标和经济目标分别进行两小时的运行，反应器温度被约束在设定点±2°C范围内。仅经过四次批次迭代，GP-MLMPC方案的跟踪误差相比初始轨迹降低了83%。此外，在经济目标下，到第8次迭代时，GP-MLMPC的终产物质量相比初始轨迹提高了17倍。两种情况下，GP-MLMPC的性能均与全模型NMPC相当，表明该方案能够学习最优控制器。通过在最优轨迹附近采集样本，GP-MLMPC在各迭代间保持样本效率并实现快速收敛。因此，所提出的GP-MLMPC方案为无需机理知识的非线性间歇过程控制提供了一种有前景的数据高效方法。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.22672v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Batch processes are inherently transient and typically nonlinear, motivating nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC). However, adopting NMPC is hindered by the cost and unavailability of dynamic models. Thus, we propose to use Gaussian Processes (GP) in a model-learning NMPC scheme (GP-MLMPC) for batch processes. We initialize the GP-MLMPC using data from a single initial trajectory, e.g., from a PI controller. We iteratively apply the NMPC embedded with GPs to run batches and update the GP with new observations from each iteration, thereby achieving batch-wise improvements. Using uncertainty quantification from the GPs, we formulate chance constraints to enforce safe operation to the required confidence levels. We demonstrate our approach in silico on a semi-batch polymerization reactor for tracking and economic objectives over durations of two hours, and the reactor temperature is constrained in a range of ±2ⁱ̧rc C around its setpoint. After only four batch iterations, tracking error from the GP-MLMPC scheme converged to a reduction of 83%, compared to the initial trajectory. Furthermore, under an economic objective, the GP-MLMPC resulted in a 17-fold increase in final product mass by iteration 8, compared to the initial trajectory. In both cases, the resulting GP-MLMPC performance is on par with the full-model NMPC, which shows that the optimal controller can be learned by the approach. By collecting samples around the optimal trajectory, the GP-MLMPC remains sample-efficient across iterations and achieves quick convergence. Thus, the proposed GP-MLMPC scheme presents a promising data-efficient approach for the control of nonlinear batch processes without mechanistic knowledge.

147

Tensor Network Estimation of Distribution Algorithms#

📚 arXiv👤 John Gardiner, Javier Lopez-Piqueres📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究从分布估计算法视角重新审视张量网络进化优化方法，揭示生成模型精度与优化性能的非单调关系这一反直觉现象，突破"更好模型即更好优化"的固有认知；提出显式变异算子作为关键改进策略，为强大生成模型与优化
arXiv:2412.19780v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：张量网络最初是多体量子物理领域的一种工具，如今在计算科学中有着广泛的用途，从数值方法到机器学习。将张量网络整合到进化优化算法中的方法近期已见于文献。本质上，这些方法可以理解为用基于张量网络的生成模型替代遗传算法中的传统交叉操作。我们从分布估计算法（EDAs）的视角对这些方法进行研究。我们发现，这些方法的优化性能与生成模型的能力之间并非简单的关联关系。更优的生成模型（即能更好地…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2412.19780v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：张量网络最初是多体量子物理领域的一种工具，如今在计算科学中有着广泛的用途，从数值方法到机器学习。将张量网络整合到进化优化算法中的方法近期已见于文献。本质上，这些方法可以理解为用基于张量网络的生成模型替代遗传算法中的传统交叉操作。我们从分布估计算法（EDAs）的视角对这些方法进行研究。我们发现，这些方法的优化性能与生成模型的能力之间并非简单的关联关系。更优的生成模型（即能更好地建模其训练数据所来自的分布）并不必然导致其所构成的优化算法性能更佳。这引出了一个问题：如何最佳地将强大的生成模型融入优化流程中。鉴于此，我们发现对生成模型的输出添加显式变异算子通常能够提升优化性能。

English Abstract

arXiv:2412.19780v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Tensor networks are a tool first employed in the context of many-body quantum physics that now have a wide range of uses across the computational sciences, from numerical methods to machine learning. Methods integrating tensor networks into evolutionary optimization algorithms have appeared in the recent literature. In essence, these methods can be understood as replacing the traditional crossover operation of a genetic algorithm with a tensor network-based generative model. We investigate these methods from the point of view that they are Estimation of Distribution Algorithms (EDAs). We find that optimization performance of these methods is not related to the power of the generative model in a straightforward way. Generative models that are better (in the sense that they better model the distribution from which their training data is drawn) do not necessarily result in better performance of the optimization algorithm they form a part of. This raises the question of how best to incorporate powerful generative models into optimization routines. In light of this we find that adding an explicit mutation operator to the output of the generative model often improves optimization performance.

148

Fast, close, non-singular and property-preserving approximations of entropic measures#

📚 arXiv👤 Illia Horenko, Davide Bassetti, Lukáš Pospíšil📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：本文提出快速熵近似（FEA）方法，以非奇异有理函数逼近香农熵与对称化KL散度，在保持核心数学性质的同时将误差降低一个数量级，计算速度提升2–37倍。该突破显著加速了机器学习特征选择与提取任务，为大规模
arXiv:2505.14234v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：熵度量如香农熵（SE）、其量子力学对应物冯·诺依曼熵以及库尔贝克-莱布勒散度（KL）是物理学、信息论、机器学习（ML）和量子计算中诸多工具的关键组成部分。除了这些领域所需的大量SE和KL计算外，其在零点附近梯度的奇异性是导致依赖这些概念的计算工具成本高昂、鲁棒性频繁低下以及收敛缓慢的核心数学原因之一。本文提出快速熵近似（FEA）——SE和对称化KL的非奇异有理近似，该方法保留…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2505.14234v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：熵度量如香农熵（SE）、其量子力学对应物冯·诺依曼熵以及库尔贝克-莱布勒散度（KL）是物理学、信息论、机器学习（ML）和量子计算中诸多工具的关键组成部分。除了这些领域所需的大量SE和KL计算外，其在零点附近梯度的奇异性是导致依赖这些概念的计算工具成本高昂、鲁棒性频繁低下以及收敛缓慢的核心数学原因之一。本文提出快速熵近似（FEA）——SE和对称化KL的非奇异有理近似，该方法保留了其主要数学性质，并将平均绝对误差控制在约10⁻³量级（比现有最优计算近似优10-20倍）。研究表明，FEA可将SE计算速度提升约2倍，将对称化KL计算速度提升高达37倍：FEA仅需5至7次基本运算操作，而基于查表、位移或级数近似的对数方案的SE和KL评估则需要数十次基本运算。在一组机器学习特征选择问题的通用基准测试中，我们证明更少的基本运算次数、低近似误差、主要数学性质的保持以及非奇异梯度的综合效应，能够显著加速训练并获得质量更优的模型。我们进一步证明，FEA实现的机器学习特征提取速度比极为流行的LASSO特征提取快三个数量级，且质量更优。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.14234v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Entropic measures like Shannon entropy (SE), its quantum mechanical analogue von Neumann entropy, and Kullback-Leibler divergence (KL) are key components in many tools used in physics, information theory, machine learning (ML) and quantum computing. Besides of the significant amounts of SE and KL computations required in these fields, the singularity of their gradients near zero is one of the central mathematical reason inducing the high cost, frequently low robustness and slow convergence of computational tools that rely on these concepts. Here we propose the Fast Entropic Approximations (FEA) - non-singular rational approximations of SE and symmetrized KL, that preserve their main mathematical properties and achieve a mean absolute errors of around 10⁻³ (10-20 times better than comparable state-of-the-art computational approximations). We show that FEA allows up to around 2 times faster computation of SE and up to 37 times faster computation of symmetrized KL: it requires only 5 to 7 elementary computational operations, as compared to the tens of elementary operations behind SE and KL evaluations based on approximate logarithm schemes with table look-ups, bitshifts, or series approximations. On a set of common benchmarks for the feature selection problem in machine learning, we show that the combined effect of fewer elementary operations, low approximation error, preservation of main mathematical properties, and non-singular gradients allows much faster training of significantly-better models. We demonstrate that FEA enables ML feature extraction that is three orders of magnitude faster, and better in quality then the very popular LASSO feature extraction.

149

The Shape of Adversarial Influence: Characterizing LLM Latent Spaces with Persistent Homology#

📚 arXiv👤 Aideen Fay, Inés García-Redondo, Qiquan Wang, Haim Dubossarsky, Anthea Monod📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将代数拓扑中的持续同调引入LLM可解释性领域，突破传统线性方法的局限，首次从几何拓扑视角揭示对抗攻击导致潜在空间"拓扑压缩"的普适机制。该框架为检测和防御间接提示注入、后门攻击等安全威胁
arXiv:2505.20435v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：现有的大语言模型（LLM）可解释性方法主要捕获线性方向或孤立特征，这忽略了模型表征的高维、关联性和非线性几何特性。我们应用持续同调（PH）来刻画对抗性输入如何重塑LLM内部表征空间的几何与拓扑结构。这一现象在跨操作模式不同的攻击类型中考虑时，尤其缺乏深入理解。我们分析了六种模型（38亿至700亿参数）在两种不同攻击下的表现——间接提示注入和后门微调——并发现一致的拓扑特征贯穿…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2505.20435v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：现有的大语言模型（LLM）可解释性方法主要捕获线性方向或孤立特征，这忽略了模型表征的高维、关联性和非线性几何特性。我们应用持续同调（PH）来刻画对抗性输入如何重塑LLM内部表征空间的几何与拓扑结构。这一现象在跨操作模式不同的攻击类型中考虑时，尤其缺乏深入理解。我们分析了六种模型（38亿至700亿参数）在两种不同攻击下的表现——间接提示注入和后门微调——并发现一致的拓扑特征贯穿始终。对抗性输入引发拓扑压缩，即潜在空间在结构上变得更简单，将潜在空间从多样化、紧凑的小尺度特征坍缩为更少、更主导的大尺度特征。该特征与架构无关，在网络早期层即出现，并在各层之间具有高度区分性。通过量化激活点云的形状和神经元层面的信息流，我们的框架揭示了表征变化的几何不变量，对现有线性可解释性方法形成补充。

English Abstract

arXiv:2505.20435v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Existing interpretability methods for Large Language Models (LLMs) predominantly capture linear directions or isolated features. This overlooks the high-dimensional, relational, and nonlinear geometry of model representations. We apply persistent homology (PH) to characterize how adversarial inputs reshape the geometry and topology of internal representation spaces of LLMs. This phenomenon, especially when considered across operationally different attack modes, remains poorly understood. We analyze six models (3.8B to 70B parameters) under two distinct attacks, indirect prompt injection and backdoor fine--tuning, and show that a consistent topological signature persists throughout. Adversarial inputs induce topological compression, where the latent space becomes structurally simpler, collapsing the latent space from varied, compact, small-scale features into fewer, dominant, large-scale ones. This signature is architecture-agnostic, emerges early in the network, and is highly discriminative across layers. By quantifying the shape of activation point clouds and neuron-level information flow, our framework reveals geometric invariants of representational change that complement existing linear interpretability methods.

150

Leveraging Teleconnections with Physics-Informed Graph Attention Networks for Long-Range Extreme Rainfall Forecasting in Thailand#

📚 arXiv👤 Kiattikun Chobtham, Kanoksri Sarinnapakorn, Kritanai Torsri, Prattana Deeprasertkul, Jirawan Kamma📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究创新性地将物理约束图神经网络与极值分析融合，通过遥相关机制和地形降水物理公式构建可解释的图注意力-LSTM模型，并首创空间季节感知广义帕累托分布方法处理极端降雨。为泰国长期水资源管理提供了兼顾精
arXiv:2510.12328v5 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确的降雨预报，特别是对极端事件的预报，仍是气候学和地球系统科学中的一项重大挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的物理约束图神经网络（GNN）与极值分析技术相结合的方法，以改进泰国测站尺度的降雨预测。该模型利用测站图结构表征来捕捉复杂的时空模式，并通过遥相关机制提供可解释性。我们对可能影响区域降雨的相关气候指数进行了预处理。所提出的图注意力网络结合长短期记忆模型（Attention-LS…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2510.12328v5 公告类型：替换 摘要：准确的降雨预报，特别是对极端事件的预报，仍是气候学和地球系统科学中的一项重大挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的物理约束图神经网络（GNN）与极值分析技术相结合的方法，以改进泰国测站尺度的降雨预测。该模型利用测站图结构表征来捕捉复杂的时空模式，并通过遥相关机制提供可解释性。我们对可能影响区域降雨的相关气候指数进行了预处理。所提出的图注意力网络结合长短期记忆模型（Attention-LSTM）采用注意力机制，其初始边特征源自简单的地形降水物理公式。嵌入向量随后由LSTM层处理。为应对极端事件，我们采用新颖的空间季节感知广义帕累托分布（GPD）方法进行超阈值峰值（POT）映射，克服了传统机器学习模型的局限性。实验表明，该方法在大多数区域（包括极端事件频发地区）均优于成熟基线模型，并与最先进方法保持强劲竞争力。与业务预报系统SEAS5相比，我们的实际应用改进了极端事件预测，并提供了一种实用增强方案，可生成高分辨率地图，以支持长期水资源管理决策。

English Abstract

arXiv:2510.12328v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurate rainfall forecasting, particularly for extreme events, remains a significant challenge in climatology and the Earth system. This paper presents novel physics-informed Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) combined with extreme-value analysis techniques to improve gauge-station rainfall predictions across Thailand. The model leverages a graph-structured representation of gauge stations to capture complex spatiotemporal patterns, and it offers explainability through teleconnections. We preprocess relevant climate indices that potentially influence regional rainfall. The proposed Graph Attention Network with Long Short-Term Memory (Attention-LSTM) applies the attention mechanism using initial edge features derived from simple orographic-precipitation physics formulation. The embeddings are subsequently processed by LSTM layers. To address extremes, we perform Peak-Over-Threshold (POT) mapping using the novel Spatial Season-aware Generalized Pareto Distribution (GPD) method, which overcomes limitations of traditional machine-learning models. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms well-established baselines across most regions, including areas prone to extremes, and remains strongly competitive with the state of the art. Compared with the operational forecasting system SEAS5, our real-world application improves extreme-event prediction and offers a practical enhancement to produce high-resolution maps that support decision-making in long-term water management.

151

Beyond Variational Bias: Resolving Intertwined Orders in the Hubbard Model#

📚 arXiv👤 Luciano Loris Viteritti, Riccardo Rende, Christopher Roth, Anirvan Sengupta, Giuseppe Carleo, Antoine Georges📅 2026-04-27🤖 AI/机器学习
AI 解读：该研究揭示变分偏置是导致Hubbard模型基态争议的关键根源，通过三种无预训练Transformer波函数证明：仅凭能量无法判定竞争相基态，必须追踪关联函数随波函数精度提升的演化行为，最终确立超导-条
arXiv:2604.21978v1 发布类型：新论文 摘要：有限掺杂下的二维Hubbard模型存在相互竞争或交织的序，导致不同计算方法对其基态得出相互矛盾的结论。我们发现，此类差异的一个关键来源是变分拟设中编码的偏置。我们考虑了三种不同的基于Transformer回流费米子波函数，分别基于Slater行列式、其粒子-空穴对应形式以及Pfaffian形式，且均未进行任何平均场预训练。我们发现，尽管三者都达到了近乎简并的、最先进的变分能…
阅读原文 ↗
页内定位所在专题
中文摘要

arXiv:2604.21978v1 发布类型：新论文 摘要：有限掺杂下的二维Hubbard模型存在相互竞争或交织的序，导致不同计算方法对其基态得出相互矛盾的结论。我们发现，此类差异的一个关键来源是变分拟设中编码的偏置。我们考虑了三种不同的基于Transformer回流费米子波函数，分别基于Slater行列式、其粒子-空穴对应形式以及Pfaffian形式，且均未进行任何平均场预训练。我们发现，尽管三者都达到了近乎简并的、最先进的变分能量，但每种拟设都收敛到自旋、电荷和配对关联定性不同的态。然而，通过对称性恢复和方差降低来提高精度后，这三种拟设都收敛到相同的物理图像：超导与条纹序共存。这些结果表明，在存在竞争相的情况下，仅凭变分能量不足以确定基态，并强调在得出物理结论之前，追踪关联函数如何随波函数的系统改进而演化的重要性。

English Abstract

arXiv:2604.21978v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The two-dimensional Hubbard model at finite doping hosts competing or intertwined orders, resulting in conflicting conclusions from different computational approaches regarding its ground state. We show that a key source of such discrepancies is the bias encoded in the variational ansatz. We consider three different Transformer backflow fermionic wave functions based on a Slater determinant, its particle-hole counterpart, and a Pfaffian, initialized without any mean-field pretraining. We show that, despite achieving nearly degenerate, state-of-the-art variational energies, each ansatz converges to a state with qualitatively different spin, charge, and pairing correlations. Upon improving accuracy via symmetry restoration and variance reduction, however, all three converge to the same physical picture: coexisting superconducting and stripe orders. These results demonstrate that variational energy alone is insufficient to identify the ground state in the presence of competing phases, and highlight the importance of tracking how correlation functions evolve as the wave function is systematically improved before drawing physical conclusions.

阅读建议
  • 先读本周总览，再看交叉研究，最后按磁性/铁电与 AI 分区深挖。
  • 期刊分布适合快速判断本周成果主要来自顶刊还是预印本平台。
  • 若需要长期追踪某条研究线，可回到归档页连续浏览多周内容。
